source: Consumer groups say Dominion Virginia Power , the state 's No.1 utility , spearheaded the legislation and is unfairly benefiting from it . It can keep 40% of excess profits and earn an especially high rate of return for building nuclear plants , renewable power or " clean coal " generators . And Dominion can still sell power into the region 's competitive wholesale markets .
domestication: 消费者团体认为，州内最大公用事业公司多米尼恩能源公司是这项立法的幕后推手，并且从中不当地获益。根据规定，这家公司可以保留超额利润的40%，并且可以因建造核电站、可再生能源发电厂或者“清洁煤炭”发电机而获得特别高的回报率。此外，多米尼恩能源公司仍然可以将电力卖给区域内的竞争性批发市场。这种做法让人感觉这家公司占了便宜，一方面享受着特殊待遇，一方面还能自由地在市场上交易电力。

source: The explanation that seems to me to make the most sense holds that readers have a hunger for more substance than much contemporary mainstream fiction provides . Minimalist novels , academic novels , novels that are n't about anything tend to garner M.F.A. degrees and National Endowment for the Arts grants without winning over the reading public . I read recently of a woman who has been secretly getting her reading matter from the Young Adult section because the books are about something . Much of crime fiction , too , is about something . There 's a crime , and there 's an attempt to do something about it . There are characters , and some of them live and some of them die , and the whole thing works out in the end . Or it does n't , and that 's how it works out . Either way there 's a story , and you want to know what happens next .
domestication: 在我看来，有一个解释是最有道理的，那就是读者渴望更有内涵的东西，而当代主流小说并不能满足他们的需求。那些极简主义的小说、学术小说、毫无内容的小说可能会获得创意写作硕士学位和国家艺术基金会的补助，但它们并不能赢得广大读者的青睐。我最近读到一个女人喜欢从青少年读物区借书，因为那些书有真正的故事。很多侦探小说也是如此，它们讲述的是真实的故事。有犯罪，有侦破，有人物，有人活下来有人死去，故事最后会有一个结局。不管结局是什么，读者都想知道接下来会发生什么。这就是为什么读者更喜欢侦探小说的原因吧。
foreignization: 我认为最有道理的解释是，读者渴望比当代主流小说提供的更多的内容。极简主义小说、学术小说和没有什么主题的小说往往能获得M.F.A.学位和国家艺术基金会的补助金，但并不能赢得广大读者的青睐。我最近读到一个女人一直偷偷地从青少年区借书，因为这些书是关于某些东西的。很多犯罪小说也是关于某些东西的。有犯罪，有人试图对此做些什么。有角色，其中一些活下来，一些死了，整个故事最终会有结局。或者没有结局，这就是它的结局。不管怎样，都有一个故事，你想知道接下来会发生什么。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The explanation that seems to me to make the most sense holds that readers have a hunger for more substance than much contemporary mainstream fiction provides . Minimalist novels , academic novels , novels that are n't about anything tend to garner M.F.A. degrees and National Endowment for the Arts grants without winning over the reading public . I read recently of a woman who has been secretly getting her reading matter from the Young Adult section because the books are about something . Much of crime fiction , too , is about something . There 's a crime , and there 's an attempt to do something about it . There are characters , and some of them live and some of them die , and the whole thing works out in the end . Or it does n't , and that 's how it works out . Either way there 's a story , and you want to know what happens next .

在我看来，有一个解释是最有道理的，那就是读者渴望更有内涵的东西，而当代主流小说并不能满足他们的需求。那些极简主义的小说、学术小说、毫无内容的小说可能会获得创意写作硕士学位和国家艺术基金会的补助，但它们并不能赢得广大读者的青睐。我最近读到一个女人喜欢从青少年读物区借书，因为那些书有真正的故事。很多侦探小说也是如此，它们讲述的是真实的故事。有犯罪，有侦破，有人物，有人活下来有人死去，故事最后会有一个结局。不管结局是什么，读者都想知道接下来会发生什么。这就是为什么读者更喜欢侦探小说的原因吧。

source: Then I showed Vi how to click on flags , populations , alliances . I took her right up to now , 2007 , Montenegro out on its own again , Kosovo possibly soon . " So this is what you do , Chris , " said Vi still puzzling , " all the random stuff you must know ! " Of course she knows random stuff too , but she does n't know it 's random yet . To someone of my age it 's all an unsettling patchwork . Patterns I once perceived have gone blurry . There are too many patches , too many stitches . It will only get worse .
domestication: 然后我给Vi演示了怎么点击旗帜、人口、联盟。我一路给她讲到了现在，2007年，黑山又独立了，科索沃也可能很快跟着独立。“所以你就是干这个的，克里斯，”Vi还在疑惑，“你知道这么多乱七八糟的东西！”当然，她也知道很多乱七八糟的东西，但她还没意识到这些是乱七八糟的。对我来说，这一切就像一块让人不安的拼布。以前觉得有规律的东西，现在都模糊不清了。补丁太多，缝线也太多了。情况只会越来越糟。
foreignization: 然后我向Vi展示了如何点击旗帜、人口、联盟。我带她一直到了现在，2007年，黑山再次独立，科索沃可能很快也会独立。“所以这就是你做的事，Chris，”Vi仍然困惑地说，“你必须知道的所有随机信息！”当然，她也知道一些随机的信息，但她还不知道这些信息是随机的。对于我这个年纪的人来说，这一切都是一片令人不安的拼凑。我曾经感知到的模式已经变得模糊。有太多的拼块，太多的缝线。情况只会变得更糟。

source: Glen Murakami of Teen Titans fame is ( in ) famous for not caring about the finer points that get the Fandom up in arms . The Shrug of God is the official answer to anything related to whether or not it 's in continuity with the other DCAU cartoons , anything to do with the characters ' origins or out-of-costume lives ( most famously , which Robin it is ) , and pretty much anything not detailed onscreen . General fan consensus is that Teen Titans is n't part of the DCAU and Robin is Dick Grayson , but The Powers That Be have never answered yes or no , not considering these things to be important .
domestication: 因为《少年泰坦》而出名的格伦·穆拉卡米，以不在乎粉丝们热议的细节而闻名。对于是否与DC动画宇宙中的其他卡通保持连贯，角色的起源或日常生活（最著名的例子就是哪一位罗宾），以及几乎所有屏幕上没有详细展示的内容，官方的答案都是“无所谓的态度”。粉丝们普遍认为，《少年泰坦》不属于DC动画宇宙，罗宾是迪克·格雷森，但官方从未明确回答过这些问题，认为这些都不重要。
foreignization: 因《少年泰坦》而著名的格伦·村上以其对那些让粉丝群体激动不已的细节毫不在意而闻名。对于任何与其它DCAU动画是否连续、角色的起源或非装扮生活（最著名的是，是哪个罗宾）相关的问题，以及几乎所有未在屏幕上详细描述的内容，官方答案都是“上帝的耸肩”。普遍的粉丝共识是，《少年泰坦》不属于DCAU，罗宾是迪克·格雷森，但高层从未给出肯定或否定的回答，他们认为这些事情并不重要。

General fan consensus is that Teen Titans is n't part of the DCAU and Robin is Dick Grayson , but The Powers That Be have never answered yes or no , not considering these things to be important .

source: The messenger rode back at an easy trot, stopping pretty often at ale-houses by the way to drink, but evincing a tendency to keep his own counsel, and to keep his hat cocked over his eyes. He had eyes that assorted very well with that decoration, being of a surface black, with no depth in the colour or form, and much too near together—as if they were afraid of being found out in something, singly, if they kept too far apart. They had a sinister expression, under an old cocked-hat like a three-cornered spittoon, and over a great muffler for the chin and throat, which descended nearly to the wearer’s knees. When he stopped for drink, he moved this muffler with his left hand, only while he poured his liquor in with his right; as soon as that was done, he muffled again.
domestication: 使者策马缓缓而行，途中频繁停靠在路边的客栈饮酒，但他似乎更愿意独自保守秘密，并且总是把帽子歪戴在眼上。他的眼睛与这种装饰非常相配，是一种没有深度和层次的黑色，而且两眼离得很近，仿佛它们害怕被发现了什么，于是紧紧地挨在一起。他那顶老旧的三角帽像一个带有三个嘴巴的吐痰盂，他脖子和下巴上裹着一条大大的围巾，长度几乎垂到了膝盖。当他停下来喝酒时，他用左手稍微拨开围巾，只是在右手倒酒的时候才这么做；酒倒好后，他又把围巾裹了回去。他的整个样子有一种不祥的气息，令人感到毛骨悚然。
foreignization: 那个使者以轻松的慢跑速度回来了，一路上经常在客栈停下来喝酒，但他表现出一种倾向，即保留自己的想法，并且把他的帽子斜戴在眼睛上。他有一双眼睛与这顶帽子搭配得很好，表面是黑色，在颜色或形状上没有任何深度，而且眼睛离得太近——仿佛它们害怕如果相距太远，就会被发现有问题。它们在一顶老式的三角帽下面，呈现出一种险恶的表情，这顶帽子像一个三角形的吐痰盂，还有一条大围巾裹住了他的下巴和脖子，几乎垂到了骑手的膝盖。当他停下来喝酒时，他用左手移动这条围巾，只有在他用右手倒酒的时候才这么做；只要喝完，他又把自己裹起来。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The messenger rode back at an easy trot, stopping pretty often at ale-houses by the way to drink, but evincing a tendency to keep his own counsel, and to keep his hat cocked over his eyes. He had eyes that assorted very well with that decoration, being of a surface black, with no depth in the colour or form, and much too near together—as if they were afraid of being found out in something, singly, if they kept too far apart. They had a sinister expression, under an old cocked-hat like a three-cornered spittoon, and over a great muffler for the chin and throat, which descended nearly to the wearer’s knees. When he stopped for drink, he moved this muffler with his left hand, only while he poured his liquor in with his right; as soon as that was done, he muffled again.

使者策马缓缓而行，途中频繁停靠在路边的客栈饮酒，但他似乎更愿意独自保守秘密，并且总是把帽子歪戴在眼上。他的眼睛与这种装饰非常相配，是一种没有深度和层次的黑色，而且两眼离得很近，仿佛它们害怕被发现了什么，于是紧紧地挨在一起。他那顶老旧的三角帽像一个带有三个嘴巴的吐痰盂，他脖子和下巴上裹着一条大大的围巾，长度几乎垂到了膝盖。当他停下来喝酒时，他用左手稍微拨开围巾，只是在右手倒酒的时候才这么做；酒倒好后，他又把围巾裹了回去。他的整个样子有一种不祥的气息，令人感到毛骨悚然。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The messenger rode back at an easy trot, stopping pretty often at ale-houses by the way to drink, but evincing a tendency to keep his own counsel, and to keep his hat cocked over his eyes. He had eyes that assorted very well with that decoration, being of a surface black, with no depth in the colour or form, and much too near together—as if they were afraid of being found out in something, singly, if they kept too far apart. They had a sinister expression, under an old cocked-hat like a three-cornered spittoon, and over a great muffler for the chin and throat, which descended nearly to the wearer’s knees. When he stopped for drink, he moved this muffler with his left hand, only while he poured his liquor in with his right; as soon as that was done, he muffled again.

那个使者以轻松的慢跑速度回来了，一路上经常在客栈停下来喝酒，但他表现出一种倾向，即保留自己的想法，并且把他的帽子斜戴在眼睛上。他有一双眼睛与这顶帽子搭配得很好，表面是黑色，在颜色或形状上没有任何深度，而且眼睛离得太近——仿佛它们害怕如果相距太远，就会被发现有问题。它们在一顶老式的三角帽下面，呈现出一种险恶的表情，这顶帽子像一个三角形的吐痰盂，还有一条大围巾裹住了他的下巴和脖子，几乎垂到了骑手的膝盖。当他停下来喝酒时，他用左手移动这条围巾，只有在他用右手倒酒的时候才这么做；只要喝完，他又把自己裹起来。

source: That was a good thing . During the " Cultural Revolution " of 1966-76 , rampaging youths called Red Guards stormed across the countryside seeking to weed out Western influences . They broke into Li 's house and smashed pictures taken at the pregame lunch he hosted . At age 65 , Li was sentenced to four years digging rice in the countryside .
domestication: 这倒是一件好事。1966年到1976年的“文化大革命”期间，一群被称为红卫兵的狂热青年在农村横冲直撞，试图清除西方影响。他们闯进了李家，砸毁了他在赛前宴请时拍的照片。65岁的李被判处四年去乡下种水稻。

source: First , you can not disprove the existence of anything without examining all of the universe . Since we do n't have space ships or sensor arrays that can peer around corners of the galaxy and universe , we can no more disprove God than we can disprove that someone named Schmortz lives on the planet Fooble .

source: Since joining the team in a trade in 1992 , Favre 's constancy with the Packers is one of the few stable things in the constantly changing league . His primary receiver has changed from Sterling Sharpe to Antonio Freeman to Bill Schroeder to Donald Driver . Sherman is his third coach , after Mike Holmgren and Ray Rhodes ( though , as Sherman pointed out , the offense Favre has run is virtually unchanged . )
domestication: 自从 1992 年加盟球队以来，法维尔在PACKERS队的稳定表现，是变化莫测的联盟中少数几个不变的事物。他的主要接球手已经从斯特林-沙普换成了安东尼奥-弗里曼，再到比尔-施罗德，最终变成了唐纳德-德莱弗。雪曼是他第三位主教练，在迈克-霍姆格伦和雷-里德斯之后（虽然正如雪曼所指出的那样，法维尔执掌的进攻几乎没有什么变化）。
foreignization: 自从1992年以交易的方式加入球队以来，法维尔在帕克队的稳定性是这个不断变化的联盟中少数几个稳定的东西。他的主要接球手从斯特林·夏普换成了安东尼奥·弗里曼，然后又变成了比尔·施罗德，最后是唐纳德·德赖弗。谢尔曼是他的第三位教练，在迈克·霍姆格伦和雷·罗兹之后（不过，正如谢尔曼所指出的，法维尔所执行的进攻几乎没有改变）。

source: RIANZ , New Zealand 's answer to the RIAA , have withdrawn their case against an individual they said should have been punished under the country 's " 3 strikes " anti-filesharing regime . The decision follows a procedure beset by problems , including delivery of erroneous infringement notices and a claim for financial punishments that was not only unsupported by the law , but appears to have been reached via guesswork on the part of rightsholders .
domestication: 新西兰的唱片行业协会（RIANZ），可以说是美国唱片业协会（RIAA）的翻版，最近撤回了对一名个人的诉讼。这名个人本应根据新西兰的“三次警告”反文件共享制度受到惩罚。这个程序问题多多，比如错误地发送了侵权通知，而且要求的经济处罚不仅没有法律依据，还像是版权持有者随口一说的结果。
foreignization: RIANZ，新西兰的RIAA版本，已经撤回了他们针对一个他们认为应该根据该国的“三次警告”反文件共享制度受到惩罚的个人的案件。这一决定是在一系列问题之后做出的，包括错误的侵权通知的送达和一项不仅没有法律支持，而且似乎是权利持有人猜测得出的财务惩罚要求。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

source: I do n't read much of Amanda Marcotte admittedly because while I 'm sure she does have a large readership , I do n't find her writing up my alley . But I was surprised she wrote on immigration at all and when I read her piece , I just felt like deja vu because I 've read bfp 's blog for about a year or so including her postings on immigration and when I was reading Marcotte 's article , I saw bfp in it . Throughout . I think Sylvia broke the text down further in her blog posting . I was surprised after reading it not to find bfp cited anywhere , including her speech that she gave at WAM . But I guess , given the historical precedence for this type of thing that 's been going on for a while , I should n't have been .
domestication: 我得承认，我对阿曼达·马科特的文章读得不多，虽然她可能有很多读者，但她的写作风格实在不太对我的胃口。不过，当我看到她竟然写了关于移民的文章时，还真有点意外。读了她的文章后，我有种似曾相识的感觉，因为我在过去的一年里，一直关注bfp的博客，包括她关于移民的帖子。读马科特的文章时，我总感觉里面能看到bfp的影子，到处都是。西尔维娅在她的博客中也对这篇文章做了更详细的分析。读完之后，我发现文中和引用部分都没提到bfp，就连她在WAM上的演讲也没提，这让我挺惊讶的。不过转念一想，这种事情历史上也不是第一次发生了，所以我也就不那么惊讶了。
foreignization: 我承认我不太读阿曼达·马科特的文章，虽然我相信她确实有很多读者，但我觉得她的写作不符合我的口味。但我对她竟然撰写关于移民的话题感到惊讶，当我读到她的文章时，我感觉就像是似曾相识，因为我已经读了bfp的博客大约一年左右，包括她关于移民的帖子，而在阅读马科特的文章时，我看到了bfp的身影。通篇都是。我认为西尔维娅在她的博客文章中进一步剖析了这篇文字。读完之后，我没有看到任何地方引用了bfp，包括她在WAM的演讲。但我想，鉴于这种行为已经有很长的历史先例，我本不该感到惊讶的。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

I do n't read much of Amanda Marcotte admittedly because while I 'm sure she does have a large readership , I do n't find her writing up my alley . But I was surprised she wrote on immigration at all and when I read her piece , I just felt like deja vu because I 've read bfp 's blog for about a year or so including her postings on immigration and when I was reading Marcotte 's article , I saw bfp in it . Throughout . I think Sylvia broke the text down further in her blog posting . I was surprised after reading it not to find bfp cited anywhere , including her speech that she gave at WAM . But I guess , given the historical precedence for this type of thing that 's been going on for a while , I should n't have been .

我得承认，我对阿曼达·马科特的文章读得不多，虽然她可能有很多读者，但她的写作风格实在不太对我的胃口。不过，当我看到她竟然写了关于移民的文章时，还真有点意外。读了她的文章后，我有种似曾相识的感觉，因为我在过去的一年里，一直关注bfp的博客，包括她关于移民的帖子。读马科特的文章时，我总感觉里面能看到bfp的影子，到处都是。西尔维娅在她的博客中也对这篇文章做了更详细的分析。读完之后，我发现文中和引用部分都没提到bfp，就连她在WAM上的演讲也没提，这让我挺惊讶的。不过转念一想，这种事情历史上也不是第一次发生了，所以我也就不那么惊讶了。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

I do n't read much of Amanda Marcotte admittedly because while I 'm sure she does have a large readership , I do n't find her writing up my alley . But I was surprised she wrote on immigration at all and when I read her piece , I just felt like deja vu because I 've read bfp 's blog for about a year or so including her postings on immigration and when I was reading Marcotte 's article , I saw bfp in it . Throughout . I think Sylvia broke the text down further in her blog posting . I was surprised after reading it not to find bfp cited anywhere , including her speech that she gave at WAM . But I guess , given the historical precedence for this type of thing that 's been going on for a while , I should n't have been .

我承认我不太读阿曼达·马科特的文章，虽然我相信她确实有很多读者，但我觉得她的写作不符合我的口味。但我对她竟然撰写关于移民的话题感到惊讶，当我读到她的文章时，我感觉就像是似曾相识，因为我已经读了bfp的博客大约一年左右，包括她关于移民的帖子，而在阅读马科特的文章时，我看到了bfp的身影。通篇都是。我认为西尔维娅在她的博客文章中进一步剖析了这篇文字。读完之后，我没有看到任何地方引用了bfp，包括她在WAM的演讲。但我想，鉴于这种行为已经有很长的历史先例，我本不该感到惊讶的。

source: Musl did get it right . His ( or her ) thinking that our opinions are based on " biased news coverage of remote incidents " is absolutely spot-on . However , I would describe media coverage favors Muslims due to the fact that their reports are infrequent and downplayed enough so as to go unnoticed .
domestication: 穆斯林的看法很有道理，他认为我们的观点是基于对遥远事件的“偏见性新闻报道”，说得非常到位。然而，我认为媒体的报道有利于穆斯林，因为他们的报道很少，而且被淡化到几乎没有人会注意到。这种现象真的是“树欲静而风不止”，但又常常被我们忽略。

source: Duhamel considers actor James Caan a key mentor . But for every one of Caan 's Godfather blockbusters , there 's a Rolterball dud . The message here : Milk your mentor for his or her pitfalls , not just successes . " The best way to learn from mistakes is to have other people make them for you , " says Powers . Ask , " What skills do you wish you 'd polished earlier on ? " instead of fawning , " How can T become you ? " CREATE STARRING ROLES
domestication: 杜哈梅尔视演员詹姆斯·卡恩为重要导师。但卡恩每有一部《教父》这样的巨制，就有一部《滚轴球》这样的败笔。这里的意思是：要从你导师的失败中吸取教训，而不仅仅是成功。鲍尔斯说：“学习的最佳方式就是让别人替你犯错。”不妨问一问：“您希望早些磨练哪些技能？”而不是谄媚地说：“我怎样才能成为您这样的人？”创造属于自己的主角光环。

source: The cans of beer are in a stall with dried beans , mustard , biscuits , honey bread , and tinned meats . There is also an open chessboard and a game in progress . The grocer behind the stand is playing black , and a man who looks like a passerby is playing white . Several pawns , a knight , and a bishop have been taken .
domestication: 啤酒罐放在一个摊位上，旁边堆着干豆、芥末酱、饼干、蜂蜜面包和罐头肉。摊位后面还摆着一副打开的棋盘，棋局正酣。卖杂货的老哥下黑棋，对面是个看起来像是过路的客人，下的是白棋。棋盘上已经吃了好几个兵、一个马和一个象。

source: " Senator Cotton , do you support repealing the Affordable Care Act so that 300,000 Arkansas citizens will lose their health care ? " a woman asked him at a town hall meeting here this year . She was referring to the state 's unique Medicaid expansion initiative created under the ACA , in which more than 300,000 people have enrolled .
domestication: 科顿参议员，你支持废除平价医疗法案（Affordable Care Act），导致三万阿肯色州公民失去医疗保健吗？今年在这里的一场市政厅会议上，一位女性这样问他。她指的是该州根据ACA制定的独特的医疗补助扩展计划，其中有超过30万人已经报名。
foreignization: “ 参议员科顿，你是否支持废除《平价医疗法案》，这样阿肯色州就有30万公民会失去医疗保障？”，今年，一位女性在市政厅会议上问他如此。她所指的是在ACA下成立的该州独特的医疗补助扩张倡议，其中超过30万人已经报名。

source: There 's no question that some who claim to lust for virtuous work are using their debt as an excuse to go off and get rich . But some are sincere the law student or soon-to-be Wall Streeter who really does plan to quit after a few years of paying down debts and go teach high school . But even the most well-intentioned souls become acculturated . The fat paychecks come ; all your friends are getting them , too . The career ladder beckons , then there 's the new house and with it mortgage payments that dwarf the loan payments -- and on and on . Sallie mayhem
domestication: 确实有人声称自己渴望从事高尚的职业，只是借口还债却去赚大钱。但也有一些人是真心的，比如法律专业的学生或者即将加入华尔街工作的人，他们真的打算在还完几年债务之后辞职去教高中。但即便是最有志向的人也会受到同化的影响。工资很丰厚，所有的朋友也都有同样的收入。职场的晋升机会在召唤，接着是新买的房子和比贷款利息还高的按揭付款——就这样不断循环下去。混乱的萨莉
foreignization: 毫无疑问，有些声称渴望从事高尚工作的人只是以债务为借口去赚取财富。但是，也有一些人是真诚的，比如法律学生或者即将加入华尔街工作的人，他们真的计划在还掉几年债务后就辞职去教高中。但即使是最有良好愿望的人也会被同化。丰厚的薪水来了；你的所有朋友也都拿到了。职业阶梯在召唤，然后是新的房子和随之而来的抵押贷款付款，这比贷款付款大得多——等等。萨利梅赫姆

source: “Miss Manette, I am a man of business. I have a business charge to acquit myself of. In your reception of it, don’t heed me any more than if I was a speaking machine—truly, I am not much else. I will, with your leave, relate to you, miss, the story of one of our customers.”
domestication: 曼内特小姐，我是个做买卖的，现在有一桩生意上的事情要跟您交代。您听我说的时候，就当我是台会说话的机器好了——其实我也差不多就是这么个东西。得了您的允许，我就给您讲讲我们一位客户的故事吧。
foreignization: “曼内特小姐，我是一个生意人。我有一个商务任务需要完成。在您接收这项任务时，不要把我当成人来看待，而要当作一台说话的机器——事实上，我也不过如此。我将在您的允许下，向您讲述我们的一位客户的故事。”

messages_domestication.content:

“Miss Manette, I am a man of business. I have a business charge to acquit myself of. In your reception of it, don’t heed me any more than if I was a speaking machine—truly, I am not much else. I will, with your leave, relate to you, miss, the story of one of our customers.”
曼内特小姐，我是个做买卖的，现在有一桩生意上的事情要跟您交代。您听我说的时候，就当我是台会说话的机器好了——其实我也差不多就是这么个东西。得了您的允许，我就给您讲讲我们一位客户的故事吧。

“Miss Manette, I am a man of business. I have a business charge to acquit myself of. In your reception of it, don’t heed me any more than if I was a speaking machine—truly, I am not much else. I will, with your leave, relate to you, miss, the story of one of our customers.”
“曼内特小姐，我是一个生意人。我有一个商务任务需要完成。在您接收这项任务时，不要把我当成人来看待，而要当作一台说话的机器——事实上，我也不过如此。我将在您的允许下，向您讲述我们的一位客户的故事。”

source: But indeed, at that time, putting to death was a recipe much in vogue with all trades and professions, and not least of all with Tellson’s. Death is Nature’s remedy for all things, and why not Legislation’s? Accordingly, the forger was put to Death; the utterer of a bad note was put to Death; the unlawful opener of a letter was put to Death; the purloiner of forty shillings and sixpence was put to Death; the holder of a horse at Tellson’s door, who made off with it, was put to Death; the coiner of a bad shilling was put to Death; the sounders of three-fourths of the notes in the whole gamut of Crime, were put to Death. Not that it did the least good in the way of prevention—it might almost have been worth remarking that the fact was exactly the reverse—but, it cleared off (as to this world) the trouble of each particular case, and left nothing else connected with it to be looked after. Thus, Tellson’s, in its day, like greater places of business, its contemporaries, had taken so many lives, that, if the heads laid low before it had been ranged on Temple Bar instead of being privately disposed of, they would probably have excluded what little light the ground floor had, in a rather significant manner.
domestication: 但确实，那时处决成了一种流行的手段，各行各业都乐此不疲，尤其是泰尔森银行。俗话说，生死有命，立法何尝不是？于是，伪造者被处死；传递假钞的被处死；非法拆信的被处死；偷了四十先令六便士的被处死；在泰尔森银行门口牵走马匹的被处死；铸造假币的被处死；几乎所有犯罪行为的参与者几乎都难逃一死。这根本起不到预防作用——甚至可以反过来说，一点效果都没有——但这倒是解决了个案问题，再不用操心后续了。就这样，泰尔森银行在那个年代，像其他同辈的大企业一样，处决了不少人。要是那些被砍下的头颅不是秘密处理，而是挂在特emple栅栏上，恐怕连一楼那点微弱的光线都要被遮挡得严严实实，意义深远啊。
foreignization: 但的确，在当时，处决是一种各行各业都非常流行的方法， Tellson’s 也不例外。死亡是自然对一切事物的补救措施，立法为何不能如此？因此，伪造者被处死；流通假币者被处死；非法拆信者被处死；偷窃四十一先令六便士者被处死；在 Tellson’s 门口牵走马匹者被处死；铸造劣质硬币者被处死；几乎所有犯罪行为中的人，无论轻重，都被处死。这并不是说这种做法对预防犯罪丝毫没有好处——几乎可以说事实恰恰相反——但它确实清除了（在这个世界上的）每个具体案件的麻烦，使之不再需要进一步关注。因此，Tellson’s 在其鼎盛时期，像它同时代的更大企业一样，夺去了许多生命，如果那些倒在它脚下的人头不是私下处理而是排列在泰晤士栅栏上，很可能几乎会完全遮挡住一楼的光线，以一种相当意味深长的方式。

source: To wit : Although the geometry is virtually identical to that of the unisex , identically-priced Z3 , the frame 's carbon lay-up is not -- because female cyclists are typically lighter than men of the same height , engineers use less material in constructing the frame . The result , says Felt marketing director Doug Martin , is a bike that uses the same frame geometry and tube shapes as the company 's Z line of plush , road-damping bikes , but will deliver ride sensations more similar to the stiffer F-series race bikes when pedaled by lighter riders . Put another way , you get the performance of a bike built for men , in a lighter package . Martin says that most of the cyclists on the Felt-sponsored Exergy TWENTY12 women 's pro team ride the ZW3 frame , with only the taller riders opting instead for the F-series , which has a longer top tube and shorter head tube in most frame sizes .
domestication: 说白了，虽然ZW3的几何结构和男女通用且价格相同的Z3几乎一模一样，但车架的碳纤维铺设方式却大不相同。因为女性骑行者的体重通常比同身高的男性要轻，工程师在制造车架时使用了更少的材料。费尔特营销总监道格·马丁表示，这样一来，这辆自行车虽然采用了公司Z系列舒适型公路减震车的相同车架几何形状和管形，但在较轻的骑行者踩踏时，骑行感受会更接近于F系列的赛车。换句话说，你得到了为男性设计的自行车性能，但却是在一个更轻的车身里。马丁还提到，大多数由费尔特赞助的Exergy TWENTY12女子职业车队的队员骑的都是ZW3车架，只有个子较高的队员会选择F系列，因为F系列在大部分车架尺寸上都有更长的上管和更短的头管。
foreignization: 换句话说：尽管几何形状几乎与男女通用、价格相同的Z3相同，但车架的碳纤维层压结构并非如此——因为女性骑行者通常比同等身高的男性更轻，工程师在构建车架时使用了更少的材料。Felt营销总监Doug Martin表示，结果是，这款自行车采用了公司Z系列舒适、减震公路车相同的车架几何形状和管形，但在较轻的骑手骑行时，将会提供更接近于较硬的F系列赛车的骑行感受。换言之，你将获得为男性设计的自行车的性能，但包装更轻。Martin说，大多数由Felt赞助的Exergy TWENTY12女子职业车队的车手都骑ZW3车架，只有较高的车手会选择F系列，该系列在大多数车架尺寸下具有更长的上管和更短的头管。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

To wit : Although the geometry is virtually identical to that of the unisex , identically-priced Z3 , the frame 's carbon lay-up is not -- because female cyclists are typically lighter than men of the same height , engineers use less material in constructing the frame . The result , says Felt marketing director Doug Martin , is a bike that uses the same frame geometry and tube shapes as the company 's Z line of plush , road-damping bikes , but will deliver ride sensations more similar to the stiffer F-series race bikes when pedaled by lighter riders . Put another way , you get the performance of a bike built for men , in a lighter package . Martin says that most of the cyclists on the Felt-sponsored Exergy TWENTY12 women 's pro team ride the ZW3 frame , with only the taller riders opting instead for the F-series , which has a longer top tube and shorter head tube in most frame sizes .

source: He accompanied his conductor into a guard-room, smelling of common wine and tobacco, where certain soldiers and patriots, asleep and awake, drunk and sober, and in various neutral states between sleeping and waking, drunkenness and sobriety, were standing and lying about. The light in the guard-house, half derived from the waning oil-lamps of the night, and half from the overcast day, was in a correspondingly uncertain condition. Some registers were lying open on a desk, and an officer of a coarse, dark aspect, presided over these.
domestication: 他跟着向导来到了一个守卫室，屋里弥漫着廉价酒和烟草的味道。一些士兵和爱国人士，有的睡着了，有的醒着，有的醉醺醺的，有的还清醒，处于半梦半醒、似醉非醉的状态，或站或躺。守卫室的光线昏暗不定，一半来自夜间的油灯，另一半则透过阴沉的天空透进来。桌子上摊开着几本登记簿，一位相貌粗犷、面色黝黑的军官正坐在那里管理着这些。
foreignization: 他陪同他的向导进入了一间散发着普通酒和烟草气味的警卫室，那里有一些士兵和爱国者，有的睡着，有的醒着，有的醉了，有的清醒，处于睡眠与清醒、醉酒与清醒之间的各种中性状态，或站或躺。警卫室里的光线，一半来自夜间即将燃尽的油灯，一半来自阴沉的白天，处于相应的不确定状态。桌上放着一些打开的登记册，一位长相粗犷、面色黝黑的军官主持着这些事务。

As he arrived at this apostrophe, he again rolled upon the door-step, and laughed louder than before.

The Grutter decision written by former Justice Sandra Day O'Connor was indefensible , but fortunately , O'Connor has been replaced by Justice Samuel Alito . Also , Justice Elena Kagan is recused , because she approved the filing of an amicus brief in the Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals in this case that supported the university 's discriminatory admissions policy when she was still the Solicitor General at the Justice Department .
格特尔案由前大法官桑德拉·戴·奥康纳撰写，是不可辩解的，但幸运的是，奥康纳已被塞缪尔·阿利托大法官取代。此外，埃琳娜·卡根大法官回避了此案，因为她在此案中批准提交了一份支持大学歧视性招生政策的法庭之友意见书，当时她还是司法部的总检察长。

source: I mostly pick on Jeff , the strong , fast , young one . He started his Manchester streak at 13 , and used to play fair . When he began his work career in California , he even took red-eye flights back home to the East Coast at Thanksgiving . For this , I gave him his due . Then he turned unethical and moved to a Connecticut town just up the road from Manchester . This is not fair play , and I am still plotting my revenge . For now , I intend to taunt him by maintaining my 29-year gap . The way I see it , if my brain sends out a strong enough signal , the legs will follow .
domestication: 我主要针对杰夫，那个又壮又快的年轻人。他13岁就开始在曼彻斯特连续参赛，起初还挺公平的。后来他在加利福尼亚工作时，为了感恩节还能坐红眼航班飞回家，真是不容易，我也挺佩服他的。没想到他后来变得不地道了，竟然搬到了离曼彻斯特不远的康涅狄格镇上。这可真是不厚道，我还在盘算怎么报复他呢。现在，我打算通过保持我们之间29年的差距来嘲笑他。我觉得，只要大脑发出足够的信号，腿自然就会跟上的。

source: This dialogue had taken place at Mr. Lorry’s usual desk, with Monseigneur swarming within a yard or two of it, boastful of what he would do to avenge himself on the rascal-people before long. It was too much the way of Monseigneur under his reverses as a refugee, and it was much too much the way of native British orthodoxy, to talk of this terrible Revolution as if it were the only harvest ever known under the skies that had not been sown—as if nothing had ever been done, or omitted to be done, that had led to it—as if observers of the wretched millions in France, and of the misused and perverted resources that should have made them prosperous, had not seen it inevitably coming, years before, and had not in plain words recorded what they saw. Such vapouring, combined with the extravagant plots of Monseigneur for the restoration of a state of things that had utterly exhausted itself, and worn out Heaven and earth as well as itself, was hard to be endured without some remonstrance by any sane man who knew the truth. And it was such vapouring all about his ears, like a troublesome confusion of blood in his own head, added to a latent uneasiness in his mind, which had already made Charles Darnay restless, and which still kept him so.
domestication: 这段对话发生在洛里先生平常工作的桌子旁，蒙瑟奈先生在附近转来转去，吹嘘着他将如何很快对那些恶棍百姓报复。这是蒙瑟奈先生作为难民的常见表现，也是英国本土正统思想的体现，他们总是把这场可怕的革命看作是天下唯一未曾播种却获得的收获——仿佛没有任何原因导致了它的发生，也仿佛从来没有人预见过它的到来。事实上，法国数百万穷苦人民的观察者和被误用及滥用的资源本应让他们富裕起来，却早在多年前就已经看到革命的不可避免，并且明确地记录下了他们所看到的一切。这种夸夸其谈，加上蒙瑟奈先生为恢复一个已经完全衰败并耗尽了天堂和地球以及自身的状态所制定的奢侈计划，对于任何一个了解真相的理智之人来说，是很难忍受的。而这种夸夸其谈就像他自己头部里的血液混乱一样在他耳边不断出现，加上他心中已经存在的潜在不安，这些让查尔斯·丹尼变得焦虑不安，他至今仍然无法平静下来。
foreignization: 这段对话发生在洛里先生的办公桌旁，蒙西尼尔就在离这里一两码远的地方，夸口不久后要向那些坏蛋报复。他作为难民遭遇到挫折时，经常这样说，这也太像英国本土的正统观念了，谈论这场可怕的革命，就好像它是天下唯一一次没有播种就收获的庄稼——好像从来没有做过什么，或者忽略了应该做的事情，导致了革命——好像法国那些可怜百万民众的观察者和他们被滥用和误用的资源（这些资源本该让他们富裕起来）的观察者，没有多年前就预见到它不可避免地到来，并且没有用明白的话记录下他们所看到的一切。这样的言论，再加上蒙西尼尔恢复已经完全耗尽、耗尽了天堂和地球以及自己的状态的荒唐计划，对于任何一个知道真相的正常人来说，是很难忍受的。还有，他周围都是这样的空话，像他自己脑子里混乱的血液一样，让他感到烦躁，加上他心中潜藏的不安，这种不安已经让查尔斯·丹尼变得不安分，现在仍然让他如此。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

This dialogue had taken place at Mr. Lorry’s usual desk, with Monseigneur swarming within a yard or two of it, boastful of what he would do to avenge himself on the rascal-people before long. It was too much the way of Monseigneur under his reverses as a refugee, and it was much too much the way of native British orthodoxy, to talk of this terrible Revolution as if it were the only harvest ever known under the skies that had not been sown—as if nothing had ever been done, or omitted to be done, that had led to it—as if observers of the wretched millions in France, and of the misused and perverted resources that should have made them prosperous, had not seen it inevitably coming, years before, and had not in plain words recorded what they saw. Such vapouring, combined with the extravagant plots of Monseigneur for the restoration of a state of things that had utterly exhausted itself, and worn out Heaven and earth as well as itself, was hard to be endured without some remonstrance by any sane man who knew the truth. And it was such vapouring all about his ears, like a troublesome confusion of blood in his own head, added to a latent uneasiness in his mind, which had already made Charles Darnay restless, and which still kept him so.

这段对话发生在洛里先生平常工作的桌子旁，蒙瑟奈先生在附近转来转去，吹嘘着他将如何很快对那些恶棍百姓报复。这是蒙瑟奈先生作为难民的常见表现，也是英国本土正统思想的体现，他们总是把这场可怕的革命看作是天下唯一未曾播种却获得的收获——仿佛没有任何原因导致了它的发生，也仿佛从来没有人预见过它的到来。事实上，法国数百万穷苦人民的观察者和被误用及滥用的资源本应让他们富裕起来，却早在多年前就已经看到革命的不可避免，并且明确地记录下了他们所看到的一切。这种夸夸其谈，加上蒙瑟奈先生为恢复一个已经完全衰败并耗尽了天堂和地球以及自身的状态所制定的奢侈计划，对于任何一个了解真相的理智之人来说，是很难忍受的。而这种夸夸其谈就像他自己头部里的血液混乱一样在他耳边不断出现，加上他心中已经存在的潜在不安，这些让查尔斯·丹尼变得焦虑不安，他至今仍然无法平静下来。

source: The raven feather was many-textured , smooth as silk then fractured anti rough and deep , black to blue from the quill outward . Edward said , once , looking at it on the cabinet in the living room , " I always want to have things like this around me . " Just suddenly , out of the blue , a statement coming from a conversation he was having with himself .
domestication: 乌鸦的羽毛纹理丰富，摸起来滑如丝绸，但又裂痕纵横，粗粝而深邃，从根部的黑色渐变为蓝色。爱德华有次看着客厅柜子上的羽毛说：“我总想身边围着这样的东西。”这话来得突然，像是他自言自语时脱口而出的一样。
foreignization: 乌鸦的羽毛层次丰富，摸起来既如丝般光滑，又裂纹纵横，粗糙而深邃，从羽茎向外由黑渐变为蓝。爱德华曾经说过，看着它放在客厅的柜子上，“我总是想身边有这样东西。” 突如其来，毫无征兆，这句话是他自言自语时说出来的。

source: The museum 's five small galleries ( amounting to about 14,000 sq . ft. ) , with their cream walls and whitewashed oak floors , have been lauded for their grace , subtlety , and adaptability . Electronically controlled skylights bathe rooms with natural light , baffled by exterior panes in pyramid shapes . One-third of the open-air courtyard is filled with plants and a canopy of Chinese evergreen elms . Heat-retaining granite pavers warm feet on cool California evenings .
domestication: 博物馆的五个小巧展厅，总面积约14000平方英尺，墙面呈奶油色，地板则是刷白的橡木，其优雅、细腻和灵活性广受赞誉。电子控制的天窗让自然光洒满房间，外层的金字塔形玻璃板则巧妙地调节光线。露天庭院的三分之一种满了植物，还有中国常绿榆树形成的树冠。保留热量的花岗岩铺路石，在凉爽的加州夜晚也能温暖脚底。

source: So , I decided to sell my only horse and go to Europe to see what " drug-free " racing was like . There , I learned that trainers give " vitamin " mixtures with a hypodermic in the stable yard before going over to race . Their solution to EIPH with no lasix was to bleed the horse a liter or so to reduce blood volume before a race . No idea if it worked or not .
domestication: 于是，我卖了唯一的一匹马，去了欧洲，想看看所谓的“无药赛马”究竟是怎么回事。到了那儿才发现，驯马师们在去赛场之前，会在马厩里给马打一针维生素混合液。他们对付赛马运动中常见的EIPH（运动引起的肺出血）问题，又没有使用拉昔克斯（一种止血药），就想出了个土办法——比赛前给马放一升左右的血，说是这样能减少血液量。管不管用，就不得而知了。
foreignization: 所以，我决定卖掉我唯一的一匹马，去欧洲看看什么是“无药物”赛马。在那里，我了解到训练师会在去比赛之前在马厩院子里用注射器给马注射“维生素”混合物。他们解决没有拉西克斯（Lasix）的EIPH问题的方法是在比赛前让马放血一升左右以减少血液量。不知道这种方法是否有效。

messages_domestication.content:

So , I decided to sell my only horse and go to Europe to see what " drug-free " racing was like . There , I learned that trainers give " vitamin " mixtures with a hypodermic in the stable yard before going over to race . Their solution to EIPH with no lasix was to bleed the horse a liter or so to reduce blood volume before a race . No idea if it worked or not .
于是，我卖了唯一的一匹马，去了欧洲，想看看所谓的“无药赛马”究竟是怎么回事。到了那儿才发现，驯马师们在去赛场之前，会在马厩里给马打一针维生素混合液。他们对付赛马运动中常见的EIPH（运动引起的肺出血）问题，又没有使用拉昔克斯（一种止血药），就想出了个土办法——比赛前给马放一升左右的血，说是这样能减少血液量。管不管用，就不得而知了。

So , I decided to sell my only horse and go to Europe to see what " drug-free " racing was like . There , I learned that trainers give " vitamin " mixtures with a hypodermic in the stable yard before going over to race . Their solution to EIPH with no lasix was to bleed the horse a liter or so to reduce blood volume before a race . No idea if it worked or not .
所以，我决定卖掉我唯一的一匹马，去欧洲看看什么是“无药物”赛马。在那里，我了解到训练师会在去比赛之前在马厩院子里用注射器给马注射“维生素”混合物。他们解决没有拉西克斯（Lasix）的EIPH问题的方法是在比赛前让马放血一升左右以减少血液量。不知道这种方法是否有效。

source: One of the most spectacular arms deals conducted in violation of Latvian sovereignty -- though apparently in accordance with Russian law -- was the September 19 delivery of a Kilo-class submarine to Iran . The sub sailed from the Bolderaja naval base at the mouth of Riga harbor with a crew consisting largely of Russians paid up to $40 a day for their services in delivering the vessel to the Gulf . It is probably not the last such deal , since a number of Iranians remained on the Russian base in Latvia , waiting for a second , and , possibly , a rumored third submarine .
domestication: 最引人注目的违抗拉脱维亚主权的军火交易之一，虽然是按照俄罗斯法律进行的，就是9月19日向伊朗交付了一艘基洛级潜艇。这艘潜艇从里加港入口处的博尔德贾海军基地出发，船上大部分是俄罗斯船员，他们每天赚取高达40美元的报酬，负责将这艘潜艇送抵波斯湾。这可能不是最后一笔交易，因为还有一些伊朗人在拉脱维亚境内的俄罗斯基地等着，等着第二艘，甚至据说还有第三艘潜艇。
foreignization: 违反拉脱维亚主权进行的最壮观的军火交易之一——尽管显然符合俄罗斯法律——是9月19日向伊朗交付了一艘基洛级潜艇。这艘潜艇从里加港入口处的博尔德贾海军基地启航，船员主要由俄罗斯人组成，他们每天获得高达40美元的报酬，以将该船只运送到海湾。这可能不是最后一次此类交易，因为一些伊朗人仍留在拉脱维亚的俄罗斯基地，等待第二艘，甚至可能是传闻中的第三艘潜艇。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

One of the most spectacular arms deals conducted in violation of Latvian sovereignty -- though apparently in accordance with Russian law -- was the September 19 delivery of a Kilo-class submarine to Iran . The sub sailed from the Bolderaja naval base at the mouth of Riga harbor with a crew consisting largely of Russians paid up to $40 a day for their services in delivering the vessel to the Gulf . It is probably not the last such deal , since a number of Iranians remained on the Russian base in Latvia , waiting for a second , and , possibly , a rumored third submarine .

source: He would not have stopped then, for anything less necessary than breath, it being a spectral sort of race that he ran, and one highly desirable to get to the end of. He had a strong idea that the coffin he had seen was running after him; and, pictured as hopping on behind him, bolt upright, upon its narrow end, always on the point of overtaking him and hopping on at his side—perhaps taking his arm—it was a pursuer to shun. It was an inconsistent and ubiquitous fiend too, for, while it was making the whole night behind him dreadful, he darted out into the roadway to avoid dark alleys, fearful of its coming hopping out of them like a dropsical boy’s kite without tail and wings. It hid in doorways too, rubbing its horrible shoulders against doors, and drawing them up to its ears, as if it were laughing. It got into shadows on the road, and lay cunningly on its back to trip him up. All this time it was incessantly hopping on behind and gaining on him, so that when the boy got to his own door he had reason for being half dead. And even then it would not leave him, but followed him upstairs with a bump on every stair, scrambled into bed with him, and bumped down, dead and heavy, on his breast when he fell asleep.
domestication: 他当时是顾不得任何事的，因为那是一场怪异的追逐，而这场追逐越早结束越好。他心里清楚，刚才看到的棺材肯定是在追赶他。那个棺材在他脑海里被描绘成这样：直挺挺地站在后面，一直在他身后蹦来蹦去，随时都可能追上并且挽住他的胳膊，所以必须要避开它。这种想法让他十分害怕，因为那个棺材无处不在，它让整夜都变得恐怖。为了躲避它，他冲进了路中间，害怕它会突然从黑暗的小巷里蹦出来，就像一个没有尾巴和翅膀的大风筝一样。它还躲在门道里，用肩膀摩擦着门，并且把门拉到耳边，好像在窃笑一般。它躲在路上的阴影处，侧卧着想绊倒他。这一切都发生得那么迅速，那个棺材一直在他后面不停地蹦跳着，快要追上他了。所以，当男孩终于回到自己家门口时，他已经累得半死。但即使到这时，那个棺材也没有放过他，它跟着他上了楼，在每一步台阶上都重重地磕撞着，然后钻进他的床里，等他一睡着，就重重地压在他的胸口。
foreignization: 他不会在那时停下来，除非是更必要的事情，比如呼吸，因为他跑的是一种幽灵般的比赛，而这种比赛结束得越快越好。他有一个很强烈的想法，那就是他看到的棺材正在追赶他；并且，在他身后，笔直地跳跃着，总是要追上他并且从旁边跳进来——也许会抓住他的胳膊——这是一个需要躲避的追逐者。这是一个不一致的和无处不在的邪恶灵魂，因为当它让整夜都变得可怕的时候，他突然冲到了马路上，以避免黑暗的小巷，害怕它会像没有尾巴和翅膀的水肿男孩的风筝一样从小巷里跳出来。它还躲藏在门道里，用可怕的肩膀摩擦门，并将它们拉到耳朵旁，就像它在笑一样。在路上的阴影中，它躺下，试图绊倒他。与此同时，它不断地从后面跳跃并靠近他，所以当男孩到达自己家门口时，他已经半死不活了。即使那样，它也不会离开他，而是跟着他上了楼，每一步都伴随着一声碰撞，跟着他爬进床，最后当他睡着时，重重地倒在他的胸口。

source: There has been no slowdown in the race for higher executive pay , the experts said . Chief executives won a median pay raise of 30 percent in 2004 , twice the increase from 2003 , according to the Corporate Library , a watchdog group that rates public companies on corporate governance . Repeated studies have shown virtually no connection between high compensation and good corporate performance .
domestication: 专家们表示，高管薪酬竞赛丝毫没有减速的迹象。据公司治理监督机构“企业图书馆”报告，2004年，首席执行官们的中位数薪酬涨幅达到了30%，是2003年的两倍。多项研究显示，高额薪酬与良好的公司业绩之间几乎没有关联。

source: She brought me down and hid me and I lived in her board house near the train tracks . On her dresser she kept the bible , a big pink comb and a leaf of sinka bible . We did n't eat much . I taught her my songs and she showed me tricks I could use in a fight . At night we slept in a bed of rags scented with khus khus , her arm around me like a shield . I called her Vida for she was the first life I knew .
domestication: 她带我下去藏了起来，我就住在她家靠近铁轨的木板房里。她的梳妆台上放着一本圣经、一个大大的粉红色梳子和一片辛卡圣经。我们吃得不多。我教她我的歌，她则教我打架时能用的小招数。晚上，我们睡在散发着库斯库斯香味的破布床上，她像盾牌一样搂着我。我叫她薇达，因为她是我的第一个依靠。

source: Hartsfield Atlanta International , the world 's busiest airport , is grappling with many of the industry 's issues a full year after the terrorists struck , transforming air travel more than any aspect of daily life . The airport serves as a hub for Delta Air Lines , the nation 's third-largest carrier , and AirTran Airways , a fast-growing low-fare carrier .
domestication: 亚特兰大国际机场是世界上最繁忙的机场，一年前恐怖分子袭击发生后，它至今仍然面临着许多业内问题，而那次袭击却对日常生活中的飞行旅行产生了比其他方面更大的影响。这座机场同时也是三大航空公司之一的达美航空以及快速发展的廉价航空公司AirTran Airways的枢纽。
foreignization: 哈兹菲尔德亚特兰大国际机场是世界上最繁忙的机场，一年前恐怖分子袭击事件发生后，机场仍然面临着诸多行业问题， 这次袭击事件使得航空旅行比日常生活的其他方面发生了更大的变化。 这个机场同时也是三角洲航空公司和爱彩航空公司的枢纽。其中，三角洲航空公司是美国第三大航空公司，爱彩航空公司是一家快速发展的廉价航空公司。

source: David Dwares was born in 1963 but describes himself as a New Deal liberal , one who believes that " government can do good . " He is a young associate at a high-powered Washington firm , but devotes hundreds of hours a year to volunteer " pro bono " work . He is a litigator , but has zeroed in on one of the least glamorous and most heart-rending fields of poverty law : winning Social Security benefits for people with AIDS .

source: The merger will not " create a massive influx in the Wellness Center exercise room , " although members of branches will be able to use other branches , Lipstein said . Rates and the way rates are set will not change with the merger , he said . And , Freedom Valley YMCA CEO Jay Schaeffer , who is set to retire pending the merger , will not receive a " golden parachute " of any kind because of it , as has been rumored , Lipstein said .
domestication: 这次合并不会让健身中心的锻炼室一下子变得过度拥挤，不过各个分支机构的会员可以使用其他分支机构的设施，利普斯坦说。收费标准和制定收费的方式也不会因为合并而改变，他表示。另外，有传言称自由谷YMCA的CEO杰伊·谢弗在合并后退休时会获得一大笔赔偿，但利普斯坦表示事实并非如此，谢弗在退休后不会得到任何“黄金降落伞”。

Rates and the way rates are set will not change with the merger , he said . And , Freedom Valley YMCA CEO Jay Schaeffer , who is set to retire pending the merger , will not receive a " golden parachute " of any kind because of it , as has been rumored , Lipstein said .
合并不会“在健康中心的运动房创建大量涌入”，尽管分支机构的会员将能够使用其他分支机构，利普斯坦说。费率和费率设定的方式不会随着合并而改变，他说。另外，自由谷YMCA CEO杰伊·谢弗（Jay Schaeffer），他因合并即将退休，将不会因这件事而获得任何形式的“金色降落伞”，正如谣言所说的那样，利普斯坦说。

source: David Dwares was born in 1963 but describes himself as a New Deal liberal , one who believes that " government can do good . " He is a young associate at a high-powered Washington firm , but devotes hundreds of hours a year to volunteer " pro bono " work . He is a litigator , but has zeroed in on one of the least glamorous and most heart-rending fields of poverty law : winning Social Security benefits for people with AIDS .

source: Hartsfield Atlanta International , the world 's busiest airport , is grappling with many of the industry 's issues a full year after the terrorists struck , transforming air travel more than any aspect of daily life . The airport serves as a hub for Delta Air Lines , the nation 's third-largest carrier , and AirTran Airways , a fast-growing low-fare carrier .

source: He bypassed a bunch of lobsters and a small pup . He was out about sixty meters now already , but getting into the thick of them . The third one he drilled , he started the hole too low on the ridge and punctured the shell - he could tell when it pushed through without showing on the other side . He knew what was coming and flinched as he jerked the drill back .
domestication: 他绕过了一群龙虾和一只小海狗。现在已经出了六十米左右了，但正往人多的地方去。第三次打洞时，他在山脊上开孔的位置太低，结果钻穿了壳——他能感觉到钻头穿过时另一边却没有动静。他知道接下来会发生什么，不由得瑟缩了一下，赶紧把钻头抽了回来。

source: Now that Communism has been swept aside , there will be a temptation to excuse the excuses as a kind of intellectual victimless crime . source: The raven feather was many-textured , smooth as silk then fractured anti rough and deep , black to blue from the quill outward . Edward said , once , looking at it on the cabinet in the living room , " I always want to have things like this around me . " Just suddenly , out of the blue , a statement coming from a conversation he was having with himself .

source: Ezra Glenn blew on an old-fashioned train whistle . " All aboard for ' Last Train Home ' ! " The crowd chuckled . " Our conductor , Tunney Lee , will make some announcements at the front of the car . There are still some snacks left in the dining car . " Glenn motioned to a spread of mooncakes and other Chinese treats on a small table at the edge of the classroom . The room was full . Movie night at the MIT Department of Urban Studies and Planning had begun .

source: Huh ? Sorry , I walked into Best Buy and within a dozen swipes of a Windows 8 touch screen I was in awe ! This is where computing is going - keyboards are son 19th century anyway . So if I am a graphics guy I can use the add-ons I currently use . Or if I am a gal that likes keyboards I can use one . Or if I am standing in line at the bus stop I swipe to read my paper . Any glitches will be forgotten a couple of years from now - other OS 's will be playing catch up for years .  Re : " keyboards are son 19th century anyway . "  Nearly ... but shallow
domestication: 啥？对不起，我一走进百思买，摸了十几下Windows 8的触屏，就被震撼到了！这就是未来的计算方式——键盘早就过时了。所以，如果我是搞图像的，可以用我现在用的外设；如果我喜欢键盘，也可以用键盘；如果我在公交站排队，就划一划屏幕看新闻。几年后，这些小问题都会被忘得一干二净——其他操作系统还得跟在后面追好几年呢。至于“键盘早就过时了”，差不多吧……但有点太浅薄了。

source: Muttering a curse upon his tardiness, Sikes pushed Oliver before him; and they entered a low dark room with a smoky fire, two or three broken chairs, a table, and a very old couch: on which, with his legs much higher than his head, a man was reposing at full length, smoking a long clay pipe. He was dressed in a smartly-cut snuff-coloured coat, with large brass buttons; an orange neckerchief; a coarse, staring, shawl-pattern waistcoat; and drab breeches. Mr. Crackit (for he it was) had no very great quantity of hair, either upon his head or face; but what he had, was of a reddish dye, and tortured into long corkscrew curls, through which he occasionally thrust some very dirty fingers, ornamented with large common rings. He was a trifle above the middle size, and apparently rather weak in the legs; but this circumstance by no means detracted from his own admiration of his top-boots, which he contemplated, in their elevated situation, with lively satisfaction.
domestication: 嘴里嘟囔着咒骂他的迟到，赛克斯一把推了奥利弗进去。他们走进一间低矮昏暗的房间，里面有一个烟熏火炉，两三把破椅子，一张桌子，还有一张很旧的沙发。沙发上躺着一个男人，两腿高高翘起，比头还高，正悠闲地抽着长陶土烟斗。他穿着一件剪裁合身的土黄色外套，上面有大大的铜扣子；系着一条橙色领巾；穿了一件粗制滥造、花里胡哨的背心，下身是浅棕色马裤。这人就是克拉基特先生，他头上和脸上的毛发都不多，但有的几根却是红褐色的，被卷成了长长的螺旋状，他不时会用脏兮兮的手指，戴着大号普通戒指的手指，去拨弄这些卷发。他个子中等偏上，腿似乎有些无力，但这丝毫没有影响他对那双高筒靴的欣赏，他满意地看着高高翘起的双脚，心里美滋滋的。
foreignization: 嘟哝着咒骂他的迟到，西克斯把奥利弗推到前面；他们进入了一个低矮阴暗的房间，里面有一个冒烟的火炉，两三把破椅子，一张桌子和一个非常旧的沙发：沙发上，一个人仰躺着，双腿高过头部，正在抽着一根长陶土烟斗。他穿着一件剪裁讲究的淡褐色外套，上面有大铜纽扣；一条橙色领巾；一件粗犷、显眼的格子背心；以及浅褐色马裤。克里基特先生（因为就是他）头上和脸上并没有多少头发；但有的都是红棕色的，被扭曲成长长的螺旋形卷发，他偶尔会用一些非常脏的手指，戴着大而普通的戒指，穿过这些卷发。他身材略高于中等，看上去腿有些无力；但这一情况丝毫没有减少他对自己的高筒靴的欣赏，他满怀愉悦地注视着它们在高位上的样子。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

source: Established in 1813 , the House Judiciary Committee is the second oldest standing committee in Congress . Its jurisdiction often places it at the center of American politics , such as when it approved the U.S.A. PATRIOT Act following the terrorist attacks on September 11 , 2001 . Particularly important today is the Committee 's oversight responsibility for the Departments of Justice and Homeland Security .
domestication: 司法委员会成立于1813年，是国会中第二古老的常设委员会。它的职权范围常常让它处于美国政治的风口浪尖，比如在2001年9月11日恐怖袭击之后，该委员会批准了《爱国者法案》。如今，委员会对司法部和国土安全部的监督职责尤为重要。
foreignization: 成立于1813年，众议院司法委员会是国会中历史第二悠久的常设委员会。其管辖范围常常使其处于美国政治的中心，例如在2001年9月11日恐怖袭击后批准了《美国爱国者法案》。如今特别重要的是，该委员会对司法部和国土安全部负有监督责任。

source: I had said something like this to him , back in the desert , when we were at the last halt , and sold off the riding-urts . We had a night ( yes , because there was night , out there ) on the town , he with a pretty female pay-me , and I with a handsome male pay-me . We had also drunk the wine -- wells dry . And in the intimacy post-received pleasure and alcohol , I had let slip to Hassent my doubt about the magics of this place -- whether they were truly finished . source: There 's no question that some who claim to lust for virtuous work are using their debt as an excuse to go off and get rich . But some are sincere the law student or soon-to-be Wall Streeter who really does plan to quit after a few years of paying down debts and go teach high school . But even the most well-intentioned souls become acculturated . The fat paychecks come ; all your friends are getting them , too . The career ladder beckons , then there 's the new house and with it mortgage payments that dwarf the loan payments -- and on and on . Sallie mayhem
domestication: 毋庸置疑，有些人口口声声说着要追求高尚的职业，其实是借着债务的幌子去捞金。但也有人真心实意，比如法学院的学生或是即将投身华尔街的人，他们真的计划在还几年债后，去当高中老师。但即使是初衷最好的人也会被同化。高薪滚滚而来，周围的朋友也都拿着高薪。职业的晋升梯子就在眼前，接着是新房和高额的房贷——这房贷比贷款还款还多得多，如此循环往复。萨利的混乱局面。

source: Oliver did see it in his mind’s eye as distinctly as if he had not altered his position; but he thought it better not to worry the kind old lady; so he smiled gently when she looked at him; and Mrs. Bedwin, satisfied that he felt more comfortable, salted and broke bits of toasted bread into the broth, with all the bustle befitting so solemn a preparation. Oliver got through it with extraordinary expedition. He had scarcely swallowed the last spoonful, when there came a soft rap at the door. “Come in,” said the old lady; and in walked Mr. Brownlow.
domestication: 奥利弗在心里看得清清楚楚，就像他根本没有动过一样；但他觉得没必要让这位好心的老太太担心，所以当老太太看着他的时候，他就微微一笑；贝德温太太见他这样，便放心了，以为他舒服多了，于是忙忙碌碌地往汤里加盐，撒碎面包片，那阵势仿佛是在准备什么重要的仪式似的。奥利弗三下五除二就把汤喝完了。他刚喝完最后一口，门上就轻轻地响了两下。“请进。”老太太说。布朗洛先生就走了进来。
foreignization: 奥利弗在心中清清楚楚地看到了这一幕，就像他没有改变位置一样；但他认为最好别让这位善良的老太太担心；所以当她看着他的时候，他微微一笑；贝德温太太见他似乎感觉更舒服了，便忙忙碌碌地往肉汤里加盐并撒入烤面包碎片，以符合如此庄重的准备。奥利弗以惊人的速度吃完了这顿饭。他刚吞下最后一勺，就传来一阵轻轻的敲门声。“进来，”老太太说；布朗洛先生走了进来。

Oliver did see it in his mind’s eye as distinctly as if he had not altered his position; but he thought it better not to worry the kind old lady; so he smiled gently when she looked at him; and Mrs. Bedwin, satisfied that he felt more comfortable, salted and broke bits of toasted bread into the broth, with all the bustle befitting so solemn a preparation. Oliver got through it with extraordinary expedition. He had scarcely swallowed the last spoonful, when there came a soft rap at the door. “Come in,” said the old lady; and in walked Mr. Brownlow.

source: Mr. Huq became the host of a variety show , and literally stumbled into some luck when he opened a door too quickly and hit a stranger who turned out to be Noorul Quader . Mr. Quader was a civil servant who had just negotiated agreements that allowed desperately poor Bangladesh to start exporting garments without facing any serious quotas .

source: The band has perfected the art of the stealth groove ? that knack for quietly sliding into a composition and hooking everyone within earshot by mid-song . Their sound is built on a bedrock of bass , meditative vocal harmonies , rock-steady guitar licks and tightly syncopated percussion rhythms . It 's this eclectic mix of sounds that have afforded the band tour slots with a variety of artists over the years , including the Marley Brothers , blink-182 , G. Love &; Special Sauce , Pennywise , and N.E.R.D.
domestication: 这支乐队已经掌握了“隐形节奏”的艺术——他们可以悄无声息地滑入一首歌曲，并在歌曲中间迷住所有在场的人。他们的音乐建立在坚实的贝斯线上，冥想般的和声，稳定的吉他演奏和紧密的打击乐节奏之上。这正是他们在这些年里能够与各种不同风格的艺人同台演出的原因，包括马利兄弟乐队、眨眼182乐队、G. Love与特制酱乐队、便士智慧乐队和N.E.R.D.乐队等。他们的音乐风格很折衷，融合了多种不同的元素，因此能够吸引各式各样的观众。
foreignization: 该乐队已经掌握了隐秘的节奏艺术 - 在音乐中安静地滑入并通过歌曲的中间部分吸引所有在耳边的人。他们的声音建立在贝斯、冥想般的声乐和谐、稳如磐石的吉他和紧密的切分节奏打击乐之上。正是这种混合声音使得乐队多年来能够与包括马利兄弟、blink-182、G.Love & Special Sauce、Pennywise和NERD在内的多种艺术家一起巡演。

The band has perfected the art of the stealth groove ? that knack for quietly sliding into a composition and hooking everyone within earshot by mid-song . Their sound is built on a bedrock of bass , meditative vocal harmonies , rock-steady guitar licks and tightly syncopated percussion rhythms . It 's this eclectic mix of sounds that have afforded the band tour slots with a variety of artists over the years , including the Marley Brothers , blink-182 , G. Love &; Special Sauce , Pennywise , and N.E.R.D.

这支乐队已经掌握了“隐形节奏”的艺术——他们可以悄无声息地滑入一首歌曲，并在歌曲中间迷住所有在场的人。他们的音乐建立在坚实的贝斯线上，冥想般的和声，稳定的吉他演奏和紧密的打击乐节奏之上。这正是他们在这些年里能够与各种不同风格的艺人同台演出的原因，包括马利兄弟乐队、眨眼182乐队、G. Love与特制酱乐队、便士智慧乐队和N.E.R.D.乐队等。他们的音乐风格很折衷，融合了多种不同的元素，因此能够吸引各式各样的观众。

source: He would not have stopped then, for anything less necessary than breath, it being a spectral sort of race that he ran, and one highly desirable to get to the end of. He had a strong idea that the coffin he had seen was running after him; and, pictured as hopping on behind him, bolt upright, upon its narrow end, always on the point of overtaking him and hopping on at his side—perhaps taking his arm—it was a pursuer to shun. It was an inconsistent and ubiquitous fiend too, for, while it was making the whole night behind him dreadful, he darted out into the roadway to avoid dark alleys, fearful of its coming hopping out of them like a dropsical boy’s kite without tail and wings. It hid in doorways too, rubbing its horrible shoulders against doors, and drawing them up to its ears, as if it were laughing. It got into shadows on the road, and lay cunningly on its back to trip him up. All this time it was incessantly hopping on behind and gaining on him, so that when the boy got to his own door he had reason for being half dead. And even then it would not leave him, but followed him upstairs with a bump on every stair, scrambled into bed with him, and bumped down, dead and heavy, on his breast when he fell asleep.
domestication: 他当时是不会停下的，除非是喘口气这样性命攸关的事。这是一场幽灵般的赛跑，早点到头才是上策。他心里笃定那口棺材正在追他，仿佛它竖立着在他身后一蹦一跳，眼看就要追上他，蹦到他身边，说不定还会挽住他的胳膊。这个追踪者是他避之不及的。这玩意儿既矛盾又无处不在，一边让他身后的夜色变得恐怖无比，一边又逼得他冲向马路，生怕它从黑暗的小巷里蹦出来，就像个没尾巴没翅膀的肿腿风筝。它还藏在门洞里，肩膀蹭着门板，仿佛在哈哈大笑。它潜伏在路边的阴影中，狡猾地躺在那儿等着绊倒他。这一路上它一刻不停地跟在他后面蹦跶，离他越来越近，等那孩子跑到自己家门口时，他已经累得半死不活了。可这鬼东西还是不肯放过他，一路跟着他上楼，每上一级台阶就发出“咚咚”声，接着钻进被窝和他一起睡，等他睡着后，就沉甸甸地压在他胸口上。
foreignization: 他那时是不会停下的，除非是比呼吸更必要的事情，因为他跑的是一场幽灵般的赛跑，而且非常渴望能够到达终点。他强烈地感觉到自己看到的棺材正在追赶他；想象着它直立着，窄窄的一端在地上跳动，总是快要追上他，然后跳到他身边——或许还会挽起他的手臂——这是一个必须躲避的追逐者。这还是一个不一致且无处不在的恶魔，因为当它使他身后的整个夜晚变得可怕时，他会冲到马路上，以避开黑暗的小巷，害怕它会像一个没有尾巴和翅膀的浮肿男孩的风筝一样从里面跳出来。它还藏在门廊里，用它可怕的肩膀摩擦门，并把门拉到耳边，仿佛在笑。它钻进路上的阴影中，巧妙地躺在背上，试图绊倒他。所有这段时间，它一直在不断地在他身后跳跃并逐渐靠近他，因此当男孩到达自己的门口时，他已经累得半死。即使到了那时，它也没有放过他，而是跟着他上楼，每走一级楼梯都会发出一声闷响，爬进他的床，当他入睡时，沉重地压在他的胸口。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

He would not have stopped then, for anything less necessary than breath, it being a spectral sort of race that he ran, and one highly desirable to get to the end of. He had a strong idea that the coffin he had seen was running after him; and, pictured as hopping on behind him, bolt upright, upon its narrow end, always on the point of overtaking him and hopping on at his side—perhaps taking his arm—it was a pursuer to shun. It was an inconsistent and ubiquitous fiend too, for, while it was making the whole night behind him dreadful, he darted out into the roadway to avoid dark alleys, fearful of its coming hopping out of them like a dropsical boy’s kite without tail and wings. It hid in doorways too, rubbing its horrible shoulders against doors, and drawing them up to its ears, as if it were laughing. It got into shadows on the road, and lay cunningly on its back to trip him up. All this time it was incessantly hopping on behind and gaining on him, so that when the boy got to his own door he had reason for being half dead. And even then it would not leave him, but followed him upstairs with a bump on every stair, scrambled into bed with him, and bumped down, dead and heavy, on his breast when he fell asleep.

source: It was a dull, close, overcast summer evening. The clouds, which had been threatening all day, spread out in a dense and sluggish mass of vapour, already yielded large drops of rain, and seemed to presage a violent thunder-storm, when Mr. and Mrs. Bumble, turning out of the main street of the town, directed their course towards a scattered little colony of ruinous houses, distant from it some mile and a-half, or thereabouts, and erected on a low unwholesome swamp, bordering upon the river.
domestication: 那是个沉闷、潮湿、阴云密布的夏夜。天上的乌云一整天都憋着劲儿，终于凝成了厚厚的、慵懒的一团水汽，开始滴下大颗的雨珠，预示着一场猛烈的雷雨即将来临。正在这时，班布尔夫妇从镇上的主街上拐了出来，朝着距此大约一里半远的一片破败房屋走去。这些房子零零散散地建在河边一个低洼不健康的沼泽上。
foreignization: 那是一个沉闷、闷热、阴云密布的夏日傍晚。整天都威胁着要下雨的云层，现在扩展成一片浓重而迟缓的水汽，已经开始落下大滴的雨点，并似乎预示着一场猛烈的雷暴。就在这个时候，邦布尔先生和夫人从镇上的主街拐出，朝着离镇约一英里半左右的一片零散的破败房屋走去，这些房屋建在一个靠近河边的低洼不健康的沼泽上。

source: " Oh , naturally you 'll have to take that up with the new editor , whoever that might be . There 's a wealth of applicants - folks you 've never heard of have come out of the woodwork-but Ed 's too busy earning his Florida real-estate broker 's license to interview them yet . However , if you can write entertainingly about postcards - 11 I knocked down a Chinese restaurant delivery-boy in my haste to clear Gordon 's offices . Helping the lad up , I was somehow not surprised to hear him exclaim , " TANSTAAFL ! "
domestication: 唉，你想跟编辑提这个事儿吧，那得看新来的编辑是什么样的人了。申请的人挺多的，都是些你没听说过的，跟从不知道哪里冒出来的一样。不过编辑埃德现在忙着考佛罗里达州房地产经纪人执照，哪有工夫面试他们呢。反正，如果你能写出关于明信片的好文章……我刚才在急着清理戈登办公室的时候，不小心撞倒了一个中国餐馆的送货小伙，帮他起来后，我听到他惊呼“没有免费的午餐！”，倒也并不意外。
foreignization: “ 哦，自然你得去跟新编辑谈这件事，无论谁来担任都行。申请者非常多——你从未听说过的人都从不知哪里冒出来了——但是埃德太忙于获得佛罗里达州房地产经纪人执照，以至于还没时间面试他们。然而，如果你能写出关于明信片的有趣文章——我急着清空戈登的办公室，结果撞倒了一个中国餐馆的送货男孩。在帮那个男孩站起来时，我并不惊讶地听到他大喊，“TANSTAAFL！”

source: That did n't end the dream . Aviation enthusiast and Bureau of Air Commerce chief Eugene Vidal ( father of novelist Gore Vidal ) offered government grants to manufacturers of a " poor man 's airplane " -- one that could be had for $700 back in the 1930s . Inventor Waldo Waterman took him up on the offer in 1936 and built a small plane with removable wings , a clutch and a transmission , called the Waterman Arrowbile . It actually flew through the air and rumbled over roads , but did n't fly as well as the average plane nor drive as well as the average car . Waterman never mass-produced the thing and no one has since found a market for an aerial roadster .
domestication: 这事儿还没完。航空爱好者兼商务部航空局的局长尤金·维达尔（小说家戈尔·维达尔的父亲）向制造商提供了政府补助，目标是研发一款“穷人的飞机”——在20世纪30年代，这款飞机的售价只需700美元。发明家沃尔多·沃特曼在1936年接受了这个提议，造了一款带可拆卸机翼、离合器和变速箱的小飞机，取名为沃特曼箭车。这玩意儿不仅能飞天，还能在路上跑，但飞得不如普通飞机顺畅，开起来也比不上一般的汽车。沃特曼没能让它量产，后来也没人找到空中轿车的市场。
foreignization: 那并没有结束这个梦想。航空爱好者兼商务航空局主管尤金·维达尔（小说家戈尔·维达尔的父亲）向“穷人的飞机”制造商提供了政府补助——这种飞机在20世纪30年代可以以700美元的价格买到。发明家瓦尔多·沃特曼在1936年接受了这一提议，制造了一种带有可拆卸机翼、离合器和变速箱的小型飞机，名为沃特曼箭车。它实际上可以在空中飞行并在道路上轰鸣行驶，但飞得不如普通飞机好，也开得不如普通汽车好。沃特曼从未批量生产这种飞机，此后也没有人找到空中敞篷车的市场。

That did n't end the dream . Aviation enthusiast and Bureau of Air Commerce chief Eugene Vidal ( father of novelist Gore Vidal ) offered government grants to manufacturers of a " poor man 's airplane " -- one that could be had for $700 back in the 1930s . Inventor Waldo Waterman took him up on the offer in 1936 and built a small plane with removable wings , a clutch and a transmission , called the Waterman Arrowbile . It actually flew through the air and rumbled over roads , but did n't fly as well as the average plane nor drive as well as the average car . Waterman never mass-produced the thing and no one has since found a market for an aerial roadster .

source: In less than a second , a horn will sound from below . Jess will fall back , swing herself away from her father and toward the rest of her life , her friends waiting in a car by the curb , the night to come , the boy who has told her she is beautiful , who will , in a few hours , in the basement of another home , slip his hand inside her pants and whisper again that she is beautiful .
domestication: 不到一秒钟，下面就会响起喇叭声。杰西会往后退一步，摆动身体远离她的父亲，朝她余下的生活迈去——朋友们已经在路边的车里等着她了，夜幕即将降临，有个男孩曾告诉她她很美，几个小时后，在另一户人家的地下室里，他会把手伸进她的裤子里，再次轻声说她很美。

source: I 'm not going to apologize for valuing my time enough to find ways to make that time work harder for me , and I 'm not going to apologize that , because my time is valuable , there are things in my house that are just not perfect . There are unfinished projects laying around . While the current bills get filed , the old ones sometimes take a while to get shredded . I SWEAR I 'm making a wall hanging with all those wine corks ... some day . When someone says something to me about a particular mess or clutter pile , I just look at them and say that as soon as it 's worth $40+ an hour for me to clean it up or finish it , I will . Not that someone will pay me to organize it/finish the project , just that it will be WORTH that much to me in ease of use of my **26;4891;TOOLONG .
domestication: 我不打算为了珍惜自己的时间而去道歉，我找到方法让时间更高效地为我工作，这没什么好抱歉的。我的时间很宝贵，家里有些事情自然就不会那么完美。家里有些未完成的项目，新账单归档了，旧账单却迟迟没时间销毁。我发誓，总有一天我会用那些葡萄酒塞子做个墙饰。如果有人提到家里的某个乱糟糟的地方或一堆杂物，我就直视他们，告诉他们，只要整理这些或完成这些项目的价值达到每小时40多块钱，我立马动手。不是说有人会付钱让我去整理或完成这些项目，而是对我来说，这事儿得值这么多钱才值得我去花时间。
foreignization: 我不打算因为重视我的时间而寻找方法让这段时间更高效地利用而不道歉，我也不打算因为我的时间很宝贵，家里有些事情并不完美而道歉。周围有些未完成的项目。虽然当前的账单会及时归档，但旧的账单有时会拖延一段时间才处理掉。我发誓，我会用所有那些葡萄酒塞子做一个墙面装饰……总有一天。当有人对我提到某个特定的混乱或杂物堆时，我只是看着他们说，一旦清理它或完成它值得每小时40美元以上，我就会去做。并不是有人会付钱让我整理它/完成这个项目，只是对我来说，这将值这么多钱，以换取使用的便捷性。

source: He was thin when he came back from Vietnam . No , not really thin , but just not the great stunning lout her loneliness had made of him . The skin on his shoulders , and where it sloped to his breast , was pale , mottled , tight . Almost transparent . He grew a beard . She put her mouth in the beard .. Her mouth against his bearded face . Deep , like a jungle . She liked that , a mouth full of hair . Then his eyes lit up and he took her face in his hands and said , so close their lips were touching , and he smiling all the time , " Wife-to-be . My unwed wife . "
domestication: 他从越南回来时很瘦，不算真正的瘦，只是没有了她在孤独中想象中的那个令人惊艳的大块头。他的肩膀和胸部的皮肤很苍白，斑驳，紧绷，几乎透明。他留起了胡子，她把嘴唇贴在他的胡子上，深深地像是在探索一片丛林。她很喜欢这种感觉，嘴里充满了胡须。然后他的眼睛亮了起来，他握住她的脸，说：“我的准妻子，我的未婚妻。”他的话语温柔，带着笑容，他们的嘴唇几乎相触。

Nobody had made any acknowledgment of Mr. Carton’s part in the day’s proceedings; nobody had known of it. He was unrobed, and was none the better for it in appearance.
其实一直以来，都没有人对卡顿先生在当天事件中所起的作用给予任何认可；因为根本就没人知道这回事。他已经脱下了官袍，但这样一来，他的模样也没有变得更好看一点。

source: The United States linked the question of indemnization for U.S. copper companies with Chile 's multilateral foreign debt . That foreign debt , an inheritance from the obligations incurred by the Alessandri and Frei governments , was the second highest foreign debt per capita of any country in the world . Yet , in the 1972 and 1973 Paris Club foreign debt negotiations with Chile 's principal foreign creditor nations , the United States alone refused to consider rescheduling Chile 's foreign payments until there was movement toward indemnization for the U.S. copper companies . The United States also exerted pressure on each of the other foreign creditor nations not to renegotiate Chile 's foreign debt as a group .
domestication: 美国把赔偿美国铜业公司的问题跟智利的多边外债联系在一起。这种外债是阿莱桑德里和弗雷政府留下的包袱，是世界上人均外债第二高的国家。然而，在1972年和1973年的巴黎俱乐部外债谈判中，面对智利的主要外债国，美国拒绝考虑重新安排智利的外债付款，除非美国铜业公司得到赔偿。美国还对其他外债国施压，不让他们作为一个整体来重新协商智利的外债问题。这种做法使得智利的外债问题变得更加复杂和棘手。美国的强硬态度无疑增加了智利的经济负担，也让智利感到极大的压力。这种情况下，智利不得不面对着巨大的经济挑战。
foreignization: 美国将美国铜业公司的赔偿问题与智利的多边外债联系起来。这种外债是由阿莱桑德里和弗雷政府承担的义务所遗留下来的，是世界上任何国家的人均外债中第二高的。然而，在1972年和1973年与智利主要外国债权国在巴黎俱乐部的外债谈判中，美国独自拒绝考虑重新安排智利的外债支付，直到美国铜业公司的赔偿问题有所进展为止。美国还对每一个其他外国债权国施加压力，阻止他们作为一个整体来重新谈判智利的外债。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The United States linked the question of indemnization for U.S. copper companies with Chile 's multilateral foreign debt . That foreign debt , an inheritance from the obligations incurred by the Alessandri and Frei governments , was the second highest foreign debt per capita of any country in the world . Yet , in the 1972 and 1973 Paris Club foreign debt negotiations with Chile 's principal foreign creditor nations , the United States alone refused to consider rescheduling Chile 's foreign payments until there was movement toward indemnization for the U.S. copper companies . The United States also exerted pressure on each of the other foreign creditor nations not to renegotiate Chile 's foreign debt as a group .

source: It 's about time someone spoke out about this inane drug war as Ed Quillen did in his July 12 column ( " Can anybody tell us what victory means in this longest war ? " ) . In the past , the media ( free public service announcements ) and the government at all levels have acted as though there were only one side to this issue . All of a sudden , the public seems to be waking up and listening to the other side . Do n't get me wrong - I 'm not in favor of kids or adults abusing drugs . Been there , done that ! I 'm lucky to have survived . But the fact is , the current " cure " is worse than the disease .
domestication: 也该有人像埃德·奎伦7月12日在专栏里那样，站出来对这场荒唐的禁毒战争说两句了（《谁来告诉我们，在这场最漫长的战争中胜利意味着什么？》）。过去，媒体（那些所谓的免费公益广告）和各级政府总是一边倒，好像这事儿只有一面之词。可突然之间，大众似乎开始觉醒，愿意听听另一面的声音了。别误会，我不是支持孩子们或者大人吸毒。我可是亲身经历过，能活下来已经算是幸运。但事实就是，现在的“治疗”比疾病本身还要糟糕。
foreignization: 是时候有人像埃德·奎伦在7月12日的专栏中那样（“有人能告诉我们在这场最长的战争中胜利意味着什么吗？”）说出关于这场愚蠢的禁毒战争的意见了。在过去，媒体（免费的公共服务公告）和各级政府都表现得好像这个问题只有一面之词。突然之间，公众似乎开始觉醒，并倾听另一方的声音。别误会我的意思——我不赞同孩子们或成年人滥用药物。我经历过，也做过！我很幸运能够活下来。但事实是，当前的“治疗方法”比疾病本身更糟。

I 'm lucky to have survived . But the fact is , the current " cure " is worse than the disease .

source: The mayor of New Bern , North Carolina , says his city has imposed a curfew . He says there are 30 roads still unpassable , 4,200 homes and more than 300 commercial buildings damaged , 6,000 customers without power and 1,200 residents in shelters because of hurricane-turned Tropical Depression Florence .
domestication: 北卡罗来纳州新伯恩市的市长说，该市已经实施了宵禁。他表示，由于飓风佛罗伦萨，目前仍有30条道路无法通行，4,200栋房屋和300多座商业建筑受损，6,000户居民断电，1,200名居民被迫住在避难所。
foreignization: 北卡罗来纳州纽伯恩市长说，他的城市已经实施了宵禁。他说，仍有30条道路无法通行，4,200栋房屋和超过300座商业建筑受损，6,000名客户停电，1,200名居民由于飓风弗洛伦斯转化为热带低压系统而被迫进入避难所。

source: In all but the stormiest weather , Mr. Bates was either mending his lobster traps or at sea from , as he put it , in to kaint-from can-see to ca n't . Hannah 's workday was longer , starting with building a fire in the cookstove before sunup and not ending until the dishes were dried and the fires banked .
domestication: 除了最恶劣的天气，贝茨先生要么在修补龙虾陷阱，要么出海捕鱼，他常说从天亮忙到天黑。汉娜的工作时间更长，她得在太阳出来前先烧好炉子，一直忙到洗完碗碟，封好炉火才算是完活。
foreignization: 除了最暴风雨的天气外，贝茨先生要么在修理他的龙虾陷阱，要么如他所说，从“能见到”到“不能见”。汉娜的工作日更长，从日出前在炊事炉里生火开始，一直到洗完碗碟和封好火才结束。

source: Hannah 's first week was like her darkest dreams . Mr. Bates ' mother was as old as Methuselah and bedridden . Giving her sponge baths made Hannah 's stomach clench not just from the smell but from fear that the skin would tear and her whole body would come apart like overcooked sole in the skillet .
domestication: 汉娜的第一周就像她最糟糕的噩梦一样。贝茨先生的母亲老态龙钟，行动不便，整天卧床不起。给她擦澡的时候，汉娜肚子直发紧，不仅是因为那股难闻的气味，还因为她担心老太太的皮肤会被擦破，身体就会像锅里煮过头的鱼片一样散架。
foreignization: 汉娜的第一个星期就像她的最黑暗的梦一样。贝茨先生的母亲跟玛土撒拉一样老，卧床不起。给她擦澡让汉娜的胃部因害怕而紧缩，这不仅是因为气味，还有担心皮肤会撕裂，而她的整个身体会像平底锅里煮过头的鱼片一样散架。

source: Oliver, whose eyes had glistened at the mention of meat, and who was trembling with eagerness to devour it, replied in the negative; and a plateful of coarse broken victuals was set before him.
domestication: 奥利弗一听到肉的提及，就眼里闪出了光芒，此刻他正急不可耐地想要狼吞虎咽地吃掉这些食物，他回答说自己还没吃饭。于是，一盘杂乱无章的残羹冷饭被摆在了他的面前。

source: Oh , I knew those dagoes were coming all right , and that 's why I hid in the orchard , crouching there in Wellington boots , the hem of my dress bunched in one hand . Over sixty trees were in bloom , and I was busy brushing petals out of the valley of fabric between my knees , trying to breathe , because the scent of orange blossom was chokingly sweet . And the rabbits the bloody rabbits had ringbarked all the newly planted almond slips , their buds already wilting .

source: A : Kids just do n't have as many cavities anymore , so the next 20 years will be fascinating because dentistry is going to be totally different . However , I 'm in an age group in which people still need the dentist . Even if they do n't have dental problems , people have the disposable income to concentrate on bright , straight smiles -- maybe that 's all there will be to do in 20 years , who knows ? On the other hand , I 've seen research saying that roughly 50 percent of people do n't go to the dentist -- at least not regularly . That 's a huge untapped market .
domestication: 孩子们现在的蛀牙问题已经不如以前那么严重了，所以未来二十年会非常有趣，因为牙科领域将会变得完全不同。不过，我现在属于那个仍需要看牙医的年龄段。即使人们没有牙齿问题，他们也有足够的闲钱来让自己拥有洁白、笔直的笑容——也许二十年后，这就是牙医唯一要做的事情，谁知道呢？另一方面，我看到了一些研究，表明大约50%的人不去看牙医——至少不是定期去。这是一个巨大的潜在市场，实在令人惊讶，有这么多人都没有得到牙科服务。
foreignization: A：孩子们不再有这么多蛀牙，所以接下来的20年将会很有趣，因为牙科将会变得完全不同。然而，我处于一个仍需要看牙医的人的年龄段。即使他们没有牙齿问题，人们有足够的可支配收入来关注洁白、笔直的笑容——也许在20年后，这将是唯一要做的事情，谁知道呢？另一方面，我看到过研究表明，大约50%的人不去看牙医——至少不是定期去。那是一个巨大的未开发市场。

source: 3 . Develop Scenarios -- Futurists often describe the future development of a trend , a strategy , or a wild-card event in story form . These scenarios paint a vivid picture that can help you visualize possible future developments and show how you can prepare effectively for future risks and opportunities . Scenarios help you to blend what you know about the future with imagination about the uncertain . Scenarios help you move from dreaming to planning and then to accomplishment .

source: It was now Young Jerry’s turn to approach the gate: which he did, holding his breath. Crouching down again in a corner there, and looking in, he made out the three fishermen creeping through some rank grass! and all the gravestones in the churchyard—it was a large churchyard that they were in—looking on like ghosts in white, while the church tower itself looked on like the ghost of a monstrous giant. They did not creep far, before they stopped and stood upright. And then they began to fish.
domestication: 现在轮到小杰瑞靠近大门了，他屏住呼吸，小心翼翼地蹑手蹑脚地走过去。又一次他缩进角落，探头往里看，这回他发现三个渔夫正在穿过一片杂草丛生的荒地！周围是教堂墓地里的无数墓碑——他们所在的墓地很大——那些墓碑像白衣幽灵一样站着，教堂的塔楼像个巨型幽灵一般耸立在那里。渔夫们没有走多远，就停了下来，挺直了身子。然后，他们开始钓鱼了。

source: He was given to yes or no answers . When writers would ask Maris if he were going to break the record , Kubek says a typical response was : " How should I know ? " That was June . By late summer , according to The New York Yankee Encyclopedia , that had deteriorated to " How the hell should I know ? "
domestication: 他平时说话就爱答非所问。作家们问马里斯是否打算打破纪录时，库贝克说，马里斯通常会回答：“我怎么知道？”这是六月的情况。到了夏末，《纽约洋基百科全书》记载，他的回答变成了：“我怎么可能知道？”

source: Mike 's heart goes out to him . Gautam has the worst case of Squirt Envy anybody in the Brainpan has ever seen , but he also suffers the misfortune of being a rare genius in exactly the right job for both his rarity and his genius . This is a misfortune because Gautam was brought up with a sense of obligation to his fellow human beings , which means that while he wants the Squirt more than anything in the world , he also believes that he owes it to humanity to sacrifice this desire in order to keep the Virt running for everyone else . So . It 's a sad case . But right now Mike needs the optimally functional Gautam , not the despairing Gautam , so he says , " Gautam . Goddammit . What is going on ? "
domestication: 迈克真替他难过。 Gautam 的“喷射嫉妒”在大脑小组里算是最严重的了，但他又偏偏是个罕见的天才，正好干着最适合他这等天才的工作。这反而成了他的不幸，因为他从小就有一种对人类的责任感，这让他虽然比谁都想要那个“喷射”，但又觉得有义务为了大家牺牲自己的欲望，确保“美德”系统正常运行。所以啊，这真是个让人揪心的情况。可现在，迈克需要的是状态最好的 Gautam，而不是垂头丧气的 Gautam，于是他就说：“Gautam，见鬼，这是怎么回事？”
foreignization: 迈克对他深表同情。高塔姆在大脑小组里患有最严重的喷射嫉妒症，但他同时也遭受着一种不幸，即他是一个罕见的天才，而他的工作恰好既适合他的罕见也适合他的天才。这是一种不幸，因为高塔姆从小就被灌输了一种对同类的责任感，这意味着虽然他比世界上任何东西都更想要那个喷射，但他也相信自己有义务为了人类牺牲这种欲望，以保持Virt的运行供其他人使用。所以。这是一个令人悲伤的案例。但此时迈克需要的是功能最优的高塔姆，而不是绝望的高塔姆，所以他说道，“高塔姆。该死。到底发生了什么？”

source: “As I was saying; if Monsieur Manette had not died; if he had suddenly and silently disappeared; if he had been spirited away; if it had not been difficult to guess to what dreadful place, though no art could trace him; if he had an enemy in some compatriot who could exercise a privilege that I in my own time have known the boldest people afraid to speak of in a whisper, across the water there; for instance, the privilege of filling up blank forms for the consignment of any one to the oblivion of a prison for any length of time; if his wife had implored the king, the queen, the court, the clergy, for any tidings of him, and all quite in vain;—then the history of your father would have been the history of this unfortunate gentleman, the Doctor of Beauvais.”
domestication: 正如我刚才所说，如果曼内特先生没有死去，而是突然无声无息地消失了；如果他被神秘地带走了；如果人们虽然能猜到他去了某个可怕的地方，却无法找到任何线索；如果他有一个同乡的敌人，这个敌人拥有一种特权，这种特权在当时连最胆大的人都不敢在水那边低语提及，比如可以随意填写空白表格，将任何人关进监狱，让人间蒸发；如果他的妻子向国王、王后、朝廷、教会恳求过他的消息，但都毫无结果——那么你父亲的故事，就是这位不幸的博韦医生的故事了。
foreignization: 正如我所说；如果曼内特先生没有去世；如果他突然且无声无息地消失了；如果他被带走了；如果很难猜到他被带到了什么可怕的地方，尽管任何手段都无法追踪到他；如果他有一个同胞敌人，这个敌人拥有我在我那个时代见过最勇敢的人也不敢在水那边低声提及的特权，例如，填写空白表格将任何人关押进监狱并使其消失的特权，无论时间多长；如果他的妻子向国王、王后、宫廷和教士恳求有关他的任何消息，但都毫无结果；——那么你父亲的历史就会是这位不幸的先生，博韦的医生的历史。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“As I was saying; if Monsieur Manette had not died; if he had suddenly and silently disappeared; if he had been spirited away; if it had not been difficult to guess to what dreadful place, though no art could trace him; if he had an enemy in some compatriot who could exercise a privilege that I in my own time have known the boldest people afraid to speak of in a whisper, across the water there; for instance, the privilege of filling up blank forms for the consignment of any one to the oblivion of a prison for any length of time; if his wife had implored the king, the queen, the court, the clergy, for any tidings of him, and all quite in vain;—then the history of your father would have been the history of this unfortunate gentleman, the Doctor of Beauvais.”

正如我刚才所说，如果曼内特先生没有死去，而是突然无声无息地消失了；如果他被神秘地带走了；如果人们虽然能猜到他去了某个可怕的地方，却无法找到任何线索；如果他有一个同乡的敌人，这个敌人拥有一种特权，这种特权在当时连最胆大的人都不敢在水那边低语提及，比如可以随意填写空白表格，将任何人关进监狱，让人间蒸发；如果他的妻子向国王、王后、朝廷、教会恳求过他的消息，但都毫无结果——那么你父亲的故事，就是这位不幸的博韦医生的故事了。

source: Although establishing a guiding principle for a garden is fairly easy to do , its execution generally requires tackling a multitude of muscle-straining obstacles . Here , the wild tangle of growth had to be cleared and the hillside terraced to prevent erosion and provide places in which to relax and entertain . This exercise revealed thick , rocky , clay soil . The next step was to add a foot and a half of topsoil to create a more congenial , better-drained environment for plant roots , ( Even so , the water-retaining clay used to create seeps in wet winters , which flooded the basement of the house and occasionally posed problems for the arid-land plants of which the two are fond . )
domestication: 虽然给花园定个指导原则很简单，但实施起来却要克服许多费力的难题。这里的情况尤为复杂，乱糟糟的野草得清理干净，山坡还得做成梯田，防止水土流失，同时提供休闲娱乐的地方。这一番劳作下来，才发现这里的土壤又厚又硬，满是岩石和黏土。接下来，为了给植物根系创造一个更友好、排水更好的环境，我们又铺了一英尺半的表土。即便如此，冬天湿气重时，黏土还是会存水，导致地下室进水，偶尔还会给这两位喜爱干旱植物的人带来麻烦。
foreignization: 虽然为花园建立一个指导原则相对容易，但其执行通常需要克服许多费力的障碍。在这里，必须清理杂乱无章的野生植物，并将山坡梯田化以防止侵蚀并提供休闲和娱乐的地方。这一过程揭示了厚厚的、多石的黏土土壤。下一步是添加一英尺半的表土，以创造一个更适合植物根系生长且排水更好的环境，（即便如此，用于保持水分的黏土在湿润的冬季仍会形成渗流，导致房屋地下室被淹，偶尔还会给这两位喜欢的旱地植物带来问题。）

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Although establishing a guiding principle for a garden is fairly easy to do , its execution generally requires tackling a multitude of muscle-straining obstacles . Here , the wild tangle of growth had to be cleared and the hillside terraced to prevent erosion and provide places in which to relax and entertain . This exercise revealed thick , rocky , clay soil . The next step was to add a foot and a half of topsoil to create a more congenial , better-drained environment for plant roots , ( Even so , the water-retaining clay used to create seeps in wet winters , which flooded the basement of the house and occasionally posed problems for the arid-land plants of which the two are fond . )

虽然给花园定个指导原则很简单，但实施起来却要克服许多费力的难题。这里的情况尤为复杂，乱糟糟的野草得清理干净，山坡还得做成梯田，防止水土流失，同时提供休闲娱乐的地方。这一番劳作下来，才发现这里的土壤又厚又硬，满是岩石和黏土。接下来，为了给植物根系创造一个更友好、排水更好的环境，我们又铺了一英尺半的表土。即便如此，冬天湿气重时，黏土还是会存水，导致地下室进水，偶尔还会给这两位喜爱干旱植物的人带来麻烦。

Here , the wild tangle of growth had to be cleared and the hillside terraced to prevent erosion and provide places in which to relax and entertain . This exercise revealed thick , rocky , clay soil . The next step was to add a foot and a half of topsoil to create a more congenial , better-drained environment for plant roots , ( Even so , the water-retaining clay used to create seeps in wet winters , which flooded the basement of the house and occasionally posed problems for the arid-land plants of which the two are fond . )
虽然为花园建立一个指导原则相对容易，但其执行通常需要克服许多费力的障碍。在这里，必须清理杂乱无章的野生植物，并将山坡梯田化以防止侵蚀并提供休闲和娱乐的地方。这一过程揭示了厚厚的、多石的黏土土壤。下一步是添加一英尺半的表土，以创造一个更适合植物根系生长且排水更好的环境，（即便如此，用于保持水分的黏土在湿润的冬季仍会形成渗流，导致房屋地下室被淹，偶尔还会给这两位喜欢的旱地植物带来问题。）

source: Perfectly still and silent, and not even fallen back in her chair, she sat under his hand, utterly insensible; with her eyes open and fixed upon him, and with that last expression looking as if it were carved or branded into her forehead. source: Monseigneur, as a class, had dissociated himself from the phenomenon of his not being appreciated: of his being so little wanted in France, as to incur considerable danger of receiving his dismissal from it, and this life together. Like the fabled rustic who raised the Devil with infinite pains, and was so terrified at the sight of him that he could ask the Enemy no question, but immediately fled; so, Monseigneur, after boldly reading the Lord’s Prayer backwards for a great number of years, and performing many other potent spells for compelling the Evil One, no sooner beheld him in his terrors than he took to his noble heels.
domestication: 老爷们作为一个阶层，已经和他们不受待见的现象脱钩了：在法国，他们如此不受欢迎，以至于面临着被赶出法国甚至被赶出人世的危险。这就像那个传说中的乡下人，费尽千辛万苦召唤出了魔鬼，结果一见到魔鬼就吓得魂不附体，连个问题都没敢问就撒腿跑了。同样，老爷们多年来大胆地倒念主祷文，还施了许多强大的咒语来迫使邪魔现身，可一旦真的在恐惧中看到了邪魔，立刻就拔腿逃之夭夭。
foreignization: 蒙塞涅日作为一个阶级，已经把自己与他不被赏识的现象脱离开来：他在法国如此不受欢迎，以至于面临被解雇并失去生命的巨大危险。就像那个传说中的乡下人，费尽千辛万苦召唤出了魔鬼，却因见到他的模样而吓得魂飞魄散，连一个问题都不敢向敌人发问，立即逃之夭夭；同样，蒙塞涅日在大胆地倒念了多年的主祷文，并施行了许多其他强大的咒语以迫使恶魔屈服后，一看到他便吓得拔腿就跑。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Monseigneur, as a class, had dissociated himself from the phenomenon of his not being appreciated: of his being so little wanted in France, as to incur considerable danger of receiving his dismissal from it, and this life together. Like the fabled rustic who raised the Devil with infinite pains, and was so terrified at the sight of him that he could ask the Enemy no question, but immediately fled; so, Monseigneur, after boldly reading the Lord’s Prayer backwards for a great number of years, and performing many other potent spells for compelling the Evil One, no sooner beheld him in his terrors than he took to his noble heels.

source: But , yes , so much of the language here does indeed come across as completely gratuitous -- like people trying to sound like part of the Kool Kids Klub . source: The 1958 ranch I grew up in had a pink main bathroom and I loved it . I suspect my 1957 L-shaped ranch did , too , before a 80 ? s remodel by the previous owner , since several houses near me still have them . I plan to someday restore my kitchen to it 's mid-century glory and eventually the bathroom , too . It just may become pink again ! My grandmother 's house still has a pink bathroom .

I plan to someday restore my kitchen to it 's mid-century glory and eventually the bathroom , too . It just may become pink again ! My grandmother 's house still has a pink bathroom .
我长大的1958年的牧场房有一个粉红色的主要浴室，我非常喜欢它。我怀疑我1957年的L形牧场房在前主人80年代翻修之前也有，因为附近的几栋房子现在仍然有。我计划有一天将我的厨房恢复到它的中世纪辉煌，最终也会翻修浴室。它可能会再次变成粉红色！我祖母的房子仍然有一个粉红色的浴室。

source: Monseigneur, as a class, had dissociated himself from the phenomenon of his not being appreciated: of his being so little wanted in France, as to incur considerable danger of receiving his dismissal from it, and this life together. Like the fabled rustic who raised the Devil with infinite pains, and was so terrified at the sight of him that he could ask the Enemy no question, but immediately fled; so, Monseigneur, after boldly reading the Lord’s Prayer backwards for a great number of years, and performing many other potent spells for compelling the Evil One, no sooner beheld him in his terrors than he took to his noble heels.
domestication: 莫尼格先生作为一个阶级的代表，已经与自己不被重视的现象脱节了：他在法国被低估到几乎快被驱逐出境的地步。但是，就像那个传说中的农夫，费尽心机地召唤出魔鬼，但当他看到魔鬼时却吓得魂飞魄散，连一个问题都没问就落荒而逃一样，莫尼格先生在大胆地反向念主祷文很多年，并且施展了许多其他强大的咒语来召唤邪恶之人之后，当他看到邪恶之人时，就赶紧夹着尾巴逃跑了。
foreignization: 蒙塞尼耶作为一个阶级，已经与他没有被欣赏的现象脱节：他在法国不受欢迎，甚至面临着被法国解雇的重大危险，以及失去这生命一起。就像传说中的乡下人，他费尽千辛万苦地唤醒了魔鬼，但看到魔鬼时却吓得要死，以至于他问不了敌人任何问题，而是立刻逃跑；同样，蒙塞尼耶在大胆地倒背《主祷文》很多年，并且施展了许多其他强大的咒语来迫使邪恶者，却在他一看到恐怖的魔鬼时，就夺路而逃。

source: As children mill about near the cloakroom waiting for the hour of their class , the first hurdle looms : partnering . Who will ask you to walk in with him ? Jack Hutchinson , who bounces in the polka ? Chubby Tuttle , who hops but is a good kid ? Jerry Post , whose hands sweat through his gloves ? Pee Wee Johnson , whose head scrapes your nose ? Or , unasked this week , will you have to find a partner among the other stranded girls , preserve face , and walk in smiling ?
domestication: 孩子们在更衣室外面等待上课的时候，第一个难题就出现了：找舞伴。谁会邀请你和他一起进教室呢？是跳波尔卡舞总是弹跳的杰克·哈钦森？还是虽然跳舞不漂亮但是很好相处的恰比·塔特尔？或者是穿着手套还能让人感觉到他手心出汗的杰瑞·波斯特？又或者是皮威·约翰逊，他的头碰得你鼻子生痛？抑或这周没人邀请你，你不得不在其他落单的女孩中找个伴，保全面子，强颜欢笑地走进去？
foreignization: 孩子们在衣帽间附近等待上课的时间，第一个障碍出现了：找舞伴。谁会邀请你和他一起进去？是弹着波尔卡舞进来的杰克·哈钦森？是虽然有点胖但是很好相处的查比·塔特尔？是手掌通过手套冒汗的杰瑞·波斯特？是头碰到你鼻子的皮威·约翰逊？或者这周没有人邀请你，你不得不在其他被抛弃的女孩中找个伴，维护面子，带着微笑地走进去？
