Translate the following text to Chinese.

It was now Young Jerry’s turn to approach the gate: which he did, holding his breath. Crouching down again in a corner there, and looking in, he made out the three fishermen creeping through some rank grass! and all the gravestones in the churchyard—it was a large churchyard that they were in—looking on like ghosts in white, while the church tower itself looked on like the ghost of a monstrous giant. They did not creep far, before they stopped and stood upright. And then they began to fish.

source: Consumer groups say Dominion Virginia Power , the state 's No.1 utility , spearheaded the legislation and is unfairly benefiting from it . It can keep 40% of excess profits and earn an especially high rate of return for building nuclear plants , renewable power or " clean coal " generators . And Dominion can still sell power into the region 's competitive wholesale markets .
domestication: 消费者团体说，弗吉尼亚州头号电力公司——多米尼能源，带头推动了这项立法，并从中获得了不公平的好处。它能保留40%的超额利润，建设核电站、可再生能源或“清洁煤”发电厂还能获得特别高的回报率。同时，多米尼能源仍然可以向地区内的竞争性批发市场卖电。

source: But the crucial question is not what technology can enable us to do , but what sort of person -- or god -- we will be . Whether by discipline and learning or by technology , our brains are changed -- perhaps permanently -- by our experiences and our choices . But most of us hold out the hope that we can choose not to follow a particular path , whether we be wielding a flint axe or a nuclear bomb . The technology changes , but do we have control of ourselves sufficiently , and sufficient wisdom , to not allow the additional power provided by more advanced technology to corrupt us , as we use it to give expression to our deep-seated hostilities .
domestication: 不过，问题的关键不在于技术能让我们做什么，而在于我们将会变成怎样的人——或者说，怎样的神。无论通过自律和学习，还是通过技术，我们的大脑都因我们的经历和选择而发生变化——可能是永久性的变化。但大多数人仍抱着希望，希望自己能够选择不走某条路，无论我们手里拿的是石头斧还是核弹。技术在不断进步，但我们是否有足够的自控力和智慧，不让更先进的技术带来的额外力量腐蚀我们，当我们用它来表达深藏的敌意时。换句话说，我们能否抵制住技术进步带来的诱惑，不让它把我们变成自己都不认识的人。
foreignization: 但是，关键问题不是技术能让我们做什么，而是我们将成为怎样的人——或者说神。无论是通过纪律和学习，还是通过技术，我们的大脑都会因为我们的经历和选择而改变——也许是永久性的改变。但是，我们大多数人都抱着希望，认为我们可以选择不走某条特定的道路，无论我们是使用燧石斧还是核弹。技术在变化，但我们是否有足够的自控力和足够的智慧，不让更先进的技术提供的额外力量腐蚀我们，当我们使用它来表达我们深藏的敌意时。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

But the crucial question is not what technology can enable us to do , but what sort of person -- or god -- we will be . Whether by discipline and learning or by technology , our brains are changed -- perhaps permanently -- by our experiences and our choices . But most of us hold out the hope that we can choose not to follow a particular path , whether we be wielding a flint axe or a nuclear bomb . The technology changes , but do we have control of ourselves sufficiently , and sufficient wisdom , to not allow the additional power provided by more advanced technology to corrupt us , as we use it to give expression to our deep-seated hostilities .

不过，问题的关键不在于技术能让我们做什么，而在于我们将会变成怎样的人——或者说，怎样的神。无论通过自律和学习，还是通过技术，我们的大脑都因我们的经历和选择而发生变化——可能是永久性的变化。但大多数人仍抱着希望，希望自己能够选择不走某条路，无论我们手里拿的是石头斧还是核弹。技术在不断进步，但我们是否有足够的自控力和智慧，不让更先进的技术带来的额外力量腐蚀我们，当我们用它来表达深藏的敌意时。换句话说，我们能否抵制住技术进步带来的诱惑，不让它把我们变成自己都不认识的人。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

source: In bed at night , Lila often thought of the times she 'd broken someone 's heart . She 'd kissed Paul Devaney in high school , but did n't let him go up her dress . She refused to dance with Rahul Kanwar at prom . In college she had given men wrong numbers when they asked her out . She 'd cheated on her boyfriend in veterinary school with a swine professor .

source: Shortly thereafter John McCone telephoned CIA Director Richard Helms . As a result of this call , a meeting was arranged between the Chairman of the Board of ITT and the Chief of the Western Hemisphere Division of the CIA . Geneen offered to make available to the CIA a substantial amount of money to be used in support of the Alessandri campaign . In subsequent meetings ITT offered to make $1 million available to the CIA . The CIA rejected the offer . The memorandum indicated further that CIA 's advice was sought with respect to an individual who might serve as a conduit of ITT funds to the Alessandri campaign .
domestication: 不久后，约翰·麦克康给中情局局长理查德·赫尔姆斯打了个电话。这一通电话之后，安排了ITT董事会主席和中情局西半球分部主任的一次会面。在这次会面中，哈里曼·吉尼恩提出给中情局一大笔钱，用于支持亚历山德里的竞选活动。后来几次会面中，ITT更是表示愿意提供100万美元给中情局。不过，中情局拒绝了这笔钱。备忘录还提到，中情局就如何找到合适的人选，作为ITT资金流向亚历山德里竞选活动的中间人，给出了建议。

In subsequent meetings ITT offered to make $1 million available to the CIA . The CIA rejected the offer . The memorandum indicated further that CIA 's advice was sought with respect to an individual who might serve as a conduit of ITT funds to the Alessandri campaign .

source: “In the name of the assembled companions in misfortune,” said a gentleman of courtly appearance and address, coming forward, “I have the honour of giving you welcome to La Force, and of condoling with you on the calamity that has brought you among us. May it soon terminate happily! It would be an impertinence elsewhere, but it is not so here, to ask your name and condition?”

foreignization: “以在场的同病相怜的伙伴们的名义，”一位仪表堂堂、风度翩翩的绅士走上前来说，“我有幸向您表示欢迎来到拉弗斯，并对给您带来不幸的灾难表示慰问。愿它早日圆满结束！在其他地方这样做可能是不礼貌的，但在这里并非如此，可以请问您的姓名和身份吗？”

source: The gentleman with the white waistcoat was standing at the gate with his hands behind him, after having delivered himself of some profound sentiments in the board-room. Having witnessed the little dispute between Mr. Gamfield and the donkey, he smiled joyously when that person came up to read the bill, for he saw at once that Mr. Gamfield was exactly the sort of master Oliver Twist wanted. Mr. Gamfield smiled, too, as he perused the document; for five pounds was just the sum he had been wishing for; and, as to the boy with which it was encumbered, Mr. Gamfield, knowing what the dietary of the workhouse was, well knew he would be a nice small pattern, just the very thing for register stoves. So, he spelt the bill through again, from beginning to end; and then, touching his fur cap in token of humility, accosted the gentleman in the white waistcoat.
domestication: 穿白背心的先生站在门口，双手背在身后，刚才他在会议室里发表了一番深刻的言论。他目睹了伽姆菲尔先生和驴子之间的小小争执，当那人走过来读告示时，他高兴地笑了，因为他立刻看出，伽姆菲尔先生正是奥利弗·特威斯特需要的那种主人。伽姆菲尔先生读着告示也笑了，因为五英镑正好是他想要的数目；至于附带的这个孩子，伽姆菲尔知道济贫院的伙食，明白这孩子肯定瘦小，正好是做烟囱清洁工的料。于是，他又从头到尾仔细读了一遍告示，然后谦卑地摸了摸自己的毛皮帽，向穿白背心的先生搭话。
foreignization: 穿白色背心的先生站在门口，双手背后，刚刚在会议室发表了一些深刻的感言。目睹了甘菲尔德先生和驴子之间的小小争执后，当那个人走过来读告示时，他高兴地笑了，因为他立刻看出甘菲尔德先生正是奥利弗·特威斯特需要的那种主人。甘菲尔德先生在阅读文件时也笑了，因为五英镑正好是他所希望得到的数目；至于附带的男孩，甘菲尔德先生了解济贫院的伙食情况，深知他会是一个不错的、小巧的样本，正是炉灶登记所需要的。于是，他又从头到尾仔细读了一遍告示；然后，摸了摸自己的皮帽以示谦卑，向穿白色背心的先生打招呼。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The gentleman with the white waistcoat was standing at the gate with his hands behind him, after having delivered himself of some profound sentiments in the board-room. Having witnessed the little dispute between Mr. Gamfield and the donkey, he smiled joyously when that person came up to read the bill, for he saw at once that Mr. Gamfield was exactly the sort of master Oliver Twist wanted. Mr. Gamfield smiled, too, as he perused the document; for five pounds was just the sum he had been wishing for; and, as to the boy with which it was encumbered, Mr. Gamfield, knowing what the dietary of the workhouse was, well knew he would be a nice small pattern, just the very thing for register stoves. So, he spelt the bill through again, from beginning to end; and then, touching his fur cap in token of humility, accosted the gentleman in the white waistcoat.

So, he spelt the bill through again, from beginning to end; and then, touching his fur cap in token of humility, accosted the gentleman in the white waistcoat.

穿白色背心的先生站在门口，双手背后，刚刚在会议室发表了一些深刻的感言。目睹了甘菲尔德先生和驴子之间的小小争执后，当那个人走过来读告示时，他高兴地笑了，因为他立刻看出甘菲尔德先生正是奥利弗·特威斯特需要的那种主人。甘菲尔德先生在阅读文件时也笑了，因为五英镑正好是他所希望得到的数目；至于附带的男孩，甘菲尔德先生了解济贫院的伙食情况，深知他会是一个不错的、小巧的样本，正是炉灶登记所需要的。于是，他又从头到尾仔细读了一遍告示；然后，摸了摸自己的皮帽以示谦卑，向穿白色背心的先生打招呼。

source: He recovered himself almost instantly. Rain was really falling in large drops, and he showed the back of his hand with rain-drops on it. But, he said not a single word in reference to the discovery that had been told of, and, as they went into the house, the business eye of Mr. Lorry either detected, or fancied it detected, on his face, as it turned towards Charles Darnay, the same singular look that had been upon it when it turned towards him in the passages of the Court House.
domestication: 他几乎在瞬间恢复了过来。雨确实下起来了，大滴大滴的，他举起手背，手上都沾满了雨滴。但是，他对刚刚听到的那个消息却只字未提。当他们走进屋里的时候，洛里先生那双精明的眼睛似乎发现了，或者说是以为发现了，当时他的脸转向夏尔逊·达尼的时候，脸上的表情和他在法院走廊里转头看他的时候一样很奇怪。
foreignization: 他几乎瞬间恢复了过来。雨真的下起来了，雨滴很大，他给她看了看手背上的雨滴。但是，他没有提及被揭露的那件事的一句话，当他们进入房子时，洛里先生那双注重事务的眼睛，要么察觉，要么以为察觉到了，当他的脸朝向查尔斯·达尼转过来的同时，在他的脸上出现了同样的奇怪神情，就像在法庭走廊他转向他时的表情一样。

He recovered himself almost instantly. Rain was really falling in large drops, and he showed the back of his hand with rain-drops on it. But, he said not a single word in reference to the discovery that had been told of, and, as they went into the house, the business eye of Mr. Lorry either detected, or fancied it detected, on his face, as it turned towards Charles Darnay, the same singular look that had been upon it when it turned towards him in the passages of the Court House.

source: Above their bed , the tally of squirrels had reached seventeen , yet it seemed to Riley that he had n't made a dent in the squirrel population . They were still running about his land with the same degree of impunity , insinuating their way into the scaffolding of his house , going about their business in a perpetual state of regeneration . The other night , a squirrel had found its way into the bedroom , and in the morning , when Riley and Samantha woke up , the animal looked up imploringly at them , as if he hoped to be invited for breakfast .
domestication: 他们床头记录的松鼠数量已经达到了十七只，但瑞利觉得这似乎对松鼠大军没什么影响。这些小家伙依旧在他的地盘上肆无忌惮地乱窜，还堂而皇之地钻进了他家的房梁里，忙忙碌碌，好像永远都不会停歇。前天晚上，一只松鼠竟然跑到了卧室里，早上瑞利和桑德拉醒来时，那小东西还抬头可怜兮兮地看着他们，好像在等着被邀请吃早饭呢。
foreignization: 在他们的床上方，松鼠的数量已经达到了十七只，但瑞利觉得他还没有对松鼠的数量造成任何影响。它们仍然在他的土地上自由自在地奔跑，想方设法钻进他房子的框架里，不断地进行着它们的活动，处于一种持续再生的状态。前天晚上，一只松鼠找到了进入卧室的路，早上当瑞利和桑德拉醒来时，那只动物仰望着他们，好像希望被邀请吃早餐。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Above their bed , the tally of squirrels had reached seventeen , yet it seemed to Riley that he had n't made a dent in the squirrel population . They were still running about his land with the same degree of impunity , insinuating their way into the scaffolding of his house , going about their business in a perpetual state of regeneration . The other night , a squirrel had found its way into the bedroom , and in the morning , when Riley and Samantha woke up , the animal looked up imploringly at them , as if he hoped to be invited for breakfast .
他们床头记录的松鼠数量已经达到了十七只，但瑞利觉得这似乎对松鼠大军没什么影响。这些小家伙依旧在他的地盘上肆无忌惮地乱窜，还堂而皇之地钻进了他家的房梁里，忙忙碌碌，好像永远都不会停歇。前天晚上，一只松鼠竟然跑到了卧室里，早上瑞利和桑德拉醒来时，那小东西还抬头可怜兮兮地看着他们，好像在等着被邀请吃早饭呢。

Above their bed , the tally of squirrels had reached seventeen , yet it seemed to Riley that he had n't made a dent in the squirrel population . They were still running about his land with the same degree of impunity , insinuating their way into the scaffolding of his house , going about their business in a perpetual state of regeneration . The other night , a squirrel had found its way into the bedroom , and in the morning , when Riley and Samantha woke up , the animal looked up imploringly at them , as if he hoped to be invited for breakfast .
在他们的床上方，松鼠的数量已经达到了十七只，但瑞利觉得他还没有对松鼠的数量造成任何影响。它们仍然在他的土地上自由自在地奔跑，想方设法钻进他房子的框架里，不断地进行着它们的活动，处于一种持续再生的状态。前天晚上，一只松鼠找到了进入卧室的路，早上当瑞利和桑德拉醒来时，那只动物仰望着他们，好像希望被邀请吃早餐。

source: If you had to be ' accurate ' in every suspicion you had , that would have an extremely chilling effect on both professional law enforcement and citizen vigilance against ( real ) criminal activity . Probable cause is just that -- not nearly the same standard as ' beyond a reasonable doubt ' , which is what is required for a conviction .
domestication: 如果每一个怀疑都必须是“准确”的，那么这将会对执法和民众防范真正的犯罪活动产生极其寒蝉效应。合理怀疑只是一个可能的理由，而不是像“超出合理怀疑”那样严格的标准，这才是定罪所需的条件。简单来说，就算有九成九的把握，只要不能百分之百确认，也不能妄下结论，否则会扼杀大家积极主动预防和报告犯罪的热情。
foreignization: 如果你必须在每一个怀疑中都“准确”，那将会对职业执法和公民对（真正的）犯罪活动的警惕产生极其寒冷的影响。合理怀疑只是这样 -- 与“超出合理怀疑”的标准差异巨大，后者才是定罪所需的。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

If you had to be ' accurate ' in every suspicion you had , that would have an extremely chilling effect on both professional law enforcement and citizen vigilance against ( real ) criminal activity . Probable cause is just that -- not nearly the same standard as ' beyond a reasonable doubt ' , which is what is required for a conviction .
如果每一个怀疑都必须是“准确”的，那么这将会对执法和民众防范真正的犯罪活动产生极其寒蝉效应。合理怀疑只是一个可能的理由，而不是像“超出合理怀疑”那样严格的标准，这才是定罪所需的条件。简单来说，就算有九成九的把握，只要不能百分之百确认，也不能妄下结论，否则会扼杀大家积极主动预防和报告犯罪的热情。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

If you had to be ' accurate ' in every suspicion you had , that would have an extremely chilling effect on both professional law enforcement and citizen vigilance against ( real ) criminal activity . Probable cause is just that -- not nearly the same standard as ' beyond a reasonable doubt ' , which is what is required for a conviction .
如果你必须在每一个怀疑中都“准确”，那将会对职业执法和公民对（真正的）犯罪活动的警惕产生极其寒冷的影响。合理怀疑只是这样 -- 与“超出合理怀疑”的标准差异巨大，后者才是定罪所需的。

source: McCain is honest , sometimes brutally so , about his own failings and errors ; his description of the Keating Five affair is thorough and unsparing , as are his admissions of occasional prevarication and displays of temper . He is no less straightforward about his political experiences . While a dedicated conservative and a believer , his contempt for the near-fascist " Christian " wing of the Republican party is evident , as is his disgust with the treatment former Senator John Tower received when nominated by President George H.W. Bush for the post of Secretary of Defense , a nomination shot down more by far right wingers than by the Democrats . One thing I did miss was his honest appraisal of the current President , but from patriotic motivations McCain may be saving that for later .
domestication: 麦凯恩对自己的缺点和错误直言不讳，有时候甚至毫不留情。他详尽而不加粉饰地描述了自己在凯廷五人案中的经历，也坦承偶尔撒谎和发脾气。他对自己的政治经历同样坦诚相见。虽然他是个坚定的保守派，也信奉宗教，但他对共和党内近乎法西斯的“基督徒”派系充满了鄙视，对布什总统提名前参议员约翰·塔尔出任国防部长时受到的非议也感到愤怒，这更多是来自右翼的攻击，而不是民主党。唯一让我觉得不够的是，他没有对现任总统作出坦率的评价，不过出于爱国心，他可能打算以后再说。
foreignization: 麦凯恩对自己的缺点和错误坦诚相见，有时甚至是无情的；他对基廷五人事件的描述详尽而毫不留情，同样坦率地承认了自己偶尔的撒谎和情绪失控。他对自己的政治经历也同样直截了当。虽然是一位坚定的保守派和信徒，但他对共和党内近乎法西斯的“基督教”翼派的蔑视显而易见，他对前参议员约翰·塔尔在被乔治·H·W·布什总统提名为国防部长时所受到的待遇感到厌恶，这一提名更多是因为极右翼而非民主党人的反对而失败。有一件事我确实觉得有所遗漏，那就是他对现任总统的真实评价，但出于爱国动机，麦凯恩可能将此留待日后再说。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

McCain is honest , sometimes brutally so , about his own failings and errors ; his description of the Keating Five affair is thorough and unsparing , as are his admissions of occasional prevarication and displays of temper . He is no less straightforward about his political experiences . While a dedicated conservative and a believer , his contempt for the near-fascist " Christian " wing of the Republican party is evident , as is his disgust with the treatment former Senator John Tower received when nominated by President George H.W. Bush for the post of Secretary of Defense , a nomination shot down more by far right wingers than by the Democrats . One thing I did miss was his honest appraisal of the current President , but from patriotic motivations McCain may be saving that for later .

source: That was my world last fall . I fell out of my life like Alice falling through the rabbit hole . Although I had feared mental illness all of my life because my mother wound up with Alzheimer 's disease and my father was severely mentally disturbed after he had a series of strokes , I had no idea that I could lose myself so quickly , so easily .
domestication: 去年秋天，那就是我的世界。我就像爱丽丝掉进兔子洞一样，突然间跌出了自己的生活。虽然我一直害怕精神疾病，因为我妈最后得了阿尔茨海默病，我爸中风后也变得严重的精神错乱，但我做梦也没想到，自己会这么快、这么容易就迷失了自我。
foreignization: 那是在去年秋天我的世界。我像爱丽丝穿过兔子洞一样从我的生活中跌落出来。虽然我一直害怕精神疾病，因为我的母亲最终患上了阿尔茨海默病，而我的父亲在中风后也严重精神失常，但我完全没有意识到自己会如此迅速、如此轻易地失去自我。

source: The US Antitrust restrictions already placed on sales of Micro-soft 's Windows software do not extend to Windows 98 , a federal appeals court in Washington ruled . But Sun Micro-systems asked a US judge in San Jose , Calif. , to force changes in Windows 98 or block its release . In addition , the Justice Department and a group of states investigating Microsoft were reportedly preparing a new antitrust complaint that could interfere with this week 's planned shipment of Windows 98 to computermakers .
domestication: 美国华盛顿的一家上诉法院裁定，对微软Windows软件销售的反垄断限制不适用于Windows 98。但太阳微系统公司却请求加州圣何塞的一位联邦法官，要求修改Windows 98或阻止其发布。此外，据称司法部和一组州正在调查微软，他们正准备提出新的反垄断诉讼，可能会干扰本周向电脑制造商发货Windows 98的计划。
foreignization: 美国华盛顿的一家联邦上诉法院裁定，已经对微软Windows软件销售施加的反垄断限制不适用于Windows 98。但Sun Microsystems要求加州圣何塞的一名美国法官强制改变Windows 98或阻止其发布。此外，据报道，司法部和一组正在调查微软的州正在准备一项新的反垄断投诉，这可能会干扰本周向电脑制造商计划运送Windows 98的安排。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

The US Antitrust restrictions already placed on sales of Micro-soft 's Windows software do not extend to Windows 98 , a federal appeals court in Washington ruled . But Sun Micro-systems asked a US judge in San Jose , Calif. , to force changes in Windows 98 or block its release . In addition , the Justice Department and a group of states investigating Microsoft were reportedly preparing a new antitrust complaint that could interfere with this week 's planned shipment of Windows 98 to computermakers .
美国华盛顿的一家上诉法院裁定，对微软Windows软件销售的反垄断限制不适用于Windows 98。但太阳微系统公司却请求加州圣何塞的一位联邦法官，要求修改Windows 98或阻止其发布。此外，据称司法部和一组州正在调查微软，他们正准备提出新的反垄断诉讼，可能会干扰本周向电脑制造商发货Windows 98的计划。

source: Here , on a visit to The Metropolitan Museum of Art , in New York City , he was so struck by a painting by Velzquez , the portrait Juan de Pareja , that his career took a major shift toward fine art . Kobayashi began studying the work of Whistler , Chase , and Sargent -- all artists also influenced by Velzquez . Subsequently , Japanese art also became an inspiration for Kobayashi , in particular the 16th- and 17th-century Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print masters , such as Hokusai , Sharaku , and Utamaro .
domestication: 在这里，他来到纽约的大都会艺术博物馆参观时，被委拉斯凯兹的《胡安·德·帕尔哈肖像》深深吸引，从此他的职业生涯转向了美术。小林开始研究惠斯勒、蔡斯和萨金特的作品，这些艺术家也都受到过委拉斯凯兹的影响。之后，日本艺术也成了小林的灵感来源，尤其是16、17世纪的浮世绘大师，如北斋、Sharaku和歌麿。

source: We have a right to competent , honest lawyers in government . ( I know several and they are very intelligent , decent people ; I can not judge their expertise . ) We also have a right to pay for only one legal position from our government . Currently we often pay for both plaintiff and defendant . Thus my solution would be to cut the DoJ budget in half , every year , compounded , until the top echelons got their act together . In the private sector this is common , and effective . When Mr. Perez is terminated , loses his house in foreclosure ; it will flavor his legal theories .
domestication: 我们有权利享受有能力、诚实的政府律师。（我认识几个，他们非常聪明、品行端正；但我不能评判他们的专业水平。）同时，我们也有权利只为一个政府法律职位买单。目前，我们经常同时支付原告和被告的费用。因此，我的解决方案是，每年将司法部预算削减一半，采用滚存方式，直到高层领导整顿好自己的工作。在私营部门，这种做法很常见，也很有效。当佩雷斯先生被解雇，失去房子被查封时，这将使他的法律理论更有味道。
foreignization: 我们有权利拥有在政府中有能力、诚实的律师。（我认识几位，他们非常聪明，都是好人；我无法判断他们的专业知识。）我们还有权利只为政府的一個法律职位付费。目前，我们经常同时支付原告和被告的费用。因此，我的解决方案是将司法部（DoJ）的预算每年减半，复利计算，直到最高层的人把事情办好。在私营部门，这是很常见的，也很有效。当佩雷斯先生被解雇，失去房子被拍卖时；这将使他的法律理论更有味道。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

We have a right to competent , honest lawyers in government . ( I know several and they are very intelligent , decent people ; I can not judge their expertise . ) We also have a right to pay for only one legal position from our government . Currently we often pay for both plaintiff and defendant . Thus my solution would be to cut the DoJ budget in half , every year , compounded , until the top echelons got their act together . In the private sector this is common , and effective . When Mr. Perez is terminated , loses his house in foreclosure ; it will flavor his legal theories .

source: From 2005 to 2009 , I was Executive Head of the United Nations Development Program , headquartered in New York . In 2007 , I hired a new research analyst for my front office . She was a very bright young Turkish woman , perhaps about 25 years old . She was not from Istanbul , Ankara or Izmir , but from Samsun , on the eastern Black Sea coast in Anatolia . I went to her office to welcome her on her first day of work . She had not yet unpacked anything , the office was full of boxes , her table was empty and the walls were clear of posters or pictures . Clear , except for one picture which she had hung on the yet bare walls : a picture of Atatrk , of Mustafa Kemal Pa ? a .
domestication: 2005年到2009年，我担任联合国开发计划署的执行主任，这个机构设在纽约。2007年，我为我的办公室招了一位新的研究分析师。她是一个非常聪明的土耳其年轻女孩，大概二十五岁左右。她不是来自伊斯坦布尔、安卡拉或伊兹密尔，而是来自安纳托利亚黑海沿岸的萨姆松。她在第一天上班时，我去了她的办公室表示欢迎。当时她还没来得及整理东西，办公室里全是箱子，桌子上空荡荡的，墙上也没有挂任何海报或照片。只有一张照片挂在光秃秃的墙上：那就是阿塔图尔克，穆斯塔法·凯末尔·帕夏的照片。
foreignization: 从2005年到2009年，我是联合国开发计划署的执行主任，该机构总部位于纽约。2007年，我为我的前办公室雇用了一名新的研究分析师。她是一位非常聪明的年轻土耳其女性，可能大约25岁。她不是来自伊斯坦布尔、安卡拉或伊兹密尔，而是来自安纳托利亚东部黑海沿岸的萨姆松。我在她上班的第一天去她的办公室欢迎她。她还没有拆开任何东西，办公室里堆满了箱子，她的桌子是空的，墙上没有任何海报或照片。除了墙上挂着的一张照片：一张阿塔图尔克的照片，即穆斯塔法·凯末尔·帕夏的照片。

I went to her office to welcome her on her first day of work . She had not yet unpacked anything , the office was full of boxes , her table was empty and the walls were clear of posters or pictures . Clear , except for one picture which she had hung on the yet bare walls : a picture of Atatrk , of Mustafa Kemal Pa ? a .

source: “Well, never you mind that, my dear,” said the old lady; “that’s got nothing to do with your broth; and it’s full time you had it; for the doctor says Mr. Brownlow may come in to see you this morning; and we must get up our best looks, because the better we look, the more he’ll be pleased.” And with this, the old lady applied herself to warming up, in a little saucepan, a basin full of broth: strong enough, Oliver thought, to furnish an ample dinner, when reduced to the regulation strength, for three hundred and fifty paupers, at the lowest computation.
domestication: 唉，这些你都别管了，亲爱的。这跟你的肉汤没关系，现在是该喝肉汤的时候了。医生说布朗洛先生可能今天早上会来看你，我们必须打扮得漂漂亮亮的，因为我们看起来越好，他会越高兴。老太太说完这话，就开始在一个小锅里加热一大碗肉汤。奥利弗想，这肉汤加水稀释到标准浓度后，足够三百五十个穷人吃一顿饭了。
foreignization: “好吧，这与你无关，亲爱的，”老太太说，“这与你的肉汤无关；现在正是时候给你喝了；因为医生说布朗洛先生可能今天早上来看你；我们必须打扮得漂亮一些，因为我们看起来越好，他会越高兴。” 在这之后，老太太开始在一个小锅里加热一盆肉汤：奥利弗认为，即使是按规定稀释到标准浓度，这锅肉汤也足够供应三百五十名贫民吃一顿丰盛的晚餐。

source: Rose Marie Nichols McGee , of Nichols Garden Nursery , in Albany , Oregon , concurs and mentions that she is especially unenthusiastic about the idea of a " new " white carrot . " Carrots started white , " she points out . " Breeders worked for a long time to get the beautiful orange color . Wild carrots are white , and any accidental cross with them gives you a white , so they turn up all the time . And anyway , we already carry white carrots . "
domestication: 罗丝·玛丽·尼科尔斯·麦吉来自俄勒冈州阿尔比尼的尼科尔斯花园苗圃，她对此表示赞同，并特别不看好所谓的“新”白胡萝卜。“胡萝卜本来就是白色的，”她指出，“育种专家费了好大劲才培育出漂亮的橙色。野生胡萝卜是白色的，和它们一杂交就会出现白胡萝卜，这事儿常有。再说，我们店里本来就卖白胡萝卜。”
foreignization: Rose Marie Nichols McGee，来自俄勒冈州阿尔比市的Nichols Garden Nursery，表示赞同，并提到她尤其不看好“新”的白色胡萝卜。“胡萝卜一开始是白色的，”她指出。“育种家花了很长时间才培育出美丽的橙色。野生胡萝卜是白色的，与它们的任何偶然杂交都会产生白色，所以它们总是不断出现。而且，我们已经出售白色胡萝卜。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Rose Marie Nichols McGee , of Nichols Garden Nursery , in Albany , Oregon , concurs and mentions that she is especially unenthusiastic about the idea of a " new " white carrot . " Carrots started white , " she points out . " Breeders worked for a long time to get the beautiful orange color . Wild carrots are white , and any accidental cross with them gives you a white , so they turn up all the time . And anyway , we already carry white carrots . "
罗丝·玛丽·尼科尔斯·麦吉来自俄勒冈州阿尔比尼的尼科尔斯花园苗圃，她对此表示赞同，并特别不看好所谓的“新”白胡萝卜。“胡萝卜本来就是白色的，”她指出，“育种专家费了好大劲才培育出漂亮的橙色。野生胡萝卜是白色的，和它们一杂交就会出现白胡萝卜，这事儿常有。再说，我们店里本来就卖白胡萝卜。”

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Rose Marie Nichols McGee , of Nichols Garden Nursery , in Albany , Oregon , concurs and mentions that she is especially unenthusiastic about the idea of a " new " white carrot . " Carrots started white , " she points out . " Breeders worked for a long time to get the beautiful orange color . Wild carrots are white , and any accidental cross with them gives you a white , so they turn up all the time . And anyway , we already carry white carrots . "
Rose Marie Nichols McGee，来自俄勒冈州阿尔比市的Nichols Garden Nursery，表示赞同，并提到她尤其不看好“新”的白色胡萝卜。“胡萝卜一开始是白色的，”她指出。“育种家花了很长时间才培育出美丽的橙色。野生胡萝卜是白色的，与它们的任何偶然杂交都会产生白色，所以它们总是不断出现。而且，我们已经出售白色胡萝卜。”

source: Advances in fuel cells will enable deep-sea habitation . Fuel cells such as those currently being developed for automobiles will produce electricity directly , with no toxic fumes . This advance will eventually make it easier to explore and even colonize the undersea world via extended submarine journeys .

source: They travelled in the night, halting an hour or two after daybreak, and lying by until the twilight fell. The escort were so wretchedly clothed, that they twisted straw round their bare legs, and thatched their ragged shoulders to keep the wet off. Apart from the personal discomfort of being so attended, and apart from such considerations of present danger as arose from one of the patriots being chronically drunk, and carrying his musket very recklessly, Charles Darnay did not allow the restraint that was laid upon him to awaken any serious fears in his breast; for, he reasoned with himself that it could have no reference to the merits of an individual case that was not yet stated, and of representations, confirmable by the prisoner in the Abbaye, that were not yet made.
domestication: 他们夜间赶路，天亮后休息一两个小时，等到黄昏再继续前行。护送的人衣衫褴褛，只得用稻草缠绕在裸露的腿上，又用稻草覆盖在破烂的肩膀上，以挡风雨。除了这样的陪同让人心生不适，再加上其中一位爱国者常年酗酒，枪支随意乱拿，带来了一些眼前的危险之外，查尔斯·达尔内并没有因为身上的束缚而感到真正的恐惧；他心里盘算着，这不可能是针对他个人情况的措施，毕竟他的案子还没陈述，也没能在阿拜监狱里证实他的请求。
foreignization: 他们在夜间旅行，在天亮后一两个小时停歇，直到暮色降临时才再次出发。护送人员衣衫褴褛，以至于他们把稻草缠绕在裸露的腿上，并在破烂的肩膀上覆盖稻草以挡雨水。除了这种随行方式给他个人带来的不适，以及当前由于一位爱国者长期醉酒并随意携带火枪而产生的危险之外，查尔斯·达内并不让加诸于他的限制引起自己内心的严重担忧；因为他自认为，这种限制与尚未陈述的个人案件的优劣无关，也与尚待由阿拜监狱中的囚犯证实的情况无关。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

They travelled in the night, halting an hour or two after daybreak, and lying by until the twilight fell. The escort were so wretchedly clothed, that they twisted straw round their bare legs, and thatched their ragged shoulders to keep the wet off. Apart from the personal discomfort of being so attended, and apart from such considerations of present danger as arose from one of the patriots being chronically drunk, and carrying his musket very recklessly, Charles Darnay did not allow the restraint that was laid upon him to awaken any serious fears in his breast; for, he reasoned with himself that it could have no reference to the merits of an individual case that was not yet stated, and of representations, confirmable by the prisoner in the Abbaye, that were not yet made.
他们夜间赶路，天亮后休息一两个小时，等到黄昏再继续前行。护送的人衣衫褴褛，只得用稻草缠绕在裸露的腿上，又用稻草覆盖在破烂的肩膀上，以挡风雨。除了这样的陪同让人心生不适，再加上其中一位爱国者常年酗酒，枪支随意乱拿，带来了一些眼前的危险之外，查尔斯·达尔内并没有因为身上的束缚而感到真正的恐惧；他心里盘算着，这不可能是针对他个人情况的措施，毕竟他的案子还没陈述，也没能在阿拜监狱里证实他的请求。

source: Inside Cuyahoga County , taxpayers support 13 separate municipal courts , including Cleveland 's . With a new or revamped county Justice Center under active review , it 's a matter of urgency that Greater Clevelanders debate whether they 'd be better served by one countywide municipal court that could achieve both taxpayer savings and more seamless justice for all .
domestication: 在凯霍加县，纳税人要养活13个独立的市法院，克利夫兰的也在其中。眼下，新的或翻修的县司法中心正在审查中，当务之急是大克利夫兰地区的居民讨论一下，是否应该设立一个全县统一的市法院，这样既能节省纳税人的钱，又能为所有人提供更顺畅的司法服务。
foreignization: 在凯霍加县内，纳税人支持13个独立的市政法院，包括克利夫兰的。随着新的或翻新的县司法中心正在积极审查中，大克利夫兰地区的人们迫切需要辩论是否一个全县范围的市政法院能更好地为他们服务，既能实现纳税人的节约，又能为所有人提供更加无缝的正义。

source: Nothing but the production of the afflicted Gabelle’s letter from his prison of the Abbaye would have got him on so far. His difficulty at the guard-house in this small place had been such, that he felt his journey to have come to a crisis. And he was, therefore, as little surprised as a man could be, to find himself awakened at the small inn to which he had been remitted until morning, in the middle of the night.
domestication: 若不是嘉贝勒从阿巴耶监狱里写来的信，他也不可能走到这一步。在这小镇的岗哨遇到的麻烦，让他觉得此行已到了紧要关头。因此，当他被叫醒时，虽然夜已深，也不感到意外，毕竟人在屋檐下，不得不低头，何况他还住在这家小旅店里，只能听天由命了。
foreignization: 除了受苦的加贝尔从阿巴耶监狱寄出的信件外，没有什么能让他进展到这一步。他在这个小地方的哨所遇到的困难如此之大，以至于他觉得自己的旅程已经到了一个关键时刻。因此，当他在半夜被叫醒时，他几乎可以说是毫不惊讶，尽管他被安排在一家小旅馆里等到天亮。

His mind was evidently wandering to his old life, for he continued to mutter, without appearing conscious of their presence otherwise than as a part of his vision.

source: " Excellent , I knew you were a good girl . " He reached out to chuck her under the chin and she stepped back quickly . Morro deliberately did n't follow immediately , causing Zorndorf to almost trip . By the time her boss recovered , she was standing a few paces away with her very innocent canine companion at her side . Four years of working for the pig had given them far too much practice in that move .
domestication: “好得很，就知道你是个好姑娘。”他伸出手想摸摸她的下巴，她却迅速往后退了一步。莫罗故意不马上跟上，差点让佐恩多夫绊了个踉跄。等她的老板站稳了，她已经站在几步之外，身边还站着她那副无辜模样的狗伙伴。给这头猪干了四年，这个动作他们练得太多了。
foreignization: “很好，我就知道你是个好女孩。”他伸出手捏了捏她的下巴，她迅速后退了一步。莫罗故意没有立刻跟上，导致佐恩多夫差点绊倒。等她的老板恢复平衡时，她已经站在几码外，身旁是她那非常无辜的犬类同伴。为这头猪工作四年来，他们对这一招已经练习得太多太多了。

It all came to light , of course , but accidentaUy . One of his clients , who was taking away the ashes of a relative , cremated that very same Saturday as our Victor Sushkov , got confused and mixed up the time . He turned up at the incinerator too early . WeU , what was the rush ! Plus he kept looking at his watch .
事情当然最后还是露馅了，但纯属意外。有位客户来取亲戚的骨灰，这位亲戚正好是和我们的维克托·苏什科夫同一天火化的。结果他记错了时间，提前来到了火化场。急什么嘛！他还一直看表。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

It all came to light , of course , but accidentaUy . One of his clients , who was taking away the ashes of a relative , cremated that very same Saturday as our Victor Sushkov , got confused and mixed up the time . He turned up at the incinerator too early . WeU , what was the rush ! Plus he kept looking at his watch .
当然，一切都暴露了，但纯属偶然。他的一个客户，正在取一位亲戚的骨灰，而这位亲戚恰好在那个星期六与我们的维克托·苏什科夫同一天火化，搞错了时间。他过早地出现在了焚化炉。嗯，何必这么急呢！他还不断地看着手表。

source: Established in 1813 , the House Judiciary Committee is the second oldest standing committee in Congress . Its jurisdiction often places it at the center of American politics , such as when it approved the U.S.A. PATRIOT Act following the terrorist attacks on September 11 , 2001 . Particularly important today is the Committee 's oversight responsibility for the Departments of Justice and Homeland Security .
domestication: 众议院司法委员会成立于1813年，是国会中第二古老的常设委员会。它的管辖范围经常使其处于美国政治的中心，比如在2001年9月11日恐怖袭击之后，它通过了爱国者法案。尤其是现在，委员会对司法部和国土安全部进行监督是一个非常重要的职责。说白了，这个委员会可真不是吃素的，在美国政治中占有举足轻重的地位。
foreignization: 成立于1813年，众议院司法委员会是国会中第二古老的常设委员会。其权限经常使其处于美国政治的中心位置，如在2001年9月11日恐怖袭击事件发生后批准了《爱国者法案》。尤其值得注意的是该委员会对司法部和国土安全部的监督职责非常重要。

Particularly important today is the Committee 's oversight responsibility for the Departments of Justice and Homeland Security .

source: He was given to yes or no answers . When writers would ask Maris if he were going to break the record , Kubek says a typical response was : " How should I know ? " That was June . By late summer , according to The New York Yankee Encyclopedia , that had deteriorated to " How the hell should I know ? "
domestication: 他习惯给出简短的肯定或否定回答。当作家问马里斯是否会打破记录时，库贝克说马里斯的典型回答是：“我怎么知道？”那是六月的事情。到了夏末，根据《纽约洋基百科全书》，他的回答已经变成了：“我怎么会知道啊！”他真是越来越不耐烦了，估计那段时间压力太大。到了八月份，他终于忍不住了，干脆就说：“管我什么事？”更是让人哭笑不得。
foreignization: 他只会给出是或否的答案。当作家们问马里斯是否会打破纪录时，库贝克说典型的回应是：“我怎么知道？”那已经是六月了。到了夏末，根据《纽约洋基百科全书》的记载，他的回应已经变成了：“我怎么知道？”，但具体的回答是“我怎么会知道”（How should I know）。

source: But, for many days, Oliver remained insensible to all the goodness of his new friends. The sun rose and sank, and rose and sank again, and many times after that; and still the boy lay stretched on his uneasy bed, dwindling away beneath the dry and wasting heat of fever. The worm does not work more surely on the dead body, than does this slow creeping fire upon the living frame.
domestication: 可是，奥利弗对新朋友们的好意迟迟无动于衷。太阳升起又落下，再升起再落下，反反复复许多回；可这孩子依然躺在床上，身体在高烧的炙烤下日渐消瘦。这缓慢蔓延的火苗侵蚀活人的肉体，就像虫子蛀蚀死尸一样，一点一滴地蚕食着生命。
foreignization: 但是，许多天过去了，奥利弗仍然对新朋友的所有好意毫无感觉。太阳升起又落下，再次升起又落下，之后又多次如此；而这个男孩依然躺在他那不舒适的床上，因发热的干燥和消耗性的热度而日渐消瘦。虫子不会比这种缓慢蔓延的火更确凿地在死尸上蛀蚀，就像它在活生生的身体上那样。

source: Funny how those who attack Romney about Bain Capital NEVER talk about the many companies he was able to save along with 10 ? s of thousands of jobs . No , they have to pick the ones he tried to save but were too far gone . Those companies would have caved in regardless of what Bain could do for them . What 's important is Romney tried to help those companies anyway even though he probably knew they could not survive .
domestication: 有趣的是，那些攻击罗姆尼关于贝恩资本的人，从不提他救活的许多公司和成千上万的工作岗位。不，他们偏要挑那些他尽力了但还是没救回来的公司来说事儿。这些公司即便是贝恩资本再怎么努力，也难逃倒闭的命运。重要的是，罗姆尼还是尽力去帮助这些公司，即便他自己可能也知道，这些公司已经回天无力了。
foreignization: 有趣的是，那些攻击罗姆尼关于贝恩资本的人从来不会提到他能够拯救的许多公司以及数以万计的工作岗位。不，他们必须挑选那些他试图挽救但已经无法挽回的公司。这些公司无论贝恩能为它们做什么都会倒闭。重要的是，罗姆尼还是尽力帮助了这些公司，即使他可能知道它们无法生存下去。

source: Another truth : your understanding/opinion is only valid for you . Just because you believe that you can find a bitchen ' Epiphone that you think is just as good as someone else 's vintage Les Paul does n't mean that that viewpoint is true or correct in general or for anyone else . ( if it 's correct for you , consider yourself lucky , in a way ) Just because you can find a bunch of people to affirm your belief on a thread like this does n't mean it 's objectively true .
domestication: 还有一个真相：你所理解的或者你的观点只对你自己有用。仅仅因为你相信你可以找到一款很棒的爱皮宝（Epiphone），而且你认为它和别人的老式雷斯保罗（Les Paul）一样好，并不意味着这种观点在大众眼里是正确的或者对其他人来说也是如此。（如果对你来说这是真的，那么你可以算是幸运的吧）仅仅因为你能在这样的讨论串中找到一堆人支持你的想法，也不代表这就是客观事实。大家都说“三人成虎”，但不管有多少人支持某种观点，都不能代表它的正确性，关键还得看事实本身。
foreignization: 另一个真相：你的理解/观点只对你自己有效。仅仅因为你相信你可以找到一件很棒的艾比朗（Epiphone），你认为它和别人的老式莱斯·保罗（Les Paul）一样好，并不意味着这种观点在一般情况下或对于其他人来说是正确的。（如果对你来说是正确的，那么从某种程度上讲，你很幸运）仅仅因为你可以在像这样的帖子中找到一堆人来肯定你的信念，并不意味着它是客观真实的。

source: “To the first, then. He is of a studious habit, and unusually energetic; he applies himself with great ardour to the acquisition of professional knowledge, to the conducting of experiments, to many things. Now, does he do too much?”
domestication: 首先来说第一个问题。他有很强的学习习惯，也非常勤奋，学习时总是很有激情，他在获取专业知识、进行实验以及做其他事情时都非常投入。现在，我们要问的是，他这样做是否过头了？
foreignization: “先来说第一点。他有着勤学的习惯，且异常充满活力；他以极大的热情投入到专业知识的获取中，实验的进行中，以及很多事情中。现在，他做得太多了吗？”

So far all I see is you continuing to make everything about you or an attack on you and no effort on your part to acknowledge your continued acts which are identical to those you complain are being directed at you . Our response to your email of 11:59 AM today which you published on this site :
Stacey，也许下次你打电话给我们，要求我们既往不咎时，你最好有诚意地说出你已经在两天内写了两篇文章称我们为“疯子”，指责我们“攻击你”以及是Kimberlin团队的无意识傀儡。到目前为止，我看到的只是你继续把一切都归咎于你或对你进行攻击，而没有做出任何努力来承认你持续的行为与你所抱怨的针对你的行为完全相同。我们对你今天上午11:59发来的电子邮件的回应，你已在此网站上公布：

source: At any other time, this remonstrance, and the tone in which it was delivered, would have had the desired effect; but the girl being really weak and exhausted, dropped her head over the back of the chair, and fainted, before Mr. Sikes could get out a few of the appropriate oaths with which, on similar occasions, he was accustomed to garnish his threats. Not knowing, very well, what to do, in this uncommon emergency; for Miss Nancy’s hysterics were usually of that violent kind which the patient fights and struggles out of, without much assistance; Mr. Sikes tried a little blasphemy: and finding that mode of treatment wholly ineffectual, called for assistance.

source: To improve your eating habits , try the visualization technique athletes use . In a McGill University study of 177 students , those who made a plan to consume more fruit , wrote it down , and pictured themselves carrying it out ( where they 'd buy the items , for example , and how they 'd prepare them ) increased their fruit intake twice as much as those who simply resolved to eat more of it .
domestication: 想改善饮食习惯，不妨学学运动员的可视化技巧。麦吉尔大学有一项针对177名学生的研究，那些制定了增加水果摄入量计划、把计划写下来，并且想象自己如何实施（比如在哪里买水果，怎么准备）的学生，吃的水果量是那些仅仅决定要多吃水果的学生的两倍。所以说，好记性不如烂笔头，心里有数还得手上行动，这样才能事半功倍。
foreignization: 为了改善你的饮食习惯，可以尝试运动员使用的可视化技术。在麦吉尔大学对177名学生进行的一项研究中，那些制定了多吃水果的计划、把它写下来并想象自己实施这一计划（比如在哪里购买这些水果，以及如何准备它们）的人，其水果摄入量比那些仅仅决定要多吃水果的人增加了两倍。

source: GE had 11 times CBS 's sales , based on the latest figures available when CBS determined pay , while IBM had 14 times CBS 's market capitalization . Neither company compares itself with CBS in setting its pay . GE CEO Jeffrey Immelt had total compensation of $21.6 million last year , and former IBM CEO Sam Palmisano , who stepped down in December , had compensation of $31.8 million for 2011 . CBS in a statement said benchmarking is " just one data point " it uses when setting CEO pay , which varies based on performance .
domestication: 通用电气的销售额是CBS的11倍，而IBM的市值则是CBS的14倍，这些数据都是在CBS决定薪酬时最新的可用数字。不过，这两家公司设定薪酬时都不拿自己跟CBS比。通用电气的CEO杰夫·伊梅尔特去年的总薪酬为2160万美元，而IBM前CEO山姆·帕米萨诺在2011年的薪酬更是高达3180万美元，他在去年12月才卸任。CBS在声明中表示，对标只是他们在设定CEO薪酬时参考的一个数据点，实际薪酬会根据业绩波动。
foreignization: 通用电气的销售额是哥伦比亚广播公司的11倍，这一数据基于哥伦比亚广播公司在确定薪酬时可获得的最新数字，而IBM的市值是哥伦比亚广播公司的14倍。这两家公司都不将自己与哥伦比亚广播公司进行比较来设定薪酬。通用电气首席执行官杰弗里·伊梅尔特去年的总薪酬为2160万美元，而前IBM首席执行官山姆·帕米萨诺（于去年12月卸任）2011年的薪酬为3180万美元。哥伦比亚广播公司在一份声明中表示，基准对比“只是我们在设定首席执行官薪酬时使用的一个数据点”，薪酬会根据业绩表现而有所不同。

source: Beth 's mother and the neighbor are not even very good friends . The neighbor was just driving by . She had just come from Beth 's school where she registered her boy for kindergarten for the fall . The neighbor wore a spring suit for the occasion , light green with tiny flowers on it , a skirt and blazer , a white blouse . The boy wore a sailor suit and new red Keds . The mothers drank coffee and the boy ran in and out of the house , showing them the things he had found : a stone , a feather , a leaf , a ladybug .
domestication: 别丝的妈妈和邻居也就一般般熟，不算很好的朋友。邻居那天正好开车经过这里。她刚从别丝的学校回来，刚帮自己的孩子办完今年秋天上幼儿园的手续。为了这事儿，邻居还穿了一身新衣服：春季套装，淡绿色的，上面有小花，连衣裙加夹克，白色衬衫。她的孩子也打扮得整整齐齐，海军风的小西装，新买的红色运动鞋。两个妈妈一边喝着咖啡，一边看着孩子在屋子里跑进跑出，高兴地给她们看自己找到的东西：一块石头、一根羽毛、一片树叶、一只瓢虫。

source: No one is " sacrificing their Constitutional rights " -- in fact -- just the opposite . They are following the right to VOTE and have elected leaders make decisions in the best interest of its citizens , which is exactly what Homeland Security was born out of . It 's been around for many years now -- so when have you been exercising your " constitutional right " before then to have it revoked , if that 's what you believe ?
domestication: 无需大惊小怪，实际上没人在牺牲自己的宪法权利，反而大家都是在行使选举权，让民选领导人为公民着想做出最有利的决定，这正是成立国土安全部的初衷。国土安全部早就存在了很多年，你过去怎么不去行使你的所谓“宪法权利”呢？现在才来喊冤，难道不是搬起石头砸自己的脚吗？
foreignization: 没有人在“牺牲他们的宪法权利”--事实上恰恰相反。他们正在行使投票的权利，并让选举出来的领导人作出对其公民最有利的决定，这正是国土安全的起源。它已经存在很多年了--那么，你以前是什么时候行使你的“宪法权利”，以至于现在被取消，如果那是你相信的？

source: We can agree or disagree on whether single payer is the right term for this , but it 's a viable model which according to Krugman " relies on private insurance companies , using a combination of regulation and subsidies to ensure that everyone is covered . " He also says " the Massachusetts health reform more or less follows the Swiss model .... " As for Obamacare , " basically , it 's a plan to Swissify America , using regulation and subsidies to ensure universal coverage . "
domestication: 我们可以同意或不同意“单一付款人”是否是描述这种制度的合适词汇，但不可否认这是一个可行的模式。根据克鲁格曼的说法，这种模式依赖于私人保险公司，并通过监管和补贴的结合来确保每个人都能获得医疗保障。他还提到，“马萨诸塞州的医疗改革基本上遵循了瑞士模式”。至于奥巴马医改，“基本上它就是一个计划，要让美国走向瑞士化，通过监管和补贴来实现全民医疗保障。”这两种制度都有各自的特点和优势，我们不妨来分析一下。首先，单一付款人的优点在于，它能够更好地控制医疗费用，让医疗服务更加廉价和普及。其次，瑞士模式则更加强调竞争和选择，让个人有更多的自由去选择自己想要的医疗服务。

" As for Obamacare , " basically , it 's a plan to Swissify America , using regulation and subsidies to ensure universal coverage . "

source: ? Rosenthal : Flat-out , bald-faced lies ? Not too often . Half-truths , incomplete truths , shading of truths ? Just about every day . That said , it 's our job to dig deeper , figure out when we 're getting played , get to the bottom of stories . Generally , I have no problem with someone who declines comment on a question . I have a big problem with someone who deliberately misleads me . And yes , I keep score .
domestication: 罗森塔尔说：“完全是无耻的谎言吗？这种情况并不常见。半真半假、省略事实、歪曲真相？几乎每天都在发生。话虽如此，这是我们的工作，深入调查，弄清楚我们何时被欺骗，找出真相。一般来说，如果有人拒绝对某个问题发表评论，我不会有意见。但如果有人故意误导我，那我就非常介意了。是的，我会记住这些事情。”
foreignization: 罗森塔尔：完全、公然的谎言？不是很常见。半真半假、不完整的真相、歪曲真相？几乎每天都会发生。话虽如此，挖得更深入、弄清楚我们何时被误导、并查明事实真相是我们的工作。通常，我没有问题，如果有人拒绝回答我的问题。我对那些故意误导我的人有很大的问题。是的，我有记分。

source: “My dear Manette, it is the case of an old and a prolonged shock, of great acuteness and severity to the affections, the feelings, the—the—as you express it—the mind. The mind. It is the case of a shock under which the sufferer was borne down, one cannot say for how long, because I believe he cannot calculate the time himself, and there are no other means of getting at it. It is the case of a shock from which the sufferer recovered, by a process that he cannot trace himself—as I once heard him publicly relate in a striking manner. It is the case of a shock from which he has recovered, so completely, as to be a highly intelligent man, capable of close application of mind, and great exertion of body, and of constantly making fresh additions to his stock of knowledge, which was already very large. But, unfortunately, there has been,” he paused and took a deep breath—“a slight relapse.”
domestication: 亲爱的曼内特，这是一桩旧疾，拖了很长时间，对情感、心灵——用你的说法就是精神——造成了极大的刺激和伤害。这病让患者不堪重负，持续了多久无人知晓，因为他自己也记不清时间，更没有其他方法可以得知。病情一度好转，他自己都描述不出是如何逐渐恢复的，我曾经听他公开讲述过这个过程，非常动人。他恢复得很好，成了一个聪明绝顶的人，既有专注力，又有体力，还能不断学习新知，知识渊博。然而，不幸的是，”他顿了顿，深吸了一口气——“最近又有点复发了。”
foreignization: “我亲爱的马内特，这是一个长期的、严重的、对情感、感觉、你所说的——心灵——造成的强烈冲击的病例。心灵。这是一个患者在其中被压垮的冲击，持续了多久无法确定，因为他自己也无法计算时间，也没有其他方法可以得知。这是一个患者从中恢复过来的冲击，他自己也无法追踪恢复的过程——我曾听他公开讲述过这一过程，非常动人。这是一个他已经完全恢复的冲击，他现在是一个非常聪明的人，能够集中精力，身体力行，不断充实自己已经很丰富的知识库。但是，不幸的是，”他停顿了一下，深吸了一口气——“有轻微的复发。”

Translate the following text to Chinese.

source: Soon after the marriage of the young people, the worthy doctor returned to Chertsey, where, bereft of the presence of his old friends, he would have been discontented if his temperament had admitted of such a feeling; and would have turned quite peevish if he had known how. For two or three months, he contented himself with hinting that he feared the air began to disagree with him; then, finding that the place really no longer was, to him, what it had been, he settled his business on his assistant, took a bachelor’s cottage outside the village of which his young friend was pastor, and instantaneously recovered. Here he took to gardening, planting, fishing, carpentering, and various other pursuits of a similar kind: all undertaken with his characteristic impetuosity. In each and all he has since become famous throughout the neighbourhood, as a most profound authority.
domestication: 年轻人的婚事一完结，那位德高望重的医生便回到切尔西。在那里，如果他允许自己有这种感受的话，他本会因缺少老朋友的陪伴而感到不满足，甚至会变得相当脾气暴躁。但事实上，他做不到这一点。两个月左右，他只是暗示他担心当地的空气开始对他不利；然后，发现这个地方真的已经不再是以前的样子，他便把生意交给了他的助手，在他那位年轻朋友担任牧师的村庄外面租了一间小屋，并且马上就好转了。在这里，他开始了园艺、种植、钓鱼、木工和其他类似的活动，所有这些都是以他特有的冲劲儿来进行的。他在每一个领域都已成为邻近地区公认的权威。
foreignization: 年轻人结婚后不久，令人尊敬的博士回到切特西，在那里，如果他的性格允许这样一种感觉的话，他会因失去老朋友的陪伴而感到不满；如果他知道如何做，他就会变得相当厌烦。几个月来，他满足于暗示他担心空气开始让他感到不舒服；然后，发现这个地方真的不再是它曾经的样子，他在年轻朋友担任牧师的村庄外面为自己买了一间独身汉的小屋，把生意交给了他的助手，并立即康复。就在这里，他开始从事园艺、种植、钓鱼、木工和其他类似的追求：所有这些都以他特有的冲动性进行。他在每一个领域中都已成为整个社区中最权威的专家。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Soon after the marriage of the young people, the worthy doctor returned to Chertsey, where, bereft of the presence of his old friends, he would have been discontented if his temperament had admitted of such a feeling; and would have turned quite peevish if he had known how. For two or three months, he contented himself with hinting that he feared the air began to disagree with him; then, finding that the place really no longer was, to him, what it had been, he settled his business on his assistant, took a bachelor’s cottage outside the village of which his young friend was pastor, and instantaneously recovered. Here he took to gardening, planting, fishing, carpentering, and various other pursuits of a similar kind: all undertaken with his characteristic impetuosity. In each and all he has since become famous throughout the neighbourhood, as a most profound authority.

source: But, this was not the change on the village, and on many a village like it. For scores of years gone by, Monseigneur had squeezed it and wrung it, and had seldom graced it with his presence except for the pleasures of the chase—now, found in hunting the people; now, found in hunting the beasts, for whose preservation Monseigneur made edifying spaces of barbarous and barren wilderness. No. The change consisted in the appearance of strange faces of low caste, rather than in the disappearance of the high caste, chiselled, and otherwise beautified and beautifying features of Monseigneur.
domestication: 但这变化，并不是村子里独有的，许多类似的村子也发生了这样的变化。多少年来，贵族老爷们把村子榨干了，却很少赏脸光临，除非是为了打猎取乐——有时猎的是人，有时猎的是野兽。为了保护这些野兽，老爷们还特地留出大片荒凉的不毛之地，当作狩猎场。不，这变化主要体现在低贱的陌生面孔出现了，而不是那些高贵、精致、美化了村庄的老爷们的消失。
foreignization: 但是，这并不是这个村庄以及许多类似村庄的变化。在过去的几十年里，贵族一直在压榨它，很少以自己的存在来恩赐它，除非是为了狩猎的快乐——现在是在猎捕人民；现在是在猎捕野兽，为了保护这些野兽，贵族将荒凉的荒野变成了教化之地。不。变化在于低贱阶层的陌生面孔的出现，而不是高贵阶层的、雕刻精美且以其他方式美化和美化了的贵族特征的消失。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

But, this was not the change on the village, and on many a village like it. No. The change consisted in the appearance of strange faces of low caste, rather than in the disappearance of the high caste, chiselled, and otherwise beautified and beautifying features of Monseigneur.

' "
domestication: 纽厄尔在接受《纽约时报》采访时说，他更希望维尔福公司能“分崩离析”。他还补充道，“我们更可能走向这条路，而不是去找个大公司把我们收购了，然后等着两三年后我们的雇佣合同到期。”
foreignization: 在接受《纽约时报》采访时，Newell 表示，如果 Valve 能够“解体”他会感到更加自在，接着补充道，“我们更有可能朝那个方向发展，而不是说，‘让我们找一家想要收购我们的大公司，然后等两三年让我们的雇佣协议到期。’”

source: Mrs. Mann ushered the beadle into a small parlour with a brick floor; placed a seat for him; and officiously deposited his cocked hat and cane on the table before him. Mr. Bumble wiped from his forehead the perspiration which his walk had engendered, glanced complacently at the cocked hat, and smiled. Yes, he smiled. Beadles are but men: and Mr. Bumble smiled.
domestication: 曼夫人把管事带到一个小客厅，地上是砖地，给他摆了个座位，还自作主张地把他的礼帽和手杖放在他面前的桌子上。班布尔先生擦掉了额头上因走路而冒出的汗水，得意地瞥了一眼自己的礼帽，露出了笑容。是的，他确实露出了笑容。因为管事也是人啊，班布尔先生就露出了笑容。
foreignization: 曼夫人把看门人领进一间地板是铺着砖的客厅，给他安排了一个座位，然后热情地把他的三角帽和手杖放在他面前的桌子上。 邦布尔先生从额头上擦掉因走路引起的汗水，得意洋洋地瞥了一眼三角帽，并且微笑。是的，他微笑了。看门人终究也是人：而邦布尔先生却微笑起来。

Mrs. Mann ushered the beadle into a small parlour with a brick floor; placed a seat for him; and officiously deposited his cocked hat and cane on the table before him. Mr. Bumble wiped from his forehead the perspiration which his walk had engendered, glanced complacently at the cocked hat, and smiled. Yes, he smiled. Beadles are but men: and Mr. Bumble smiled.
曼夫人把看门人领进一间地板是铺着砖的客厅，给他安排了一个座位，然后热情地把他的三角帽和手杖放在他面前的桌子上。 邦布尔先生从额头上擦掉因走路引起的汗水，得意洋洋地瞥了一眼三角帽，并且微笑。是的，他微笑了。看门人终究也是人：而邦布尔先生却微笑起来。

source: To wit : Although the geometry is virtually identical to that of the unisex , identically-priced Z3 , the frame 's carbon lay-up is not -- because female cyclists are typically lighter than men of the same height , engineers use less material in constructing the frame . The result , says Felt marketing director Doug Martin , is a bike that uses the same frame geometry and tube shapes as the company 's Z line of plush , road-damping bikes , but will deliver ride sensations more similar to the stiffer F-series race bikes when pedaled by lighter riders . Put another way , you get the performance of a bike built for men , in a lighter package . Martin says that most of the cyclists on the Felt-sponsored Exergy TWENTY12 women 's pro team ride the ZW3 frame , with only the taller riders opting instead for the F-series , which has a longer top tube and shorter head tube in most frame sizes .
domestication: 而且，有一点很有意思：虽然ZW3和同价的无性别区别的Z3在外形上几乎一模一样，但是它们的碳纤维构造却大不相同，因为女性骑手一般身高相同的情况下体重会比男人轻，所以制造商在制作车架时用的材料会相对较少。Felt公司的营销总监Doug Martin表示，这样一来，ZW3拥有和公司的Z系列公路赛车相同的车架几何构造和管道形状，但当由体重较轻的骑手骑乘时，会提供更类似于更加坚固的F系列赛车的骑行感受。换句话说，你能从中获得男士版自行车的性能，但体现在一个更轻的包装上。马丁说，大部分由Felt公司赞助的Exergy TWENTY12女子职业队的骑手都选择了ZW3车架，只有个子较高的骑手才会选择F系列，因为后者在大部分车架尺寸上拥有更长的横管和更短的头管。

source: “What’s to be done!” exclaimed Mrs. Sowerberry. “Your master’s not at home; there’s not a man in the house, and he’ll kick that door down in ten minutes.” Oliver’s vigorous plunges against the bit of timber in question, rendered this occurance highly probable.

source: First , you can not disprove the existence of anything without examining all of the universe . Since we do n't have space ships or sensor arrays that can peer around corners of the galaxy and universe , we can no more disprove God than we can disprove that someone named Schmortz lives on the planet Fooble .
domestication: 首先，你不可能在没有检查整个宇宙的情况下否认任何事物的存在。由于我们没有能穿越银河和宇宙边角的飞船或传感器阵列，我们不可能证明上帝不存在，就像不能证明某个叫施莫茨的人住在福布尔星球上一样。这就好比大海捞针，如果你没到处找过，你怎么能说找不到呢？况且，宇宙这么浩瀚，我们的视野又那么有限，怎么可能确定不存在神灵呢？所以，关于神灵的存在还是存疑吧。

source: Stukey visited the facilities with members of the 720th US Military Police Battalion . source: After Poe , pre-eminence in the mystery field passed to the British . Wilkie Collins wrote The Moonstone , Sir Arthur Conan Doyle created Sherlock Holmes , R. Austin Freeman wrote about Dr. Thorndyke , and any number of British writers went on to develop the detective story as a suspenseful adventure , an intellectual exercise , and a look into the darker corners of the human psyche .
domestication: 波厄之后，侦探小说的主导权传到了英国人手里。威尔基·柯林斯写出了《月亮宝石》，阿瑟·柯南·道尔创造了夏洛克·福尔摩斯，R·奥斯汀·弗里曼则有桑德基医生的故事。此后，无数英国作家继续将侦探小说发展成扣人心弦的冒险故事、智力游戏，以及对人性阴暗面的探索。

source: In the current issue of Discover , I examine electroconvulsive therapy . I had about 1500 words to write about it , and I only focused on a single study recently published in the Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences . I think it 's an important piece of research , because it uses fMRI for the first time to look at what happens to the brain when ECT pulls people out of major depression .
domestication: 最近，我在《发现》杂志上发表了一篇关于电抽搐疗法的文章，这是我的一项研究。限于篇幅，我只好集中讨论最近发表在《美国国家科学院院刊》的一项研究。我认为这是一个非常重要的研究，因为它第一次利用功能性磁共振成像技术来观察大脑在电抽搐疗法治疗重度抑郁症时的变化。
foreignization: 在当前的Discover杂志上，我检查了电抽搐治疗。我有大约1500字来写关于它的内容，而且我只关注了一项最近在美国国家科学院院刊上发表的单独研究。我认为这是一个重要的研究成果，因为它第一次使用fMRI来查看，当电抽搐治疗使得人们摆脱重度抑郁症时，大脑会发生什么变化。

source: Jeffrey Stone , a former federal prosecutor who now heads the white-collar defense practice at McDermott Will &; Emery , said some new rules , especially one that requires a company and its auditors to examine financial controls , impose heavy costs " that far outstrip the protections that are afforded . source: On an April Friday , they rallied round the liberties of the Bar . They remained in session from 9 in the morning till almost 11 at night-no other crisis in English society , it was noted , had ever been able to delay the start of a weekend like this-noble lord and lady rising after noble lord and lady to bait and berate and blast the Lord Chancellor as he sat imperturbable on the woolsack . For every one or two who defended him , like Viscount Bledisloe , who refused to drop a tear over those " somnolent anachronisms , " the Inns of Court , there were a dozen to savage the Green Paper .
domestication: 四月的一个星期五，他们齐聚一堂，声援律师界的自由。从早上九点到晚上将近十一点，会议持续了整整一天——有人评论说，英国社会史上从未有过这样的危机，连周末的开始都推迟了。一个接一个的贵族男女站出来指责和抨击坐在羊毛垫上的大法官。有人支持他，比如布莱德斯洛子爵，他就看不上那些“昏昏欲睡的古董”，即律师学院；但更多的人则猛烈抨击那份绿皮书，比例大概是一比十二。
foreignization: 在一个四月的星期五，他们聚集起来维护律师界的自由。他们从早上9点一直开会到几乎晚上11点——有人注意到，在英国社会中没有其他危机能够像这样推迟周末的开始——贵族和夫人一个接一个地站起来，在羊毛袋上泰然自若坐着的大法官进行嘲讽、斥责和抨击。对于每一两个像布莱德斯洛子爵那样为他辩护的人（布莱德斯洛子爵拒绝为那些“昏昏欲睡的过时事物”，即律师学院而流泪），就有十几个人猛烈抨击绿皮书。

source: My brother cut off all contact with my parents the night before Thanksgiving . He was 25 at the time . " I 'm not coming this year , " he told my mother while she was spreading the Butterball turkey 's legs to receive her Dayton-wide famous stuffing . " I need some time away from you and dad . I do n't know how long , but I wo n't be calling you , and please do n't call me . "

source: At times , their conclusions seem ludicrous . A bone scan on June 15 , 1987 , found the disease progressing undeterred , with new infiltration in her ribs . Dr. Jacob wrote in his notes that he had explained the report to her . She was , he jotted , " reassured , " and " happy with the results . " He underlined " reassured . "
domestication: 有时候，他们的结论听起来真是荒唐可笑。1987年6月15日的骨扫描结果显示，病情仍在恶化，肋骨上出现了新的病变。雅各布医生在病历中写道，他已经把这些情况解释给她听了。他记下，她“放心了”，对结果“很满意”。他还特意加粗了“放心”这个词。
foreignization: 有时，他们的结论显得荒谬。1987年6月15日的骨扫描发现疾病仍在继续发展，在她的肋骨中出现了新的浸润。雅各布医生在他的笔记中写道，他已经向她解释了报告。他记录道，她“感到放心”，并且“对结果满意”。他加粗了“放心”。

source: Then I showed Vi how to click on flags , populations , alliances . I took her right up to now , 2007 , Montenegro out on its own again , Kosovo possibly soon . " So this is what you do , Chris , " said Vi still puzzling , " all the random stuff you must know ! " Of course she knows random stuff too , but she does n't know it 's random yet . To someone of my age it 's all an unsettling patchwork . Patterns I once perceived have gone blurry . There are too many patches , too many stitches . It will only get worse .
domestication: 我接着教维如何点击旗帜、人口和联盟这些选项。我带她了解了从过去到现在的变化，直到2007年，黑山再次独立，科索沃可能也会很快独立。“原来你就是做这种事情啊，克里斯，”维仍然很困惑地说，“你脑子里竟然有这么多杂七杂八的东西！”当然，维自己也知道很多东西，但她还没意识到这些东西是杂乱无章的。对于像我这个年龄的人来说，世界就像一块不太协调的拼缝被子。曾经清晰的图案变得模糊不清。被子上有太多的碎片，太多的针脚。而且，这种情况只会越来越糟糕。
foreignization: 然后我向维展示了如何点击国旗、人口和联盟。我带她了解到现在，2007年，黑山再次独立，科索沃可能很快也会独立。 “所以这就是你做的事情，克里斯，”维仍然感到困惑地说，“你必须知道的所有随机东西！”当然，她也知道很多随机的东西，但她还不知道那是随机的。在我这个年龄的人看来，这一切都是令人不安的拼缝。我曾经察觉到的模式已经变得模糊了。有太多的补丁，太多的针脚。这只会变得更糟。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

" So this is what you do , Chris , " said Vi still puzzling , " all the random stuff you must know ! " Of course she knows random stuff too , but she does n't know it 's random yet . To someone of my age it 's all an unsettling patchwork . Patterns I once perceived have gone blurry . There are too many patches , too many stitches . It will only get worse .

source: The main purpose of the three UNCS will be support the international work of the United Nations . UNCS will be the home base for the United Nations Peacekeeping Forces as well as the training centers for United Nations operations . Governments from around the world could send their police and military personal for United Nations Certification as Reserved International Peacekeeping Personnel . The United Nations would maintain the fulltime United Nations Peacekeeper Forces .
domestication: 这三个联合国城的主要任务是支持联合国的国际工作。联合国城将是联合国维和部队的大本营，也是联合国行动的培训中心。各国可以派遣警察和军事人员到联合国城接受认证，成为后备国际维和人员。联合国将维持一支全职的联合国维和部队。
foreignization: 三个联合国城的主要目的将是支持联合国的国际工作。联合国城将成为联合国维和部队的基地以及联合国行动的培训中心。世界各地的政府可以派遣他们的警察和军事人员进行联合国认证，作为储备国际维和人员。联合国将维持全职的联合国维和部队。

The United Nations would maintain the fulltime United Nations Peacekeeper Forces .

source: Does sushi making rely more on cultural insight than making other genres of food to the highest standards ? That is , is it more important that a great sushi chef be of Japanese culture than that one who wants to make great barbecue be of Southern US culture , or an aspiring cook of Dim Sum be of Chinese culture ?
domestication: 做寿司是否比做其他类型的食物更依赖文化的洞察力？也就是说，一个优秀的寿司厨师必须具有日本文化背景，而想要做出好烧烤的人必须是美国南方人，想要做出好点心的人必须是华人吗？这话怎么说呢，文化背景确实对烹饪有一定影响，但不能说非要本土人才能做出正宗的美食。关键还在于厨师的技艺和对食材的理解。就像我们常说的，“一招鲜，吃遍天”，只要你掌握了做某道菜的诀窍和技巧，并且用心去做，就能做出让人赞不绝口的美食，无论你是哪国人。
foreignization: 寿司制作是否比制作其他类型的食品更依赖于文化洞察力来达到最高标准？也就是说，一个伟大的寿司厨师是日本文化的重要性是否大于一个想要制作伟大烧烤的厨师是南方美国文化，或者一个有抱负的点心厨师是中国文化？

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Does sushi making rely more on cultural insight than making other genres of food to the highest standards ? That is , is it more important that a great sushi chef be of Japanese culture than that one who wants to make great barbecue be of Southern US culture , or an aspiring cook of Dim Sum be of Chinese culture ?

做寿司是否比做其他类型的食物更依赖文化的洞察力？也就是说，一个优秀的寿司厨师必须具有日本文化背景，而想要做出好烧烤的人必须是美国南方人，想要做出好点心的人必须是华人吗？这话怎么说呢，文化背景确实对烹饪有一定影响，但不能说非要本土人才能做出正宗的美食。关键还在于厨师的技艺和对食材的理解。就像我们常说的，“一招鲜，吃遍天”，只要你掌握了做某道菜的诀窍和技巧，并且用心去做，就能做出让人赞不绝口的美食，无论你是哪国人。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Does sushi making rely more on cultural insight than making other genres of food to the highest standards ? That is , is it more important that a great sushi chef be of Japanese culture than that one who wants to make great barbecue be of Southern US culture , or an aspiring cook of Dim Sum be of Chinese culture ?
寿司制作是否比制作其他类型的食品更依赖于文化洞察力来达到最高标准？也就是说，一个伟大的寿司厨师是日本文化的重要性是否大于一个想要制作伟大烧烤的厨师是南方美国文化，或者一个有抱负的点心厨师是中国文化？

source: Blueberry Hills Farm . Joe and Kathy Gibbs . Mount Zion Road , Alto , Ga . ( off Hwy. 365 ) . Blueberries , 25 acres , grown without herbicides or pesticides . Daily , July 1 until end of August . Harnesses and buckets for picking , picnic tables , ice water available . Also , packaged berries for sale . 404-776-1217 , 404-776-1204 .
domestication: 蓝莓山农场，老板是乔和凯西·吉布斯，位于佐治亚州奥尔托的锡安山路上（靠近365号高速公路）。他们种了二十五亩蓝莓，没有用除草剂和杀虫剂，非常健康。从七月一号开始到八月底，每天都可以去采摘。农场有专门的工具让你摘莓子，还有野餐桌，可以在那里休息一下。另外，他们也会把莓子装好卖给你带走。如果想去的话，可以打电话预约，电话号码是404-776-1217或者404-776-1204。

source: Several key elements of the energy policy menu seem inherently desirable in terms of prioritizing one or more of the three central objectives while not downgrading the others : diversifying energy sources , encouraging conservation of energy , and maintaining a basic spirit of fairness in government policy affecting the citizenry .

source: 1 . Instead food farm energy plants . The ETOC lobby of the Americas and the Biogas lobby in Europe salute David Hanson of NASA . 2 . Regulate farming intensly in favour of preservation . So may be that migratory bird devastete crops or watermanagment for amphibias makes farming a pain . 3 . Apart from preservation get more trees planted which follows the infantile perception the oxygen comes from the terrestial trees that even agglomerate the CO2 4 . Burry fertile farmland under solar panels , wind turbines or hundred feet of water for the purpose of power production . 5 . Before shortage of farmland occurs invest in farmland to get a good bargain . Big Investment Companies but also power companies are investing franticly in farmland . Ask Ted Turner of CNN who bouught land the size of a small state in Europe .
domestication:
现在的人们开始倡导种植能源作物取代食品作物。美洲的ETOC游说团和欧洲的生物气体游说团对NASA的David Hanson表示欢迎。人们开始大量投入农业，力求在保护环境的同时发展农业，结果可能会导致候鸟破坏庄稼或者为了保护两栖动物而实施的水资源管理使得农业生产变得困难重重。

除了保护环境以外，大家开始更加注重植树造林，这是出于这样的认识：氧气来源于陆地上的树木，而树木能够吸收二氧化碳。于是，人们开始把宝贵的耕地埋没在太阳能板、风力涡轮机下，甚至将其淹没在百尺深的水下，所有这一切都是为了发电。

在全球性粮食短缺出现之前，投资土地已经成为热潮，大家都在抢着买地，因为这是一项非常划算的投资。很多大型投资公司和能源公司都在疯狂地投资土地。CNN的老板特德·特纳就是一个例子，他购买了欧洲一个小国那么大的土地。
foreignization: 1 . 不要种食物，改种能量作物。美洲的ETOC游说团和欧洲的生物气体游说团向NASA的David Hanson致敬。 2 . 为了保护环境，强烈监管农业。这样可能会导致候鸟破坏农作物，或者为两栖动物进行水资源管理，使得农业成为一件痛苦的事情。 3 . 除了保护环境以外，还要种更多的树，这符合幼稚的认识，即氧气来自陆地树木，它们甚至聚集了二氧化碳 4 . 将肥沃的农田埋在太阳能板、风力涡轮机或几百英尺深的水下，以便发电。 5 . 在土地短缺发生之前，投资于农田以获得良好的交易。 大型投资公司以及电力公司都在疯狂地投资于农田。 问CNN的特德·特纳，他在欧洲买了一块像小国一样大小的土地。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

1 . Instead food farm energy plants . The ETOC lobby of the Americas and the Biogas lobby in Europe salute David Hanson of NASA . 2 . Regulate farming intensly in favour of preservation . So may be that migratory bird devastete crops or watermanagment for amphibias makes farming a pain . 3 . Apart from preservation get more trees planted which follows the infantile perception the oxygen comes from the terrestial trees that even agglomerate the CO2 4 . Burry fertile farmland under solar panels , wind turbines or hundred feet of water for the purpose of power production . 5 . Before shortage of farmland occurs invest in farmland to get a good bargain . Big Investment Companies but also power companies are investing franticly in farmland . Ask Ted Turner of CNN who bouught land the size of a small state in Europe .

1 . 不要种食物，改种能量作物。美洲的ETOC游说团和欧洲的生物气体游说团向NASA的David Hanson致敬。 2 . 为了保护环境，强烈监管农业。这样可能会导致候鸟破坏农作物，或者为两栖动物进行水资源管理，使得农业成为一件痛苦的事情。 3 . 除了保护环境以外，还要种更多的树，这符合幼稚的认识，即氧气来自陆地树木，它们甚至聚集了二氧化碳 4 . 将肥沃的农田埋在太阳能板、风力涡轮机或几百英尺深的水下，以便发电。 5 . 在土地短缺发生之前，投资于农田以获得良好的交易。 大型投资公司以及电力公司都在疯狂地投资于农田。 问CNN的特德·特纳，他在欧洲买了一块像小国一样大小的土地。

source: Dave Ramsey has inspired a lot of people to get out of debt , including Derek at Life and My Finances . source: Buy organic . Nobody forces Jewish people who want to live kosher to eat non-kosher foods by failing to label everything " this product is not kosher " , same with Halal -- you want to eat a certain way that 's entirely your right -- but the onus is on you to get it done and to bear the cost burden of the segregation of products .
domestication: 买有机食品吧。没人会强迫想要遵守犹太教规的人去吃非洁食，因为不是所有东西都标着“本产品非洁食”。同样，清真食品也一样——你想怎么吃是你的权利，但责任在你身上，确保买到这些食品，并承担因此产生的额外费用。

source: This change only trickles through the population , however , with no flood forecast . The United States remains solidly a meat-eating country . We eat , for example , 50 times as much meat as people in India , and five times as much as people in China , said Joan Dye Gussow , a nutrition education professor at Columbia Teachers College .

source: Remember how people flipped out about a rumor that retailer Urban Outfitters CEO Richard Hayne may have been donating money to support Republican presidential nominee Rick Santorum ? ( PolitiFact confirmed Hayne did contribute some money , but not for the current presidential election ) . Who 's supporting them , and do you support those companies and institutions as well ?

source: If you picked the Opportunity Scholarship Program as controversial , you 're right . The OSP has been under attack ever since its initial enactment , and every yearly reauthorization has come with a fight . The Obama administration has staked out a position that " the Federal Government should focus its attention and available resources on improving the quality of public schools for all students . " Education Secretary Arne Duncan recently commented that " we remain convinced that our time and resources are best spent on reforming the public school system to benefit all students . "
domestication: 如果你认为机会奖学金计划有争议，那你是对的。这个计划从一开始实施就饱受批评，每次年度重新授权都伴随着一场战斗。奥巴马政府一直坚持认为，“联邦政府应该把注意力和可用资源集中在提高所有学生的公立学校质量上。” 教育部长阿恩·邓肯最近也表示，“我们仍然坚信，我们应该把时间和资源花在改革公立学校系统，让所有学生受益上。”
foreignization: 如果你选择了机会奖学金计划（Opportunity Scholarship Program）是有争议的，你是对的。自从该计划最初实施以来，它一直受到攻击，每次年度重新授权都伴随着一场斗争。奥巴马政府已经表明了“联邦政府应将其注意力和可用资源集中在提高所有学生的公立学校的质量上”的立场。教育部长阿恩·邓肯最近评论说，“我们仍然认为，我们的时间和资源最好花在改革公立学校系统以使所有学生受益上。”

如果你选择了机会奖学金计划（Opportunity Scholarship Program）是有争议的，你是对的。自从该计划最初实施以来，它一直受到攻击，每次年度重新授权都伴随着一场斗争。奥巴马政府已经表明了“联邦政府应将其注意力和可用资源集中在提高所有学生的公立学校的质量上”的立场。教育部长阿恩·邓肯最近评论说，“我们仍然认为，我们的时间和资源最好花在改革公立学校系统以使所有学生受益上。”

source: He waited at the bottom of a steep hill till a stage-coach came up, and then begged of the outside passengers; but there were very few who took any notice of him: and even those told him to wait till they got to the top of the hill, and then let them see how far he could run for a halfpenny. Poor Oliver tried to keep up with the coach a little way, but was unable to do it, by reason of his fatigue and sore feet. When the outsides saw this, they put their halfpence back into their pockets again, declaring that he was an idle young dog, and didn’t deserve anything; and the coach rattled away and left only a cloud of dust behind.
domestication: 他在陡峭的山脚下等着，等马车上来，然后向车外的乘客乞讨。可几乎没人理他，即使有人搭理，也让他等到了山顶再看看他能跑多远，才给他半便士。可怜的奥利弗试着跟了马车一小段路，但因为又累脚又疼，实在跟不上了。车上的乘客见状，又把半便士塞回口袋里，说他是个懒狗，不值得给钱。马车“哗啦啦”地走了，留下一片尘土。
foreignization: 他在一座陡峭的山脚下等着，直到一辆驿车上来，然后向车外的乘客乞讨；但几乎没有几个人注意到他：即使那些人也告诉他等到他们到了山顶，然后再看看他能为半便士跑多远。可怜的奥利弗试着跟在驿车后面走了一小段路，但由于疲劳和疼痛的脚，他无法继续。当车外的人看到这一点时，他们又把半便士放回口袋里，声称他是一个懒惰的小狗，不值得给任何东西；驿车隆隆地驶离，只留下一团尘土。

He waited at the bottom of a steep hill till a stage-coach came up, and then begged of the outside passengers; but there were very few who took any notice of him: and even those told him to wait till they got to the top of the hill, and then let them see how far he could run for a halfpenny. Poor Oliver tried to keep up with the coach a little way, but was unable to do it, by reason of his fatigue and sore feet. When the outsides saw this, they put their halfpence back into their pockets again, declaring that he was an idle young dog, and didn’t deserve anything; and the coach rattled away and left only a cloud of dust behind.

source: In the wake of the Chiefs ' 0-2 start and Cunningham 's brief contemplation of resigning after the opening loss to Indianapolis , the victory at Mile High was extraordinarily emotional for Kansas City . source: 1 . Instead food farm energy plants . The ETOC lobby of the Americas and the Biogas lobby in Europe salute David Hanson of NASA . 2 . Regulate farming intensly in favour of preservation . So may be that migratory bird devastete crops or watermanagment for amphibias makes farming a pain . 3 . Apart from preservation get more trees planted which follows the infantile perception the oxygen comes from the terrestial trees that even agglomerate the CO2 4 . Burry fertile farmland under solar panels , wind turbines or hundred feet of water for the purpose of power production . 5 . Before shortage of farmland occurs invest in farmland to get a good bargain . Big Investment Companies but also power companies are investing franticly in farmland . Ask Ted Turner of CNN who bouught land the size of a small state in Europe .
domestication:
1. 不种粮食作物，改种能源植物。美洲的ETOC游说团体和欧洲的生物气游说团体都向NASA的大卫·汉森致敬。

2. 加强农业监管，优先保护环境。这样一来，候鸟可能会毁坏庄稼，或者为了保护两栖动物的水质而让农业生产变得困难重重。

3. 除了保护环境，还要多植树，尽管这背后的逻辑有些幼稚——认为氧气主要来自陆地上的树木，这些树还能吸收二氧化碳。

4. 把肥沃的农田埋在太阳能板、风力发电机下，甚至淹在百尺深的水下，以生产电力。

5. 在耕地短缺之前，赶紧投资买地，这样能占个大便宜。大型投资公司和电力公司都在疯狂购入耕地。问问CNN的泰德·特纳吧，他买的地在欧洲都能算个小国了。
foreignization:
1. 取而代之的是食物农场能源植物。美洲的ETOC游说团体和欧洲的沼气游说团体向NASA的大卫·汉森致敬。
2. 强烈监管农业以利于保护。因此，可能会有候鸟毁坏庄稼，或者两栖动物的水管理使耕作变得困难。
3. 除了保护外，种植更多的树木，这遵循了氧气来自陆地树木的幼稚观念，即使这些树木也能聚集二氧化碳。
4. 将肥沃的农田埋在太阳能板、风力涡轮机或百英尺深的水下，以用于电力生产。
5. 在耕地短缺发生之前投资耕地以获得一个好交易。大型投资公司和电力公司都在疯狂投资耕地。问问CNN的特德·特纳，他购买了相当于欧洲一个小国大小的土地。

1 . Instead food farm energy plants . The ETOC lobby of the Americas and the Biogas lobby in Europe salute David Hanson of NASA . 2 . Regulate farming intensly in favour of preservation . So may be that migratory bird devastete crops or watermanagment for amphibias makes farming a pain . 3 . Apart from preservation get more trees planted which follows the infantile perception the oxygen comes from the terrestial trees that even agglomerate the CO2 4 . Burry fertile farmland under solar panels , wind turbines or hundred feet of water for the purpose of power production . 5 . Before shortage of farmland occurs invest in farmland to get a good bargain . Big Investment Companies but also power companies are investing franticly in farmland . Ask Ted Turner of CNN who bouught land the size of a small state in Europe .

1. 不种粮食作物，改种能源植物。美洲的ETOC游说团体和欧洲的生物气游说团体都向NASA的大卫·汉森致敬。

2. 加强农业监管，优先保护环境。这样一来，候鸟可能会毁坏庄稼，或者为了保护两栖动物的水质而让农业生产变得困难重重。

3. 除了保护环境，还要多植树，尽管这背后的逻辑有些幼稚——认为氧气主要来自陆地上的树木，这些树还能吸收二氧化碳。

4. 把肥沃的农田埋在太阳能板、风力发电机下，甚至淹在百尺深的水下，以生产电力。

5. 在耕地短缺之前，赶紧投资买地，这样能占个大便宜。大型投资公司和电力公司都在疯狂购入耕地。问问CNN的泰德·特纳吧，他买的地在欧洲都能算个小国了。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

1 . Instead food farm energy plants . The ETOC lobby of the Americas and the Biogas lobby in Europe salute David Hanson of NASA . 2 . Regulate farming intensly in favour of preservation . So may be that migratory bird devastete crops or watermanagment for amphibias makes farming a pain . 3 . Apart from preservation get more trees planted which follows the infantile perception the oxygen comes from the terrestial trees that even agglomerate the CO2 4 . Burry fertile farmland under solar panels , wind turbines or hundred feet of water for the purpose of power production . 5 . Before shortage of farmland occurs invest in farmland to get a good bargain . Big Investment Companies but also power companies are investing franticly in farmland . Ask Ted Turner of CNN who bouught land the size of a small state in Europe .

1. 取而代之的是食物农场能源植物。美洲的ETOC游说团体和欧洲的沼气游说团体向NASA的大卫·汉森致敬。
2. 强烈监管农业以利于保护。因此，可能会有候鸟毁坏庄稼，或者两栖动物的水管理使耕作变得困难。
3. 除了保护外，种植更多的树木，这遵循了氧气来自陆地树木的幼稚观念，即使这些树木也能聚集二氧化碳。
4. 将肥沃的农田埋在太阳能板、风力涡轮机或百英尺深的水下，以用于电力生产。
5. 在耕地短缺发生之前投资耕地以获得一个好交易。大型投资公司和电力公司都在疯狂投资耕地。问问CNN的特德·特纳，他购买了相当于欧洲一个小国大小的土地。

source: The single best resource for the ECRI call and the ongoing debate is Doug Short . This week 's article , ECRI 's Embarrassing Recession Call , describes the complete history , the critics , and how it has played out . The article highlights the most important economic indicators used in identifying recessions , showing that none have rolled over .
domestication: 关于ECRI的衰退预测和这场持续的辩论，最好的资源莫过于Doug Short了。这周他的文章《ECRI尴尬的衰退预言》详细回顾了整个事件的来龙去脉，包括批评者的观点以及事态的发展。文章还重点介绍了识别经济衰退最重要的几个指标，结果表明这些指标都没有出现反转的迹象。
foreignization: 关于ECRI电话会议和持续辩论的单一最佳资源是Doug Short。本周的文章《ECRI令人尴尬的衰退预测》描述了完整的背景、批评者以及这一事件的发展过程。文章强调了用于识别经济衰退的最重要经济指标，显示这些指标无一出现逆转。

source: Actually , at Ben Gurion they 've found just asking " Are you a terrorist ? " to be very effective at screening . I do n't think she 's saying people should n't report anything . But as long as we remain ignorant of what actually constitutes a *real* threat , we 're going to be wasting a lot of time and money on fears borne of racism .  Crafty Trilobite
domestication: 其实，在本古里安机场，他们发现直接问“你是恐怖分子吗？”这种筛查方法非常有效。她并不是说人们不应该报告任何情况。但只要我们对什么是真正的威胁还一知半解，就会因为种族偏见而浪费大量的时间和金钱。这可真是个精明的三叶虫啊。
foreignization: 实际上，在本古里安机场，他们发现仅仅询问“你是恐怖分子吗？”就非常有效地进行了筛查。我认为她并不是说人们不应该报告任何事情。但只要我们对什么构成真正的威胁仍然无知，我们就会浪费大量时间和金钱在因种族主义而产生的恐惧上。 Crafty Trilobite

source: Victor does n't believe geo-engineering will solve anything by itself , but he expects that ultimately we will have a cocktail of solutions . Perhaps we could start with a few puffs of sulfur in the atmosphere to buy time , then forests of plankton in the ocean , and then genetically engineered carbon-hungry trees . What is n't an option , Victor says , is refusing to fund more research , in the hope that geo-engineering wo n't be needed .
domestication: 维克托不相信单靠地球工程能解决任何问题，但他认为最终我们会有一套组合拳的解决方案。可能我们可以先往大气里喷点硫，争取点儿时间；再在海洋里种上大片的浮游植物森林；最后搞些基因改造过的、特别能吸收碳的树。维克托说，不行的就是不给更多的研究投钱，指望地球工程用不上，这纯属自欺欺人。
foreignization: 维克多不相信地球工程本身能解决任何问题，但他预计最终我们将有一系列解决方案。也许我们可以从向大气中喷入少量硫开始以争取时间，然后在海洋中种植浮游植物森林，再后来是基因工程改造的吸碳树。维克多说，不是一种选择的是，拒绝为更多的研究提供资金，寄希望于地球工程不会被需要。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Victor does n't believe geo-engineering will solve anything by itself , but he expects that ultimately we will have a cocktail of solutions . Perhaps we could start with a few puffs of sulfur in the atmosphere to buy time , then forests of plankton in the ocean , and then genetically engineered carbon-hungry trees . What is n't an option , Victor says , is refusing to fund more research , in the hope that geo-engineering wo n't be needed .
维克托不相信单靠地球工程能解决任何问题，但他认为最终我们会有一套组合拳的解决方案。可能我们可以先往大气里喷点硫，争取点儿时间；再在海洋里种上大片的浮游植物森林；最后搞些基因改造过的、特别能吸收碳的树。维克托说，不行的就是不给更多的研究投钱，指望地球工程用不上，这纯属自欺欺人。

source: In 2010 Harry Reid should have lost except the GOP picked the one person in the entire state of NV that could n't win . This is deja vu . If Akin stays the GOP loses that race and we all have to hope that Scott Brown , no conservative , can beat back the tidal wave of liberals in MA in order to give the GOP a chance of winning the Senate . Anyone other Akin has a better chance of winning than Scott Brown .
domestication: 2010年，哈里·里德原本应该输掉选举，但是共和党却选择了内华达州唯一一个无人能胜的候选人，这简直是历史重演。如果艾金坚持不下台，共和党必然会失去这场选举，我们都只能寄希望于斯科特·布朗（并非真正的保守派）能在马萨诸塞州挡住自由派的滔天巨浪，从而让共和党有机会赢得参议院的控制权。任何其他人比起斯科特·布朗来，都更有可能获胜。
foreignization: 2010年，哈里·雷德（Harry Reid）本应该输掉选举，除了共和党人选中了内华达州唯一一个无法获胜的人。这是似曾相识。如果艾金（Akin）继续参选，共和党将会失去这场选举，我们都必须希望斯科特·布朗（Scott Brown），一个非保守派，能够抵御马萨诸塞州的自由主义浪潮，以便给共和党赢得参议院的机会。任何其他人都比斯科特·布朗有更好的机会赢得选举。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

If Akin stays the GOP loses that race and we all have to hope that Scott Brown , no conservative , can beat back the tidal wave of liberals in MA in order to give the GOP a chance of winning the Senate . Anyone other Akin has a better chance of winning than Scott Brown .

source: But, there were other echoes, from a distance, that rumbled menacingly in the corner all through this space of time. And it was now, about little Lucie’s sixth birthday, that they began to have an awful sound, as of a great storm in France with a dreadful sea rising.
domestication: 不过，还有其他的声音，从远处传来，在这段时间里一直阴沉沉地在角落里回荡。直到小露西六岁生日前后，这些声音开始变得可怕起来，就像是法国刮起了大风暴，海浪汹涌澎湃，让人不寒而栗。
foreignization: 但是，在这段时间里，从远处传来了其他回声，在角落里阴森森地隆隆作响。而现在，大约在小露西六岁生日的时候，这些回声开始有一种可怕的声音，就像是法国的一场大风暴，伴随着可怕的海浪涌起。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

But, there were other echoes, from a distance, that rumbled menacingly in the corner all through this space of time. And it was now, about little Lucie’s sixth birthday, that they began to have an awful sound, as of a great storm in France with a dreadful sea rising.
不过，还有其他的声音，从远处传来，在这段时间里一直阴沉沉地在角落里回荡。直到小露西六岁生日前后，这些声音开始变得可怕起来，就像是法国刮起了大风暴，海浪汹涌澎湃，让人不寒而栗。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

But, there were other echoes, from a distance, that rumbled menacingly in the corner all through this space of time. And it was now, about little Lucie’s sixth birthday, that they began to have an awful sound, as of a great storm in France with a dreadful sea rising.
但是，在这段时间里，从远处传来了其他回声，在角落里阴森森地隆隆作响。而现在，大约在小露西六岁生日的时候，这些回声开始有一种可怕的声音，就像是法国的一场大风暴，伴随着可怕的海浪涌起。

source: When your blog is new , one of the worst things you can do is to plaster advertisements all over the place . If your blog is small , those ads wo n't earn you more than a few bucks , but could be costing you big . You 'll turn off readers and stunt your growth during your critical formative months .
domestication: 新博客初创的时候，最糟糕的做法就是满篇都是广告。如果博客小而且知名度不高，那些广告每天可能只会带来区区几块钱，但却可能会让你失去更多。这种行为会让读者失去兴趣，从而阻碍你在关键的成长期发展。
foreignization: 当你的博客是新的时， 你可以做的最糟糕的事情之一就是到处贴满广告。 如果你的博客很小，那些广告不会给你带来超过几美元的收入，但可能会让你损失惨重。 你会疏远读者，并在你重要的成长月份中阻碍你的成长。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

source: My one brother is off on a vacation with his family . Kids are all grown , but they got two of them along . Must be hard to raise kids then off they go . I do n't know , maybe they 're relieved to finally have an empty nest . I do n't know my nieces and nephew really . I was n't around them when they were growing up .
domestication: 我哥哥带着家人出去度假了，他们孩子都长大了，但还是带上了两个孩子。养育孩子真不容易，等到他们终于长大了就离开了家。也许做父母的会觉得如释重负，终于可以享受空巢的生活了。我其实并不太了解我的侄女和侄子，因为我在他们小时候没怎么陪伴过他们。
foreignization: 我哥哥和他的家人一起去度假了，孩子们都长大了，但他们还是带上了其中的两个。一定很难养育孩子，然后他们就离开了。我不知道，也许他们终于有了空巢，这让他们松了一口气。其实我并不是很了解我的侄女和侄子，我在他们成长过程中没有陪伴他们。

I do n't know , maybe they 're relieved to finally have an empty nest . I do n't know my nieces and nephew really . I was n't around them when they were growing up .
我哥哥和他的家人一起去度假了，孩子们都长大了，但他们还是带上了其中的两个。一定很难养育孩子，然后他们就离开了。我不知道，也许他们终于有了空巢，这让他们松了一口气。其实我并不是很了解我的侄女和侄子，我在他们成长过程中没有陪伴他们。

source: Although it certainly can feel a bit cornball at times , I also really liked " Warrior " and was a bit shocked that it bombed at the box office despite the good reviews and positive word of mouth . Speaking of movies that deserved more attention this year , " City of Life and Death " was finally released stateside and is one of the best war movies I 've seen . Tagging it as a Chinese " Schindler 's List " is understandable but also unfair , as this is a film that stands on its own with a distinct , personal vision running through it . I was looking forward to reading a Roger Ebert review for it , but it unfortunately received just a small arthouse release .
domestication: 虽然有时候确实觉得有点土，但我真的很喜欢《勇士》这部电影，没想到它在票房上扑街了，尽管口碑很好，口口相传也都是正面的。说到今年该获得更多关注的电影，《南京！南京！》终于在美国上映了，这是我看过最好的战争片之一。把它称作中国的《辛德勒的名单》是可以理解的，但也有点不公平，这是一部有自己独特视角和个人风格的作品。本来很期待罗杰·艾伯特的影评，可惜它只在小众艺术影院上映。

source: “Never mind wot it is!” replied Sikes. “I want a boy, and he musn’t be a big ’un. Lord!” said Mr. Sikes, reflectively, “if I’d only got that young boy of Ned, the chimbley-sweeper’s! He kept him small on purpose, and let him out by the job. But the father gets lagged; and then the Juvenile Delinquent Society comes, and takes the boy away from a trade where he was earning money, teaches him to read and write, and in time makes a ’prentice of him. And so they go on,” said Mr. Sikes, his wrath rising with the recollection of his wrongs, “so they go on; and, if they’d got money enough (which it’s a Providence they haven’t,) we shouldn’t have half a dozen boys left in the whole trade, in a year or two.”
domestication: “管它是什么！”赛克斯回答道。“我要找个男孩，但不能太大。天啊！”赛克斯先生沉思着说，“要是能有内德那个扫烟囱的小孩就好了！内德故意让他保持瘦小，还按次出租。可他父亲被抓了，接着少年犯罪协会就来了，把孩子从赚钱的行当里带走，教他读书写字，最后给他找个学徒的活儿。他们就这样干，”赛克斯先生想到自己的冤屈，怒火中烧，“他们就是这样干；如果他们钱够多的话（谢天谢地他们没钱），不出几年，我们这行当里连几个小孩都找不到了。”
foreignization: “不管它是什么！”赛克斯回答。“我需要一个男孩，而且不能是个大个子。天哪！”赛克斯先生若有所思地说，“要是我有内德那个扫烟囱的小男孩就好了！他故意让他保持瘦小，然后按活计出租给他。但父亲被关了；接着少年犯罪协会的人来了，把男孩从能赚钱的行当中带走，教他读书写字，最终把他变成一个学徒。就这样，”赛克斯先生回想起自己的冤屈，愤怒愈发高涨，“他们就是这样做的；如果他们有足够的钱（幸好他们没有），再过一两年，整个行业里就剩不下几个男孩了。”

And so they go on,” said Mr. Sikes, his wrath rising with the recollection of his wrongs, “so they go on; and, if they’d got money enough (which it’s a Providence they haven’t,) we shouldn’t have half a dozen boys left in the whole trade, in a year or two.”

source: #1 E-mail subscribers sure is a good idea , even better if you offer ' subscribers only ' feature . source: Quieter trading rooms are the least of it . Wheat First 's push technology system delivers benefits that could boost the bottom line by several millions dollars a year : Branch-office financial consultants are no longer chained to their speakerphones , yet news of the latest trades is always at their fingertips . In the end , the fresher information lets them offer customers better deals .
domestication: 安静的交易室只是其中一小部分好处。小麦期货公司推出的推送技术系统带来的好处可能每年能增加数百万美元的利润：分公司财务顾问不再被拴在扬声电话前，但最新的交易信息随时都能掌握在手中。归根结底，更及时的信息让他们能给客户提供更优惠的条件。

source: Unfortunately , the service was somewhat annoying on four of our five visits . The house style seems to be intrusive . Are the waiters secretly actors waiting to be discovered by some hungry producer ? They continually make snappy comments and insert themselves into private conversations , but then disappear when you need them .
domestication: 不巧的是，我们五次光顾中有四次服务都挺让人头疼的。这家店的服务风格就像是贴身跟踪一样让人难受。这些服务员难道是等着哪个饿得眼花的制片人来发掘的演员吗？他们老是插科打诨，还时不时地闯进客人的私聊里，可一到你需要他们的时候，却像蒸发了一样找不着人影。
foreignization: 不幸的是，在我们五次访问中的四次，服务有点令人讨厌。房子的风格似乎是侵入性的。服务员是不是在等待某个饥饿的制片人发现他们的秘密演员？他们不断发表俏皮的评论，并插入私人谈话中，但当你需要他们时，他们却消失了。

source: “All work is stopped, all assemble there, nobody leads the cows out, the cows are there with the rest. At midday, the roll of drums. Soldiers have marched into the prison in the night, and he is in the midst of many soldiers. He is bound as before, and in his mouth there is a gag—tied so, with a tight string, making him look almost as if he laughed.” He suggested it, by creasing his face with his two thumbs, from the corners of his mouth to his ears. “On the top of the gallows is fixed the knife, blade upwards, with its point in the air. He is hanged there forty feet high—and is left hanging, poisoning the water.”
domestication: 所有活儿都停了，大伙儿都聚在那儿，没人去牵牛，牛也跟着挤在人群中。中午时分，鼓声响起。士兵们连夜进了监狱，他被团团围住。他像之前一样被绑着，嘴里还塞了个东西——用根绳子紧紧勒住，看起来像是在笑。他用两个大拇指从嘴角到耳朵比划了一下，示意那种样子。绞刑架顶上固定着一把刀，刀刃朝上，尖端指向天空。他就这样被吊在四十英尺高的地方，任由他在那里悬挂，毒害水源。
