source: The role of the United Nations is so very important to the future global community . With problems in the Untied Nations and around the world becoming so more complex . As major changes have to happen around the world so they must at the United Nations . Example ; United Nations Security Council Veto Vote Resolution 1385 on Saturday December 29 , 2001 . One nation or one person should not have so much power to be able to stop such a resolution in secret . With only one being out of sync with the others an amendment to the resolution would have been in order . The UN Security Council being the high Council of the UN with the one vote veto you are creating a dictatorial buricaticy on a global level . Giving any one of the Permanent Nations absolute power in being able to stop any resolution they desire .
domestication: 联合国对于未来全球社会的作用至关重要。随着联合国和世界各地的问题变得愈发复杂，世界必须发生重大变革，联合国也不例外。比如，2001年12月29日星期六，联合国安理会通过的第1385号决议的否决投票。一个国家或一个人不应该有这么大的权力，能在暗中阻止这样的决议。只要有一国与其他国家不一致，就应当对决议进行修改。联合国安理会作为联合国的最高理事会，一票否决制实际上是在全球层面上创造了一个独裁的官僚体制，让任何一个常任理事国都能随心所欲地阻止任何决议。
foreignization: 联合国在未来的全球社会中的作用非常重要。随着联合国和世界各地的问题变得越来越复杂。当世界范围内必须发生重大变化时，联合国也必须如此。例如：2001年12月29日星期六的联合国安理会否决权决议1385。一个国家或一个人不应该有如此大的权力能够在秘密中阻止这样的决议。如果只有一个国家与其他人不同步，就应该对决议进行修正。作为联合国的最高理事会，联合国安理会的一票否决权正在创建一个全球层面的独裁官僚制度。给予任何一个常任理事国绝对的权力，能够阻止他们想要阻止的任何决议。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The role of the United Nations is so very important to the future global community . With problems in the Untied Nations and around the world becoming so more complex . As major changes have to happen around the world so they must at the United Nations . Example ; United Nations Security Council Veto Vote Resolution 1385 on Saturday December 29 , 2001 . One nation or one person should not have so much power to be able to stop such a resolution in secret . With only one being out of sync with the others an amendment to the resolution would have been in order . The UN Security Council being the high Council of the UN with the one vote veto you are creating a dictatorial buricaticy on a global level . Giving any one of the Permanent Nations absolute power in being able to stop any resolution they desire .

联合国对于未来全球社会的作用至关重要。随着联合国和世界各地的问题变得愈发复杂，世界必须发生重大变革，联合国也不例外。比如，2001年12月29日星期六，联合国安理会通过的第1385号决议的否决投票。一个国家或一个人不应该有这么大的权力，能在暗中阻止这样的决议。只要有一国与其他国家不一致，就应当对决议进行修改。联合国安理会作为联合国的最高理事会，一票否决制实际上是在全球层面上创造了一个独裁的官僚体制，让任何一个常任理事国都能随心所欲地阻止任何决议。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The role of the United Nations is so very important to the future global community . With problems in the Untied Nations and around the world becoming so more complex . As major changes have to happen around the world so they must at the United Nations . Example ; United Nations Security Council Veto Vote Resolution 1385 on Saturday December 29 , 2001 . One nation or one person should not have so much power to be able to stop such a resolution in secret . With only one being out of sync with the others an amendment to the resolution would have been in order . The UN Security Council being the high Council of the UN with the one vote veto you are creating a dictatorial buricaticy on a global level . Giving any one of the Permanent Nations absolute power in being able to stop any resolution they desire .

source: The museum 's five small galleries ( amounting to about 14,000 sq . ft. ) , with their cream walls and whitewashed oak floors , have been lauded for their grace , subtlety , and adaptability . Electronically controlled skylights bathe rooms with natural light , baffled by exterior panes in pyramid shapes . One-third of the open-air courtyard is filled with plants and a canopy of Chinese evergreen elms . Heat-retaining granite pavers warm feet on cool California evenings .
domestication: 这家博物馆有五个不大的展厅，总共有一万四千平方英尺左右，墙壁是乳白色的，橡木地板刷了白漆，看起来简洁优雅，细节处理得也很到位。控制室内光线的天窗可以让自然光线照进来，不过为了避免直射，设计者在外面加了菱形的玻璃隔板。一半的庭院里种满了植物，还种了几棵常绿的榆树，形成了一片绿荫。冬天晚上，即使加州的凉风习习，人行道上也是温温的，因为路面铺的是保暖效果不错的花岗岩石板。
foreignization: 博物馆的五个小画廊（总面积约为14,000平方英尺），其奶油色的墙壁和粉刷过的橡木地板，因其优雅、微妙和适应性而受到赞誉。电子控制的天窗将自然光芒洒满整个房间，这些光线被外部金字塔形玻璃板所遮挡。露天庭院的三分之一充满了植物和一簇中国常绿榆树。保暖花岗岩路面在凉爽的加利福尼亚傍晚温暖人们的脚步。

博物馆的五个小画廊（总面积约为14,000平方英尺），其奶油色的墙壁和粉刷过的橡木地板，因其优雅、微妙和适应性而受到赞誉。电子控制的天窗将自然光芒洒满整个房间，这些光线被外部金字塔形玻璃板所遮挡。露天庭院的三分之一充满了植物和一簇中国常绿榆树。保暖花岗岩路面在凉爽的加利福尼亚傍晚温暖人们的脚步。

source: “Why, do you mean to say you couldn’t have done it, if you had chosen?” demanded Monks, sternly. “Haven’t you done it, with other boys, scores of times? source: His removal, to make way for other accused persons who were to be tried, rescued him from these caresses for the moment. Five were to be tried together, next, as enemies of the Republic, forasmuch as they had not assisted it by word or deed. So quick was the Tribunal to compensate itself and the nation for a chance lost, that these five came down to him before he left the place, condemned to die within twenty-four hours. The first of them told him so, with the customary prison sign of Death—a raised finger—and they all added in words, “Long live the Republic!”
domestication: 他被移走，好让其他被告上庭受审，这暂时让他摆脱了这些“亲热”。接下来，有五个人要一起受审，因为他们没有以言行支持共和国，被视为共和国的敌人。法庭为了弥补错失的机会，迅速作出判决，这五个人在他离开前就被定罪，要在二十四小时内处死。第一个人用狱中惯用的死刑手势——举起手指——告诉他这个消息，其他人都附和道：“共和国万岁！”
foreignization: 他的移除，为了让其他要受审的人有位置，暂时让他从这些拥抱中解脱出来。接下来，五个人将一起作为共和国的敌人受审，因为他们没有以言语或行动支持共和国。法庭如此迅速地补偿自己和国家失去的机会，以至于这五人在他离开这个地方之前就来找他，被判在二十四小时内处死。其中第一个人用惯常的监狱死亡手势——举起的手指——告诉他这一点，并且他们所有人都用言语补充道，“共和国万岁！”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

His removal, to make way for other accused persons who were to be tried, rescued him from these caresses for the moment. So quick was the Tribunal to compensate itself and the nation for a chance lost, that these five came down to him before he left the place, condemned to die within twenty-four hours. The first of them told him so, with the customary prison sign of Death—a raised finger—and they all added in words, “Long live the Republic!”

source: Furthermore , malfunction of the parathyroid gland , located in the neck just inches from where one holds a cell phone , may actually cause electrohypersensitivity in some people by reducing the background level of calcium ions in the blood . RF/microwave radiation is also known to decrease the production of melatonin , which protects against cancer , and to promote the growth of existing cancer cells .
domestication: 此外，位于脖子、离手机很近的甲状旁腺如果出问题，可能会通过降低血液中钙离子的背景水平，导致某些人对电磁波过敏。射频/微波辐射还被发现会减少有助于防癌的褪黑素的生成，同时还会促进现有癌细胞的生长。
foreignization: 此外，位于颈部、距离人们手持手机位置仅几英寸的甲状旁腺发生故障，实际上可能通过降低血液中钙离子的背景水平导致某些人出现电磁超敏反应。射频/微波辐射还已知会减少保护人体免受癌症侵害的褪黑激素的产生，并促进现有癌细胞的生长。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Furthermore , malfunction of the parathyroid gland , located in the neck just inches from where one holds a cell phone , may actually cause electrohypersensitivity in some people by reducing the background level of calcium ions in the blood . RF/microwave radiation is also known to decrease the production of melatonin , which protects against cancer , and to promote the growth of existing cancer cells .
此外，位于脖子、离手机很近的甲状旁腺如果出问题，可能会通过降低血液中钙离子的背景水平，导致某些人对电磁波过敏。射频/微波辐射还被发现会减少有助于防癌的褪黑素的生成，同时还会促进现有癌细胞的生长。

source: This was not my mother 's first lump , nor her first brush with the fear of breast cancer . Twenty years earlier , she 'd had a benign cyst removed from her right breast . In the interim , her sister-in-law had a mastectomy , her sister had two mastectomies , and a close friend died of the disease .
domestication: 这已经不是我妈第一次发现肿块了，也不是她第一次和乳腺癌的恐惧擦肩而过。二十年前，她右边的乳房就切除了一个良性囊肿。这期间，她的嫂子做了切除手术，她的妹妹做了两次切除手术，一个亲密的朋友也因这病去世了。

source: In the equation ( 2 ) , the constants a and b are preset in the following manner . A plurality of simulation wafers of the same specification as that of a wafer subjected to actual development treatment ( i.e. , a wafer to be treated ) are prepared . A photoresist film is formed on each of the simulation wafers under the same conditions as those for the wafer to be treated , and exposure for circuit patterning and other processes are effected . Development treatment is applied to the respective simulation wafers for different amounts of time . The other conditions are the same for all the simulation wafers .
domestication: 在公式（2）中，常数a和b是预先设置的。具体来说，准备了多块与实际待处理的晶圆（即待处理的晶圆）规格相同的模拟晶圆。在每块模拟晶圆上，在与待处理晶圆相同的条件下，形成了光阻膜，并进行了曝光和其他工序，比如线路图形的刻蚀等。然后，对每块模拟晶圆施加不同的显影时间，而其他条件则保持一致。通过这样，可以得到一系列数据，然后根据这些数据来确定a和b的值，以满足公式（2）的要求。
foreignization: 在公式（2）中，常数a和b按以下方式预设：准备多个与实际开发处理的晶圆规格相同的仿真晶圆（即待处理晶圆）。在与待处理晶圆相同的条件下，在每个仿真晶圆上形成光刻胶膜，并进行曝光和其他工艺以进行电路图案化。将不同时间的开发处理应用于各个仿真晶圆。所有仿真晶圆的其他条件均相同。

source: People who have doubts about whether substantially greater auto efficiency is possible should consider Volvo 's prototype LCP 2000 . It seats four comfortably , is more crashworthy than federal standards require , accelerates faster than the average car today ( from 0 to 60 in 11 seconds ) , and gets 81 highway miles to the gallon . To top it off , Volvo has devised a streamlined manufacturing process that would make the LCP 2000 no more costly than typical Volvos today .
domestication: 那些对大幅提高汽车效率持怀疑态度的人，不妨看看沃尔沃的LCP 2000原型车。这车能舒适地坐四个人，安全性还超过了联邦标准，加速性能也比现在的普通车强（11秒内从0到60英里），百公里油耗低至3.4升。更妙的是，沃尔沃还设计了一套流水线制造工艺，使得LCP 2000的造价不会比现在普通的沃尔沃车贵。
foreignization: 对大幅提高汽车效率持怀疑态度的人应该考虑沃尔沃的LCP 2000原型车。它可舒适地容纳四人，比联邦标准要求的更安全，加速性能优于当今普通汽车（从0到60英里/小时只需11秒），并且每加仑油可行驶81英里。锦上添花的是，沃尔沃设计了一种简化的制造工艺，使LCP 2000的成本不会高于当今典型的沃尔沃汽车。

To top it off , Volvo has devised a streamlined manufacturing process that would make the LCP 2000 no more costly than typical Volvos today .

To top it off , Volvo has devised a streamlined manufacturing process that would make the LCP 2000 no more costly than typical Volvos today .
对大幅提高汽车效率持怀疑态度的人应该考虑沃尔沃的LCP 2000原型车。它可舒适地容纳四人，比联邦标准要求的更安全，加速性能优于当今普通汽车（从0到60英里/小时只需11秒），并且每加仑油可行驶81英里。锦上添花的是，沃尔沃设计了一种简化的制造工艺，使LCP 2000的成本不会高于当今典型的沃尔沃汽车。

source: " Why not ? " Brent asked . Brent was a pudgy Master 's student in Entomology who always wore a Cubs hat and T-shirts proclaiming the triumphs of beer . Divorced with two kids , he usually led the monologues that were to be their conversations : My ex got a hold of my credit cards . My ex gained 40 pounds . My ex feeds my kids cheese whiz and R.C. Cola . My ex is a slut . My ex this . My ex that .
domestication: “为什么不呢？”布伦特问道。布伦特是个研究昆虫学的硕士生，身材有点发福，总是戴着芝加哥小熊队的帽子，穿的T恤上印着啤酒的种种辉煌。他离了婚，有两个孩子，平时聊天基本上都是他在唱独角戏：“我前妻把我的信用卡都刷爆了。”“我前妻胖了四十磅。”“我前妻给孩子吃奶酪威士和R.C.可乐。”“我前妻是个性感女郎。”总而言之一句话，不是我前妻干这，就是我前妻干那。

source: In the wake of the Chiefs ' 0-2 start and Cunningham 's brief contemplation of resigning after the opening loss to Indianapolis , the victory at Mile High was extraordinarily emotional for Kansas City . Cunningham was embraced by team president Carl Peterson as they walked off the field together . Then the celebration in the dressing room got even more physical .
domestication: 堪萨斯城酋长队以0胜2负的糟糕战绩开局，加上库宁安曾在首场对阵印第安纳波利斯的小牛队失利后考虑过辞职，所以他们在海拔里程碗取得的胜利对整个球队来说意义非凡。在离开球场时，库宁安被球队总裁卡尔·彼得森拥抱。之后，球员们在更衣室里继续庆祝，气氛更加激动人心。他们兴奋地互相拥抱、击掌，甚至还有人哭了，大家都沉浸在胜利的喜悦中。这场胜利让整个球队重拾了信心，也让库宁安重新燃起了斗志，他们相信，只要团结一致，就能取得更多的胜利。
foreignization: 在首席队以0-2开局以及坎宁安在对阵印第安纳波利斯的第一场比赛失败后考虑辞职的情况下，位于Mile High的胜利对于堪萨斯城来说是异常感人的。当他们一起离开球场时，坎宁安被球队总裁卡尔·彼得森拥抱。然后更衣室里的庆祝活动变得更加激动人心。

source: When ready to bake , have ready a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or lightly sprinkled with cornmeal or flour . Place the dough on a very lightly floured counter and , using your fingertips , flatten the dough gently and shape it into a round ball or a football shape . Transfer it to the baking sheet , cover with an overturned large container or an oiled piece of plastic wrap and set aside to rise until the dough has almost doubled in size . ( Gently press a finger into the center of the dough ; if the depression fills in very slowly , it should be ready . )
domestication: 准备烤制时，先在烤盘上铺一层烘焙纸，或者撒上少量玉米面或面粉。把面团放在撒了少许面粉的台面上，用手指轻轻按压，把它整形成圆球状或橄榄球形状。然后，将面团转移到烤盘上，盖上一个倒扣的大碗或是涂了油的保鲜膜，放在一旁发酵，直到面团体积几乎翻倍。（轻轻按一下面团中心，如果按下去的坑慢慢回弹，说明面团就发好了。）
foreignization: 当准备烘烤时，准备好一张铺有烘焙纸或轻轻撒上玉米面或面粉的烤盘。将面团放在非常轻度撒上面粉的台面上，用指尖轻轻压平面团并将其塑形成圆形球状或橄榄球形状。将其转移到烤盘上，用一个倒扣的大容器或涂油的保鲜膜覆盖，放置一旁发酵直到面团几乎膨胀至两倍大。（轻轻按压面团中心；如果凹陷处缓慢回弹，就表示已经发酵好了。）

source: I do n't read much of Amanda Marcotte admittedly because while I 'm sure she does have a large readership , I do n't find her writing up my alley . But I was surprised she wrote on immigration at all and when I read her piece , I just felt like deja vu because I 've read bfp 's blog for about a year or so including her postings on immigration and when I was reading Marcotte 's article , I saw bfp in it . Throughout . I think Sylvia broke the text down further in her blog posting . I was surprised after reading it not to find bfp cited anywhere , including her speech that she gave at WAM . But I guess , given the historical precedence for this type of thing that 's been going on for a while , I should n't have been .

source: In 1961 , station KWEX-TV ( channel 41 ) in San Antonio , Texas , began to transmit programs in Spanish . Since Texas ' Spanish-speaking population is predominantly of Mexican background , it is not surprising that this early effort catered to the thinking and tastes of that market . Rene Anselmo , a Bostonian , realized better than anyone else at the time what the new immigrant public wanted : soap operas and music that would remind its members of the land they had left behind when they set out in search of a brighter future .
domestication: 1961年，德克萨斯州圣安东尼奥的KWEX-TV（41频道）开始播放西班牙语节目。德克萨斯州的西语人口大多是墨西哥裔，所以这个早期的尝试自然瞄准了这个市场的口味和喜好。波士顿人雷内·安塞尔莫比任何人都更清楚新移民想要什么：肥皂剧和能勾起他们思乡之情的音乐。这些节目和音乐让他们在寻找更美好未来的同时，仍能感受到家乡的温暖。

In 1961 , station KWEX-TV ( channel 41 ) in San Antonio , Texas , began to transmit programs in Spanish . Rene Anselmo , a Bostonian , realized better than anyone else at the time what the new immigrant public wanted : soap operas and music that would remind its members of the land they had left behind when they set out in search of a brighter future .

source: But the crucial question is not what technology can enable us to do , but what sort of person -- or god -- we will be . Whether by discipline and learning or by technology , our brains are changed -- perhaps permanently -- by our experiences and our choices . But most of us hold out the hope that we can choose not to follow a particular path , whether we be wielding a flint axe or a nuclear bomb . The technology changes , but do we have control of ourselves sufficiently , and sufficient wisdom , to not allow the additional power provided by more advanced technology to corrupt us , as we use it to give expression to our deep-seated hostilities .
domestication: 但关键的问题不是技术能让我们做什么，而是我们会成为什么样的人，甚至是神。无论是通过自律和学习，还是通过技术，我们的大脑都会因经历和选择而改变，或许这种改变是永久的。不过，大多数人还是抱有希望，认为我们可以选择不走某条路，不论是挥舞着石斧还是核弹。技术在变，但我们是否有足够的自控力和智慧，不让更先进的技术赋予我们的额外力量腐蚀我们，当我们用它来宣泄深藏的敌意时。
foreignization: 但是关键的问题不在于技术能使我们做什么，而在于我们将成为什么样的人——或者神。无论是通过纪律和学习还是通过技术，我们的大脑都会因我们的经历和选择而改变——也许是永久性的。但大多数人都抱有希望，认为我们可以选择不走某条特定的道路，无论我们是挥舞着石斧还是核弹。技术在变化，但我们是否足够控制自己，并拥有足够的智慧，不让更先进的技术所提供的额外力量在我们用来表达根深蒂固的敌意时腐蚀我们。

source: There is an element of validity in each of these statements . The trouble is that if our desire is not met , these attitudes can lead to a vicious cycle . The more we want something , the more we think of it as something we need and deserve . And the more we think we are entitled to it , the more convinced we are that we can not be happy and secure without it .
domestication: 这些话都有一定的道理。问题在于，如果我们的愿望得不到满足，这些态度就会形成一个恶性循环。越想要什么，就越觉得自己需要并值得拥有。越觉得自己应该得到，就越觉得没有它就无法快乐和安心。
foreignization: 这些陈述每个都有其合理之处。问题在于，如果我们的心愿得不到满足，这些态度会导致恶性循环。我们越想要某样东西，就越会认为自己需要并值得拥有它。而我们认为自己有权得到它的想法越多，就越确信没有它就无法快乐和安全。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

There is an element of validity in each of these statements . The trouble is that if our desire is not met , these attitudes can lead to a vicious cycle . The more we want something , the more we think of it as something we need and deserve . And the more we think we are entitled to it , the more convinced we are that we can not be happy and secure without it .
这些话都有一定的道理。问题在于，如果我们的愿望得不到满足，这些态度就会形成一个恶性循环。越想要什么，就越觉得自己需要并值得拥有。越觉得自己应该得到，就越觉得没有它就无法快乐和安心。

source: Although it certainly can feel a bit cornball at times , I also really liked " Warrior " and was a bit shocked that it bombed at the box office despite the good reviews and positive word of mouth . Speaking of movies that deserved more attention this year , " City of Life and Death " was finally released stateside and is one of the best war movies I 've seen . Tagging it as a Chinese " Schindler 's List " is understandable but also unfair , as this is a film that stands on its own with a distinct , personal vision running through it . I was looking forward to reading a Roger Ebert review for it , but it unfortunately received just a small arthouse release .
domestication: 虽然感觉有点太过老套，但我真的很喜欢“勇士”，而且当它在口碑和评论都很好的时候，票房却惨败，我还是挺意外的。说到今年那些值得更多关注的电影，“南京！南京！”终于在美国上映，它是我看过的最好的战争电影之一。将其称为中国版的“辛德勒的名单”是可以理解的，但是也有点不公平，因为这部电影有着自己独特的视野和个人风格。我本来还期待着罗杰·艾伯特会写一篇评论，但是不幸的是，这部电影只在小型艺术院线上映了。
foreignization: 虽然它有时可能感觉有点太过感伤，但我也非常喜欢《勇士》，并且我对它尽管收到了好评和正面的口碑却在票房上失败感到有点震惊。在提到今年应该得到更多关注的电影时，《南京！南京！》终于在美国发行，它是我看过的最好的战争电影之一。把它标记为中国版的《辛德勒的名单》是可以理解的，但也很不公平，因为这是一部具有独特个人视野的独立电影。我曾经期待着阅读罗杰·埃伯特对它的评论，但遗憾的是它只获得了小型艺术影院的发行。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Although it certainly can feel a bit cornball at times , I also really liked " Warrior " and was a bit shocked that it bombed at the box office despite the good reviews and positive word of mouth . Speaking of movies that deserved more attention this year , " City of Life and Death " was finally released stateside and is one of the best war movies I 've seen . Tagging it as a Chinese " Schindler 's List " is understandable but also unfair , as this is a film that stands on its own with a distinct , personal vision running through it . I was looking forward to reading a Roger Ebert review for it , but it unfortunately received just a small arthouse release .
虽然感觉有点太过老套，但我真的很喜欢“勇士”，而且当它在口碑和评论都很好的时候，票房却惨败，我还是挺意外的。说到今年那些值得更多关注的电影，“南京！南京！”终于在美国上映，它是我看过的最好的战争电影之一。将其称为中国版的“辛德勒的名单”是可以理解的，但是也有点不公平，因为这部电影有着自己独特的视野和个人风格。我本来还期待着罗杰·艾伯特会写一篇评论，但是不幸的是，这部电影只在小型艺术院线上映了。

source: I married into a pink bathroom ! With the hidious mint green and floral wallpaper border it was obvious someone was more in tune to the 70 ? s and I 'll admit I was not a fan . However , with much thought and procrastination I 'm slowly transforming it . I hope to have a clean slate so that I can decorate and redecorate as I see fit with minimal effort , but also , if we sell this house , someone else wo n't be stuck with an awful bathroom . It 's one of the rooms in the house which everyone sees and since it 's our only bathroom I intend to not be overwhelmingly feminine ! I shall fight the urge , but keep the pink !
domestication: 我嫁进来时，浴室是粉红色的！墙上还贴着恶心的薄荷绿和花边壁纸，一看就知道这风格是70年代的。说实话，我实在不喜欢。不过，经过深思熟虑，加上拖延症发作，我开始慢慢改造它了。我希望最终能有个干净的底子，这样我可以随心所欲地装饰，不用费太大劲，而且如果将来卖房子，别人也不会摊上个糟糕的浴室。这个浴室是家里每个来客都会看到的地方，而且还是我们唯一的卫生间，我可不想让它显得过于女性化！我要克制自己，但保留那抹粉色！
foreignization: 我嫁入了一个粉红色的浴室！带有可怕的薄荷绿和花卉墙纸边框，很明显有人更符合70年代的审美，我承认我不喜欢。然而，经过深思熟虑和拖延，我正在慢慢改造它。我希望有一个干净的起点，这样我可以根据自己的喜好轻松地装饰和重新装饰，但同时，如果我们出售这所房子，其他人也不会被一个糟糕的浴室所困扰。这是房子里每个人都能看到的一个房间，而且作为我们唯一的浴室，我打算不让它过于女性化！我会抑制这种冲动，但保留粉色！

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

I married into a pink bathroom ! With the hidious mint green and floral wallpaper border it was obvious someone was more in tune to the 70 ? s and I 'll admit I was not a fan . However , with much thought and procrastination I 'm slowly transforming it . I hope to have a clean slate so that I can decorate and redecorate as I see fit with minimal effort , but also , if we sell this house , someone else wo n't be stuck with an awful bathroom . It 's one of the rooms in the house which everyone sees and since it 's our only bathroom I intend to not be overwhelmingly feminine ! I shall fight the urge , but keep the pink !

我嫁进来时，浴室是粉红色的！墙上还贴着恶心的薄荷绿和花边壁纸，一看就知道这风格是70年代的。说实话，我实在不喜欢。不过，经过深思熟虑，加上拖延症发作，我开始慢慢改造它了。我希望最终能有个干净的底子，这样我可以随心所欲地装饰，不用费太大劲，而且如果将来卖房子，别人也不会摊上个糟糕的浴室。这个浴室是家里每个来客都会看到的地方，而且还是我们唯一的卫生间，我可不想让它显得过于女性化！我要克制自己，但保留那抹粉色！

source: Alas! How few of Nature’s faces are left alone to gladden us with their beauty! The cares, and sorrows, and hungerings, of the world, change them as they change hearts; and it is only when those passions sleep, and have lost their hold for ever, that the troubled clouds pass off, and leave Heaven’s surface clear. It is a common thing for the countenances of the dead, even in that fixed and rigid state, to subside into the long-forgotten expression of sleeping infancy, and settle into the very look of early life; so calm, so peaceful, do they grow again, that those who knew them in their happy childhood, kneel by the coffin’s side in awe, and see the Angel even upon earth.
domestication: 唉！如今自然界的美好面容所剩无几，能让我们心生欢喜的更是寥寥无几！世上的忧愁、烦恼和饥饿，改变着人们的面貌，就像它们改变人心一样；只有当这些激情消散，永远失去了掌控，那些忧云才会散去，天空才会再次清澈。常见的是，即使在死者的脸上，即使是在那固定而僵硬的状态下，面容也会逐渐恢复到久违的婴儿般的安睡表情，重新呈现出早年生活的模样；它们变得如此平静、安宁，以至于那些曾在他们快乐童年时认识他们的人，会在棺材旁跪下，怀着敬畏之心，仿佛看到了人间的天使。
foreignization: 唉！自然的面容中有多少还保持着它们的美丽来让我们高兴啊！世间的忧虑、悲伤和饥饿改变了它们，就像它们改变心灵一样；只有当这些激情沉睡，永远失去了它们的控制时，纷扰的乌云才会消散，留下天堂表面的清澈。即使是死者的面容，在那种固定和僵硬的状态下，也常常会恢复到早已遗忘的婴儿睡眠时的表情，重新呈现出早年生活的模样；它们再次变得如此平静，如此安宁，以至于那些在他们幸福童年时认识他们的人，会在棺材旁跪下，敬畏地看到天使甚至在人间。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Alas! How few of Nature’s faces are left alone to gladden us with their beauty! The cares, and sorrows, and hungerings, of the world, change them as they change hearts; and it is only when those passions sleep, and have lost their hold for ever, that the troubled clouds pass off, and leave Heaven’s surface clear. It is a common thing for the countenances of the dead, even in that fixed and rigid state, to subside into the long-forgotten expression of sleeping infancy, and settle into the very look of early life; so calm, so peaceful, do they grow again, that those who knew them in their happy childhood, kneel by the coffin’s side in awe, and see the Angel even upon earth.

唉！如今自然界的美好面容所剩无几，能让我们心生欢喜的更是寥寥无几！世上的忧愁、烦恼和饥饿，改变着人们的面貌，就像它们改变人心一样；只有当这些激情消散，永远失去了掌控，那些忧云才会散去，天空才会再次清澈。常见的是，即使在死者的脸上，即使是在那固定而僵硬的状态下，面容也会逐渐恢复到久违的婴儿般的安睡表情，重新呈现出早年生活的模样；它们变得如此平静、安宁，以至于那些曾在他们快乐童年时认识他们的人，会在棺材旁跪下，怀着敬畏之心，仿佛看到了人间的天使。

source: Third , earlier this year the agency 's board ( the secretaries of labor , commerce and the Treasury ) adopted a new investment strategy that took on more risk . Instead of investing around a quarter of its assets in equities and most of the rest in bonds , as it had been doing , the corporation 's board decided to allot 45 percent of the portfolio to public equities ( both American and international stocks ) , 45 percent to fixed-income securities ( a mix of corporate bonds and government bonds ) , and 10 percent to alternative investments ( real estate and private equities ) .
domestication: 第三，今年早些时候，机构的董事会（劳工部、商务部和财政部的部长）通过了一项新的投资策略，增加了风险。之前，他们大约把四分之一的资产投在股票上，剩下的大部分都放在债券里。现在，董事会决定把45%的资金投向公开市场股票（包括美国和国际股票），45%投向固定收益证券（包括企业债和政府债），剩下的10%则投向另类投资（如房地产和私募股权）。
foreignization: 第三，今年早些时候，该机构的董事会（劳工、商务和财政部长）采纳了一种承担更多风险的新投资策略。该企业董事会决定将45%的资产配置到公开股票（包括美国和国际股票），45%配置到固定收益证券（包括公司债券和政府债券），10%配置到另类投资（房地产和私募股权），而不是像以前那样将其大约四分之一的资产投资于股票，其余大部分投资于债券。

Instead of investing around a quarter of its assets in equities and most of the rest in bonds , as it had been doing , the corporation 's board decided to allot 45 percent of the portfolio to public equities ( both American and international stocks ) , 45 percent to fixed-income securities ( a mix of corporate bonds and government bonds ) , and 10 percent to alternative investments ( real estate and private equities ) .
第三，今年早些时候，机构的董事会（劳工部、商务部和财政部的部长）通过了一项新的投资策略，增加了风险。之前，他们大约把四分之一的资产投在股票上，剩下的大部分都放在债券里。现在，董事会决定把45%的资金投向公开市场股票（包括美国和国际股票），45%投向固定收益证券（包括企业债和政府债），剩下的10%则投向另类投资（如房地产和私募股权）。

source: If the sale of the Boston newspaper is completed , it will mark the end of one of the most complex -- and private -- corporate dramas in recent years . Since 1873 , two families have controlled the Boston newspaper . The heirs of Eben D. Jordan , the founder of the Jordan Marsh stores , who was one of the original investors , shared the ownership with the heirs of Charles Henry Taylor , Mr. Jordan 's business manager .
domestication: 如果波士顿报纸的出售成功完成，那么这将标志着近年来最复杂——同时也是最低调——的企业变动之一的终结。自1873年以来，两大家族就一直控制着波士顿报纸。乔丹百货创始人埃本·D·乔丹的后代与另一位原始投资者查尔斯·亨利·泰勒的后代共享报社的所有权，后者曾是乔丹的商业经理。这是一则充满传奇色彩的家族企业故事，波士顿报纸的命运也因此备受关注。
foreignization: 如果波士顿报纸的出售完成，它将标志着近年来最复杂和最隐私的企业戏剧之一的结束。自1873年以来，两个家族控制了这家波士顿报纸。乔丹百货公司创始人埃本·D·乔丹（Eben D. Jordan）的继承人，他们是最初的投资者之一，与查尔斯·亨利·泰勒（Charles Henry Taylor）的继承人共享所有权，而泰勒是乔丹的商业经理。

source: Since joining the team in a trade in 1992 , Favre 's constancy with the Packers is one of the few stable things in the constantly changing league . source: Alger Growth ranks 36 among 152 growth funds the past 10 years . Manager David Alger looks for stocks of large , rapidly growing companies and is willing to pay high prices for them . Alger is n't fazed by his ' 96 slump -- or the market 's current heights . " We 're very enthusiastic about the stock market , " he says . And technology , too : The fund has about 30% of its assets in tech stocks .

source: " It 's what Chuck Darwin talked about back in 1850 . Organisms evolve in response to selection pressures in their environment , " says Micheal Owen , an extension weed scientist at Iowa State University in Ames . " In essence , the better we get at controlling weeds , the more likely those efforts will select for survivors that do not respond to controls . "

foreignization: “这是查克·达尔文在1850年谈到的。生物会对其环境中的选择压力作出进化反应，”爱荷华州立大学位于艾姆斯的扩展杂草科学家迈克尔·欧文说。“实质上，我们越善于控制杂草，这些努力就越可能选择出对控制措施不作出反应的幸存者。”

source: Efforts to save the Serengeti date back decades . In the 1950s , Bernhard Grzimek of the Frankfurt Zoological Society led a campaign to save the wildebeest migration . His seminal book and a subsequent movie of the same title , Serengeti Shall Not Die , asserted that conserving the Serengeti was a global imperative . The international outcry that followed helped win protected status for the same park corridor that will accommodate the new highway .
domestication: 拯救塞伦盖蒂的努力已经持续了数十年。早在20世纪50年代，法兰克福动物学会的伯纳德·格兹米克就发起了保护角马迁徙的运动。他的著作《塞伦盖蒂不应消逝》以及同名电影，强调保护塞伦盖蒂是一项全球性的任务。这本书和电影引发了国际社会的强烈反响，最终帮助这片区域获得了保护区的地位，而这片区域正是新公路将要穿过的走廊。
foreignization: 拯救塞伦盖蒂的努力可以追溯到几十年前。20世纪50年代，法兰克福动物园协会的伯恩哈德·格茨米克领导了一场拯救角马迁徙的运动。他的开创性著作和随后同名的电影《塞伦盖蒂不应消亡》主张保护塞伦盖蒂是一项全球性的任务。随之而来的国际抗议帮助赢得了对该公园走廊的保护地位，该走廊将容纳新的公路。

source: L : READ THE COVER Aspen -- particularly young stands with trunks of buggy-whip to pole size -- attract woodcock . The clean forest floor lets timberdoodles hunt for worms , the stem density protects them from land-based predators and the overhead canopy foils would-be avian enemies . Other preferred habitats include alder runs ( for their cover density and moist soil ) and willows . Research shows that alder runs may hold more birds in dry years , likely because of the associated moisture . Dogwood and sumac can also produce .
domestication: 读一读封面吧：杨树林——特别是那些树干像马鞭一样细长的年轻林地——吸引着林鹬。干净的林地让这些小鸟能轻松寻找蚯蚓，树木密集保护它们免受陆地捕食者的袭击，而头顶的树冠则阻挡了空中的敌人。其他理想的栖息地包括桤木丛（因为其树冠密集和土壤湿润）和柳树林。研究表明，在干旱年份，桤木丛可能藏有更多鸟类，这可能是因为那里的水分更充足。山茱萸和盐肤木也能成为它们的好去处。
foreignization: L : 阅读封面 山杨 -- 尤其是树干大小在马鞭到杆状之间的幼林 -- 吸引了鹬鸟。干净的森林地面让啄木鸟可以寻找虫子，树干密度保护它们免受陆地捕食者的侵扰，头顶的树冠则挫败了潜在的鸟类敌人的企图。其他优选栖息地包括桤木带（因其覆盖密度和湿润土壤）和柳树。研究表明，在干旱年份，桤木带可能容纳更多的鸟类，这可能是因为其伴随的水分。山茱萸和盐肤木也能产生成效。

source: I will be the first to say that I 'm usually skeptical about an expansion pack , and find a hard time paying for something that I feel is n't my thing . You have to keep in mind a saying that has been around for a very long time , " Do n't knock it ' til you try it " . Sure , a certain expansion pack might not seem all that useful based on the way that you play your game , but keep in mind that expansion packs comes with brand new interactions , furniture , clothes , and things to explore . Not everything that is in the expansion packs are shown in EA 's livestream . They always leave a bit for you to discover on your own , and that bit may be the thing that you use and/or adore the most .
domestication: 我得坦白，我对扩展包通常持怀疑态度，掏钱买那些我觉得不合自己口味的东西确实挺难的。有句老话了，“没吃过猪肉也见过猪跑”，这话说的就是这种情况。可能某个扩展包乍一看对你玩游戏没啥大帮助，但别忘了，扩展包里头可多了不少新鲜玩意儿，新互动、新家具、新衣服，还有各种可以探索的内容。EA的直播里展示的只是冰山一角，他们总留一手，等着你自己去发现。而那些你自己发现的东西，很可能就是你最常用、最喜欢的部分。

source: " I also wanted to write about what a spiritual quest might look like at the end of the twentieth century-a spiritual quest by someone who , like so many of my friends , was basically irreligious and resistant to spiritual thought . " Thus was born the story of Alice Black , whose life takes an unexpected turn in the middle of one night . " She 'll spend the rest of the book trying to make sense of what happened that night , " Huneven says . " I 'm not sure she ever does , exactly . But her life is transformed . "
domestication: 我也想写一写20世纪末的精神追求会是什么模样——一个像我许多朋友那样，基本上不信教、对精神世界持怀疑态度的人的精神追求。于是，爱丽丝·布莱克的故事就这样诞生了。她的生活在一个午夜突然发生了出乎意料的转折。“她将在书的剩余部分里试图弄明白那个夜晚究竟发生了什么，”胡内文说道，“我不确定她是否真的弄明白了。但她的生活确实因此而彻底改变。”
foreignization: “我还想写一写20世纪末的精神追求可能会是什么样子——一个像我的许多朋友那样基本上无宗教信仰且对精神思想持抵制态度的人的精神追求。”于是，爱丽丝·布莱克的故事诞生了，她的生活在一个夜晚的中途发生了意想不到的转折。“她将在书的剩余部分试图弄清楚那个晚上发生的事情，”休内文说。“我不能确定她是否真的做到了。但她的生活被改变了。”

source: They were happy days, those of Oliver’s recovery. Everything was so quiet, and neat, and orderly; everybody so kind and gentle; that after the noise and turbulence in the midst of which he had always lived, it seemed like Heaven itself. He was no sooner strong enough to put his clothes on, properly, than Mr. Brownlow caused a complete new suit, and a new cap, and a new pair of shoes, to be provided for him. As Oliver was told that he might do what he liked with the old clothes, he gave them to a servant who had been very kind to him, and asked her to sell them to a Jew, and keep the money for herself. This she very readily did; and, as Oliver looked out of the parlour window, and saw the Jew roll them up in his bag and walk away, he felt quite delighted to think that they were safely gone, and that there was now no possible danger of his ever being able to wear them again. They were sad rags, to tell the truth; and Oliver had never had a new suit before.
domestication: 那是奥利弗康复的日子，真是快乐啊！一切都那么安静，整洁，有序；每个人都那么和善温柔。和他以前生活中的嘈杂与混乱相比，这里简直像是天堂一般。他刚一有力气穿衣服，布朗洛先生就让人给他准备了一身全新的衣服，还有新帽子和新鞋子。奥利弗被告知旧衣服可以随意处置，他就把这些衣服给了一个对他很好的仆人，让她拿去卖给犹太人，卖的钱归她自己。仆人高兴地答应了。奥利弗从客厅的窗户往外看，看到那个犹太人把衣服卷进包里，扬长而去，心里别提多高兴了，终于不用担心再穿上那些破烂衣服了。说真的，那些衣服破得可怜，奥利弗以前可从未穿过新衣服呢。
foreignization: 那是快乐的日子，奥利弗康复的那些日子。一切都是那么安静、整洁、有序；每个人都是那么和蔼温柔；在他以往生活的喧嚣和动荡之中，这似乎就像天堂一样。他一能够适当穿上衣服，布朗洛先生就为他准备了一整套新衣服、一顶新帽子、一双新鞋。由于奥利弗被告知可以随心所欲地处置旧衣服，他把这些衣服给了一个对他非常友善的仆人，并请求她把这些衣服卖给一个犹太人，然后把钱留给自己。她非常乐意地照做了；当奥利弗从客厅的窗户向外看，看到那个犹太人把它们卷进他的包里走开时，他感到非常高兴，想着这些衣服安全地走了，现在再也不可能有他再穿这些衣服的危险了。说实在的，那些是破烂的衣服；而奥利弗以前从未穿过新衣服。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

They were happy days, those of Oliver’s recovery. Everything was so quiet, and neat, and orderly; everybody so kind and gentle; that after the noise and turbulence in the midst of which he had always lived, it seemed like Heaven itself. He was no sooner strong enough to put his clothes on, properly, than Mr. Brownlow caused a complete new suit, and a new cap, and a new pair of shoes, to be provided for him. As Oliver was told that he might do what he liked with the old clothes, he gave them to a servant who had been very kind to him, and asked her to sell them to a Jew, and keep the money for herself. This she very readily did; and, as Oliver looked out of the parlour window, and saw the Jew roll them up in his bag and walk away, he felt quite delighted to think that they were safely gone, and that there was now no possible danger of his ever being able to wear them again. They were sad rags, to tell the truth; and Oliver had never had a new suit before.

source: " There are several reasons why a technique like AU has to be regulated . Yet , why is it that you can use insurance to cover it ? " Ms. Takayama lowered her voice . " The nation consistently has been behind the spread of AU . The goal was to rein in the falling birthrate . Another factor , however , was this monitoring ability . AU meant that women could produce healthy children for the State . Do you understand ? From the time you are a fetus , you are expected to be loyal . " " I find that odd , " replied Marina .
domestication: 这个AU技术之所以需要受到监管，有几个原因。但是，你不觉得奇怪吗，为什么可以用保险来覆盖它呢？高山女士放低了声音。“国家一直以来都在推广AU，主要目的是为了解决出生率下降的问题。然而，还有一个因素，那就是这种监控能力。AU的意思是女人可以为国家生产健康的孩子。你明白吗？从你还是个胎儿开始，就被期望对国家忠诚。”玛丽娜回答说，“我觉得很奇怪。”

source: Jones went on in this way , gently , his voice free of blame or consternation , but weighted with pleading sadness . Finally , he spread his arms and drew close to Jeffrey . Jeffrey turned and found himself folded into the muscular wingspan . Angela too had somehow become enclosed in it . Jones began a fervent prayer and their three bowed heads touched . Jeffrey trembled and wept and tried to subdue it , to hide it . He felt himself shrinking in those encircling arms . At his back , as if to ape the clenched and dismal whistle in his throat , the kettle started to sing .
domestication: 琼斯继续说着，语气温柔，没有责备或惊慌，但带着恳求的哀伤。最后，他张开双臂，靠近了杰弗里。杰弗里转过身，发现自己被那宽阔的肌肉臂膀紧紧抱住。安吉拉不知什么时候也被揽了进来。琼斯开始热切地祈祷，三个人的头低垂着碰在一起。杰弗里浑身颤抖，泪水不由自主地流下来，他努力抑制，想隐藏自己的情感。在这些环绕的怀抱中，他觉得自己变得越来越小。背后，仿佛模仿他喉咙里那压抑而悲伤的哨声，水壶也开始欢快地歌唱起来。
foreignization: 琼斯继续这样说，语气温和，声音中没有责备或惊慌，但充满了恳求的悲伤。最后，他张开双臂，靠近了杰弗里。杰弗里转过身，发现自己被那宽阔的肌肉臂膀搂住了。安吉拉也不知怎的被包括在内了。琼斯开始热烈地祈祷，他们的三个头低垂着碰在一起。杰弗里颤抖着哭泣，试图抑制它，隐藏它。他在那些环抱着他的手臂中感到自己在缩小。在他背后，仿佛模仿着他喉咙里紧绷而忧郁的哨声，水壶开始歌唱起来。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Jones went on in this way , gently , his voice free of blame or consternation , but weighted with pleading sadness . Finally , he spread his arms and drew close to Jeffrey . Jeffrey turned and found himself folded into the muscular wingspan . Angela too had somehow become enclosed in it . Jones began a fervent prayer and their three bowed heads touched . Jeffrey trembled and wept and tried to subdue it , to hide it . He felt himself shrinking in those encircling arms . At his back , as if to ape the clenched and dismal whistle in his throat , the kettle started to sing .
琼斯继续说着，语气温柔，没有责备或惊慌，但带着恳求的哀伤。最后，他张开双臂，靠近了杰弗里。杰弗里转过身，发现自己被那宽阔的肌肉臂膀紧紧抱住。安吉拉不知什么时候也被揽了进来。琼斯开始热切地祈祷，三个人的头低垂着碰在一起。杰弗里浑身颤抖，泪水不由自主地流下来，他努力抑制，想隐藏自己的情感。在这些环绕的怀抱中，他觉得自己变得越来越小。背后，仿佛模仿他喉咙里那压抑而悲伤的哨声，水壶也开始欢快地歌唱起来。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Jones went on in this way , gently , his voice free of blame or consternation , but weighted with pleading sadness . Finally , he spread his arms and drew close to Jeffrey . Jeffrey turned and found himself folded into the muscular wingspan . Angela too had somehow become enclosed in it . Jones began a fervent prayer and their three bowed heads touched . Jeffrey trembled and wept and tried to subdue it , to hide it . He felt himself shrinking in those encircling arms . At his back , as if to ape the clenched and dismal whistle in his throat , the kettle started to sing .
琼斯继续这样说，语气温和，声音中没有责备或惊慌，但充满了恳求的悲伤。最后，他张开双臂，靠近了杰弗里。杰弗里转过身，发现自己被那宽阔的肌肉臂膀搂住了。安吉拉也不知怎的被包括在内了。琼斯开始热烈地祈祷，他们的三个头低垂着碰在一起。杰弗里颤抖着哭泣，试图抑制它，隐藏它。他在那些环抱着他的手臂中感到自己在缩小。在他背后，仿佛模仿着他喉咙里紧绷而忧郁的哨声，水壶开始歌唱起来。

source: It was also an open war on the ministry of finance , and corrupt interests in the bureaucracy that lived and survived by politicians playing ball . That is why Makiko Tanaka joined the DPJ ( who was practically raped by MoFA bureaucrats and supporting mass media during her term as foreign minister ) . The point is that there was a critical mass of public awareness , and awareness among elected politicians that the bureaucracy in Japan is out of control , and proactively contributing to Japan 's problems .
domestication: 这简直就是对财政部和官僚体系中腐败利益的公开宣战，这些利益靠政客们玩弄政治而生存。正因为如此，田中真纪子才加入了民主党，她在担任外务大臣期间几乎被外务省的官僚和支持她的大众媒体“凌辱”。关键在于，公众和当选的政治家们已经形成了足够的共识：日本的官僚体系已经失控，并且主动地加剧了日本的问题。
foreignization: 这也是一场针对财务省和官僚体系中靠政客们听话行事而生存的腐败利益集团的公开战争。这就是为什么田中真纪子加入了民主党（她在担任外务大臣期间几乎被外务省官僚和支持她的大众媒体“强暴”）。重点是，公众和当选政客中已经形成了一种共识，即日本的官僚体系已经失控，并且积极地助长了日本的问题。

The point is that there was a critical mass of public awareness , and awareness among elected politicians that the bureaucracy in Japan is out of control , and proactively contributing to Japan 's problems .

source: People who have doubts about whether substantially greater auto efficiency is possible should consider Volvo 's prototype LCP 2000 . It seats four comfortably , is more crashworthy than federal standards require , accelerates faster than the average car today ( from 0 to 60 in 11 seconds ) , and gets 81 highway miles to the gallon . To top it off , Volvo has devised a streamlined manufacturing process that would make the LCP 2000 no more costly than typical Volvos today .
domestication: 那些怀疑汽车能否大幅提高效率的人应该看看沃尔沃的LCP 2000原型车。这款车舒适地可乘坐四人，碰撞安全性超过了联邦标准的要求，加速比如今平均水平的汽车还快（从0到60英里每小时仅需11秒），而且在高速公路上每加仑汽油可行驶81英里。更值得一提的是，沃尔沃还开发了一种简化的制造工艺，使得LCP 2000的生产成本并不比现在的典型沃尔沃车型更高。
foreignization: 那些对是否有可能显著提高汽车效率产生疑虑的人应该考虑沃尔沃的原型车LCP 2000。它可以舒适地容纳四个人，相比联邦标准所要求的碰撞标准还要高，相比今天的大多数汽车加速更快（从0到60英里每小时仅需11秒），而且每加仑汽油可以行驶81英里的高速公路里程。最重要的是，沃尔沃设计出了一种简化的制造流程，使得LCP 2000的成本不会超过如今典型的沃尔沃汽车。

To top it off , Volvo has devised a streamlined manufacturing process that would make the LCP 2000 no more costly than typical Volvos today .

source: Barney looked timidly at Fagin, as if for permission; the Jew remaining silent, and not lifting his eyes from the ground, he retired; and presently returned, ushering in Nancy; who was decorated with the bonnet, apron, basket, and street-door key, complete.
domestication: 巴尼怯生生地看了看费金，好像在征求许可；那犹太人却一言不发，眼睛一直盯着地面。巴尼见状便退了出去，不一会儿，带着南希回来了。南希戴着帽子，围着围裙，手里提着篮子，还拿着门钥匙，打扮得整整齐齐的。
foreignization: 巴尼怯生生地看了看费金，似乎在请求允许；犹太人保持沉默，眼睛没有从地上抬起，巴尼退了出去；不久又回来，引来了南希；她戴着帽子，系着围裙，拿着篮子和街门钥匙，全副武装。

messages_domestication.content:

Barney looked timidly at Fagin, as if for permission; the Jew remaining silent, and not lifting his eyes from the ground, he retired; and presently returned, ushering in Nancy; who was decorated with the bonnet, apron, basket, and street-door key, complete.

source: The two old crones, chiming in together, began pouring out many piteous lamentations that the poor dear was too far gone to know her best friends; and were uttering sundry protestations that they would never leave her, when the superior pushed them from the room, closed the door, and returned to the bedside. On being excluded, the old ladies changed their tone, and cried through the keyhole that old Sally was drunk; which, indeed, was not unlikely; since, in addition to a moderate dose of opium prescribed by the apothecary, she was labouring under the effects of a final taste of gin-and-water which had been privily administered, in the openness of their hearts, by the worthy old ladies themselves.
domestication: 这两位老太婆同时开口，一起唠叨了许多可怜兮兮的话，说可怜的她已经糊涂得连好朋友都不认识了，她们发誓永远不会离开她。但是， Mother Superior 把她们推出房间，把门关上，然后回到床边。被赶出房间后，这两个老太太马上改了口调，从钥匙孔处大声哭诉说老萨莉喝醉了。其实，这也不是不可能的事，因为除了药剂师开的鸦片外，她还受到了一些私下里由这些好心的老太太们端上的杜松子酒和水的影响。在她们“敞开心扉”的同时，也给她喝了不少。
foreignization: 两个老太婆，一起插话，开始倾诉许多可怜的哀叹，说可怜的亲爱的人已经病得不认得自己的好朋友了；她们正在发表各种宣誓说自己永远不会离开她的时候，修女长把她们从房间里推出去，关上门，然后回到床边。在被赶出去之后，两个老太婆改变了语气，从钥匙孔哭喊着说老萨莉醉了；这确实是不太可能的；因为除了药剂师开的适量的鸦片之外，她还在忍受着一杯私下里由值得尊敬的老太婆们出于敞开的心肠而端来的杜松子酒和水的最后一口的影响。

On being excluded, the old ladies changed their tone, and cried through the keyhole that old Sally was drunk; which, indeed, was not unlikely; since, in addition to a moderate dose of opium prescribed by the apothecary, she was labouring under the effects of a final taste of gin-and-water which had been privily administered, in the openness of their hearts, by the worthy old ladies themselves.

source: The bell rang gently as he spoke. He crept upstairs to the door, and presently returned accompanied by a man muffled to the chin, who carried a bundle under one arm. Sitting down and throwing back his outer coat, the man displayed the burly frame of Sikes.
domestication: 他说话时，铃声轻轻响起。他轻手轻脚地走上楼，不一会儿，带着一个裹得严严实实的人回来了，那人腋下夹着个包裹。一坐下，那人就脱掉了外衣，露出了粗壮的身子，原来是赛克斯。

source: Perfectly still and silent, and not even fallen back in her chair, she sat under his hand, utterly insensible; with her eyes open and fixed upon him, and with that last expression looking as if it were carved or branded into her forehead. So close was her hold upon his arm, that he feared to detach himself lest he should hurt her; therefore he called out loudly for assistance without moving.
domestication: 她坐在那里，一动不动，静止得就像雕像一样，甚至都没有往椅子上靠回去。她的手死死地抓着他的胳膊，他害怕自己一动会伤到她，所以他大声呼救，却仍然保持着原来的姿势不敢挪动。她眼睛睁得很大，凝视着他，脸上那副表情似乎被刻在了她的额头上，显得非常恐惧。
foreignization: 完全静止和沉默的，她没有甚至在她的椅子上后仰，她坐在他的手下，完全失去知觉；她的眼睛睁开并且固定在他身上，和那最后的表情看起来就像是在她的额头上刻画或烙印着。 她抓住他的手臂如此之紧，以至于他害怕脱离她，否则他应该伤害她；因此他大声呼叫帮助而不移动。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Perfectly still and silent, and not even fallen back in her chair, she sat under his hand, utterly insensible; with her eyes open and fixed upon him, and with that last expression looking as if it were carved or branded into her forehead. So close was her hold upon his arm, that he feared to detach himself lest he should hurt her; therefore he called out loudly for assistance without moving.
她坐在那里，一动不动，静止得就像雕像一样，甚至都没有往椅子上靠回去。她的手死死地抓着他的胳膊，他害怕自己一动会伤到她，所以他大声呼救，却仍然保持着原来的姿势不敢挪动。她眼睛睁得很大，凝视着他，脸上那副表情似乎被刻在了她的额头上，显得非常恐惧。

Perfectly still and silent, and not even fallen back in her chair, she sat under his hand, utterly insensible; with her eyes open and fixed upon him, and with that last expression looking as if it were carved or branded into her forehead. So close was her hold upon his arm, that he feared to detach himself lest he should hurt her; therefore he called out loudly for assistance without moving.
完全静止和沉默的，她没有甚至在她的椅子上后仰，她坐在他的手下，完全失去知觉；她的眼睛睁开并且固定在他身上，和那最后的表情看起来就像是在她的额头上刻画或烙印着。 她抓住他的手臂如此之紧，以至于他害怕脱离她，否则他应该伤害她；因此他大声呼叫帮助而不移动。

source: That was a particularly strong performance against the backdrop of a regional economy that cooled off significantly last year . source: For fuck 's sake , Marc and Jack . Knock it off . source: Now comes Windows Live Mail . The program can be downloaded free at http : //get.live.com/betas , and while it 's still in its testing phase and has kinks , it 's already rather good . It includes new bells and whistles like photo-embedding tools , syndicated feeds and integration with instant messaging . But if none of these extras interest you , you 'll be glad to find that Windows Live Mail still offers the same familiarity as OE in all its uncomplicated glory .

source: Alice , smiling , brandished one of her CPI charts . A photographer 's assistant , she spent her days behind the scenes , fetching props , soothing models , fiddling with lights and shadows ; only on the second Tuesday of each month could she emerge with her laser-printed graphs and charts and command everyone 's attention . Not that Bonnie begrudged her . She , too , often dreamed of stepping out from the shadows and into the light . But armed with what ?
domestication: 爱丽丝露出了笑容，挥舞着她手里的一张CPI图表。这位摄影师的助手每天都在幕后忙碌，跑腿拿道具，安抚模特，调节灯光和阴影；只在每个月的第二个星期二，她才可以带着激光打印的图表和图纸，吸引所有人的注意力。这并不意味着邦妮会为此感到不满，因为她也常常梦想着从阴影中走出来，步入光明。但是，她有什么资本能做到这一点呢？

source: In 1961 , station KWEX-TV ( channel 41 ) in San Antonio , Texas , began to transmit programs in Spanish . Since Texas ' Spanish-speaking population is predominantly of Mexican background , it is not surprising that this early effort catered to the thinking and tastes of that market . Rene Anselmo , a Bostonian , realized better than anyone else at the time what the new immigrant public wanted : soap operas and music that would remind its members of the land they had left behind when they set out in search of a brighter future .
domestication: 早在一九六一年，美國德克萨斯州圣安东尼奥有一家叫KWEX-TV的电视台（第41频道）开始播放西班牙语节目。当时，德克萨斯州的西班牙语人口主要是墨西哥后裔，所以，电视台的节目内容基本上迎合了他们的口味。有一位波士顿人，叫雷内·安塞尔莫，他比当时其他人更了解新移民想要什么：可以让他们回忆起祖国风情的肥皂剧和音乐。这些节目满足了他们对故乡的思念之情，因为他们都是抱着追求更好生活的梦想来到美国的。
foreignization: 1961 年，位于德克萨斯州圣安东尼奥的电台 KWEX-TV（第 41 频道）开始播出西班牙语节目。由于德克萨斯州的西班牙语人口主要是墨西哥裔，因此不奇怪这项早期尝试迎合了该市场的思维和口味。波士顿人雷内·安塞尔莫比当时其他人更好地意识到新移民公众想要什么：肥皂剧和音乐，这些会让他们回想起当年为寻求更美好的未来而离开的故乡。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Rene Anselmo , a Bostonian , realized better than anyone else at the time what the new immigrant public wanted : soap operas and music that would remind its members of the land they had left behind when they set out in search of a brighter future .

source: The wining and dining begins in earnest among producers trying to woo the most silently powerful contingent in town , theater-party leaders who , with the gimlet-eyed skepticism of a Shubert , watch video run-throughs of backers ' auditions and decide whether to recommend the show to their groups whose advance ticket sales can buy time for a show .
domestication: 戏剧界的潜规则就此开始运作，一场拉关系、请客吃饭的活动在制片人和剧组领导之间上演。这些领导们拥有极大的话语权，他们像商业大亨薛伯特一样，用敏锐的眼光审视每一个视频试镜，然后决定是否将这部作品推荐给自己的团队。这些团队提前买票的数量可以决定一部作品的命运，有时甚至可以让一部作品多存活一段时间。

source: I wanted to scream . Scream so fucking loud that time itself would stop . I wanted to run . I wanted to hide . I wanted to hold him in my arms and somehow explain everything I 'd felt out on the rocky shore . About the sailboat and the tides and the dusk and the stars . I wanted to make my words all add up to that glowing moment at the water 's edge , but when the words came all I managed was , " Yes . I know , Aless . I am , too . "
domestication: 我真想大喊一声，喊得震天响，让时间都停住。我真想跑，真想躲起来。我还想把他搂在怀里，把我在那岩石岸边的感受全告诉他。关于帆船、潮水、黄昏和星星的一切。我想让我的话汇聚成那一刻水边的光芒，但话到嘴边，却只挤出一句：“是的，阿莱斯，我知道，我也是。”
foreignization: 我想尖叫。尖叫得如此之响以至于时间本身都会停止。我想逃跑。我想躲藏。我想把他搂在怀里， somehow 解释我在那岩石岸边所感受到的一切。关于帆船和潮汐，关于黄昏和星星。我想让我的话加起来成为那一刻在水边的光辉时刻，但当话出口时，我只能说：“是的。我知道，Aless。我也是。”

source: On the national level , Tea Party Republicans ( and party leaders who fear them ) greeted Obama 's initial election by deciding that destroying him was more important than doing the best they could for the country . Will they greet his re-election as a warning to work with him toward solving problems ? One hopes so ; and one hopes that if they continue their obstreperous course their constituents will see them for what they are ; but it 's more likely that Republican House members will automatically call the sky red if Obama says it 's blue , and then try to blame him for not getting a consensus on the sky 's color .
domestication: 在全国层面上，茶党共和党人（以及害怕他们的党内领导）在奥巴马首次当选时就决定，搞垮他比为国家谋福利更重要。他们会不会把他的连任当作一个警告，开始与他合作解决问题呢？咱们都盼着能这样；也盼着如果他们继续顽固不化，选民们能看清他们的真面目。不过，更可能的情况是，共和党众议员们会自动唱反调，奥巴马说天是蓝的，他们就非要说天是红的，然后还怪奥巴马没能达成共识。
foreignization: 在国家层面上，茶党共和党人（以及害怕他们的政党领导人）在奥巴马最初当选时，决定摧毁他比尽他们所能为国家做最好的事情更重要。他们是否会将他的连任视为一个与他合作解决问题的警告？人们希望如此；并且希望，如果他们继续顽固不化，他们的选民会看清他们的真面目；但更有可能的是，共和党众议院成员会自动认为天空是红色的，如果奥巴马说它是蓝色的，然后试图责怪他没有就天空的颜色达成共识。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

On the national level , Tea Party Republicans ( and party leaders who fear them ) greeted Obama 's initial election by deciding that destroying him was more important than doing the best they could for the country . Will they greet his re-election as a warning to work with him toward solving problems ? One hopes so ; and one hopes that if they continue their obstreperous course their constituents will see them for what they are ; but it 's more likely that Republican House members will automatically call the sky red if Obama says it 's blue , and then try to blame him for not getting a consensus on the sky 's color .

source: " Oh , " she said , and sighed . " I do n't have any idea . I 'll probably just do the same old thing . Live here in the house , and take care of your dad 's books " ( she meant his finances ) , " and try to get by . " She was silent , as if the process of " getting by " was fraught with secret perils . A couple of kids came running along her stretch of beach , laughing and calling out , their flashlights bobbing like will-o-the-wisps . We watched as they ran off toward the spot where the bodies were discovered . The lights dipped and swayed as the kids ran past , growing smaller in the distance .
domestication: “哦，”她说道，叹了口气，“我也没什么主意。估计还是老样子吧，就住在这房子里，照看你爸的‘书’”（她说的是他的钱），“然后凑合过日子。”她沉默了，仿佛这“凑合过日子”的过程充满了不为人知的危险。几个孩子沿着这片海滩跑过来，笑着喊着，手电筒的光像鬼火一样忽上忽下。我们看着他们朝发现尸体的地方跑去，灯光随着他们的奔跑一晃一晃的，越变越小，直到消失在远方。

source: To labour the point , the population of the Ukraine is estimated to be 55 million IF Chernobyl had not happened . source: Tim did n't give up . He had read in a magazine that the Japanese practiced bud pollination of brassicas . He did n't know what bud pollination was , but it sounded like a good idea . So he started pollinating buds -- and it worked . Later he found out that the incompatibility characteristic of the stigma develops fairly late in brassica flower formation , so that by pollinating in the bud stage he was bypassing the incompatibility mechanism entirely .
domestication: 蒂姆没有放弃。他在一本杂志上看到，日本人会做十字花科植物的花蕾授粉。虽然他不知道什么是花蕾授粉，但觉得这个方法不错。于是他就试着给花蕾授粉，结果还真成功了。后来他才知道，十字花科植物的柱头不亲和性是在花发育得比较晚的时候才出现的，所以在花蕾阶段授粉就能完全避开这种不亲和性。
foreignization: 蒂姆没有放弃。他曾在一本杂志上读到日本人对十字花科植物进行芽授粉。他不知道芽授粉是什么，但这听起来像是个好主意。所以他开始给芽授粉——结果成功了。后来他发现十字花科植物的柱头不亲和特性是在花形成过程中相当晚的时候才发展出来的，因此通过在芽阶段授粉，他完全绕过了不亲和机制。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Tim did n't give up . He had read in a magazine that the Japanese practiced bud pollination of brassicas . He did n't know what bud pollination was , but it sounded like a good idea . So he started pollinating buds -- and it worked . Later he found out that the incompatibility characteristic of the stigma develops fairly late in brassica flower formation , so that by pollinating in the bud stage he was bypassing the incompatibility mechanism entirely .

source: Banding Together In the face of unfathomable destruction , loss of life , and disrupted families , residents have banded together . I 've witnessed countless acts of kindness ; stores are creating free charging stations , strangers are offering rides uptown , there 's free coffee , friends have offered couches to sleep on , and companies have put work in the backseat to ensure employees safety and well-being . It is instances like this that put life into perspective and make the things that we usually get hung up on seem trivial .
domestication: 团结一心 面对难以想象的破坏、生命丧失和家庭破碎，居民们团结了起来。我见证了无数善举：商店设立了免费充电站，陌生人帮忙搭车进城，有人提供免费咖啡，朋友让出沙发供人休息，公司也把工作放在一边，确保员工的安全和健康。这样的时刻让人重新审视生活，平时那些让我们纠结的事情显得微不足道。
foreignization: 团结一致 面对无法想象的破坏、生命损失和家庭破裂，居民们团结了起来。我见证了无数的善举；商店创建了免费充电站，陌生人提供搭车到 uptown，有免费的咖啡，朋友提供了可以睡觉的沙发，公司把工作放在次要位置，确保员工的安全和福祉。正是这样的时刻让我们对生活有了更深刻的认识，使我们通常纠结的事情显得微不足道。

It is instances like this that put life into perspective and make the things that we usually get hung up on seem trivial .

source: When she could n't get up , she panicked . She thought he might be drowning her , and a picture flashed in her mind : his mother -- standing over the edge of the pool , a glass of lemonade in her hand-peering into the water . Laura reached for him but her arms were n't long enough . Just when she thought her lungs would burst , he stopped .
domestication: 她爬不起来，心里慌了。她觉得他可能要把自己淹死，眼前闪过一幅画面：他的妈妈站在泳池边，手里拿着一杯柠檬水，往水里张望。劳拉想去抓他，可手够不到。她正想着肺要炸开了，他却停了下来。
foreignization: 当她无法站起来时，她惊慌了。她以为他可能在淹死她，脑海中闪过一个画面：他的母亲——站在泳池边缘，手里拿着一杯柠檬水——往水里看。劳拉伸手去抓他，但她的手臂不够长。正当她觉得肺快要爆了的时候，他停了下来。

source: The PLO 's diplomatic breakthroughs with Western nations appear practically meaningless to many Palestinians , who see no signs of an Israeli withdrawal . They point to the lack of results from the US-PLO dialogue in Tunis , which began in 1988 but which the US ended recently after a Palestinian group launched an unsuccessful attack at an Israeli beach .
domestication: 巴解组织与西方国家的外交突破对许多巴勒斯坦人来说几乎毫无意义，因为他们看不到以色列有任何撤军的迹象。人们指出，自1988年开始的美巴解对话在突尼斯进行，但最近由于一个巴勒斯坦团体对以色列海滩发动了一次未遂袭击，美国终止了这一对话，至今没有任何成果。
foreignization: 巴解组织与西方国家的外交突破对许多巴勒斯坦人来说似乎几乎毫无意义，他们看不到以色列撤军的迹象。他们指出，始于1988年的美巴解组织在突尼斯的对话缺乏成果，而美国最近在巴勒斯坦一个团体对以色列海滩发动未遂袭击后结束了这一对话。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The PLO 's diplomatic breakthroughs with Western nations appear practically meaningless to many Palestinians , who see no signs of an Israeli withdrawal . They point to the lack of results from the US-PLO dialogue in Tunis , which began in 1988 but which the US ended recently after a Palestinian group launched an unsuccessful attack at an Israeli beach .
巴解组织与西方国家的外交突破对许多巴勒斯坦人来说几乎毫无意义，因为他们看不到以色列有任何撤军的迹象。人们指出，自1988年开始的美巴解对话在突尼斯进行，但最近由于一个巴勒斯坦团体对以色列海滩发动了一次未遂袭击，美国终止了这一对话，至今没有任何成果。

source: And here 's the Storify recap of Gov . Cuomo 's news conference at his NYC offices just now . The governor is asking for a $30 billion supplemental appropriate from the federal government to cover the costs of dealing with Sandy , arguing that the storm 's impacts go far beyond just rebuilding . Cuomo announced the launch of a new 24/7 hotline , staffed by actual humans , to field questions about insurance issues : 800-339-1759 . He also renewed his vow to investigate and possibly totally overhaul the way public utilities work in the wake of their failures , he said , to both perform and communicate effectively during and after the disaster .
domestication: 看看纽约州长最新召开的新闻发布会吧。会上，库莫要求联邦政府拨款300亿美元，来应对桑迪飓风带来的灾难。据他说，这笔钱不仅是为了重建，还有很多其他方面的开支需要考虑。另外，库莫还推出了一个24小时热线电话，电话那头都是真人接听，主要是为了解决保险方面的问题。电话号码是800-339-1759，有问题的可以直接打过去问。至于那些在灾难期间表现不佳的公用事业公司，库莫又重申了要彻查他们的失职行为，并有可能会对相关的管理体制进行彻底改革。他说，这些公司不仅在执行任务时有所欠缺，而且在与外界沟通方面也存在着很大的问题。

source: The conversation of the men assembled here, turned upon the neighbouring land, and farmers; and when those topics were exhausted, upon the age of some old man who had been buried on the previous Sunday; the young men present considering him very old, and the old men present declaring him to have been quite young—not older, one white-haired grandfather said, than he was—with ten or fifteen year of life in him at least—if he had taken care; if he had taken care.
domestication: 聚在这里的男人们聊起了附近的土地和农夫们，这些话题聊完后，又开始谈论上个星期天埋葬的一个老人的年纪。在场的年轻人觉得他很老了，但老一辈的人却说他还年轻，一个满头白发的老大爷还说，他跟自己差不多大，还能再活个十年八年呢，要是他自己注意身体的话，要是他自己注意身体的话。
foreignization: 这里聚集的男人们的谈话转向了邻近的土地和农民；当这些话题耗尽时，又转向了前一个周日下葬的一位老人的年龄；在场的年轻人认为他非常老，而在场的老人们则宣称他其实很年轻——并不比其中一位白发祖父更老，这位祖父说那位老人至少还有十年或十五年的寿命——如果他注意保养的话；如果他注意保养的话。

source: Mr. Lorry was so exceedingly disconcerted by a question so hard to answer, that he could only look on, at a distance, with much feebler sympathy and humility, while the strong woman, having banished the inn servants under the mysterious penalty of “letting them know” something not mentioned if they stayed there, staring, recovered her charge by a regular series of gradations, and coaxed her to lay her drooping head upon her shoulder.
domestication: 洛里先生被这个难以回答的问题弄得十分尴尬，只能远远地站着，同情和谦卑都减弱了许多。那位坚强的女人则将旅店的仆人们以“让他们知道一些不该知道的事”为威胁赶走后，用一系列渐进的方式安抚她，最后哄得她把低垂的头靠在了她的肩膀上。
foreignization: 洛里先生被这样一个难以回答的问题弄得如此局促不安，以至于他只能远远地站在一旁，带着更加微弱的同情和谦卑，而那位强壮的女人则在以一种神秘的惩罚“让他们知道”某些未提及的事情为由将客栈的服务员赶走后，通过一系列逐渐升级的步骤恢复了对她的掌控，并哄她把垂下的头靠在她的肩膀上。

source: So , I decided to sell my only horse and go to Europe to see what " drug-free " racing was like . There , I learned that trainers give " vitamin " mixtures with a hypodermic in the stable yard before going over to race . Their solution to EIPH with no lasix was to bleed the horse a liter or so to reduce blood volume before a race . No idea if it worked or not .
domestication: 我想去看看“无药”赛马到底是什么样子，就卖掉了我唯一的一匹马，出发去欧洲了。到了那里，我发现训练师们会在马厩里给马注射“维生素”混合物，然后再去比赛。他们不用拉西斯来解决EIPH的问题，而是通过让马出血大约一升左右来减少血液量，这样可以在比赛前降低血压。不知道这种方法到底管用不管用。
foreignization: 所以，我决定出售我唯一的马匹，前往欧洲看看没有“药物”的赛马是什么样的。在那里，我了解到训练师在马厩院里用注射器给马匹注射“维生素”混合物，然后去比赛。他们对EIPH没有使用拉西克斯的解决方法是在比赛前放掉马匹大约一升的血液，以减少血液量。不知道这样是否有效。

业主彼得·琼斯卷入了一场与附近居民的纠纷，该居民希望执行一项鲜为人知的1947年分区法令。该法令基本上规定，在县区域内出售商品和服务的人，即使是临时性的，也必须经过繁琐的官僚程序并花费大量资金以获得土地使用许可。

source: It 's far too soon to know much about how Flanagan and Macy will approach the material , but judging by their fantastic Hill House adaptation , they may fall on the " the ghosts are real " side of the debate . But I 'm confident they can also do justice to the psychological complexity and many subtexts of James ' novella , leaving just a bit of ambiguity to tantalize the viewer .
domestication: 现在还为时过早，很难预料弗拉纳根和梅西这两位导演会如何演绎剧情，不过从他们对《山屋恐怖记》的精彩改编来看，他们可能会站在“鬼是真实存在”的立场上。但我有信心，他们也能对詹姆斯中篇小说的复杂的心理层面和众多潜台词进行公正的诠释，在不明之处留下一些耐人寻味的悬念，这样一来，影片才更耐看。

source: Lurking in the sacred groves and wild places of Gaul were the ancient Druids , who were said to have originated in the primeval forests of Britain across the turbulent waters of the channel . The Druids instructed the young in the secrets of religion , conducted public and private sacrifices , explained the law , and sentenced offenders . When Gallic nobles were ill or in danger in battle , they would resort to human sacrifice with the help of the Druids . Caesar 's armies conquered Gaul , but the power of the Druids with their mysterious gods and rituals was not easily suppressed .
domestication: 在高卢的圣地和荒野中，藏着古老的德鲁伊。据说他们起源于海峡对岸英伦岛上原始森林。德鲁伊教年轻人宗教的秘密，主持公共和私人祭祀，解释法律，还判决罪犯。当高卢贵族生病或战时遇险时，他们会求助于德鲁伊，进行人祭。凯撒大军征服了高卢，但德鲁伊那神秘的神祇和仪式的力量却不是那么容易就能被压制的。

source: Go back to the exercise and you 'll see how you , like the psalmist , can draw hope in times of suffering and trial by remembering all that God has done in the past . The same God who was present in the latter days , helping deliver you through difficult times and circumstances , is with you in the present and will continue to be with you in the future .
domestication: 回到那段经文中，你会发现自己像诗人一样，在困苦和试炼中也能找到希望，只要回想上帝过去为你所做的一切。当年那位在你生命中显明自己、助你度过难关的上帝，如今依然与你同在，并且将来也必不离开你。
foreignization: 回到练习中，你会看到如何像诗篇作者一样，在患难和试炼中通过回忆上帝在过去所做的一切来汲取希望。那位在末后日子临在，帮助你度过艰难时刻和处境的上帝，如今与你同在，并将在未来继续与你同在。

source: Celestine felt her fear of him close its hand around the little seed of her heart . He looked so much like one of her father 's clockwork toys that she found herself wondering at what moment , and by what invisible agency , the key had been twisted in the aperture . How carefully her father would lick the tip of his brush into a point , before painting in the pupils on a doll 's eyes ! The soldier 's eyes were terribly bright , and his pupils like the tips of pins .
domestication: 塞莱斯汀觉得对他的恐惧如同一只大手，紧紧攥住了她心底那颗小小种子。他看起来太像父亲的那些发条玩具了，她不禁在想，究竟是哪一刻，又是怎样无形的力量，将钥匙在那个小孔里拧动了呢？父亲给玩偶画眼睛时，总是小心翼翼地用舌头将画笔尖舔得又细又尖！士兵的眼睛亮得吓人，瞳孔像针尖一样。
foreignization: 塞莱斯汀感到他对她的恐惧像一只手握住了她心中的那颗小种子。他看起来太像她父亲的那些发条玩具了，她发现自己在想，在哪个时刻，通过哪种无形的力量，钥匙会在那个孔里被拧动。她父亲在给娃娃的眼睛上色之前，会多么仔细地用舌头把画笔尖舔成一个点！士兵的眼睛非常明亮，他的瞳孔像针尖一样。

source: It was the nephew of Monseigneur. He had been some few leagues behind Monseigneur, early in the afternoon. He had diminished the distance rapidly, but not so rapidly as to come up with Monseigneur on the road. He had heard of Monseigneur, at the posting-houses, as being before him.
domestication: 那是一个小伙子，是莫尼格先生的侄子，下午早些时候，他落后莫尼格先生几条街。后来他加快了脚步，缩短了两人的距离，但还是没能在路上赶上莫尼格先生。他在更换马车的驿站里听人说起过莫尼格先生，比自己先走了一段路。
foreignization: 他是蒙西尼耶的侄子。他在下午早些时候落后蒙西尼耶几里格。他快速缩短了距离，但并没有那么快地赶上蒙西尼耶的马车。他在更换马匹的驿站听说蒙西尼耶走在他的前面。

source: Jeffrey Childs steps out of his slippers , bends over and sets them toe-by-toe beside his nightstand , and sits back into bed with his wife . Beneath the blankets a nebula of warmth radiates from Angela 's body . He loves this pneumatic thrill of her heat as he gets into bed . The smell of her blood-hot limbs . Tonight he has scrubbed his teeth several moments longer than usual . He has stood at the sink in his green cotton pajamas , rinsing his mouth with protracted vigor until the mouthwash tingled and burned , watching himself in the mirror-cheeks pulsing , hands at his hips , eyes beginning to water-then spitting with proud relief , his mouth 's dark interior sanitized , tongue touching teeth as smooth as porcelain .
domestication: 杰弗里·查尔兹脱下拖鞋，弯腰把它们整齐地摆在床头柜旁，然后坐回床上，靠在妻子身边。被窝里，安吉拉身上散发出一股暖意，就像星云般扩散开来。他喜欢这种上床时感受到的温暖冲击，她那火热的四肢散发的气味让他心醉。今晚，他刷牙的时间比平时长了许多。他穿着绿色的棉质睡衣站在洗手池前，用漱口水长时间地漱口，直到嘴里一阵阵刺痛和灼热，镜中的自己脸颊泛红，双手叉腰，眼睛也开始湿润。最后，他骄傲而解脱地吐掉漱口水，口腔深处变得干净清爽，舌尖触碰着洁白如瓷的牙齿。
foreignization: 杰弗里·查尔兹脱下拖鞋，弯下腰，把它们脚尖对脚尖地放在床头柜旁边，然后坐回床上和妻子一起。被子下，一股温暖从安吉拉的身体散发出来。他喜欢这种当他上床时她身体的热量带来的充气般的快感。她热血沸腾的四肢的气味。今晚他刷牙的时间比平时长了几分钟。他穿着绿色棉质睡衣站在洗手池前，用延长的力度漱口，直到漱口水刺痛并灼烧，看着镜中的自己——脸颊跳动，双手叉腰，眼睛开始泛泪——然后带着自豪的解脱感吐出漱口水，口腔内部被消毒得黑漆漆的，舌头触碰着像瓷器一样光滑的牙齿。

Jeffrey Childs steps out of his slippers , bends over and sets them toe-by-toe beside his nightstand , and sits back into bed with his wife . Beneath the blankets a nebula of warmth radiates from Angela 's body . He loves this pneumatic thrill of her heat as he gets into bed . The smell of her blood-hot limbs . Tonight he has scrubbed his teeth several moments longer than usual . He has stood at the sink in his green cotton pajamas , rinsing his mouth with protracted vigor until the mouthwash tingled and burned , watching himself in the mirror-cheeks pulsing , hands at his hips , eyes beginning to water-then spitting with proud relief , his mouth 's dark interior sanitized , tongue touching teeth as smooth as porcelain .

source: " there is a far higher chance that you 'll set yourself up in a bell tower and start sniping passing strangers than there is that a commercialized GMO will cause any harm whatsoever ( given that there are recorded instances of humans doing the former , and no recorded instances of GMOs doing the latter ) . source: The contents of her make-up basket have been emptied : lotions , shampoos , toothpaste , all are gone . My things are here now , still housed in my travel bag , except for my clean underwear , waiting next to the bathtub . I soak in the tub until the last of the water is swallowed by the drain . I stay put until the porcelain cools , all the while smelling lavender which rises from my warm skin . I breathe in so much I am no longer able to smell anything . The scent , flowery and feminine , has moved inside of me . It will cling to my body for a while and then gradually slip away , without me knowing .
domestication: 她的化妆篮里的东西都倒空了：乳液、洗发水、牙膏，一样不剩。现在轮到我的东西登场了，还都装在旅行包里，除了干净的内衣，正等着放在浴缸边。我泡在浴缸里，直到最后一滴水被下水道吞掉。我就这样待着，直到瓷缸凉了，满身的薰衣草香不断飘出来。我闻得太多，鼻子都闻不出味儿了。这香味，既花又女人，已经钻进我的身体里。它会黏在我身上一阵子，然后悄悄溜走，我不知不觉。

source: “And notwithstanding a offered reward of ten pound, which was afterwards increased to twenty pound. Notwithstanding the most superlative, and, I may say, supernat’ral exertions on the part of this parish,” said Bumble, “we have never been able to discover who is his father, or what was his mother’s settlement, name, or condition.”

source: Starting next January , the school promises to be even more charming , when the first rose bushes will be planted on the grounds ( sponsored by the City of Scottsdale and the Scottsdale Rose Society ) . There will be themed areas of special types of roses , rose trellises , paths , and reserved painting areas for artists .

source: Established in 1787 , the College of Physicians of Philadelphia is the oldest private medical society in the United States . John Morgan , founder of the Perelman School of Medicine , was also a founding member of the society . Throughout its 225 year history , the College has provided a place for both medical professionals and the general public to learn about medicine as both a science and as an art . During his two-year term as president , Dr. Goldfarb will serve as the volunteer Chairman of the Board of Trustees and oversee issues of governance for the society .
domestication: 费城医师学院成立于1787年，是美国最古老的私人医学团体。佩雷尔曼医学院的创始人约翰·摩根也是该学会的创始成员之一。在225年的历史长河中，学院一直是医学界专业人士和普通大众了解医学科学与艺术的场所。戈德法布博士担任会长的两年任期内，将志愿出任董事会主席，负责处理学会的治理事务。
foreignization: 成立于1787年的费城医师学院是美国最古老的私人医学社团。佩雷尔曼医学院的创始人约翰·摩根也是该会的创始成员。在其225年的历史中，该学院一直为医学专业人士和普通公众提供了一个了解医学作为科学和艺术的场所。在担任会长的两年任期内，戈德法布博士将作为志愿的董事会主席，并监督社团的治理问题。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Established in 1787 , the College of Physicians of Philadelphia is the oldest private medical society in the United States . John Morgan , founder of the Perelman School of Medicine , was also a founding member of the society . Throughout its 225 year history , the College has provided a place for both medical professionals and the general public to learn about medicine as both a science and as an art . During his two-year term as president , Dr. Goldfarb will serve as the volunteer Chairman of the Board of Trustees and oversee issues of governance for the society .

source: Although establishing a guiding principle for a garden is fairly easy to do , its execution generally requires tackling a multitude of muscle-straining obstacles . Here , the wild tangle of growth had to be cleared and the hillside terraced to prevent erosion and provide places in which to relax and entertain . This exercise revealed thick , rocky , clay soil . The next step was to add a foot and a half of topsoil to create a more congenial , better-drained environment for plant roots , ( Even so , the water-retaining clay used to create seeps in wet winters , which flooded the basement of the house and occasionally posed problems for the arid-land plants of which the two are fond . )
domestication: 建一个花园的指导方针其实挺容易，但是要真正实施起来，却需要克服很多让人头疼的问题。在这里，首先要清理掉一片杂乱的野生植物，并且对山坡进行梯田建设，以防止土壤侵蚀，同时也为休息和娱乐提供空间。这个过程揭示了厚厚的岩石和黏土土壤。接下来，就是要添加一英尺半的表土来创造一个更适宜、排水更好的环境供植物根部生长。（即便如此，保水性强的黏土在湿润的冬季还是会形成小溪，这会导致房子的地下室被淹，偶尔也会给他们喜欢的干旱地区的植物带来麻烦。）
foreignization: 虽然为一个花园建立指导原则相当容易，但其执行通常需要应对大量肌肉紧张的障碍。在这里，野生的缠结生长必须清除，山坡必须梯田以防止侵蚀并提供休息和娱乐的地方。这个锻炼揭示了厚厚的、岩石的、黏土土壤。下一步是添加一英尺半的表土，以创造一个更亲切、排水更好的环境供植物根部生长，（即使这样，保留水分的粘土被用来在湿润的冬季创建渗漏点，这会导致房子的地下室被淹水，并且偶尔会为他们喜欢的两种干旱地带植物带来问题。）

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Although establishing a guiding principle for a garden is fairly easy to do , its execution generally requires tackling a multitude of muscle-straining obstacles . Here , the wild tangle of growth had to be cleared and the hillside terraced to prevent erosion and provide places in which to relax and entertain . This exercise revealed thick , rocky , clay soil . The next step was to add a foot and a half of topsoil to create a more congenial , better-drained environment for plant roots , ( Even so , the water-retaining clay used to create seeps in wet winters , which flooded the basement of the house and occasionally posed problems for the arid-land plants of which the two are fond . )

建一个花园的指导方针其实挺容易，但是要真正实施起来，却需要克服很多让人头疼的问题。在这里，首先要清理掉一片杂乱的野生植物，并且对山坡进行梯田建设，以防止土壤侵蚀，同时也为休息和娱乐提供空间。这个过程揭示了厚厚的岩石和黏土土壤。接下来，就是要添加一英尺半的表土来创造一个更适宜、排水更好的环境供植物根部生长。（即便如此，保水性强的黏土在湿润的冬季还是会形成小溪，这会导致房子的地下室被淹，偶尔也会给他们喜欢的干旱地区的植物带来麻烦。）

source: Oliver ate his share, and the Jew then mixed him a glass of hot gin and water, telling him he must drink it off directly, because another gentleman wanted the tumbler. Oliver did as he was desired. Immediately afterwards he felt himself gently lifted on to one of the sacks; and then he sunk into a deep sleep.
domestication: 奥利弗吃完了自己那份，老犹太随后给他调了一杯热杜松子酒加水，催他赶紧喝下去，说另一位先生要用杯子。奥利弗照做了。刚喝完，他就感到自己被轻轻地抬到了一个麻袋上，接着就沉沉地睡了过去。

source: Bd is associated with declines and extinction in the Western United States , such as the mountain yellow-legged frog Rana muscosa ) in the Sierra Nevada Mountains of Southern California . The disease has a global presence and has had particularly devastating impacts on amphibian communities in Australia , Costa Rica , and Panama , in an effort to keep the boreal toad from going the way of so many others , the USGS has been working to understand all aspects of the fungus and its impact on the toads .
domestication: 斑点病与美国西部的物种下降和灭绝有关，比如加利福尼亚南部内华达山脉的山地黄腿蛙（Rana muscosa）。这种疾病遍布全球，在澳大利亚、哥斯达黎加和巴拿马等地对两栖动物群体造成了毁灭性打击。为了不让寒带蟾蜍重蹈覆辙，美国地质调查局一直在努力研究真菌的各个方面及其对蟾蜍的影响。
foreignization: Bd与美国西部的种群下降和灭绝有关，例如加州南部内华达山脉的山地黄腿蛙（Rana muscosa）。这种疾病在全球范围内都有出现，并且对澳大利亚、哥斯达黎加和巴拿马的两栖动物群落产生了特别毁灭性的影响。为了防止北美林蛙走上同样道路，美国地质调查局一直在努力研究真菌的所有方面及其对林蛙的影响。

斑点病与美国西部的物种下降和灭绝有关，比如加利福尼亚南部内华达山脉的山地黄腿蛙（Rana muscosa）。这种疾病遍布全球，在澳大利亚、哥斯达黎加和巴拿马等地对两栖动物群体造成了毁灭性打击。为了不让寒带蟾蜍重蹈覆辙，美国地质调查局一直在努力研究真菌的各个方面及其对蟾蜍的影响。

source: From up close , however , so-called pointillist paintings drive observers dotty . Beautiful scenes crumble into a crazy quilt of tiny tinted flecks . Close-up scrutiny of someone 's personality can prove just as disorienting . Solid-looking dispositions dissolve into pools of often-contradictory desires , feelings , and habits .
domestication: 近距离一看，所谓的点彩画就让人头大了。美丽的景色瓦解成一堆乱七八糟的小色点。同样，对一个人性格的仔细观察也可能让人摸不着北。看似稳如泰山的性格，其实是一滩充满矛盾的愿望、情感和习惯的大杂烩。
foreignization: 然而，从近处看，所谓的点彩画会让观察者感到困惑。美丽的场景会瓦解成一片疯狂的微小色点拼凑。对某人个性的近距离审视同样可能令人迷失方向。看似坚定的性格会分解成往往相互矛盾的愿望、情感和习惯的池塘。

source: The picture produced an immense sensation in the little crowd; but all eyes, without comparing notes with other eyes, looked at Monsieur the Marquis. Perhaps, to observe whether he had any spectre on his conscience.

foreignization: 这幅画在小群人中产生了极大的轰动；但是所有的眼睛，没有与其他眼睛交换意见，就都盯着马奎斯先生看。也许是要观察他是否有鬼魂困扰着他的良心。

source: Editor -- If there is anything sadder than the savage killings of the 14 boys William Bonin raped and murdered , then surely it 's the tragically mistaken belief by some victims ' families that witnessing his execution will speed their healing ( " Death of a Serial Killer , " Chronicle , February 19 ) .
domestication: 编辑 - 如果有什么比连环杀手威廉·博宁（William Bonin）强奸并谋杀的14名男孩的残忍杀戮更令人伤心的话，那么这肯定是悲剧性错误的看法，即有些受害者家属认为目睹他的处决会加速他们的愈合过程（"连环杀手之死"，编年史，2月19日）。

source: L : READ THE COVER Aspen -- particularly young stands with trunks of buggy-whip to pole size -- attract woodcock . The clean forest floor lets timberdoodles hunt for worms , the stem density protects them from land-based predators and the overhead canopy foils would-be avian enemies . Other preferred habitats include alder runs ( for their cover density and moist soil ) and willows . Research shows that alder runs may hold more birds in dry years , likely because of the associated moisture . Dogwood and sumac can also produce .
domestication: 看看树林，特别是那些树干像马鞭一样细或者像电线杆一样粗的年轻云杉林，特别能吸引鹬鸟。林下的地面很干净，讓雞amu能夠到处找蚯蚓，而且树枝的密度可以保护它们不受陆地上的掠食者的伤害，头顶的树冠还能挡住那些想偷袭它们的空中敌人。其他它们喜欢的栖息地包括接骨木丛和柳树林，研究表明，干旱的年份里，接骨木丛里的鸟可能会更多，这可能是因为那里有较多的水分。荆树和漆树也可以成为它们的栖息地。
foreignization: L：阅读封面阿斯彭——尤其是树干从马鞭到电线杆大小的幼树林——吸引了鹬。干净的森林地面使得木兰能够捕猎蠕虫，茎密度保护它们免受陆基捕食者的伤害，头顶的树冠破坏了想要攻击的鸟类敌人。其他偏爱的栖息地包括桤树丛（因为它们的覆盖密度和潮湿土壤）和杨柳。研究表明，在干旱年份，桤树丛可能拥有更多的鸟类，很可能是由于相关的水分。荆树和漆树也可以产生。

source: One of the assailants was killed and the other wounded by a guard from a nearby mosque . The wounded gunman was taken to a hospital but disappeared in the medical system . One policeman said he had heard that the assailant had been moved by his confederates to a hospital in Sadr City so he would be beyond the reach of the American-led coalition forces .
domestication: 在袭击过程中，其中一名袭击者被附近一座清真寺的警卫击毙，另一名袭击者受伤。受伤的枪手被送往医院，但在医疗系统中消失了。 一名警察表示，他听说该袭击者已被他的同伙转移到萨德尔城的一家医院，这样他就可以避开美军领导的联军。 据传，这名枪手已经被转移走，以躲避美军的追捕。
foreignization: 其中一名袭击者被附近一座清真寺的一名警卫杀死，另一名袭击者受伤。受伤的枪手被送往医院，但在医疗系统中失踪。一位警察说他听说该嫌疑人已被他的同伙转移到萨德尔城的一家医院，这样他就可以躲避美军领导的联军。

source: It monopolized every surface . Curls and tendrils ( leaves ? hair ? ) , out of which squinted disturbing faces again , that were not quite human , not quite anything else , like the figure in the fountain . They had , the faces , no necks , but little paw-like hands . The sparkle winked slowly over their marble eyes , polished by age and the rubbing quality of pure vacance .
domestication: 它占据了每一个角落。卷曲的枝蔓（是叶子？还是头发？）从中探出，露出一张张令人不安的脸，既不像人，又不像别的什么东西，就像喷泉里的那个怪影。这些脸没有脖子，却长着一双双小爪子似的手。它们的眼睛像大理石一样，在岁月的打磨和空虚的摩擦下，慢慢地闪着光。
foreignization: 它垄断了每一个表面。卷曲和藤蔓（叶子？头发？），从中窥视着那些令人不安的脸，既不完全是人类，也不完全是其他什么东西，就像喷泉中的那个形象。这些脸没有脖子，但有小小的爪子般的手。它们的大理石眼睛因岁月和纯粹空虚的摩擦质量而磨光，闪烁着缓慢的光芒。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Curls and tendrils ( leaves ? hair ? ) , out of which squinted disturbing faces again , that were not quite human , not quite anything else , like the figure in the fountain . They had , the faces , no necks , but little paw-like hands . The sparkle winked slowly over their marble eyes , polished by age and the rubbing quality of pure vacance .
它占据了每一个角落。卷曲的枝蔓（是叶子？还是头发？）从中探出，露出一张张令人不安的脸，既不像人，又不像别的什么东西，就像喷泉里的那个怪影。这些脸没有脖子，却长着一双双小爪子似的手。它们的眼睛像大理石一样，在岁月的打磨和空虚的摩擦下，慢慢地闪着光。

它垄断了每一个表面。卷曲和藤蔓（叶子？头发？），从中窥视着那些令人不安的脸，既不完全是人类，也不完全是其他什么东西，就像喷泉中的那个形象。这些脸没有脖子，但有小小的爪子般的手。它们的大理石眼睛因岁月和纯粹空虚的摩擦质量而磨光，闪烁着缓慢的光芒。

source: Xan never read these letters . I offered , but she did n't want to . When I said it was over she trusted me and did n't want to know the details . She wanted to know if I could trust her now . I said I could . I did even more than before . It was all out in the open . Dan was gone by then . We had our safe home back . So we did all right after Dan and Amy , then we fell apart because of nothing I could see , because of time passing .
domestication: 西安从来没有看过那些信。我提议过，但她不愿意。我说已经结束了，她相信了我，也不想知道细节。她问我现在能不能信任她。我说能，而且比以前更信任。一切都摊开了说。丹那时候已经走了。我们的家又恢复了安宁。丹和艾米走后，我们一度过得不错，但后来不知怎么的，因为时间的流逝，我们慢慢疏远了。
foreignization: Xan 从未读过这些信。我提出过，但她不想读。当我告诉她结束了时，她信任我，不想知道细节。她想知道现在我是否还能信任她。我说可以。我甚至比以前更加信任她。一切都在明面上了。Dan 那时已经走了。我们找回了我们的安全的家。所以在 Dan 和 Amy 之后我们过得还不错，但后来我们却因为一些我看不出的原因，因为时间的流逝而分开了。

source: This brief direction to Charley Bates, and his recent antagonist, was softly and immediately obeyed. There was no sound of their whereabout, when the Dodger descended the stairs, bearing the light in his hand, and followed by a man in a coarse smock-frock; who, after casting a hurried glance round the room, pulled off a large wrapper which had concealed the lower portion of his face, and disclosed: all haggard, unwashed, and unshorn: the features of flash Toby Crackit.
domestication: 查利·贝茨和刚才跟他打架的那个小子听了这几句轻声的吩咐，立刻就照办了。等机灵鬼拿着灯从楼梯上下来时，屋里已经听不见他们的动静了。跟在机灵鬼后面的是个穿着粗布罩衣的男人，他扫了一眼屋子，然后扯下了遮住下半张脸的大围巾，露出一张憔悴不堪、脏兮兮、胡子拉碴的脸，正是那个耍滑头的托比·克拉基特。
foreignization: 这个简短的指示给查利·贝茨和他的最近的对手，轻声而立即地被遵从了。当多奇手拿着灯走下楼梯时，没有他们去向的声音，后面跟着一个穿着粗布罩衣的男人；他在环视了一下房间后，扯下了遮住他下半张脸的大围巾，露出了一副憔悴、脏乱、未刮胡子的脸庞：正是狡猾的托比·克瑞基特。

source: He left escort and escorted without saying a word, however, and went into the guard-room; meanwhile, they sat upon their horses outside the gate. Looking about him while in this state of suspense, Charles Darnay observed that the gate was held by a mixed guard of soldiers and patriots, the latter far outnumbering the former; and that while ingress into the city for peasants’ carts bringing in supplies, and for similar traffic and traffickers, was easy enough, egress, even for the homeliest people, was very difficult. A numerous medley of men and women, not to mention beasts and vehicles of various sorts, was waiting to issue forth; but, the previous identification was so strict, that they filtered through the barrier very slowly. Some of these people knew their turn for examination to be so far off, that they lay down on the ground to sleep or smoke, while others talked together, or loitered about. The red cap and tri-colour cockade were universal, both among men and women.
domestication: 他一句话没说就离开了护送队伍，径直走进了警卫室；而他们则骑着马守在门外。查尔斯·达尔内心里忐忑不安，环顾四周，发现城门由士兵和爱国者组成的混合岗哨守卫着，其中爱国者比士兵多得多。农民的供应车进城还比较容易，但即使是普通人，想要出城也非常困难。许多男女老少，还有各种牲畜和车辆，都在等着出城，但由于身份查验极其严格，通过速度非常缓慢。有些人的检查顺序排得特别靠后，索性躺在地上睡觉或抽烟，有的人在聊天，有的四处闲逛。红帽子和三色徽章几乎是人手一个，男女皆是如此。
foreignization: 他一句话也没说就离开了护送人员，自己护送自己，走进了哨所；与此同时，他们骑在马上守在门外。查尔斯·达奈在这种悬而未决的状态下环顾四周，注意到大门由士兵和爱国者组成的混合卫队把守，后者远远多于前者；而对于农民的马车带入补给以及类似的交易和商贩来说，进城很容易，但即使是相貌平平的人出城也非常困难。许多男女混杂在一起，更不用说各种各样的牲畜和车辆，都在等待外出；但由于之前的身份验证非常严格，他们通过关卡的速度非常缓慢。有些人知道自己的检查顺序还很靠后，便躺在地上睡觉或抽烟，而其他人则互相交谈或四处闲逛。红帽子和三色帽徽在男女中都很普遍。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

He left escort and escorted without saying a word, however, and went into the guard-room; meanwhile, they sat upon their horses outside the gate. Looking about him while in this state of suspense, Charles Darnay observed that the gate was held by a mixed guard of soldiers and patriots, the latter far outnumbering the former; and that while ingress into the city for peasants’ carts bringing in supplies, and for similar traffic and traffickers, was easy enough, egress, even for the homeliest people, was very difficult. A numerous medley of men and women, not to mention beasts and vehicles of various sorts, was waiting to issue forth; but, the previous identification was so strict, that they filtered through the barrier very slowly. Some of these people knew their turn for examination to be so far off, that they lay down on the ground to sleep or smoke, while others talked together, or loitered about. The red cap and tri-colour cockade were universal, both among men and women.

source: The word “wife” seemed to serve as a gloomy reminder to Defarge, to say with sudden impatience, “In the name of that sharp female newly-born, and called La Guillotine, why did you come to France?”

source: When I first met him , I was eleven and he was forty . For the next six or seven years , he was the most influential person in my life . It was with him that I learned to cross frontiers . In French there is the word passeur -- often translated as " ferryman " or " smuggler , " but with the connotation of a guide and something of the mountains . He was my passeur .
domestication: 我还只是个十一岁的孩子时就认识了他，他已经四十岁了。在接下来的六七年里，他是我生命中最有影响力的人。就是跟他在一起，我学会了闯荡世界，突破自我。法语里有一个词，叫做“passeur”，通常翻译成“摆渡人”或者“走私者”，但这个词更有一种向导和山地游侠的意味。他就是我的向导，我的引路人。
foreignization: 当我第一次见到他时，我11岁，他40岁。在接下来的六、七年里，他是我生命中最具影响力的人。正是通过他，我学会了跨越国界。在法语中，有一个词passeur，通常被翻译为“渡船夫”或“走私者”，但它带有向导和山区的内涵。他就是我的passeur。

source: Second , the CIA relied upon its own resources to generate anti-Allende propaganda in Chile . These efforts included : support for an underground press ; placement of individual news items through agents ; financing a small newspaper ; indirect subsidy of Patria y Libertad a group fervently opposed to Allende , and its radio programs , political advertisements and political rallies ; and the direct mailing of foreign news articles to Frei , his wife , selected leaders , and the Chilean domestic press .
domestication: 其次，中情局依靠自身资源在智利制造反阿连德的宣传。这些行动包括：支持地下出版物；通过特工发布单独的新闻报道；资助一家小报；间接资助强烈反对阿连德的“祖国与自由”组织及其广播节目、政治广告和集会；还将外国的新闻文章直接寄给弗雷、他的妻子、选定的领导人及智利国内媒体。

source: The only reason we celebrate Thanksgiving is because after half the colonists had died from deprivations , they had a couple lucky years that they had a big last meal . Only , the governor got smart , threw off the socialistic community ownership system , assigned individual ownership of plots of land , and there after they had a bounty even exporting food a couple years later .
domestication: 我们过感恩节，说白了就是当初一半的殖民者因为缺吃少穿死了，剩下的人运气好，连着几年收成不错，搞了个大聚餐。后来，州长灵光一闪，废除了大锅饭的集体所有制，分田到户，结果年年丰收，没过几年甚至还能往外出口粮食了。
foreignization: 我们庆祝感恩节的唯一原因是，在一半的殖民者因贫困而死亡之后，他们有几个幸运的年头，享用了丰盛的最后一餐。只是，总督变得聪明了，摒弃了社会主义的社区所有制，分配了个人土地所有权，此后他们有了丰收，甚至在几年后还出口了食物。

source: He knew very well, that in his horror of the deed which had culminated the bad deeds and bad reputation of the old family house, in his resentful suspicions of his uncle, and in the aversion with which his conscience regarded the crumbling fabric that he was supposed to uphold, he had acted imperfectly. He knew very well, that in his love for Lucie, his renunciation of his social place, though by no means new to his own mind, had been hurried and incomplete. He knew that he ought to have systematically worked it out and supervised it, and that he had meant to do it, and that it had never been done.
domestication: 他心里明白，对于老家族那桩最终导致声名狼藉的罪行，他感到十分恐惧；对叔叔心存猜忌；对良心上反感的那座摇摇欲坠的老宅，本该尽职维护，却做得不够好。他也知道，为了露西，他放弃了自己的社会地位，虽然这念头在他心里早已有之，但行动却过于仓促，不够彻底。他本应系统地规划和监督这一切，也确实有过这样的打算，但最终还是没能付诸实施。
foreignization: 他非常清楚，在他对自己家族老宅最终的恶行和恶名感到恐惧、对叔叔心怀怨恨的猜疑，以及对良心所反对的、他本应维护的摇摇欲坠的旧体制的厌恶中，他的行为是不完美的。他非常清楚，出于对露西的爱，他放弃了自己在社会中的地位，虽然这并不是他首次有这样的想法，但这一决定却是仓促且不完整的。他知道，他本应该有系统地规划和监督这一过程，他也曾打算这样做，但最终却从未实现。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

He knew very well, that in his horror of the deed which had culminated the bad deeds and bad reputation of the old family house, in his resentful suspicions of his uncle, and in the aversion with which his conscience regarded the crumbling fabric that he was supposed to uphold, he had acted imperfectly. He knew very well, that in his love for Lucie, his renunciation of his social place, though by no means new to his own mind, had been hurried and incomplete. He knew that he ought to have systematically worked it out and supervised it, and that he had meant to do it, and that it had never been done.
他心里明白，对于老家族那桩最终导致声名狼藉的罪行，他感到十分恐惧；对叔叔心存猜忌；对良心上反感的那座摇摇欲坠的老宅，本该尽职维护，却做得不够好。他也知道，为了露西，他放弃了自己的社会地位，虽然这念头在他心里早已有之，但行动却过于仓促，不够彻底。他本应系统地规划和监督这一切，也确实有过这样的打算，但最终还是没能付诸实施。
