source: Democrats charged that Bush had turned jingoistic in order to stem Republican losses in tight congressional races . " If the president wants politics to end at the water 's edge , " said Democratic Rep. Dave Obey of Wisconsin , " he has an obligation to leave events beyond the water 's edge out of campaign politics . " But in the heat of the campaign , the hostages became the president 's issue . By putting their plight into a political showcase , Bush took on the burden of solving the problem -- and became a hostage of sorts himself .
domestication: 民主党人指责布什采取民粹主义手段以减少共和党在国会选举中的损失。威斯康星州的民主党代表戴夫·奥比说：“如果总统希望政治止步于水边，那么他就有义务把发生在水以外的事情排除在竞选政治之外。”但是在竞选的激烈阶段，人质事件成了总统关注的问题。通过让人质危机成为政治焦点，布什承担起了解决问题的责任——同时也成了某种意义上的人质。
foreignization: 民主党人指控布什诉讼已经转向沙文主义，以阻止共和党在竞争激烈的国会比赛中的损失。 “如果总统希望政治结束时水的边缘，”威斯康星州民主党代表戴夫·奥比（Dave Obey）说，“他有义务将超出水边的事件排除在选战之外。”但是，在竞选的热潮中，人质成为总统的问题。通过将他们的困境置于政治展示中，布什承担了解决问题的重任——并成为了一种人质。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Democrats charged that Bush had turned jingoistic in order to stem Republican losses in tight congressional races . " If the president wants politics to end at the water 's edge , " said Democratic Rep. Dave Obey of Wisconsin , " he has an obligation to leave events beyond the water 's edge out of campaign politics . " But in the heat of the campaign , the hostages became the president 's issue . By putting their plight into a political showcase , Bush took on the burden of solving the problem -- and became a hostage of sorts himself .
民主党人指责布什采取民粹主义手段以减少共和党在国会选举中的损失。威斯康星州的民主党代表戴夫·奥比说：“如果总统希望政治止步于水边，那么他就有义务把发生在水以外的事情排除在竞选政治之外。”但是在竞选的激烈阶段，人质事件成了总统关注的问题。通过让人质危机成为政治焦点，布什承担起了解决问题的责任——同时也成了某种意义上的人质。

Democrats charged that Bush had turned jingoistic in order to stem Republican losses in tight congressional races . " If the president wants politics to end at the water 's edge , " said Democratic Rep. By putting their plight into a political showcase , Bush took on the burden of solving the problem -- and became a hostage of sorts himself .

source: What an excellent example of the power of dress, young Oliver Twist was! Wrapped in the blanket which had hitherto formed his only covering, he might have been the child of a nobleman or a beggar; it would have been hard for the haughtiest stranger to have assigned him his proper station in society. But now that he was enveloped in the old calico robes which had grown yellow in the same service, he was badged and ticketed, and fell into his place at once—a parish child—the orphan of a workhouse—the humble, half-starved drudge—to be cuffed and buffeted through the world—despised by all, and pitied by none.
domestication: 奥利弗·特威斯特这个孩子真是个活生生的例子，说明了穿衣的重要性啊。当他裹着唯一的那块毯子的时候，他可能是富贵人家的孩子，也可能是街上的乞儿，谁也分不出来他到底是哪根葱。但现在他换上了那件已经在这儿磨旧的黄花旧衣，马上就显出他的身份来了——一个穷困潦倒的孤儿，来自济贫院的弃儿，整天被人打来骂去，饿着肚子受苦，没有人可怜他，全世界都看不起他。
foreignization: 奥利弗·特威斯特是服装力量的优秀典范！用他以前仅有的那条毯子包裹着，他可能是贵族的孩子也可能是乞丐；即使是最傲慢的陌生人也很难把他归类到社会的适当位置。但现在他被裹在那些已经在同样的服务中变黄的旧花呢长袍里，他有了标记和标签，并且立即归入自己的位置——一个教区的孩子——穷人的孤儿——谦卑、饥饿的苦力——要被人打来打去——被所有人鄙视而没有人可怜。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

What an excellent example of the power of dress, young Oliver Twist was! Wrapped in the blanket which had hitherto formed his only covering, he might have been the child of a nobleman or a beggar; it would have been hard for the haughtiest stranger to have assigned him his proper station in society. But now that he was enveloped in the old calico robes which had grown yellow in the same service, he was badged and ticketed, and fell into his place at once—a parish child—the orphan of a workhouse—the humble, half-starved drudge—to be cuffed and buffeted through the world—despised by all, and pitied by none.

source: Now , one officer is speaking out . Major R. John Stukey , a US Army doctor who served in Baghdad from January to June , frequently visited Interior Ministry facilities on the east side of Baghdad to assess the health of prisoners . He says he personally treated about a dozen men who had been tortured and observed an environment of overcrowding and neglect .
domestication: 现在，有一位军官站出来发声了。这位名叫R. 约翰·斯图基的美国陆军军医，在一月至六月期间驻扎在巴格达，经常前往巴格达东区的内政部设施，检查囚犯的健康状况。他说自己亲自治疗了大约十几个被 torture 的人，还目睹了人满为患和疏于管理的情况。这里“torture”一般指“酷刑”，为了更符合中文表达，可以换成：他说自己亲自治疗了大约十几个遭受折磨的人，还亲眼看到那里人满为患，管理混乱。
foreignization: 现在，一名官员正在发言。R. 约翰·斯图基少校，一名曾在1月至6月期间在巴格达服役的美国陆军医生，经常前往巴格达东区的内政部设施评估囚犯的健康状况。他说，他亲自治疗了大约十几名遭受酷刑的男子，并观察到一个过度拥挤和忽视的环境。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Now , one officer is speaking out . Major R. John Stukey , a US Army doctor who served in Baghdad from January to June , frequently visited Interior Ministry facilities on the east side of Baghdad to assess the health of prisoners . He says he personally treated about a dozen men who had been tortured and observed an environment of overcrowding and neglect .

Now , one officer is speaking out . Major R. John Stukey , a US Army doctor who served in Baghdad from January to June , frequently visited Interior Ministry facilities on the east side of Baghdad to assess the health of prisoners . He says he personally treated about a dozen men who had been tortured and observed an environment of overcrowding and neglect .
现在，一名官员正在发言。R. 约翰·斯图基少校，一名曾在1月至6月期间在巴格达服役的美国陆军医生，经常前往巴格达东区的内政部设施评估囚犯的健康状况。他说，他亲自治疗了大约十几名遭受酷刑的男子，并观察到一个过度拥挤和忽视的环境。

source: “They’ve found the gentleman as owns the box; two or three more’s a coming to ’dentify him; and the Artful’s booked for a passage out,” replied Master Bates. “I must have a full suit of mourning, Fagin, and a hatband, to wisit him in, afore he sets out upon his travels. To think of Jack Dawkins—lummy Jack—the Dodger—the Artful Dodger—going abroad for a common twopenny-halfpenny sneeze-box! I never thought he’d a done it under a gold watch, chain, and seals, at the lowest. Oh, why didn’t he rob some rich old gentleman of all his walables, and go out as a gentleman, and not like a common prig, without no honour nor glory!”
domestication: 他们已经找到了那只箱子的主人了，还有两三个证人要来指认他；而阿特富尔已经安排好了一条路，准备出发了。这样一来，我得穿上一身黑衣，戴上孝带，去探望他一番再让他上路。想想看，杰克·道金斯——就是那个嘴巴甜的杰克，阿特富尔·道金斯，被抓了竟然是为了一个两便士半便士的小玩意儿！我一直以为他至少也会偷个金表、链子和印章什么的才肯罢休呢。唉，为什么他不能偷些有钱的老头子的贵重东西，像个真正的绅士一样混出个人样儿呢，非要当个普通的小偷，没脸没皮的？
foreignization: “他们已经找到了箱子的主人；还有两三个证人要来确认他的身份；小流氓已经定好了船票，”贝茨先生回答说。“在他启程旅行之前，我必须有一整套丧服，还有帽带，以便去探望他。想到杰克·道金斯——亲爱的杰克——顽童——狡猾的顽童——为了一个普通的两便士半便士的鼻涕盒而被流放海外！我从没想过他会在最低限度只得到一个镀金手表、链条和印章的情况下就这样做了。哦，为什么他不去偷某个富有的老绅士的所有值钱东西，然后以绅士的身份出国，而不是像一个普通的小偷，没有荣誉也没有荣耀？”

To think of Jack Dawkins—lummy Jack—the Dodger—the Artful Dodger—going abroad for a common twopenny-halfpenny sneeze-box! I never thought he’d a done it under a gold watch, chain, and seals, at the lowest. Oh, why didn’t he rob some rich old gentleman of all his walables, and go out as a gentleman, and not like a common prig, without no honour nor glory!”

source: Look for surprising strategic alliances across the globe . Germany and Russia will forge stronger economic ties , while Turkey and the Arab states eye Iran more closely as a competitor . Europe 's internal economic struggles will contribute to the continent 's fading as a global power , while Brazil will exert formidable economic and military influence in Africa .
domestication: 在全球范围内寻找令人惊讶的战略联盟。德国和俄罗斯将加强经济联系，土耳其和阿拉伯国家则更加警惕伊朗这个竞争对手。欧洲内部的经济困境将使它在全球的影响力逐渐减弱，而巴西将在非洲施加强大的经济和军事影响。

source: TO QUOTE THE IMMORTAL Derek Zoolander , Rosie Huntington-Whiteley is " really , really , really , ridiculously good-looking . " She could be on the hood of a car , the head of a ship , or the super-hot female lead in a blockbuster about robots . ( That , she 's done . ) Huntington-Whiteley 's looks have made her famous -- as a Victoria 's Secret Angel and Burberry model and an actress in last summer 's Transformers : Dark of the Moon . The opening scene , directed by master of subtlety Michael Bay ( who had previously worked with her on a VS commercial ) , involved a lingering close-up of her rear .
domestication: 借用不朽的德里克·祖兰德的话来说，罗茜·汉廷顿-惠特莉真是“漂亮得离谱”。她可以站在车头当个装饰，可以做船头的吉祥物，也可以在一部关于机器人的大片中担任超级性感的女主角。（这她都干过。）汉廷顿-惠特莉的美貌让她声名大噪——作为维多利亚的秘密天使、博柏利的模特，还有去年夏天《变形金刚3：月黑之时》中的女演员。这部电影的开场戏，由不按常理出牌的大师迈克尔·贝执导（此前他曾和她在维密广告中有过合作），镜头长时间停留在她的后背。

source: The role of the United Nations is so very important to the future global community . With problems in the Untied Nations and around the world becoming so more complex . As major changes have to happen around the world so they must at the United Nations . Example ; United Nations Security Council Veto Vote Resolution 1385 on Saturday December 29 , 2001 . One nation or one person should not have so much power to be able to stop such a resolution in secret . With only one being out of sync with the others an amendment to the resolution would have been in order . The UN Security Council being the high Council of the UN with the one vote veto you are creating a dictatorial buricaticy on a global level . Giving any one of the Permanent Nations absolute power in being able to stop any resolution they desire .
domestication: 联合国在未来全球社区中的作用非常重要。然而，联合国内部和全球面临的问题变得越来越复杂。随着世界的变化，联合国也必须跟进。举个例子：2001年12月29日，安理会就第1385号决议进行了投票。一国或一个人不应该拥有过多权力，以至于能单独否决决议，尤其是在秘密中进行的投票。这就造成了只有一个成员国与其他国家意见不一致，就足以推翻整个决议，这种情况下，是需要对决议进行修改的。安理会作为联合国的最高机构，却给予五常任理事国每个国家一票否决权，这实际上是在全球范围内制造了一种独裁的官僚制度，使任何一个常任理事国都能随意否决他们不喜欢的任何决议。
foreignization: 联合国在未来全球社区中的作用非常重要。由于联合国内部和世界各地的问题变得越来越复杂，联合国也必须随之发生重大变化。例如：联合国安理会否决投票决议1385于2001年12月29日星期六通过。一个国家或一个人不应该拥有如此大的权力，可以秘密阻止这样的决议。由于只有一个人与其他人不一致，对该决议的修正案是必要的。联合国安理会作为联合国的最高委员会，拥有否决权，这是在全球范围内制造了独裁官僚制度。赋予任何一个常任理事国绝对权力，使其能够阻止他们想要的任何决议。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The role of the United Nations is so very important to the future global community . With problems in the Untied Nations and around the world becoming so more complex . As major changes have to happen around the world so they must at the United Nations . Example ; United Nations Security Council Veto Vote Resolution 1385 on Saturday December 29 , 2001 . One nation or one person should not have so much power to be able to stop such a resolution in secret . With only one being out of sync with the others an amendment to the resolution would have been in order . The UN Security Council being the high Council of the UN with the one vote veto you are creating a dictatorial buricaticy on a global level . Giving any one of the Permanent Nations absolute power in being able to stop any resolution they desire .

联合国在未来全球社区中的作用非常重要。然而，联合国内部和全球面临的问题变得越来越复杂。随着世界的变化，联合国也必须跟进。举个例子：2001年12月29日，安理会就第1385号决议进行了投票。一国或一个人不应该拥有过多权力，以至于能单独否决决议，尤其是在秘密中进行的投票。这就造成了只有一个成员国与其他国家意见不一致，就足以推翻整个决议，这种情况下，是需要对决议进行修改的。安理会作为联合国的最高机构，却给予五常任理事国每个国家一票否决权，这实际上是在全球范围内制造了一种独裁的官僚制度，使任何一个常任理事国都能随意否决他们不喜欢的任何决议。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The role of the United Nations is so very important to the future global community . With problems in the Untied Nations and around the world becoming so more complex . As major changes have to happen around the world so they must at the United Nations . Example ; United Nations Security Council Veto Vote Resolution 1385 on Saturday December 29 , 2001 . One nation or one person should not have so much power to be able to stop such a resolution in secret . With only one being out of sync with the others an amendment to the resolution would have been in order . The UN Security Council being the high Council of the UN with the one vote veto you are creating a dictatorial buricaticy on a global level . Giving any one of the Permanent Nations absolute power in being able to stop any resolution they desire .

联合国在未来全球社区中的作用非常重要。由于联合国内部和世界各地的问题变得越来越复杂，联合国也必须随之发生重大变化。例如：联合国安理会否决投票决议1385于2001年12月29日星期六通过。一个国家或一个人不应该拥有如此大的权力，可以秘密阻止这样的决议。由于只有一个人与其他人不一致，对该决议的修正案是必要的。联合国安理会作为联合国的最高委员会，拥有否决权，这是在全球范围内制造了独裁官僚制度。赋予任何一个常任理事国绝对权力，使其能够阻止他们想要的任何决议。

source: The Landmark complex , which stretches essentially from 13th to 11th Streets between Harney and Farnam Streets , opened a quarter-century ago amid much fanfare . It 's among the top 10 of the city 's largest multi-tenant general office structures not occupied by its owner . But controversy also dogged the project , as it called for demolition of properties including a 112-year-old building that at the time housed Scribbles restaurant .

source: I sat on a bench talking to my friend Clay , an experienced shooter from a Southern family . Was he packing right then , I asked . To show me , he brushed aside his oversized shirt . There was his pistol , tucked into the waistband of his jeans . Although he often spoke about handguns , I was taken aback . In a moment , what had been just words before became real . Then , I wondered who else at the party was carrying a gun .

source: Homeowner 's Warranty , which denied coverage , had assured the buyers that all homes insured under its program were inspected on a continuing basis during construction -- a point that was contested at trial . Of the total jury award , $325,000 was for punitive damages intended to deter future wrongdoing . The two sides agreed to settle the case out of court for an undisclosed amount .
domestication: 房主保修公司原本拒绝赔偿，曾经向买家保证，在建造过程中，他们的保险项目下的所有房屋都将持续接受检查——这一点在审判中引发争议。陪审团的判决总金额中，32.5万美元是惩罚性赔偿，目的是警告今后不准再有类似行为。最后，双方同意以未公开的金额在庭外和解此案。
foreignization: 房屋业主保修公司（Homeowner's Warranty）拒绝承担赔偿责任，该公司向购房者保证，在建设过程中，所有参加其计划的房屋都将持续接受检查--这一点在审判期间存在争议。在陪审团裁定的总金额中，325,000美元用于惩罚性赔偿，以阻止未来类似的不法行为。双方同意在庭外和解此案，并且和解金额不对外公开。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Homeowner 's Warranty , which denied coverage , had assured the buyers that all homes insured under its program were inspected on a continuing basis during construction -- a point that was contested at trial . source: Missions will differ wildly . My alma mater put its identity as a residential college at its core , with policies to stymie students who wished to live off-campus . Religious schools like Brigham Young adopt explicit codes of conduct in keeping with their faith . source: Before the yawning information-spouting chasm of the Internet , there were two ways you could get information on video games : your dubiously-trustful buddies and trade magazines . Despite being a company rag that only covered things coming out on its own consoles , Nintendo Power was one of the best of these publications for its wonderful artwork and community culture . But do n't take my word for it : Now you can parse through the first 13 years of the magazine at Archive.org .
domestication: 在互联网如海洋般浩瀚的信息中，人们获取电子游戏信息的渠道只有两个：一个是你那些口若悬河、可信度却难以考证的朋友，另一个就是游戏杂志。尽管《任天堂力量》是一份只介绍自己主机游戏的公司刊物，但它凭借精美的插图和独特的社区文化，依然成为了最优秀的游戏杂志之一。但不要光听我的话，现在，你可以在Archive.org上浏览这份杂志的前13年内容了。
foreignization: 在互联网巨大的信息深渊之前，有两种方式可以让你得到有关电子游戏的信息：你的值得怀疑的朋友和行业杂志。尽管它是一家公司的报纸，只介绍了即将发布在自己的游戏机上的产品，但由于其精彩的艺术作品和社区文化，任天堂力量是这些出版物中最好的之一。但不要听我的话：现在您可以在Archive.org浏览这份杂志的前13年。

source: A well-set table might have as few as three pieces of silverware at a setting , or as many as six or more . It all depends on the spirit of the meal , the occasion , the food , and the time of day . The simpler the setting , the more informal the meal . But no matter how you choose to serve , the rules remain the same : Placement is according to use . Each person begins with the outside utensils and works his or her way in .
domestication: 摆好餐桌的餐具数量可以从三个到六个甚至更多，全看用餐的氛围、场合、食物和时间。餐具越简单，餐就越随意。不过不管怎么摆，规矩都一样：餐具的摆放要根据使用顺序来。每个人都是从外向内使用餐具。
foreignization: 摆设得当的餐桌可能每套餐具少至三件银器，或多至六件或更多。这完全取决于餐点的氛围、场合、食物和时间。餐具摆设越简单，用餐就越非正式。但无论你如何选择服务方式，规则都是一样的：摆放根据使用顺序。每个人从外侧的餐具开始使用，逐渐向内侧移动。

source: Monseigneur, one of the great lords in power at the Court, held his fortnightly reception in his grand hotel in Paris. Monseigneur was in his inner room, his sanctuary of sanctuaries, the Holiest of Holiests to the crowd of worshippers in the suite of rooms without. Monseigneur was about to take his chocolate. Monseigneur could swallow a great many things with ease, and was by some few sullen minds supposed to be rather rapidly swallowing France; but, his morning’s chocolate could not so much as get into the throat of Monseigneur, without the aid of four strong men besides the Cook.
domestication: 巴黎王廷中的大人物蒙西尼尔在他位于巴黎的豪华酒店举行每两周一次的招待会。蒙西尼尔在他的内室里，这是最最神圣不可侵犯的地方，对于在外面套房里的众多膜拜者来说，那简直就是至高无上的圣地。蒙西尼尔正准备享用他的巧克力。蒙西尼尔可以轻松地吞下很多东西，有些人阴郁地认为他正在以惊人的速度吞噬整个法国。但是，即使是早晨的巧克力，也需要四个强壮的男人和厨师一起帮忙，才能让它顺利通过蒙西尼尔的喉咙。

Monseigneur was in his inner room, his sanctuary of sanctuaries, the Holiest of Holiests to the crowd of worshippers in the suite of rooms without. Monseigneur was about to take his chocolate. Monseigneur could swallow a great many things with ease, and was by some few sullen minds supposed to be rather rapidly swallowing France; but, his morning’s chocolate could not so much as get into the throat of Monseigneur, without the aid of four strong men besides the Cook.
蒙瑟涅，一位在宫廷中握有巨大权力的显赫贵族，在他位于巴黎的宏伟酒店里举行了每两周一次的招待会。蒙瑟涅在他的内室里，他最为私密的圣殿中，这对于外面套房里的众多膜拜者来说，是所有圣所中最为神圣的。蒙瑟涅准备享用他的巧克力。蒙瑟涅能够轻松地吞下很多东西，一些性情阴郁的人认为他正在以惊人的速度吞噬法国；但是，即使是蒙瑟涅早晨的巧克力，也不能没有四个强壮的男人除了厨师之外的帮助，才得以进入蒙瑟涅的喉咙。

source: There has been no slowdown in the race for higher executive pay , the experts said . Chief executives won a median pay raise of 30 percent in 2004 , twice the increase from 2003 , according to the Corporate Library , a watchdog group that rates public companies on corporate governance . Repeated studies have shown virtually no connection between high compensation and good corporate performance .
domestication: 高管薪酬竞争仍在加剧，专家表示。根据企业图书馆（一家评估公司治理的监察机构）的数据，2004年首席执行官的中位数工资上涨了30%，是2003年的两倍。多项研究表明，高额报酬和良好的公司业绩之间几乎没有关联。这说明公司高管的薪水涨得快，但不见得能带来公司业绩的提升。
foreignization: 专家表示，争夺更高的高管薪酬的竞争并没有减缓。首席执行官们在2004年获得了中位数30%的加薪，这是2003年的两倍，这是根据企业图书馆（一家评估上市公司公司治理的监督机构）的数据得出的。反复研究表明，高薪酬和良好的企业业绩之间几乎没有关联。

source: Victor does n't believe geo-engineering will solve anything by itself , but he expects that ultimately we will have a cocktail of solutions . Perhaps we could start with a few puffs of sulfur in the atmosphere to buy time , then forests of plankton in the ocean , and then genetically engineered carbon-hungry trees . What is n't an option , Victor says , is refusing to fund more research , in the hope that geo-engineering wo n't be needed .
domestication: 维克多不相信单靠地质工程就能解决所有问题，但他认为，最终我们会找到一系列的解决方案。也许我们可以从向大气中释放少量硫磺开始，为我们赢得一些时间，然后是海洋中的浮游生物林，再接着是基因工程改造的吸碳树。维克多说，没有什么选择是不对的，除了一个，那就是拒绝继续资助相关研究，希望不需要地质工程。这样做就像抱着“天无绝人之路”的想法，结果可能会事与愿违。
foreignization: Victor并不认为地球工程技术可以独自解决所有问题，但他期望最终我们会得到一系列的解决方案。也许我们可以从向大气中添加几缕硫磺开始，以赢得时间，然后是海洋中的浮游生物森林，接着是基因工程改造的碳元素饥渴树木。 Victor说，现在没有选择的余地，就是拒绝为更多的研究提供资金，抱着地理工程不需要被采用的希望。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Victor does n't believe geo-engineering will solve anything by itself , but he expects that ultimately we will have a cocktail of solutions . Perhaps we could start with a few puffs of sulfur in the atmosphere to buy time , then forests of plankton in the ocean , and then genetically engineered carbon-hungry trees . What is n't an option , Victor says , is refusing to fund more research , in the hope that geo-engineering wo n't be needed .

source: " Yes , the jury votes definitely surprised me . But when I sat down , I felt all the tension and hate towards Dan that had apparently been going on amongst them at the jury house . I did n't know that he would only get one vote , I thought he would get two or three , but I definitely expected Ian to win . "
domestication: 是啊，陪审团的投票结果确实让我大吃一惊。但当我坐下来时，我感受到了一种很诡异的氛围，原来他们在陪审团宿舍里对丹的敌意和怨恨竟然这么强烈。我没想到丹会只有一个投票，我还以为他能得到两到三个投票，但我一直都觉得伊恩会赢。结果证明我的直觉是对的，丹的表现太过分了，他们才会这样反弹。
foreignization: “是的，陪审团的投票结果确实让我很惊讶。但当我坐下来时，我感觉到所有的紧张和对丹的仇恨似乎一直在他们的陪审团房子里发生。我不知道他只会得到一票，我以为他会得到两三票，但我绝对预计伊恩会赢。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

" Yes , the jury votes definitely surprised me . But when I sat down , I felt all the tension and hate towards Dan that had apparently been going on amongst them at the jury house . I did n't know that he would only get one vote , I thought he would get two or three , but I definitely expected Ian to win . "
是啊，陪审团的投票结果确实让我大吃一惊。但当我坐下来时，我感受到了一种很诡异的氛围，原来他们在陪审团宿舍里对丹的敌意和怨恨竟然这么强烈。我没想到丹会只有一个投票，我还以为他能得到两到三个投票，但我一直都觉得伊恩会赢。结果证明我的直觉是对的，丹的表现太过分了，他们才会这样反弹。

I did n't know that he would only get one vote , I thought he would get two or three , but I definitely expected Ian to win . "
“是的，陪审团的投票结果确实让我很惊讶。但当我坐下来时，我感觉到所有的紧张和对丹的仇恨似乎一直在他们的陪审团房子里发生。我不知道他只会得到一票，我以为他会得到两三票，但我绝对预计伊恩会赢。”

source: The dog, though. If any description of him were out, it would not be forgotten that the dog was missing, and had probably gone with him. This might lead to his apprehension as he passed along the streets. He resolved to drown him, and walked on, looking about for a pond: picking up a heavy stone and tying it to his handkerchief as he went.
domestication: 可是说到那条狗啊，要是有人描述他，肯定不会忘了提这狗不见了，很可能跟着他跑了。这样一来，他在街上走的时候，就容易被人认出来。他打定主意要把狗淹死，一边走一边找水塘，顺手捡了块大石头，绑在手帕上。
foreignization: 那只狗，虽然。如果有关他的任何描述被公布出去，人们就不会忘记那条狗失踪了，可能跟着他一起走了。这可能会导致他在街上行走时被捕。他决定淹死它，并继续走着，寻找一个池塘：一边走一边捡起一块大石头，绑在他的手帕上。

source: “And as such,” quoth Mr. Lorry, whom the counsel learned in the law had now shouldered back into the group, just as he had previously shouldered him out of it—“as such I will appeal to Doctor Manette, to break up this conference and order us all to our homes. Miss Lucie looks ill, Mr. Darnay has had a terrible day, we are worn out.”
domestication: 于是，洛瑞先生开口了，刚才他被律师推到了人群外，现在又被推回来了。“所以，我想请曼内特医生来结束这次谈话，叫我们各自回家吧。露西小姐看起来很不舒服，达尔奈先生经历了一个可怕的一天，我们都筋疲力尽了。”
foreignization: "而且，" 拉瑞先生说，这位法律界的顾问刚才把他推回到了人群中，就像他之前推他走出人群一样——“我将以此向曼尼特医生提出上诉，解散这次会议，并命令我们所有人回家。露西小姐看起来病了，丹尼先生度过了一个可怕的一天，我们都累坏了。"

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“And as such,” quoth Mr. Lorry, whom the counsel learned in the law had now shouldered back into the group, just as he had previously shouldered him out of it—“as such I will appeal to Doctor Manette, to break up this conference and order us all to our homes. Miss Lucie looks ill, Mr. Darnay has had a terrible day, we are worn out.”
于是，洛瑞先生开口了，刚才他被律师推到了人群外，现在又被推回来了。“所以，我想请曼内特医生来结束这次谈话，叫我们各自回家吧。露西小姐看起来很不舒服，达尔奈先生经历了一个可怕的一天，我们都筋疲力尽了。”

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“And as such,” quoth Mr. Lorry, whom the counsel learned in the law had now shouldered back into the group, just as he had previously shouldered him out of it—“as such I will appeal to Doctor Manette, to break up this conference and order us all to our homes. Miss Lucie looks ill, Mr. Darnay has had a terrible day, we are worn out.”
"而且，" 拉瑞先生说，这位法律界的顾问刚才把他推回到了人群中，就像他之前推他走出人群一样——“我将以此向曼尼特医生提出上诉，解散这次会议，并命令我们所有人回家。露西小姐看起来病了，丹尼先生度过了一个可怕的一天，我们都累坏了。"

source: I 'd like to point out that the dude was complementing ' Brits ' in a way , and that historically speaking we invented English too , sense although not everyone in America is English the country founded itself with English people , furthermore the correct terms for certain areas in the U.S are New England , Giving us leeway to adapt the language The South , The Midwest , The Mid-Atlantic
domestication: 我想说，这位老兄是在夸英国人呢，而且从历史上看，英语也是我们发明的。虽然美国不是每个人都来自英格兰，但这个国家最初是由英格兰人建立的。再说，美国有些地区的名字，比如新英格兰、南方、中西部、中大西洋地区，都给了我们改编语言的空间。

source: " Winner of JournalStone 's horror novel writing contest , Brett J. Talley has written a wonderful homage to occult horror . Each of the stories told to our protagonist is unique and scary by itself while adding to the overall atmosphere and theme of the novel as a whole . Each character is nicely fleshed-out and their individual stories come together beautifully . With references to Lovecraft , Stoker and even the Bible , That Which Should Not Be reads like the best 19th and early 20th century horror stories about the occult and ancient god-like monsters . I look forward to reading more by Talley in the future . Highly recommended . " - Colleen Wanglund , Monster Librarian
domestication: 怪诞小说大奖得主布雷特·J·塔利在其作品中向黑暗神秘主义致敬。主人公听到的每一个故事都独树一帜，令人毛骨悚然，同时又为整个小说营造出一种诡异的氛围和主题。每个角色都刻画得惟妙惟肖，他们的个人故事也在最后巧妙地交织在一起。此外，书中还暗示了洛夫克拉夫特、斯托克等人的作品，甚至连《圣经》也被提及。读起来就像是在品味19世纪和20世纪初最好的关于神秘仪式和古老、宛如神明般的怪物的恐怖故事。我非常期待布雷特·J·塔利的下一部作品，这是一部强烈推荐的好书。—— 蒙斯特图书管理员的库伦·王
foreignization: 《JournalStone》恐怖小说写作比赛的获奖者布雷特·J·塔利（Brett J. Talley）写了一篇对神秘恐怖的精彩致敬。每一个被讲述给我们主角的故事都是独特而令人恐惧的，同时也为整个小说的整体氛围和主题做出了贡献。每一个角色都被很好地刻画出来，他们各自的故事也美丽地融合在一起。小说中有对洛夫克拉夫特、斯托克和甚至《圣经》的引用，《不可存在的事物》（That Which Should Not Be）读起来就像19世纪和20世纪初关于神秘和古代神一样怪物的最佳恐怖故事。我期待着将来能够读到更多塔利的作品。强烈推荐。——科琳·王（Colleen Wanglund），怪物图书管理员

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

" Winner of JournalStone 's horror novel writing contest , Brett J. Talley has written a wonderful homage to occult horror . Each of the stories told to our protagonist is unique and scary by itself while adding to the overall atmosphere and theme of the novel as a whole . Each character is nicely fleshed-out and their individual stories come together beautifully . With references to Lovecraft , Stoker and even the Bible , That Which Should Not Be reads like the best 19th and early 20th century horror stories about the occult and ancient god-like monsters . I look forward to reading more by Talley in the future . Highly recommended . " - Colleen Wanglund , Monster Librarian

source: But with all the antioxidant supplements available these days , why resort to herbs ? Good question . Here 's my take on the subject : The antioxidant properties of herbs are just one of their many health benefits . They contain a number of chemicals that do many things . The antioxidant ginkgo , for instance , also improves circulation .
domestication: 现在市面上有那么多抗氧化剂补充剂，为什么还要用草药呢？这是一个好问题。我的看法是：草药的抗氧化特性只是其众多健康益处之一，它们含有很多对身体有益的化学物质。例如，抗氧化剂银杏，不仅能抗氧化，还能改善血液循环。总之，草药不仅仅是一种抗氧化剂，它的作用远远不止于此。
foreignization: 但如今有这么多抗氧化剂补充剂可供选择，为什么还要使用草药呢？这是一个好问题。对于这个话题，我有以下看法：草药的抗氧化特性只是它们众多健康益处之一。它们含有很多化学物质，可以发挥多种作用。例如，抗氧化剂银杏不仅可以改善血液循环。

source: “Oh! for God’s sake let me go!” cried Oliver; “let me run away and die in the fields. I will never come near London; never, never! Oh! pray have mercy on me, and do not make me steal. For the love of all the bright Angels that rest in Heaven, have mercy upon me!”
domestication: “哎呀！看在老天爷的份上，让我走吧！”奥利弗喊道，“让我跑到田野里去，死了算了。我绝对不会再靠近伦敦，绝不，绝不！求求你们发发慈悲，别逼我去偷东西。为了天上那些光明天使的爱，可怜可怜我吧！”

source: Brahms sat sleeping in the garden . Insects landed briefly on his wrapped-up body , then took off , buzzing , their wings like gauze . The letter lay open on his lap . Thule could see that it was very short , and she thought about how we 're never told enough about the lives of those we love -- that all we ever get is similar to the fly 's teasing weight on our bare skin , the threads of its legs rubbing together , its purpose beyond our imagining . She tried , delicately , to remove the letter without waking Brahms , but the minute she reached out her hand , his eyelids flew open : his eyes were yellow and dangerous .
domestication: 勃拉姆斯在花园里睡着了。虫子们在他裹紧的身体上短暂停留，然后嗡嗡地飞走，翅膀像纱一样轻薄。一封信敞开在他膝头。图勒看得出来信很短，她心想，我们对所爱之人的了解总是太少——就像苍蝇在裸露的皮肤上轻盈地逗留，细腿摩擦出的声音让人琢磨不透它的意图。图勒小心翼翼地想拿走那封信，不吵醒勃拉姆斯，但她的手刚一伸出去，勃拉姆斯的眼皮就猛地睁开：他的眼睛黄黄的，带着危险。
foreignization: 勃拉姆斯睡在花园里。昆虫短暂地落在他包裹着的身体上，然后嗡嗡地飞走，它们的翅膀像纱布一样。信件摊开在他的膝盖上。图勒可以看到这封信非常短，她想到我们对所爱之人的生活从来都不够了解——我们所能得到的一切都类似于苍蝇对我们裸露皮肤的戏弄般的重量，它的腿的丝线相互摩擦，它的目的超出了我们的想象。她试图轻柔地移走信件而不唤醒勃拉姆斯，但就在她伸出手的那一刻，他的眼睑突然睁开：他的眼睛是黄色的，充满危险。

source: In an interlude between selections , Watts modestly tells those lucky to be at the Jazz Bakery gig that the title tune is a culmination , a moment of truth , wherein a musician 's entire investment of time in their instrument is put right on the line . It is truth incarnate . And the truth here is that Watts , although he humbly states " I can not be John Coltrane , " is not only at the top of his game , but the top of the game . He approaches the doorstep to the saxophone pantheon with giant steps .
domestication: 在两首曲子的间隙，沃茨谦虚地对那些有幸来到爵士贝克里的观众说，这首标题曲是集大成之作，是真功夫见分晓的时刻。演奏者在乐器上投入的所有时间和心血，在这一刻都得拿出来晒一晒。这曲子就是实打实的真理。沃茨虽然谦虚地说“我成不了约翰·柯尔特兰”，但他不仅处于自己的巅峰状态，而且是整个领域的顶尖高手。他用大步流星的方式，一步步接近萨克斯的神坛。
foreignization: 在曲目间隙，瓦茨谦逊地告诉那些有幸参加爵士烘焙坊演出的人，标题曲是一次集大成的时刻，是真实的一刻，在这一刻，音乐家在其乐器上投入的所有时间都被摆在了眼前。这是真实的化身。而这里的真相是，尽管瓦茨谦虚地说“我不能成为约翰·科尔特兰”，但他不仅处于他个人的最佳状态，而且处于整个游戏的顶峰。他以巨大的步伐接近萨克斯风殿堂的门槛。

He approaches the doorstep to the saxophone pantheon with giant steps .

source: You bet had I been raped , I would have headed for the doctor for a morning- after pill had they been available in those days . I would have been doing everyone a favor .
domestication: 要是我当年被强了，肯定第一时间去医院要紧急避孕药，那时候有的话。要是真怀上了，肯定去做流产，那时候会这么做，现在也会。我绝不会让这样的基因祸害社会、我自己和孩子。没门儿。我这么做是大家都有好处。

source: And the ones he thought were lobsters were only shrimps . Pretty new ones at that . Not much meat here . He 'd have to work hard to make it worth the trip . source: If I come into a restaurant and say I am hungry , they wo n't look at my desire to eat ; they will be looking at how much money I have , in other words , at my screen . This means I will be measured by what the thickness ( Aviut ) of my screen is , or what my ability to receive in order to bestow is , what my power of intention is , and what amount of my former egoistic desire I am able to attach to my anti-egoistic screen and to the intention to bestow .
domestication: 我一进餐馆说饿了，人家不会看我有多想吃东西，而是会看我兜里有多少钱，换句话说，就是看我的“屏幕”有多厚。这就意味着他们会用我“屏幕”的厚度来衡量我，也就是看我能为了给予而接受多少，我的意图有多坚定，还有我能否把我以前自私的欲望转化成非自私的“屏幕”和给予的意图。
foreignization: 如果我走进一家餐厅说我很饿，他们不会看我吃东西的愿望；他们会看我有多少钱，换句话说，看我的屏幕。这意味着我将被衡量的标准是我的屏幕的厚度（Aviut）是多少，或者我为了给予而接收的能力是多少，我的意向的力量是多少，以及我能将多少以前的利己主义欲望附着到我的反利己主义屏幕上并附着到给予的意图上。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

If I come into a restaurant and say I am hungry , they wo n't look at my desire to eat ; they will be looking at how much money I have , in other words , at my screen . This means I will be measured by what the thickness ( Aviut ) of my screen is , or what my ability to receive in order to bestow is , what my power of intention is , and what amount of my former egoistic desire I am able to attach to my anti-egoistic screen and to the intention to bestow .

If I come into a restaurant and say I am hungry , they wo n't look at my desire to eat ; they will be looking at how much money I have , in other words , at my screen . This means I will be measured by what the thickness ( Aviut ) of my screen is , or what my ability to receive in order to bestow is , what my power of intention is , and what amount of my former egoistic desire I am able to attach to my anti-egoistic screen and to the intention to bestow .
如果我走进一家餐厅说我很饿，他们不会看我吃东西的愿望；他们会看我有多少钱，换句话说，看我的屏幕。这意味着我将被衡量的标准是我的屏幕的厚度（Aviut）是多少，或者我为了给予而接收的能力是多少，我的意向的力量是多少，以及我能将多少以前的利己主义欲望附着到我的反利己主义屏幕上并附着到给予的意图上。

source: “I went,” said Mr. Brownlow, after a short pause, “I went, when all was over, to the scene of his—I will use the term the world would freely use, for worldly harshness or favour are now alike to him—of his guilty love, resolved that if my fears were realised that erring child should find one heart and home to shelter and compassionate her. The family had left that part a week before; they had called in such trifling debts as were outstanding, discharged them, and left the place by night. Why, or whither, none can tell.”
domestication: 布朗洛先生停顿了一会儿后说：“事情结束之后，我去了他所谓的——我就用世人常用的词吧，世人的冷酷或青睐对他如今都一样——他那有罪的爱情发生的地方，下定决心要是我的担心成真，那个迷途的孩子至少能找到一个温暖的家和一颗同情的心。那家人一周前就离开了，他们收清了小额债务，悄悄地走了，没人知道他们为什么走，也不知道他们去哪儿了。”
foreignization: “我去了，”布朗洛先生停顿了一会儿后说，“我去了，在一切都结束之后，到了他——我会使用世人常用的词，因为世人的严厉或偏爱对他现在都一样——他有罪的恋情发生的地点，决心如果我的担心成真，那个犯错的孩子能找到一个家和一颗心来庇护和同情她。那家人一周前就离开了那里；他们收回了未偿的小债，结清了账目，然后在夜间离开了。为什么，或者去了哪里，没有人知道。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“I went,” said Mr. Brownlow, after a short pause, “I went, when all was over, to the scene of his—I will use the term the world would freely use, for worldly harshness or favour are now alike to him—of his guilty love, resolved that if my fears were realised that erring child should find one heart and home to shelter and compassionate her. The family had left that part a week before; they had called in such trifling debts as were outstanding, discharged them, and left the place by night. Why, or whither, none can tell.”

“I went,” said Mr. Brownlow, after a short pause, “I went, when all was over, to the scene of his—I will use the term the world would freely use, for worldly harshness or favour are now alike to him—of his guilty love, resolved that if my fears were realised that erring child should find one heart and home to shelter and compassionate her. The family had left that part a week before; they had called in such trifling debts as were outstanding, discharged them, and left the place by night. Why, or whither, none can tell.”
“我去了，”布朗洛先生停顿了一会儿后说，“我去了，在一切都结束之后，到了他——我会使用世人常用的词，因为世人的严厉或偏爱对他现在都一样——他有罪的恋情发生的地点，决心如果我的担心成真，那个犯错的孩子能找到一个家和一颗心来庇护和同情她。那家人一周前就离开了那里；他们收回了未偿的小债，结清了账目，然后在夜间离开了。为什么，或者去了哪里，没有人知道。”

source: They kept at this until the snow seemed to fall more brightly in one direction , a tracery of faint light in the east as day began . Out of this rode Cobb on his big mare that could plow through drifts where his Buster would valiantly flounder . He said he 'd spent the entire night keeping the herd from being blown away , had n't slept a goddamned wink . To the side of him , coming visible in the light through the falling snow , was a long semi-circle of humped shapes , snow-covered horses like a moon-scape of boulders .
domestication: 他们一直这样坚持着，直到雪似乎在一个方向上飘落得更亮了，东方出现了一丝细微的光芒，新的一天开始了。这时，科布骑着他的大母马从雪中走出来，他的母马可以轻松地在雪堆中前行，而他的另一匹马巴斯特则会在同样的地方努力挣扎。科布说他整个晚上都在努力防止牛群被风吹散，没有睡一分钟。就在他旁边，随着雪花在渐明的光线中飘落，一排长长的马形变得清晰可见，雪覆盖的马匹像一片石头遍布的月球景观一般。
foreignization: 他们坚持这样做，直到雪似乎在一个方向上落下得更亮，这是东方黎明时分的光的一道细纹。 Cobb 骑着他的大母马从中走出来，他的母马可以在牛群将要陷入的雪堆中行进。他说他整个晚上都在防止牛群被吹散，没有睡一分钟的觉。在他旁边，在穿过落雪的光线中显现出来的是一长串弧形的隆起物，像月球上的岩石一样的积雪的马匹。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

They kept at this until the snow seemed to fall more brightly in one direction , a tracery of faint light in the east as day began . Out of this rode Cobb on his big mare that could plow through drifts where his Buster would valiantly flounder . He said he 'd spent the entire night keeping the herd from being blown away , had n't slept a goddamned wink . To the side of him , coming visible in the light through the falling snow , was a long semi-circle of humped shapes , snow-covered horses like a moon-scape of boulders .
他们一直这样坚持着，直到雪似乎在一个方向上飘落得更亮了，东方出现了一丝细微的光芒，新的一天开始了。这时，科布骑着他的大母马从雪中走出来，他的母马可以轻松地在雪堆中前行，而他的另一匹马巴斯特则会在同样的地方努力挣扎。科布说他整个晚上都在努力防止牛群被风吹散，没有睡一分钟。就在他旁边，随着雪花在渐明的光线中飘落，一排长长的马形变得清晰可见，雪覆盖的马匹像一片石头遍布的月球景观一般。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

They kept at this until the snow seemed to fall more brightly in one direction , a tracery of faint light in the east as day began . Out of this rode Cobb on his big mare that could plow through drifts where his Buster would valiantly flounder . He said he 'd spent the entire night keeping the herd from being blown away , had n't slept a goddamned wink . To the side of him , coming visible in the light through the falling snow , was a long semi-circle of humped shapes , snow-covered horses like a moon-scape of boulders .
他们坚持这样做，直到雪似乎在一个方向上落下得更亮，这是东方黎明时分的光的一道细纹。 Cobb 骑着他的大母马从中走出来，他的母马可以在牛群将要陷入的雪堆中行进。他说他整个晚上都在防止牛群被吹散，没有睡一分钟的觉。在他旁边，在穿过落雪的光线中显现出来的是一长串弧形的隆起物，像月球上的岩石一样的积雪的马匹。

source: A sumptuous man was the Farmer-General. Thirty horses stood in his stables, twenty-four male domestics sat in his halls, six body-women waited on his wife. As one who pretended to do nothing but plunder and forage where he could, the Farmer-General—howsoever his matrimonial relations conduced to social morality—was at least the greatest reality among the personages who attended at the hotel of Monseigneur that day.
domestication: 这农夫总管可真是个阔绰的主儿。他马厩里养了三十匹骏马，大厅里坐着二十四个男仆，连他太太都有六个贴身丫鬟伺候着。这农夫总管，表面上虽说是个四处掠夺、搜刮民脂民膏的主儿，但不管他的婚姻关系对社会道德有多大的贡献，至少在那天来蒙塞尼尔酒店赴宴的宾客中，他是最真实的一个大人物。
foreignization: 农夫总管是一个奢华的人。三十匹马站在他的马厩里，二十四名男仆坐在他的大厅里，六名侍女伺候着他的妻子。作为一个假装什么都不做，只在能抢到东西的地方掠夺和搜刮的人，农夫总管——不管他的婚姻关系如何有助于社会道德——至少是那天在蒙塞尼尔酒店出席的人物中最大的现实。

source: Missions will differ wildly . My alma mater put its identity as a residential college at its core , with policies to stymie students who wished to live off-campus . Religious schools like Brigham Young adopt explicit codes of conduct in keeping with their faith . The curriculum requirements at a liberal arts institution like Swarthmore will differ significantly from those of vocational institutions , and Oberlin and Brown ought to be perfectly clear about the role social justice plays in their communities .
domestication: 每个学校都有自己的特点和做法，差异很大。比如我的母校非常强调校园生活，制定了很多政策来阻止学生出宿。像杨百翰大学这样的宗教学校会根据自己的信仰，制定相应的行为准则。在斯沃斯莫尔这样的文科学校，课程设置会和职业学校有很大区别。同样，奥伯林和布朗大学也应该很明确地说明社会正义在他们的社区中扮演什么角色。每个学校都有自己的一套理念和价值观，不能一概而论。
foreignization: 任务将会大不相同。我母校以其作为一个住宿学院的身份为核心，并制定政策来阻碍希望在校外居住的学生。像杨百翰这样的宗教学校采取了符合其信仰的行为准则。像斯沃斯莫尔这样的文科机构的课程要求将与职业机构有很大的不同，奥伯林和布朗应该完全清楚社会正义在他们的社区中扮演的角色。

Missions will differ wildly . My alma mater put its identity as a residential college at its core , with policies to stymie students who wished to live off-campus . Religious schools like Brigham Young adopt explicit codes of conduct in keeping with their faith . The curriculum requirements at a liberal arts institution like Swarthmore will differ significantly from those of vocational institutions , and Oberlin and Brown ought to be perfectly clear about the role social justice plays in their communities .

source: Colic is murder on a relationship . A particular irony , that . We needed each other right at that moment , my wife and I. In retrospect , I wish I 'd had more patience . I would come home from work and my wife was wrung out from listening to it , for hours , and she needed hugs and back rubs and words of encouragement . Support ! Instead , we fought . We fought because something horrible was happening to our son and we lacked the power to stop it . We fought because we were frustrated and exhausted . We fought because we were frightened .
domestication: 肠绞痛真能要命，尤其是对夫妻关系来说。这真是个讽刺。那时候，我和妻子最需要彼此。现在回想起来，真希望自己当时能有更多耐心。我下班回家，看到妻子因为连续几个小时听着孩子的哭闹而心力交瘁，她需要拥抱、需要按摩、需要几句鼓励的话，需要支持！可我们却总是吵架。因为我们眼睁睁看着儿子受苦却无能为力；因为我们都感到无助和疲惫；因为我们都害怕。

source: He left escort and escorted without saying a word, however, and went into the guard-room; meanwhile, they sat upon their horses outside the gate. Looking about him while in this state of suspense, Charles Darnay observed that the gate was held by a mixed guard of soldiers and patriots, the latter far outnumbering the former; and that while ingress into the city for peasants’ carts bringing in supplies, and for similar traffic and traffickers, was easy enough, egress, even for the homeliest people, was very difficult. A numerous medley of men and women, not to mention beasts and vehicles of various sorts, was waiting to issue forth; but, the previous identification was so strict, that they filtered through the barrier very slowly. Some of these people knew their turn for examination to be so far off, that they lay down on the ground to sleep or smoke, while others talked together, or loitered about. The red cap and tri-colour cockade were universal, both among men and women.
domestication: 他没有说一句话就离开了护卫，护送着他们前往警卫室，而他们则坐在马上，在大门外等待。当处于这种紧张状态时，查尔斯·丹雷四周环顾，发现大门由混合的士兵和爱国者守卫，后者的人数远远超过前者。他还发现，进城对于农民的马车运载物资以及其他类似的贸易活动来说是很容易的，但是，对于最普通的人来说，离开城市却非常困难。一大群男人和女人，还有各种各样的牲畜和车辆，都在等待通过大门，但是，由于之前的检查非常严格，他们只能慢慢地通过关卡。有些人知道他们排队等待检查的时间还很长，就躺在地上睡觉或抽烟，而其他人则聊天或闲逛。红帽子和三色羽饰在男人和女人中都很常见。
foreignization: 他没有说一句话就离开了护卫并被护送着，前往守卫室；与此同时，他们骑着马坐在大门外。在这种悬念状态下四周张望时，查尔斯·丹雷注意到大门由混合的士兵和爱国者守卫，后者的人数远远多于前者；而进入城市对于农民运载物资的马车以及类似的交通和贸易来说是很容易的，但是，即使对于最普通的人，出去也是非常困难的。大量不同类型的人和女人，乃至各种各样的牲畜和车辆，都在等待出去；但是，之前的识别如此严格，以至于他们通过屏障的速度非常慢。其中一些人知道自己被检查的时间还很远，所以他们躺在地上睡觉或吸烟，而其他人则交谈或逗留。红帽子和三色羽饰无论男女都很普遍。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

He left escort and escorted without saying a word, however, and went into the guard-room; meanwhile, they sat upon their horses outside the gate. Looking about him while in this state of suspense, Charles Darnay observed that the gate was held by a mixed guard of soldiers and patriots, the latter far outnumbering the former; and that while ingress into the city for peasants’ carts bringing in supplies, and for similar traffic and traffickers, was easy enough, egress, even for the homeliest people, was very difficult. A numerous medley of men and women, not to mention beasts and vehicles of various sorts, was waiting to issue forth; but, the previous identification was so strict, that they filtered through the barrier very slowly. Some of these people knew their turn for examination to be so far off, that they lay down on the ground to sleep or smoke, while others talked together, or loitered about. The red cap and tri-colour cockade were universal, both among men and women.

source: Bill Brandon , who works at Tidewater Yacht Service marina in Port Covington , remembered a customer who had reserved a boat slip for a weekend calling him from the Inner Harbor to say he could n't find it . The customer , it turned out , had followed an old chart to Tidewater 's previous location , near Domino Sugar . The company moved in 2005 .
domestication: 比尔·布兰登在波特科文顿的泰德沃特游艇服务码头工作，他记得有个客户周末预定了一艘船的位置，结果从内港打电话来说找不到地方。原来，这位客户是按照旧海图找到的泰德沃特以前的位置，就在多米诺糖厂附近。公司早在2005年就搬走了。

source: They were not agreed, and wished to retire. My Lord (perhaps with George Washington on his mind) showed some surprise that they were not agreed, but signified his pleasure that they should retire under watch and ward, and retired himself. The trial had lasted all day, and the lamps in the court were now being lighted. It began to be rumoured that the jury would be out a long while. The spectators dropped off to get refreshment, and the prisoner withdrew to the back of the dock, and sat down.
domestication: 他们意见不一致，就想退庭。大人（也许是受到了乔治·华盛顿的启发）对他们不能达成一致显得有点意外，但表示同意他们在被监视下退庭，他自己也退庭了。审判整天都没结束，现在法庭里的灯已经开始亮起来。人们开始传言说，陪审团可能要花很长时间才能做出决定。旁观者纷纷离去吃点东西，犯人则退到被告席后面，坐了下来。
foreignization: 他们没有达成一致，想要退庭。大人（也许是在想乔治·华盛顿）对他们不能达成一致表现出了一些惊讶，但表示同意他们在监视下退庭，而且他自己也退庭了。审判已经持续了一整天，现在法庭里的灯正在被点亮。人们开始传言陪审团将会外出很长时间。旁观者陆续离开去吃东西，而被告退到了被告席的后面，坐了下来。

The trial had lasted all day, and the lamps in the court were now being lighted. It began to be rumoured that the jury would be out a long while. The spectators dropped off to get refreshment, and the prisoner withdrew to the back of the dock, and sat down.

source: I mostly pick on Jeff , the strong , fast , young one . He started his Manchester streak at 13 , and used to play fair . When he began his work career in California , he even took red-eye flights back home to the East Coast at Thanksgiving . For this , I gave him his due . Then he turned unethical and moved to a Connecticut town just up the road from Manchester . This is not fair play , and I am still plotting my revenge . For now , I intend to taunt him by maintaining my 29-year gap . The way I see it , if my brain sends out a strong enough signal , the legs will follow .
domestication: 我通常喜欢拿杰夫开玩笑，这个年轻有为的家伙。十三岁时，他就开始了在曼彻斯特的连续不间断的参加某项活动，并且一直很讲究公平。当他在加州开始工作时，甚至会在感恩节的时候乘坐红眼航班回到东海岸的家中。对此，我还是给予了他应有的肯定。但是后来，他变得不再讲究公平，搬到了距离曼彻斯特只有几条街远的康涅狄格州的一个小镇。这可不算是光明正大，我现在还在策划怎么报复他。暂时来说，我打算通过保持我二十九年的记录来嘲讽他。我认为，如果我的大脑发出足够强的信号，我的腿自然就会跟上。
foreignization: 我大多数时候都针对杰夫，那个强壮、快捷、年轻的一个。他13岁时开始在曼彻斯特的比赛，他过去总是玩得很公平。当他在加利福尼亚开始他的工作生涯时，他甚至会在感恩节乘坐深夜航班回到东海岸的家中。因此，我给了他他应得的认可。然后他变得不道德，搬到了曼彻斯特附近的一座康涅狄格州的城镇。这是不公平的比赛，我仍然在策划我的报复。目前，我打算通过保持我的29年的差距来戏弄他。在我看来，如果我的大脑发出足够强的信号，腿部就会跟随。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

I mostly pick on Jeff , the strong , fast , young one . He started his Manchester streak at 13 , and used to play fair . When he began his work career in California , he even took red-eye flights back home to the East Coast at Thanksgiving . For this , I gave him his due . Then he turned unethical and moved to a Connecticut town just up the road from Manchester . This is not fair play , and I am still plotting my revenge . For now , I intend to taunt him by maintaining my 29-year gap . The way I see it , if my brain sends out a strong enough signal , the legs will follow .

我通常喜欢拿杰夫开玩笑，这个年轻有为的家伙。十三岁时，他就开始了在曼彻斯特的连续不间断的参加某项活动，并且一直很讲究公平。当他在加州开始工作时，甚至会在感恩节的时候乘坐红眼航班回到东海岸的家中。对此，我还是给予了他应有的肯定。但是后来，他变得不再讲究公平，搬到了距离曼彻斯特只有几条街远的康涅狄格州的一个小镇。这可不算是光明正大，我现在还在策划怎么报复他。暂时来说，我打算通过保持我二十九年的记录来嘲讽他。我认为，如果我的大脑发出足够强的信号，我的腿自然就会跟上。

I mostly pick on Jeff , the strong , fast , young one . He started his Manchester streak at 13 , and used to play fair . When he began his work career in California , he even took red-eye flights back home to the East Coast at Thanksgiving . For this , I gave him his due . Then he turned unethical and moved to a Connecticut town just up the road from Manchester . This is not fair play , and I am still plotting my revenge . For now , I intend to taunt him by maintaining my 29-year gap . The way I see it , if my brain sends out a strong enough signal , the legs will follow .

我大多数时候都针对杰夫，那个强壮、快捷、年轻的一个。他13岁时开始在曼彻斯特的比赛，他过去总是玩得很公平。当他在加利福尼亚开始他的工作生涯时，他甚至会在感恩节乘坐深夜航班回到东海岸的家中。因此，我给了他他应得的认可。然后他变得不道德，搬到了曼彻斯特附近的一座康涅狄格州的城镇。这是不公平的比赛，我仍然在策划我的报复。目前，我打算通过保持我的29年的差距来戏弄他。在我看来，如果我的大脑发出足够强的信号，腿部就会跟随。

source: Meanwhile , Jay 's old friend Lyor Cohen had become chairman and CEO of Warner Music Group 's U.S. Recorded Music , and he was doing the hard sell . He offered Jay a position overseeing all of Warner Music Group 's labels and a piece of WMG 's initial public offering . Several times . Jay was certain he was going to Warner . The day he went to his lawyer 's office to sign the Def Jam contract , he paced the room for five hours . He called Cohen , who grabbed Edgar Bronfman Jr. , the chairman and CEO of WMG , and raced over to the lawyer 's office , to no avail . The decision turned on the chance to own his masters .
domestication: 与此同时，Jay的老朋友Lyor Cohen成了华纳音乐集团美国录制音乐的董事长兼CEO，他一直在极力游说Jay。Cohen多次向Jay抛出橄榄枝，邀请他担任华纳音乐集团旗下所有唱片公司的负责人，并且还承诺给他华纳音乐集团首次公开募股的一部分股份。Jay心里几乎已经笃定要加入华纳了。可就在他去律师办公室签Def Jam合约的那天，他在房间里来回踱步，犹豫了整整五个小时。最后，他给Cohen打了电话，Cohen立马拉着WMG的董事长兼CEO小艾德加·布朗夫曼赶到了律师办公室，但一切努力都白费了。最终，Jay的决定是因为他想拥有自己的母带。

source: I have had plenty of discussions regarding criminal law where I speak against the three strikes concept , and so does someone else , and we each came to our own independent conclusion using completely different backgrounds ..... yet our conclusions are 100% identical . Happens all the time -- scientific history , for example , is full of people who independently and simultaneously discovered new facts or theories .
domestication: 我参加过很多关于刑法的讨论，在这些讨论中，我反对“三振出局”政策，另一个人也反对，我们俩的背景完全不同，却得出了完全一样的结论。这种情况司空见惯——比如科学史上，就有很多人独立且同时发现了新的事实或理论。
foreignization: 我进行了很多关于刑法的讨论，在这些讨论中我反对三振出局的概念，另一个人也是如此，我们各自基于完全不同的背景得出了独立的结论……然而我们的结论是100%相同的。这种情况时有发生——例如，科学历史上就充满了人们独立且同时发现新事实或理论的例子。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

I have had plenty of discussions regarding criminal law where I speak against the three strikes concept , and so does someone else , and we each came to our own independent conclusion using completely different backgrounds ..... yet our conclusions are 100% identical . Happens all the time -- scientific history , for example , is full of people who independently and simultaneously discovered new facts or theories .
我参加过很多关于刑法的讨论，在这些讨论中，我反对“三振出局”政策，另一个人也反对，我们俩的背景完全不同，却得出了完全一样的结论。这种情况司空见惯——比如科学史上，就有很多人独立且同时发现了新的事实或理论。

source: The only reason we celebrate Thanksgiving is because after half the colonists had died from deprivations , they had a couple lucky years that they had a big last meal . Only , the governor got smart , threw off the socialistic community ownership system , assigned individual ownership of plots of land , and there after they had a bounty even exporting food a couple years later .
domestication: 说来也怪，我们为什么要庆祝感恩节呢？原来，是因为早期的殖民者们遭遇了种种苦难，有一半的人都死于饥饿和疾病。但后来，他们碰巧有两年比较好的收成，就大吃了一顿，以示庆祝。其实，他们的好日子多亏了州长的明智决定，他废除了当时的社会主义式的集体所有制，给每个人分配了一块私有土地。这样一来，大家都有了自己的责任田，努力耕作，几年后就能生产出丰富的粮食，甚至还能出口到其他地方。
foreignization: 我们唯一庆祝感恩节的原因是，殖民者们在饥饿中死了一半后，他们有几个幸运的年份，他们吃了一顿大餐。但是，总督变得聪明起来，抛弃了社会主义社区所有制系统，分配了土地的个人所有权，在那之后，他们几年后就有了丰收，甚至出口食物。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The only reason we celebrate Thanksgiving is because after half the colonists had died from deprivations , they had a couple lucky years that they had a big last meal . Only , the governor got smart , threw off the socialistic community ownership system , assigned individual ownership of plots of land , and there after they had a bounty even exporting food a couple years later .
说来也怪，我们为什么要庆祝感恩节呢？原来，是因为早期的殖民者们遭遇了种种苦难，有一半的人都死于饥饿和疾病。但后来，他们碰巧有两年比较好的收成，就大吃了一顿，以示庆祝。其实，他们的好日子多亏了州长的明智决定，他废除了当时的社会主义式的集体所有制，给每个人分配了一块私有土地。这样一来，大家都有了自己的责任田，努力耕作，几年后就能生产出丰富的粮食，甚至还能出口到其他地方。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The only reason we celebrate Thanksgiving is because after half the colonists had died from deprivations , they had a couple lucky years that they had a big last meal . Only , the governor got smart , threw off the socialistic community ownership system , assigned individual ownership of plots of land , and there after they had a bounty even exporting food a couple years later .
我们唯一庆祝感恩节的原因是，殖民者们在饥饿中死了一半后，他们有几个幸运的年份，他们吃了一顿大餐。但是，总督变得聪明起来，抛弃了社会主义社区所有制系统，分配了土地的个人所有权，在那之后，他们几年后就有了丰收，甚至出口食物。

source: Dr. Citrone now thinks that the cancer had already invaded her body when he removed her diseased breasts . When he came out of surgery , he had doubts whether Esther would survive for very long . Her prognosis is therefore guarded . "
domestication: 西特隆博士现在认为，在他切除埃丝特的病变乳房时，癌细胞已经扩散到她身体的其他部位。当他结束手术出来时，他对埃丝特的生存前景产生了怀疑。手术一周后，她的肿瘤专家赫伯特·雅各布博士写了一份报告：“由于她的腋窝淋巴结转移和双侧胸部疾病，她肯定有很高的复发风险。因此，她的预后不容乐观。”可以这么说，埃丝特的生命已经走到了谷底。

source: Glen Murakami of Teen Titans fame is ( in ) famous for not caring about the finer points that get the Fandom up in arms . The Shrug of God is the official answer to anything related to whether or not it 's in continuity with the other DCAU cartoons , anything to do with the characters ' origins or out-of-costume lives ( most famously , which Robin it is ) , and pretty much anything not detailed onscreen . General fan consensus is that Teen Titans is n't part of the DCAU and Robin is Dick Grayson , but The Powers That Be have never answered yes or no , not considering these things to be important .
domestication: 《少年泰坦》的导演格伦·村上以对那些让粉丝们热议的细枝末节毫不在意而闻名。对于与DC动画宇宙（DCAU）其他动画的连续性问题、角色起源或秘密生活等疑问（最著名的是罗宾的真实身份），官方的回答就是一笑置之。粉丝们普遍认为《少年泰坦》并不属于DCAU，罗宾的真身是迪克·格雷森，但官方从未给出明确的答案，因为他们并不认为这些问题很重要。
foreignization: Teen Titans 的导演格伦·村上以不关心那些令粉丝群体感到不满的细枝末节而闻名。 上帝的耸肩是对所有关于该剧是否与其他DCAU动画系列相关、与角色起源或脱下服装后生活（最著名的是罗宾的真实身份）等问题的官方回应，以及所有没有在屏幕上详细说明的事情。一般来说，粉丝们认为 Teen Titans 不是 DCAU 的一部分，而罗宾是迪克·格雷森，但掌权者从未给出明确的答案，因为他们并不认为这些事情很重要。

General fan consensus is that Teen Titans is n't part of the DCAU and Robin is Dick Grayson , but The Powers That Be have never answered yes or no , not considering these things to be important .

source: Mr. Lorry readily engaged for that, and the conference was ended. They passed the day in the country, and the Doctor was quite restored. On the three following days he remained perfectly well, and on the fourteenth day he went away to join Lucie and her husband. The precaution that had been taken to account for his silence, Mr. Lorry had previously explained to him, and he had written to Lucie in accordance with it, and she had no suspicions.
domestication: 洛里先生爽快地答应了，会议也就此结束。他们在乡下度过了这一天，医生也完全恢复了。接下来的三天，他一直很好，到第十四天时，他就去和露西及其丈夫会合了。之前为了解释他的沉默而采取的预防措施，洛里先生已经跟他解释过，他也按照这个说法给露西写了信，所以她一点怀疑都没有。

The precaution that had been taken to account for his silence, Mr. Lorry had previously explained to him, and he had written to Lucie in accordance with it, and she had no suspicions.

Mr. Lorry readily engaged for that, and the conference was ended. They passed the day in the country, and the Doctor was quite restored. On the three following days he remained perfectly well, and on the fourteenth day he went away to join Lucie and her husband. The precaution that had been taken to account for his silence, Mr. Lorry had previously explained to him, and he had written to Lucie in accordance with it, and she had no suspicions.
洛里先生欣然同意了这一点，会议就此结束。他们在乡下度过了这一天，医生完全恢复了。在接下来的三天里，他一直非常健康，第十四天他去与露西和她的丈夫会合。为了说明他的沉默而采取的预防措施，洛里先生此前已经向他解释过，他按照这个说法给露西写了信，因此她没有任何怀疑。

source: It monopolized every surface . Curls and tendrils ( leaves ? hair ? ) , out of which squinted disturbing faces again , that were not quite human , not quite anything else , like the figure in the fountain . They had , the faces , no necks , but little paw-like hands . The sparkle winked slowly over their marble eyes , polished by age and the rubbing quality of pure vacance .
domestication: 它占据了每一个表面，有着卷曲的藤蔓和细枝（是叶子？还是头发？），从中又探出一张张令人不安的脸，它们不太像人类，却也不是其他什么东西，就像喷泉里的那个雕像一样。那些脸没有脖子，但有着像爪子一样的小手。火花在它们的眼眸上缓慢闪烁，这些眼睛被岁月和纯粹的空虚磨得像大理石一样光滑。
foreignization: 它垄断了每一个表面。卷曲和蔓延（叶子？头发？），再次从中眯着令人不安的脸，那些不太像人类，不太像其他东西，像喷泉里的那个身影一样。那些脸，有着没有脖子的小爪子般的手。闪光慢慢地眨眼，在他们经过岁月和纯粹空虚的摩擦抛光的花岗岩般的眼睛上。

source: " This proposal will place further limitations on the exploration and development of our country 's natural resources and is yet another example of how this administration continues to stand in the way of North American energy independence , " Rep. Ed Whitfield ( R-Ky. ) , the chairman of House Energy and Commerce 's subcommittee on Energy and Power , said in a statement to The Hill .
domestication: 这项提案将进一步限制我国自然资源的勘探和开发，再次证明了本届政府一直在阻碍北美能源独立的脚步。众议院能源和商务委员会下属能源和电力小组委员会主席、肯塔基州共和党众议员埃德·惠特菲尔德在给《hill》的声明中如是说。

source: Their contracts do n't require charitable work . But some players such as linebacker Thomas Davis , defensive tackle Kawann Short and defensive end Charles Johnson grew up with little and feel a pressing need back home -- each discovering that sharing their time and money can go a long way to change the life of a child stuck in poverty .
domestication: 他们的合同里面没有要求做慈善，但是有些球员，比如外线卫托马斯·戴维斯、中锋卡万·肖特和防守端查尔斯·约翰逊，小时候生活很艰难，他们深深地感受到家乡的困苦。他们发现，奉献出自己的时间和金钱，可以让困在贫穷中的孩子的人生发生意想不到的转变。
foreignization: 他们的合同中并没有要求必须做慈善工作，但有一些球员，例如线卫托马斯·戴维斯（Thomas Davis），防守截锋卡万·肖特（Kawann Short）以及防守端查尔斯·约翰逊（Charles Johnson）在成长过程中都很穷困，他们深切地感受到家乡有很多需要帮助的人，因此每个人都发现把自己的时间和金钱与人分享，可以很好地改变一个困在贫穷中的孩子的一生。

source: With the publication of the dokuhakuroku and other documents , the veil that was drawn over the Showa Emperor 's war responsibility and his failure to abdicate has been pulled back . New debate on the role of the palace groups in the period of fascism and war has also been stimulated . The prevailing views in the West of the emperor as a pacifist standing outside the political process , and the palace ' as a break on extremism throughout its prewar existence ' , have never corresponded to reality and are now sure to be revised in the light of the new material .
domestication: 随着《独白录》及其他文件的公布，昭和天皇在战争中的责任及其未能退位的面纱终于被揭开。这还激起了关于皇室集团在法西斯和战争时期作用的新讨论。西方普遍认为天皇是一位置身政治之外的和平主义者，皇室在整个战前都是制约极端主义的力量，这些观点从来就不符合事实，现在有了新材料，肯定要被修正了。

source: ? Rosenthal : Flat-out , bald-faced lies ? Not too often . Half-truths , incomplete truths , shading of truths ? Just about every day . That said , it 's our job to dig deeper , figure out when we 're getting played , get to the bottom of stories . Generally , I have no problem with someone who declines comment on a question . I have a big problem with someone who deliberately misleads me . And yes , I keep score .

source: If I come into a restaurant and say I am hungry , they wo n't look at my desire to eat ; they will be looking at how much money I have , in other words , at my screen . This means I will be measured by what the thickness ( Aviut ) of my screen is , or what my ability to receive in order to bestow is , what my power of intention is , and what amount of my former egoistic desire I am able to attach to my anti-egoistic screen and to the intention to bestow .
domestication: 如果我走进一家餐厅说自己饿了，他们不会关心我对食物的渴望；他们只会看我的钱包够不够鼓，换句话说，就是看我的实力。也就是说，我会被衡量出我能接受多少和给予多少的能力，也就是说我有多大的接收容量来实现我的意图，以及我过去那个以自我为中心的欲望能被转化成多大的利他之心，并以此来满足我的愿望。
foreignization: 如果我进入一家餐厅，说我饿了，他们不会看我想吃的欲望；他们会看我有多少钱，即我的荧幕。这意味着我将被测量我的荧幕（Aviut）的厚度，即我接受以便给予的能力是什么，我的意图力量是什么，以及我以前的利己欲望的数量，我能够附加到我的非利己荧幕和给予的意图。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

If I come into a restaurant and say I am hungry , they wo n't look at my desire to eat ; they will be looking at how much money I have , in other words , at my screen . This means I will be measured by what the thickness ( Aviut ) of my screen is , or what my ability to receive in order to bestow is , what my power of intention is , and what amount of my former egoistic desire I am able to attach to my anti-egoistic screen and to the intention to bestow .

If I come into a restaurant and say I am hungry , they wo n't look at my desire to eat ; they will be looking at how much money I have , in other words , at my screen . This means I will be measured by what the thickness ( Aviut ) of my screen is , or what my ability to receive in order to bestow is , what my power of intention is , and what amount of my former egoistic desire I am able to attach to my anti-egoistic screen and to the intention to bestow .
如果我进入一家餐厅，说我饿了，他们不会看我想吃的欲望；他们会看我有多少钱，即我的荧幕。这意味着我将被测量我的荧幕（Aviut）的厚度，即我接受以便给予的能力是什么，我的意图力量是什么，以及我以前的利己欲望的数量，我能够附加到我的非利己荧幕和给予的意图。

source: A sumptuous man was the Farmer-General. Thirty horses stood in his stables, twenty-four male domestics sat in his halls, six body-women waited on his wife. As one who pretended to do nothing but plunder and forage where he could, the Farmer-General—howsoever his matrimonial relations conduced to social morality—was at least the greatest reality among the personages who attended at the hotel of Monseigneur that day.
domestication: 农夫将军真是个奢侈的人。他家里的马厩里有三十匹好马，客厅里坐着二十四个男仆，六个女佣伺候他的老婆。虽然他标榜自己什么都不做，只是到处抢夺和掠夺，但农夫将军无论他的婚姻关系是否有助于社会道德，在当天出席莫尼格大人的酒店的那些人中，他至少是最真实的一个。
foreignization: 一个奢侈的人就是总农官， 他家里的马厩里有三十匹马，他的客厅里有二十四个男仆，六个女佣伺候他的妻子。作为一个人，他假装除了随处掠夺和觅食之外什么也不做，总农官——无论他的婚姻关系如何促进社会道德——至少是那天出席莫尼格尼尔酒店的那些人物中最大的现实。

source: Reports on the ground are that over 32k votes were recounted today in 12 hours which finished around 9PM , but for some reason the remaining 304 votes could n't be completed in 2 hours . Officials are saying an automatic alarm is set at 11PM and they are forcing everyone to leave and come back in the morning at 8AM to finish the recount . The deadline is tomorrow noon .

source: Well , if guilt springs to mind when we think of prayer , why should we let prayer come to mind ? Keep the guilt at bay . Fend it off . We respond to guilt in two main ways : Action , to assuage our conscience , or inaction , to deny guilt 's entry into our conscience . Make up for the guilt or try to make off without it .
domestication: 嗯，要是一想到祈祷就感到内疚，那为什么还要让祈祷出现在我们的脑海里呢？得把这内疚感挡在门外，不让它靠近。面对内疚，我们通常有两种反应：一种是采取行动，以求心安；另一种则是什么都不做，拒绝承认内心的内疚。要么弥补过错，要么尽量逃避内疚。
foreignization: 好吧，如果我们想到祈祷时心中涌起内疚，为什么我们要让祈祷浮现在脑海中？把内疚挡在外面。抵挡它。我们对内疚主要有两种反应：行动，以减轻我们的良心负担，或不作为，以拒绝内疚进入我们的良知。弥补内疚或试图摆脱它。

source: The Landmark complex , which stretches essentially from 13th to 11th Streets between Harney and Farnam Streets , opened a quarter-century ago amid much fanfare . It 's among the top 10 of the city 's largest multi-tenant general office structures not occupied by its owner . But controversy also dogged the project , as it called for demolition of properties including a 112-year-old building that at the time housed Scribbles restaurant .
domestication: 这个地标综合体大楼，从13街一直延伸到11街，位于哈尼街和法南姆街之间，大约在25年前伴随着众多关注而开业。它是该市最大的十栋多租户办公大楼之一，也是少数没有被业主占用的写字楼。但这个项目也一直备受争议，因为它涉及到拆除多处建筑物，包括当时斯克里布尔斯餐厅（Scribbles restaurant）的所在地——一栋有112年的历史的旧建筑。
foreignization: Landmark建筑群，从本质上讲是从Harney街和Farnam街之间的13街到11街，二十五年前在众多粉丝的簇拥下开放。它在城市最大的多租户综合办公楼中排名第十，没有被其所有者占据。但是，这个项目也引起了争议，因为它呼吁拆除包括当时容纳Scribbles餐厅的112岁建筑在内的财产。

source: Charlie says , " She 's honest . She does n't ice things over . But I fell in love with her on a day I saw her at the cafeteria . She was n't even eating , just reading , with an empty tray next to her . I often seemed to attract women with eating disorders . The kind who shovel in enormous bowls of salad , choose a chocolate layer cake , take a few bites , then pour salt over it so they wont be tempted . Diane was n't like that . I 've always had this feeling she could sustain herself on books and air . "
domestication: 查理说：“她很真诚，不会故作姿态。但我爱上她是有一天在食堂看到她的样子。当时她连饭都没吃，只是捧着一本书在看，旁边放着个空托盘。我好像总是吸引那些有饮食障碍的女人。那种人，她们大口地吃着沙拉，挑一块巧克力蛋糕，咬几口，然后撒上盐，免得自己再动心。但黛安不一样。我一直觉得，她光靠书和空气就能活下去。”

source: In the current issue of Discover , I examine electroconvulsive therapy . I had about 1500 words to write about it , and I only focused on a single study recently published in the Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences . I think it 's an important piece of research , because it uses fMRI for the first time to look at what happens to the brain when ECT pulls people out of major depression .
domestication: 在《发现》杂志的最新一期中，我探讨了电休克疗法。这篇文章大概有1500字，主要集中在最近发表在《美国国家科学院院刊》上的一项研究。我觉得这项研究非常重要，因为它首次使用功能性磁共振成像技术来观察电休克疗法是如何帮助人们摆脱重度抑郁的。这可是个大突破，说白了就是用先进的技术手段来看看电休克疗法到底对大脑做了什么，怎么就把人从抑郁症的泥潭里拉出来了。
foreignization: 在本期的《Discover》中，我考察了电休克疗法。我大约有1500字来撰写这个话题，但我只关注了一项最近发表在《国家科学院院刊》上的研究。我认为这是一项重要的研究，因为它是首次使用功能性磁共振成像（fMRI）来观察当电休克疗法将人们从重度抑郁中解救出来时大脑发生了什么。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

I think it 's an important piece of research , because it uses fMRI for the first time to look at what happens to the brain when ECT pulls people out of major depression .

source: The contents of her make-up basket have been emptied : lotions , shampoos , toothpaste , all are gone . My things are here now , still housed in my travel bag , except for my clean underwear , waiting next to the bathtub . I soak in the tub until the last of the water is swallowed by the drain . I stay put until the porcelain cools , all the while smelling lavender which rises from my warm skin . I breathe in so much I am no longer able to smell anything . The scent , flowery and feminine , has moved inside of me . It will cling to my body for a while and then gradually slip away , without me knowing .
domestication: 她的化妆篮已经空了：护肤霜、洗发水、牙膏，全都不见了。现在我的东西都在这里，还放在我的旅行袋里，只有干净的内衣放在浴缸旁边等着我。我泡在浴缸里，直到最后一滴水被排水管吸走。我一直坐在那里，直到瓷器变得凉爽，整个过程都能闻到从我温暖皮肤上飘起来的薰衣草香气。我深深地吸入，直到再也闻不到任何味道。那种花香四溢的女性气息已经潜入我的体内，会在我的身上停留一阵子，然后悄悄地消失，我却浑然不知。

source: The adoption of the Universal Declaration of Human Rights on December 10 , 1948 constituted a step forward in the slow progress towards protection of human rights . The overarching principle of the UD is universality . Its provisions have equal standing . There are no moral grounds for self-serving " relativism , " which selects for convenience ; still less for the particularly ugly form of relativism that converts the UD into a weapon to wield selectively against designated enemies .
domestication: 1948年12月10日，《世界人权宣言》的通过标志着人权保护漫长道路上的一大步。《宣言》的核心原则是普遍性，各项条款地位平等。没有道德依据支持那种自利的“相对主义”，这种相对主义随意挑选对自己有利的内容；更不能容忍那种特别丑陋的相对主义，它将《宣言》变成了一种武器，选择性地针对特定的敌人。
foreignization: 《世界人权宣言》于1948年12月10日通过，这标志着在缓慢的人权保护进程中向前迈出了一步。《宣言》的首要原则是普遍性。其各项条款具有同等地位。没有道德理由可以为出于自身便利而选择性采纳的“相对主义”辩护；更不能为特别丑陋的那种相对主义提供理由，这种相对主义将《宣言》变成针对特定敌人的选择性武器。

source: I sat on a bench talking to my friend Clay , an experienced shooter from a Southern family . Was he packing right then , I asked . To show me , he brushed aside his oversized shirt . There was his pistol , tucked into the waistband of his jeans . Although he often spoke about handguns , I was taken aback . In a moment , what had been just words before became real . Then , I wondered who else at the party was carrying a gun .
domestication: 我和来自南方的一个老朋友克莱坐在长椅上聊天，他是个有经验的枪手。我问他，你现在带枪了吗？他随手拨开宽大的衬衫给我看，原来他的裤子腰带上插着一把手枪。尽管他经常跟我谈论手枪的事，我还是吓了一跳。就在那一瞬间，之前只是口头上的东西变得非常真实。然后，我开始疑惑，_party上还有谁带了枪。
foreignization: 我坐在长椅上，和我的朋友克莱聊天，他是一个来自南方家庭的经验丰富的射手。我问他，他当时是否带枪。为了给我看，他把他那件超大号的衬衫撩开。那里是他的手枪，塞在他的牛仔裤的腰带里。尽管他经常谈论手枪，但我还是被吓了一跳。在那一刻，以前只是言语的东西变成了现实。然后，我想知道派对上还有谁带枪。

source: Our proposal to dramatically increase the Earned Income Tax Credit , or EITC , will give people an economic incentive to choose work instead of welfare . The EITC is a work-based , refundable tax credit designed to make sure that work pays for low-income families . The President 's economic plan makes a strong investment in this bipartisan program .
domestication: 我们提议大幅提高劳动所得税收抵免，也就是EITC，这样就能给人们一个经济上的动力，让他们选择工作而不是靠救济过日子。EITC是基于工作的，可以退税的税收抵免，旨在确保低收入家庭通过工作也能获得体面的收入。总统的经济计划对这个两党支持的项目进行了大手笔的投资。

source: All eyes turned to Sara Montague , the waifish assistant director , who was sitting in the back of the room with her knees up , stitching flowers on a macrame tablecloth . It was Sara 's job to stock the kitchen . Several times in the past , this had brought her into direct engagement with Ginny Stern , often on the losing side . But now her expression was serene . " Mugs ? " Sara asked faintly , as if recalling some benign distant obsession .

source: He was aking me in that moment to say yes to this 7 month old baby boy that had been diagnosed as bilaterally blind and severely , chronically malnourished - the ramifications of his malnutrition and other special needs that could surface were unknown . source: Banding Together In the face of unfathomable destruction , loss of life , and disrupted families , residents have banded together . I 've witnessed countless acts of kindness ; stores are creating free charging stations , strangers are offering rides uptown , there 's free coffee , friends have offered couches to sleep on , and companies have put work in the backseat to ensure employees safety and well-being . It is instances like this that put life into perspective and make the things that we usually get hung up on seem trivial .
domestication: 在面对无法想象的毁灭、生命损失和家庭破裂的情况下，当地居民团结起来互相帮助。我亲眼见证了无数好人好事：商店开设免费充电站，陌生人提供免费的交通服务，还有免费的咖啡，朋友们主动提供沙发让受灾者睡觉，公司也把工作放在次要位置，确保员工的安全和健康。这样的时刻让我们看清了真正重要的事情，让平时那些令我们烦恼的事变得微不足道。
foreignization: 在面对无法理解的毁灭、生命损失和家庭破碎的情况下，居民们团结在了一起。我见证了无数仁慈的行为；商店创建免费充电站，陌生人提供向城镇提供免费乘车服务，有免费咖啡，朋友提供沙发让睡觉，公司将工作放在安全座位上以确保员工的安全和健康。在这种情况下，让生活变得清晰，并使我们平常陷入其中的琐事变得微不足道。

source: Beth 's mother and the neighbor are not even very good friends . The neighbor was just driving by . She had just come from Beth 's school where she registered her boy for kindergarten for the fall . The neighbor wore a spring suit for the occasion , light green with tiny flowers on it , a skirt and blazer , a white blouse . The boy wore a sailor suit and new red Keds . The mothers drank coffee and the boy ran in and out of the house , showing them the things he had found : a stone , a feather , a leaf , a ladybug .
domestication: 贝丝的妈妈和邻居关系其实一般。那天邻居刚好路过。她刚从贝丝的学校回来，给自己的儿子报名了秋季的幼儿园。为了这个场合，她穿了一身春天的套装，淡绿色的，上面还有小小的花，裙子配夹克，里面是白色衬衫。小男孩则穿着水手服，脚上是一双新买的红色运动鞋。两个妈妈边喝咖啡，边聊天，小男孩则在屋里屋外来回跑，给他们展示自己找到的东西：一块石头、一根羽毛、一片叶子、一只瓢虫。

source: On the phone in June , one week into summer camp , he tells me he has fallen for the arts and crafts counselor , a Minnesotan with Swedish ancestry , named Anna . The only phone at camp is in the office just off the main dining room . Behind him is the dull roar and clank of a hundred children competing for a limited number of metal serving bowls of macaroni and cheese .
domestication: 六月的时候，他在夏令营待了一周，打电话给我，说他喜欢上了艺术手工课的辅导员安娜。安娜是明尼苏达州人，有瑞典血统。营地里唯一的一部电话就在主餐厅旁边的小办公室里。他背后传来一百多个孩子争抢有限的金属碗装通心粉和奶酪的声音，一片嘈杂。

source: I will vote for Obama who walked into the biggest storm possible . Banks failing , Lehman closing , Merrill Lynch and a host of others broke , Citi near collapse , what did people think - the Presidency was like the clapper - new president - clap on all good ? source: For fuck 's sake , Marc and Jack . Knock it off . source: Notwithstanding an unusual flow of company, the master of the wine-shop was not visible. He was not missed; for, nobody who crossed the threshold looked for him, nobody asked for him, nobody wondered to see only Madame Defarge in her seat, presiding over the distribution of wine, with a bowl of battered small coins before her, as much defaced and beaten out of their original impress as the small coinage of humanity from whose ragged pockets they had come.
domestication: 尽管店里顾客络绎不绝，酒馆老板却不见踪影。不过也没人留意到他的缺席，因为进店的人都没找他，也没人问起他，更没有人觉得只见到德发日太太坐在柜台后面掌管酒水的分配有什么不对劲。她面前放着一个装满破旧小银币的碗，这些硬币和那些从破烂口袋里掏出来的普通人一样，早已磨损得面目全非。
foreignization: 尽管酒馆里有不同寻常的客流，酒馆老板却不见踪影。他并不被人惦记；因为，没有人进门时会寻找他，没有人询问他，没有人对只看到德发日太太坐在她的位置上感到惊讶，她负责监督酒水的分发，面前放着一碗破损的小硬币，这些硬币和它们出自的破烂口袋中的人类小币种一样，被磨损得面目全非。

source: Rose Marie Nichols McGee , of Nichols Garden Nursery , in Albany , Oregon , concurs and mentions that she is especially unenthusiastic about the idea of a " new " white carrot . " Carrots started white , " she points out . " Breeders worked for a long time to get the beautiful orange color . Wild carrots are white , and any accidental cross with them gives you a white , so they turn up all the time . And anyway , we already carry white carrots . "
俄勒冈州奥尔巴尼的Nichols Garden Nursery的Rose Marie Nichols McGee同意这一观点，并提到她对“新”的白胡萝卜的想法尤其不感兴趣。“胡萝卜最初是白色的，”她指出。“育种者花了很长时间才得到美丽的橙色。野生胡萝卜是白色的，它们与任何意外交配都会给你一个白色的结果，所以它们一直都存在。无论如何，我们已经有白胡萝卜了。”

source: Just observe two children : one who loves to read and one who does not . This is my family , for the record . For the lover of books , reading is an escape and for her it is sweet joy without a shred of work in it . For the daughter who does not enjoy it , every word is scraped preciously and piled up as work done with much effort .
domestication: 观察两个孩子：一个爱读书，一个不爱。我家就是这种情况。对那个爱书的孩子来说，阅读是一种逃避，对她而言是纯粹的快乐，毫不费力。而对那个不爱读书的女儿来说，每个字都得艰难地挤出来，像是完成了一项艰巨的任务一样堆积起来。

source: Snow is optimistic about the future of the green movement 10 or more years down the road . " At the very least , we will have slowed the rate at which we are destroying this very fragile planet . " Snow is impressed by the environmental awareness of college-age Americans and even more by younger children . She believes that by the time they are running companies and households , if we are n't already seeing serious changes , we will by then .
domestication: 斯诺对绿色运动未来十年的发展充满乐观。她说：“至少我们已经减缓了破坏这个脆弱星球的速度。”斯诺对美国大学生的环保意识印象深刻，更让她感到惊喜的是，连小孩子都开始有了这种意识。她相信，等他们掌管公司和家庭的时候，即使现在还没有出现重大改变，到时候也一定会有的。
foreignization: 斯诺对未来10年或更长时间的绿色运动持乐观态度。“至少，我们将减缓我们破坏这个非常脆弱的星球的速度。” 斯诺对美国大学生的环保意识印象深刻，对更年轻的孩子们的意识印象更为深刻。她认为，等到他们管理公司和家庭时，如果我们还没有看到实质性的变化，到那时就会看到。

source: 12 . Do I need to do anything in order to stay in my Original Medicare ? Nope . If you 're content with your Original Medicare coverage , you can sit tight as there are no changes for 2013 to consider , says CMS 's David Sayen . However , because Original Medicare does n't include a drug plan , it 's wise to review your Part D drug plans as the medicines they cover , the pharmacies they work with , and their premiums do change .
domestication: 12. 要留在原版的医疗保险，我需要做什么吗？不用。如果你对现在的原版医疗保险满意，就什么都不用做，因为2013年没有什么变动，医保服务中心的大卫·塞延是这么说的。不过，原版医疗保险里不包括药物计划，所以最好还是检查一下你的D部分药物计划，因为覆盖的药品、合作的药店和保费都可能有变动。
foreignization: 12. 为了保持我的原始医疗保险，我需要做些什么吗？不用。如果你对你的原始医疗保险满意，你可以安心等待，因为根据CMS的大卫·塞延所说，2013年没有需要考虑的变更。然而，由于原始医疗保险不包括药物计划，因此明智的做法是审查你的D部分药物计划，因为它们所覆盖的药物、合作的药店以及保费都会发生变化。

source: But, this was not the change on the village, and on many a village like it. For scores of years gone by, Monseigneur had squeezed it and wrung it, and had seldom graced it with his presence except for the pleasures of the chase—now, found in hunting the people; now, found in hunting the beasts, for whose preservation Monseigneur made edifying spaces of barbarous and barren wilderness. No. The change consisted in the appearance of strange faces of low caste, rather than in the disappearance of the high caste, chiselled, and otherwise beautified and beautifying features of Monseigneur.
domestication: 但是，这并不是村庄的变化，也不是像这样的许多村庄的变化。过去的几十年里，蒙西尼尔一直在榨取和勒索这个村庄，对这里的关心很少，只是在打猎的时候才会光顾这里——有时是猎人，有时是猎物，因为这些猎物的保护，蒙西尼尔特意保留了原始荒芜的土地。不是的，真正的变化在于低贱之人的陌生面孔的出现，而不是高贵、雕琢、美化和优雅的蒙西尼尔面孔的消失。
foreignization: 但这并不是发生在这个村庄上的变化，也不是发生在许多类似的村庄上。几个世纪以来，莫尼塞涅一直在榨取和折磨它，很少因为狩猎的乐趣而降临到这里——有时是为了狩猎人民；有时是为了狩猎那些野兽，而莫尼塞涅为了保护它们而将残暴和荒芜的荒野变成了令人受启发的地方。不。这种变化在于低等种姓的陌生面孔的出现，而不是高等种姓、雕琢过的面孔以及其他美化和赋予美丽的莫尼塞涅面孔的消失。

No. The change consisted in the appearance of strange faces of low caste, rather than in the disappearance of the high caste, chiselled, and otherwise beautified and beautifying features of Monseigneur.

source: The new rider walked past Keyonte to sit right behind the rear exit . It was an old Black woman , a sequined black cap poised on the left of her crown of black infused gray hair . A gray wool shawl that seemed to perfectly match her hair 's color wrapped her all the way down to her hips , where a battered pair of blue jeans rested . She fell into her seat and sighed loudly .
domestication: 刚上车的乘客从Keyonte身边走过，直接坐在后门旁边。是个老黑妇人，头发是带着灰色的黑色，左侧的头顶上戴着一顶镶满亮片的黑色帽子，看起来很时髦。她身上裹着一条灰色的羊毛披肩，颜色和头发非常相配，裹到大腿根部。下面是一条破旧的蓝色牛仔裤。 她一屁股坐下，长长地松了一口气。

source: Hosted by kibitzer supreme Regis Philbin , Millionaire became a national phenomenon in the blink of an eye . Suddenly everyone was talking about it , from David Letterman ( who kept repeating its catch phrase , " Is that your final answer ? " ) to the pundits on Washington Week in Review , who puzzled over its social meaning .
domestication: 这档节目由最高级别的评论家雷吉斯·菲尔宾主持，转眼之间便成为全国性的热潮。突然之间，所有人都在谈论它，从大卫·莱特曼（他一直重复着这个节目的口头禅“这是你的最终答案吗？”）到《华盛顿周刊评论》的专家们，他们对其社会意义感到困惑。

source: With the look fixed upon him, in her paleness and wildness, she panted out in his arms, imploringly, “O my dear friend! My husband!”
domestication: 她脸色苍白，眼神狂乱，定定地看着他，喘着气在他怀里哀求道：“哦，我的好朋友！我的丈夫！”

With the look fixed upon him, in her paleness and wildness, she panted out in his arms, imploringly, “O my dear friend! My husband!”
她脸色苍白，眼神狂乱，定定地看着他，喘着气在他怀里哀求道：“哦，我的好朋友！我的丈夫！”

On the other hand , I 've seen research saying that roughly 50 percent of people do n't go to the dentist -- at least not regularly . That 's a huge untapped market .

source: Notwithstanding an unusual flow of company, the master of the wine-shop was not visible. He was not missed; for, nobody who crossed the threshold looked for him, nobody asked for him, nobody wondered to see only Madame Defarge in her seat, presiding over the distribution of wine, with a bowl of battered small coins before her, as much defaced and beaten out of their original impress as the small coinage of humanity from whose ragged pockets they had come.
domestication: 尽管客流量很大，但这家酒馆的老板却不见踪影。然而，没有人想念他，也没有人问起他，更没有人觉得奇怪为什么只有德法尔热夫人坐在座位上，负责发放葡萄酒，她面前有一碗破旧的小硬币，这些硬币已经被磨损得无法辨认，就像那些将它们从衣袋里掏出来的人们一样，变得破旧不堪。这家店似乎一切如常，大家各司其职，你来我往，根本不需要老板的出现。德法尔热夫人就像一座女王蜂一样，镇定自若地管理着整个店铺，她的目光冷静而锐利，仿佛洞悉了每个人的心思。
foreignization: 尽管客人们来来往往的很不寻常，但是这家酒馆的老板却没有出现。他也没有被人注意到；因为，没有一个人跨过门槛后会去找他，也没有人询问他的情况，也没有人觉得奇怪只有德法尔热夫人坐在她的位置上，主持着葡萄酒的分发，她面前有一碗破旧的小硬币，就像从那些衣衫褴褛的人口袋里流出来的人类精神财富一样磨损和扭曲，它们已经失去了原有的形状。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Notwithstanding an unusual flow of company, the master of the wine-shop was not visible. He was not missed; for, nobody who crossed the threshold looked for him, nobody asked for him, nobody wondered to see only Madame Defarge in her seat, presiding over the distribution of wine, with a bowl of battered small coins before her, as much defaced and beaten out of their original impress as the small coinage of humanity from whose ragged pockets they had come.

source: She shook her head to dismiss the dark thought and stared at the snowglobe on her side table , on which she set her ever-present cup of hot tea . It did n't matter if the outdoor temperature was twenty-five or ninety-five : " Hot tea , please . That will do . " On this midsummer Saturday in Wanonishaw , Minnesota , even though it was a humid eighty-seven degrees outdoors , Sasha did not turn on the air condi ­ tioning , and still she felt a slight chill .
domestication: 她摇了摇头，想甩掉那股子不痛快的念头，目光落在了床头柜上的雪景球上，旁边还放着一杯她时刻不离手的热茶。外面的温度是零下二十五度还是四十度都无所谓：“给我来杯热茶吧，这就够了。”这天是仲夏时节，瓦诺尼肖的周六，尽管室外湿热难耐，气温高达三十五度，萨莎却没开空调，可她还是觉得有点凉嗖嗖的。

source: “No, he don’t,” sneered Mr. Sikes. “Or he won’t, and that’s the same thing. Speak out, and call things by their right names; don’t sit there, winking and blinking, and talking to me in hints, as if you warn’t the very first that thought about the robbery. Wot d’ye mean?”
domestication: “他没那胆儿，”赛克斯先生嘲讽道。“或者他是有那想法但不敢干，反正都一样。有话直说，别扭扭捏捏的，好像你不是第一个想到要干这勾当似的。你到底想说什么？”
foreignization: “不，他不会，”西克斯先生嘲笑道。“或者他不愿意，这都一样。说话大声点，叫事情的正确名字；不要坐在那儿，一眨一眨地，用暗示跟我讲话，好像你不是第一个想到那件盗窃案的人似的。你是什么意思？”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“No, he don’t,” sneered Mr. Sikes. “Or he won’t, and that’s the same thing. Speak out, and call things by their right names; don’t sit there, winking and blinking, and talking to me in hints, as if you warn’t the very first that thought about the robbery. Wot d’ye mean?”
“他没那胆儿，”赛克斯先生嘲讽道。“或者他是有那想法但不敢干，反正都一样。有话直说，别扭扭捏捏的，好像你不是第一个想到要干这勾当似的。你到底想说什么？”

messages_foreignization.content:

“No, he don’t,” sneered Mr. Sikes. “Or he won’t, and that’s the same thing. Speak out, and call things by their right names; don’t sit there, winking and blinking, and talking to me in hints, as if you warn’t the very first that thought about the robbery. Wot d’ye mean?”
“不，他不会，”西克斯先生嘲笑道。“或者他不愿意，这都一样。说话大声点，叫事情的正确名字；不要坐在那儿，一眨一眨地，用暗示跟我讲话，好像你不是第一个想到那件盗窃案的人似的。你是什么意思？”

source: Over the prisoner’s head there was a mirror, to throw the light down upon him. Crowds of the wicked and the wretched had been reflected in it, and had passed from its surface and this earth’s together. Haunted in a most ghastly manner that abominable place would have been, if the glass could ever have rendered back its reflections, as the ocean is one day to give up its dead. Some passing thought of the infamy and disgrace for which it had been reserved, may have struck the prisoner’s mind. Be that as it may, a change in his position making him conscious of a bar of light across his face, he looked up; and when he saw the glass his face flushed, and his right hand pushed the herbs away.
domestication: 囚犯头顶上挂着一面镜子，用来把光线反射到他身上。这面镜子里映过无数的恶人和可怜虫，他们从镜中消失，也从人间消失了。要是这镜子能像大海有一天会吐出沉没其中的尸体那样，把曾经映在它上面的影像都还回来，那这个地方恐怕早就成了最可怕的鬼地方了。也许囚犯想到了自己留在这镜子中的耻辱与羞愧，也可能没有，但当他变换姿势，突然意识到脸上有一道光时，抬头看见了那面镜子，脸一下子红了，右手也把草药推开了。
foreignization: 在囚犯的头顶上有一面镜子，用来将光线投射到他身上。成群的恶人和不幸者曾在这面镜子里被反映出来，并且从镜面和这个地球一同消失。如果这面镜子能够像大海有一天会交出其死者那样，将其反射出来的影像重新呈现，那这个可憎的地方将会以一种最可怕的鬼魅方式受到侵扰。对于这面镜子所保留的耻辱和羞辱，囚犯心中可能掠过一些短暂的念头。无论情况如何，由于位置的变化使他意识到脸上有一道光带，他抬头看了看；当他看到镜子时，脸红了，右手把草药推开。

Be that as it may, a change in his position making him conscious of a bar of light across his face, he looked up; and when he saw the glass his face flushed, and his right hand pushed the herbs away.

source: By now the case was drawing international attention . Christian groups began to protest and Pope Benedict XVI appealed for clemency , complaining that Christians in Pakistan are " often victims of violence and discrimination . " Other minority groups in Pakistan began calling for the repeal of the blasphemy law , saying it was used to persecute all minorities . The execution was postponed . Then in mid-November , Salman Taseer , the governor of Punjab and apparently a decent man , called for issuing a pardon and said that blasphemy should not be punishable by death . In late November , an aide to President Asif Ali Zardari put out word that a pardon would be forthcoming . All the while , Bibi remained in jail .
domestication: 到这时候，这个案件已经引起了国际关注。基督徒团体开始抗议，教皇本笃十六世也出面求情，说在巴基斯坦的基督徒“常常遭受暴力和歧视”。巴基斯坦的其他少数群体也开始呼吁废除亵渎宗教法，认为这法律是用来迫害所有少数群体的。死刑被推迟了。到了11月中旬，旁遮普省省长萨尔曼·塔塞尔，据说是个正派人，呼吁赦免比比，并表示亵渎宗教不应判处死刑。11月底，总统阿西夫·阿里·扎尔达里的助手放出消息，说赦免令即将下达。然而，比比一直关在监狱里。
foreignization: 到那时，这起案件已经引起了国际关注。基督教团体开始抗议，教皇本笃十六世呼吁宽大处理，抱怨巴基斯坦的基督徒“经常成为暴力和歧视的受害者。”巴基斯坦的其他少数群体也开始呼吁废除亵渎法，称该法律被用来迫害所有少数群体。执行被推迟了。然后在11月中旬，旁遮普省省长萨尔曼·塔塞爾，显然是一位正直的人，呼吁赦免并表示亵渎不应被判处死刑。11月底，总统阿西夫·阿里·扎尔达里的助手放出消息说将会有赦免。在此期间，比比一直被关在监狱里。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

By now the case was drawing international attention . Christian groups began to protest and Pope Benedict XVI appealed for clemency , complaining that Christians in Pakistan are " often victims of violence and discrimination . " Other minority groups in Pakistan began calling for the repeal of the blasphemy law , saying it was used to persecute all minorities . The execution was postponed . Then in mid-November , Salman Taseer , the governor of Punjab and apparently a decent man , called for issuing a pardon and said that blasphemy should not be punishable by death . In late November , an aide to President Asif Ali Zardari put out word that a pardon would be forthcoming . All the while , Bibi remained in jail .
