source: Jones went on in this way , gently , his voice free of blame or consternation , but weighted with pleading sadness . Finally , he spread his arms and drew close to Jeffrey . Jeffrey turned and found himself folded into the muscular wingspan . Angela too had somehow become enclosed in it . Jones began a fervent prayer and their three bowed heads touched . Jeffrey trembled and wept and tried to subdue it , to hide it . He felt himself shrinking in those encircling arms . At his back , as if to ape the clenched and dismal whistle in his throat , the kettle started to sing .
domestication: 琼斯继续说着，声音轻柔，没有任何责备或惊慌，但带有一种恳切的悲伤。最后，他张开双臂，走近杰弗里。杰弗里转过身来，发现自己被包裹在强壮的怀抱中。安吉拉也不知不觉地被包括在内。琼斯开始虔诚地祈祷，他们三个人的头碰到了一起。杰弗里颤抖着哭泣，试图抑制住自己的情绪，想要隐藏起来。他感觉自己在包围他的怀抱中缩了回去。在他身后，好像是为了模仿他喉咙里哽咽的悲伤口哨，水壶开始哨叫起来。就像整个世界都在与他一起哭泣一样。
foreignization: 琼斯继续以这种方式说话，他的声音柔和，没有任何责备或震惊的语气，但带着哀求的悲伤。最后，他张开双臂并靠近杰弗里，杰弗里转过身来，发现自己被他有力的臂膀拥抱着。安吉拉也不知怎么地被包裹在其中。琼斯开始热切地祈祷，他们三个人的头低下，彼此相触。杰弗里颤抖着哭泣，试图抑制住自己的情绪，想要隐藏它。他感觉到自己在那些环绕他的双臂中缩小了。在他的背后，就像是在模仿他喉咙中紧握、黯淡的口哨声，水壶开始唱起歌来。

Jeffrey trembled and wept and tried to subdue it , to hide it . He felt himself shrinking in those encircling arms . At his back , as if to ape the clenched and dismal whistle in his throat , the kettle started to sing .

source: Indonesian President Suharto cut short an official visit to Egypt and flew home to deal with the growing street violence in Jakarta , Yogyakarta , and other cities . Another protester - the seventh in two days - was killed in the rioting . Meanwhile , analysts warned that if the unrest topples Suharto - with the Army seizing power - it also could wreck the $ 38 billion international bailout of Indonesia 's battered economy .
domestication: 印度尼西亚总统苏哈托原本在埃及进行国事访问，但突然中断行程，飞回国内处理雅加达、日惹等城市日益严重的街头暴力事件。暴乱中又有一名抗议者丧生，这两天里已经有七人遇害。与此同时，分析人士警告说，如果动乱导致苏哈托下台，军方夺权，那么这将可能使印度尼西亚38亿美元的国际救助计划付诸东流。
foreignization: 印尼总统苏哈托提前结束了对埃及的正式访问，飞回印度尼西亚处理雅加达、日惹和其他城市日益增长的街头暴力。又有一名抗议者——两天内第七人——在骚乱中被杀。与此同时，分析人士警告说，如果动乱推翻苏哈托——军队夺权——也可能会使得国际社会38亿美元的对印度尼西亚经济救援化为泡影。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Another protester - the seventh in two days - was killed in the rioting . Meanwhile , analysts warned that if the unrest topples Suharto - with the Army seizing power - it also could wreck the $ 38 billion international bailout of Indonesia 's battered economy .

source: After two days of intense planning Mondays and Tuesdays , Broncos coaches turn out a thick new playbook insert every week . It details everything from the team itinerary to each opponent 's tendencies on second-and-1 against the run . There are biographies , coverages , red-zone statistics showing what a team tends to do inside the 20-yard line and , of course , the scripted 15 plays with which to start the game .
domestication: 经过周一和周二两天紧张的策划，野马队的教练们每周都会拿出一份厚厚的新比赛手册插页。里面事无巨细，从球队行程到对手在二档防跑时的倾向都一应俱全。还有球员简介、防守策略、红区数据，显示对手在20码线内会怎么打，当然还有一开场就用的那15个固定战术。

source: I recognized a tiny tremor in her voice . The same as in the message recently left on my phone machine across the ocean . " Things are falling apart , " she 'd said , " if you 're coming , then come fast . " I tried to formulate a decent question in my mind . Does he know I 'm coming ? Will he recognize me ? Can he see at all ? Leave bed ? All around me young bodies were sunning themselves , running across the beach , eating gelati . The telephone clicked and I deposited another coin . "
domestication: 我听出了她声音里的那丝颤抖，和前几天留在我电话答录机里的消息一模一样。“事情乱了套，”她说，“你要是来，就快点。”我在心里盘算着该问些什么才好。他知道我要来吗？还认得我吗？还能看得见吗？能下床吗？周围全是晒太阳的年轻人，有的在海滩上奔跑，有的在吃冰淇淋。电话咔嚓一声响，我又投了一枚硬币进去。“
foreignization: 我听出了她声音中的微微颤抖。和前不久留在我跨洋电话答录机里的信息一样。“事情正在瓦解，”她说，“如果你要来，就快点。”我在脑海中努力构思一个得体的问题。他知道我要来吗？他会认出我吗？他还能看见吗？能下床吗？周围都是晒太阳的年轻人，他们在海滩上奔跑，吃着冰淇淋。电话咔哒一声，我又投了一枚硬币。“

source: Yes , people ... IT IS DANGEROUS ! I get it ... if I could not get into my home I , too , would be furious ! You should be taking this up with your Mayor , etc . Christie is only going by what THEY are relaying to him . It , in my opinion , is your local officials . I just returned from a " get-together " with a bunch of people dislocated from the barrier island and not once did I hear " me or I " ... it was " how are your and your family doing " . Not all barrier Island people are ready to start a war and mad at the Gov , they just want answers from their local officials ! Storm the bridge if you must ... its your right . God Bless you all in this time of trial and tribulation .
domestication: 行，各位听我说……这事儿确实危险！我懂，如果连家都进不去，谁不生气啊！但这事儿得找你们市长解决才对。克里斯蒂也是按照上面的指示办事，依我看，关键还在你们地方官员身上。我刚参加了一个从海边岛搬出来的朋友们聚会，全程没听到有人抱怨自己，都是在问“你和你家人还好吗？”不是所有岛上的人都是想跟政府对着干，他们只是想从地方官员那儿得到个说法！要是实在不行，非得去桥上抗议，那也随你们，这是你们的权利。在这艰难时刻，愿上帝保佑大家。
foreignization:
好的，以下是原文的中文翻译：

是的，人们……这确实很危险！我理解……如果我不能进入我的家，我也会非常愤怒！你应该向你们的市长等人提出这个问题。克里斯蒂只是按照他们传达给他的信息行事。在我看来，是你们的地方官员。我刚刚从一个与一群从屏障岛疏散的人举行的“聚会”回来，在整个过程中我一次也没有听到“我”或“我的”……而是“你和你的家人怎么样了”。并不是所有屏障岛上的人们都准备开战并对政府感到愤怒，他们只是想从地方官员那里得到答案！如果你必须冲击大桥……那是你的权利。愿上帝在这艰难困苦的时刻保佑你们所有人。

source: He moved from end to end of his voluptuous bedroom, looking again at the scraps of the day’s journey that came unbidden into his mind; the slow toil up the hill at sunset, the setting sun, the descent, the mill, the prison on the crag, the little village in the hollow, the peasants at the fountain, and the mender of roads with his blue cap pointing out the chain under the carriage. That fountain suggested the Paris fountain, the little bundle lying on the step, the women bending over it, and the tall man with his arms up, crying, “Dead!”
domestication: 他从这头走到那头，在豪华的卧室里来回踱步，脑海中不由自主地浮现出今日旅途中的片片段段：夕阳下的缓慢攀爬，落日余晖，下山的路，磨坊，峭壁上的监狱，山谷里的小村庄，水泉边的农民，还有那个戴蓝帽子的修路人，指着车下的锁链。那口泉水让他想起了巴黎的喷泉，石阶上躺着的小包裹，弯腰查看的女人，还有那个高个子男人，双臂高举，喊着：“死了！”

source: “Only one thing more,” said Mr. Lorry, laying stress upon it as a wholesome means of enforcing her attention: “he has been found under another name; his own, long forgotten or long concealed. It would be worse than useless now to inquire which; worse than useless to seek to know whether he has been for years overlooked, or always designedly held prisoner. It would be worse than useless now to make any inquiries, because it would be dangerous. Better not to mention the subject, anywhere or in any way, and to remove him—for a while at all events—out of France. Even I, safe as an Englishman, and even Tellson’s, important as they are to French credit, avoid all naming of the matter. I carry about me, not a scrap of writing openly referring to it. This is a secret service altogether. My credentials, entries, and memoranda, are all comprehended in the one line, ‘Recalled to Life;’ which may mean anything. But what is the matter! She doesn’t notice a word! Miss Manette!”
domestication: “只有一件事，”洛里先生说，他强调这一点是为了引起她的注意，“他被发现时用的名字与真名不同，他的真名早已被遗忘或隐瞒了。现在去查究到底是哪个名字已经没有意义了，也不用去打听他这些年来是否被忽视还是故意被关押。现在任何调查都没有意义，因为这会很危险。最好不要在任何地方、以任何方式提及此事，而应该暂时将他带离法国。就连我这样安全的英国人，以及对法国信贷至关重要的泰尔森公司，也避免提及这件事。我身边没有任何公开提及此事的文件。这是一项完全保密的任务。我的证件、记录和笔记全部都包含在一句话中——‘被召回生命’，这可能意味着任何事情。但是怎么回事？她好像没有听到我的话！曼妮特小姐！”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“Only one thing more,” said Mr. Lorry, laying stress upon it as a wholesome means of enforcing her attention: “he has been found under another name; his own, long forgotten or long concealed. It would be worse than useless now to inquire which; worse than useless to seek to know whether he has been for years overlooked, or always designedly held prisoner. It would be worse than useless now to make any inquiries, because it would be dangerous. Better not to mention the subject, anywhere or in any way, and to remove him—for a while at all events—out of France. Even I, safe as an Englishman, and even Tellson’s, important as they are to French credit, avoid all naming of the matter. I carry about me, not a scrap of writing openly referring to it. This is a secret service altogether. My credentials, entries, and memoranda, are all comprehended in the one line, ‘Recalled to Life;’ which may mean anything. But what is the matter! She doesn’t notice a word! Miss Manette!”

“只有一件事，”洛里先生说，他强调这一点是为了引起她的注意，“他被发现时用的名字与真名不同，他的真名早已被遗忘或隐瞒了。现在去查究到底是哪个名字已经没有意义了，也不用去打听他这些年来是否被忽视还是故意被关押。现在任何调查都没有意义，因为这会很危险。最好不要在任何地方、以任何方式提及此事，而应该暂时将他带离法国。就连我这样安全的英国人，以及对法国信贷至关重要的泰尔森公司，也避免提及这件事。我身边没有任何公开提及此事的文件。这是一项完全保密的任务。我的证件、记录和笔记全部都包含在一句话中——‘被召回生命’，这可能意味着任何事情。但是怎么回事？她好像没有听到我的话！曼妮特小姐！”

source: Mr. Huq became the host of a variety show , and literally stumbled into some luck when he opened a door too quickly and hit a stranger who turned out to be Noorul Quader . Mr. Quader was a civil servant who had just negotiated agreements that allowed desperately poor Bangladesh to start exporting garments without facing any serious quotas .

source: And here 's the Storify recap of Gov . Cuomo 's news conference at his NYC offices just now . The governor is asking for a $30 billion supplemental appropriate from the federal government to cover the costs of dealing with Sandy , arguing that the storm 's impacts go far beyond just rebuilding . Cuomo announced the launch of a new 24/7 hotline , staffed by actual humans , to field questions about insurance issues : 800-339-1759 . He also renewed his vow to investigate and possibly totally overhaul the way public utilities work in the wake of their failures , he said , to both perform and communicate effectively during and after the disaster .
domestication: 这是科莫州长刚刚在纽约市办公室新闻发布会上的Storify回顾。州长要求联邦政府追加300亿美元拨款，用于应对桑迪飓风的影响，他认为飓风的影响远不止重建那么简单。科莫宣布开通一条新的24小时热线，由真人接听，专门解答保险问题，电话是800-339-1759。他还重申了调查并可能彻底改革公共事业机构的决心，因为这些机构在灾难期间及之后的表现和沟通都出现了严重问题。
foreignization: 以下是科莫州长刚刚在纽约市办公室举行的新闻发布会的Storify回顾。州长要求联邦政府提供300亿美元的额外拨款，以应对桑迪飓风带来的影响，他认为飓风的影响远远超出了重建的范围。科莫宣布启动一个新的24/7热线，由真人接听，解答有关保险问题：800-339-1759。他还重申了调查并可能彻底改革公共事业公司运营方式的承诺，他说，这些公司在灾难期间及之后的表现和沟通都存在严重不足。

source: “Partly through paying me to help you, I suppose. But it’s not worth your while to apostrophise me, or the air, about it; what you want to do, you do. You were always in the front rank, and I was always behind.”

source: Collect great running quotes . You can start anywhere , from the Bible to The Iliad and the The Odyssey to Mark Will-Weber 's classic book The Quotable Runner . I once asked Mark to pick the greatest running quote . He chose : " Bid me run , and I will strive with things impossible , " from Shakespeare , Julius Caesar .
domestication: 收集精彩的跑步名言。你可以从任何地方开始，从《圣经》到《伊利亚特》和《奥德赛》，再到马克·威尔-韦伯的经典著作《跑者的名言录》。我曾经问过马克，让他挑选最伟大的跑步名言。他选了莎士比亚《凯撒大帝》中的一句：“让我跑吧，我会与不可能的事物一决高下。”

source: Our new home sits in a clearing that we carved from the thick jungle on this beautiful 300-acre river flat . The Ningunsaw River , a tributary of the Iskut , flows east to west through the center of our valley , and the giant spruce , balsam , and cottonwoods there can make us feel as small as gnomes at times . In season , even the stinging nettles , cow parsnips , and ferns tower over our heads . On one side of the valley , a peak we simply call South Mountain rises to an altitude of 6,000 feet , and Rocky Mountain goats live on its high ridges .
domestication: 我们的新家坐落在一片美丽的300英亩河滨平原上，我们从茂密的丛林中清理出了一片空地。宁恩桑河（Ningunsaw River）是伊斯库特河（Iskut River）的一条支流，它从东向西贯穿我们山谷的中心，而那里的高大的云杉、香柏和杨树有时会让我们感觉自己像侏儒一样渺小。到了季节，甚至是荨麻、牛蒡和蕨类植物也会高过我们的头顶。在山谷的一侧，有一座我们简单称之为南山（South Mountain）的山峰，它的海拔高达6000英尺，山脊上居住着岩羊。整个景色让人感到大自然的威严和神奇，充满了生命力和生机。
foreignization: 我们的新家坐落在我们从这片美丽的300英亩河滨平原上茂密的丛林中开辟出的空地上。宁根索河（Ningunsaw River），伊斯库特河（Iskut River）的一条支流，从东向西流经我们的山谷中心，而那里巨大的云杉、香柏和黑杨树有时会让我们感觉自己像侏儒一样渺小。在季节内，甚至荨麻、牛萝卜和蕨类植物也能高过我们的头顶。山谷的一侧，有一座我们简称为南山（South Mountain）的山峰，海拔高达6000英尺，洛矶山羊（Rocky Mountain goats）生活在它的高耸的山脊上。

source: “I think if you give me a full and unlimited commission to bully Giles, and that little boy, Brittles, I can manage it. Giles is a faithful fellow and an old servant, I know; but you can make it up to him in a thousand ways, and reward him for being such a good shot besides. You don’t object to that?”
domestication: 我觉得只要你让我全权对付吉尔斯和那个小毛头布里特尔斯，我就能搞定。我知道吉尔斯是个忠心耿耿的老仆人，但你可以用各种方式补偿他，还能因为他枪法好再额外奖励他。你没意见吧？
foreignization: 我认为如果你给我充分且无限制的授权去欺负吉尔斯和那个小男孩布里特尔，我就能办到。吉尔斯是一个忠诚的人，也是个老仆人，我知道；但你可以用千百种方式补偿他，并且因为他射箭技术高超而奖励他。你不会反对这一点吧？

messages_domestication.content:

Giles is a faithful fellow and an old servant, I know; but you can make it up to him in a thousand ways, and reward him for being such a good shot besides. You don’t object to that?”
我认为如果你给我充分且无限制的授权去欺负吉尔斯和那个小男孩布里特尔，我就能办到。吉尔斯是一个忠诚的人，也是个老仆人，我知道；但你可以用千百种方式补偿他，并且因为他射箭技术高超而奖励他。你不会反对这一点吧？

source: Mr. Lorry was so exceedingly disconcerted by a question so hard to answer, that he could only look on, at a distance, with much feebler sympathy and humility, while the strong woman, having banished the inn servants under the mysterious penalty of “letting them know” something not mentioned if they stayed there, staring, recovered her charge by a regular series of gradations, and coaxed her to lay her drooping head upon her shoulder.
domestication: 洛瑞先生被这个问题难住了，脸上显得很窘迫，只能在一旁远远地看着，眼神中满是同情和谦卑。而那个壮实的女人则驱逐了聚集过来的客栈服务员，警告他们如果再逗留就“让他们知道厉害”，然后，她通过一系列缓和的动作，让年轻的女子慢慢恢复了过来，并说服她把头靠在自己的肩膀上。
foreignization: 洛里先生被如此难以回答的问题弄得非常狼狈，以至于他只能在远处以极其微弱的同情和谦卑注视着，而那位强壮的女人，在把客店的仆人驱逐掉后——如果他们再呆在那里，盯着看不走，她就要让他们知道一些没有提到的事情——她按照一定的程序让她的托付之人恢复了过来，并哄劝她把头靠在她的肩膀上。

source: He stared at the readings . They were heading off into a section of the belt where a lot of the minor bodies had n't ever been properly charted , so he was setting up scans to add the data into his own charts . He double-checked the firewalls to make sure none of it leaked over into common memory .
domestication: 他盯着那些读数，看来他们正在进入小行星带的一个区域，那里有很多小天体还没有被详细绘制地图，所以他正在设置扫描，以便将这些数据添加到自己的地图中。他再次检查了防火墙，确保这些数据不会泄露到公共内存中。这就像是在未知的荒野中探索，他得小心翼翼地记录下每一个细节，以免迷失方向。

source: The bath water is running and steaming and Wallace is telling me they 're all entombed in ice . He 's speaking of the great artic explorers : Scott and Amundsen and Shackleton and that lot . He 's wrong , I believe , but I let him continue on , telling me how we should all be left undecaying within our roles . Painters preserved in acrylic . Architects walled-up in their buildings . Wallace is -- was -- a chef . I ask if he 'd like to be baked into a pie .
domestication: 浴缸里的水哗哗地流着，热气腾腾，华莱士却跟我讲他们都被冰封在冰里了。他讲的是那些伟大的北极探险家：斯科特、阿蒙森、沙克尔顿那帮人。我觉得他说得不对，但还是让他继续说下去。他告诉我，我们应该在各自的角色中保持不朽。画家被凝固在颜料里，建筑师被封在自己的建筑里。华莱士曾是个厨师，我问他愿不愿意被烤进派里。
foreignization: 洗澡水正在流淌并冒着热气，沃利斯告诉我他们都冰封在冰中。他谈到伟大的北极探险家：斯科特、阿蒙森、沙克尔顿和那群人。我认为他是错的，但我让他继续说下去，告诉我我们所有人都应该在我们的角色中不腐烂。画家被保存在丙烯酸颜料中。建筑师被砌进他们的建筑物中。沃利斯是——曾经是——一名厨师。我问他是否愿意被烤进一个馅饼里。

source: Zhu 's fish farm , in a village on the lower reaches of the Yangtze River , sends about 2.7 million catfish fillets each year to the United States through an importer in Virginia . Despite his best efforts -- he has dozens of employees clearing trash from the water each day , and the fish are fed sacks of fish meal more expensive than rice -- Zhu 's fish sometimes get sick . Then he brings out the drugs .
domestication: 朱先生的鱼塘位于长江下游的一个村庄，每年通过一家位于弗吉尼亚州的进口商，将大约270万片鲶鱼片运往美国。尽管他竭尽全力——每天有几十名员工从水中清理垃圾，而且喂鱼的鱼粉比米饭还贵——但是他的鱼还是会生病。然后，他就拿出药来了。毕竟，药是万能的嘛，没办法，为了保住鱼，只能靠药物了。
foreignization: 朱的鱼场位于长江下游的一个村庄，每年通过一家在弗吉尼亚州的进口商向美国出口大约270万片鲶鱼片。尽管他尽了最大的努力 -- 他有数十名雇员每天从水中清除垃圾，鱼吃的鱼粉比大米还贵 -- 朱的鱼有时还是会生病。这时他就会拿出药物。

source: With many adieus and good wishes, Mr. Fagin went his way. Noah Claypole, bespeaking his good lady’s attention, proceeded to enlighten her relative to the arrangement he had made, with all that haughtiness and air of superiority, becoming, not only a member of the sterner sex, but a gentleman who appreciated the dignity of a special appointment on the kinchin lay, in London and its vicinity.
domestication: 费金先生辞别众人，带着许多祝福上路了。诺亚·克莱波勒则摆出一副高高在上的架势，仿佛不仅是个男人，更是个懂得伦敦及其周边地区“小偷行业”特别任命之尊严的绅士，他向自己的好太太详细解释了所做的一切安排。
foreignization: 带着许多告别和美好的祝愿，费金先生走上了他的路。诺亚·克萊普尔请求他善良的夫人的注意，接着以一种不仅符合男性成员，而且符合一位认识到在伦敦及其周边地区担任儿童盗窃培训特别职务的尊严的绅士所应有的傲慢和优越感，向她阐明了他所作出的安排。

source: The deepened marks in the nose, and the lengthening of the fine straight lines in the cruel face, looked ominous as to that; the uncle made a graceful gesture of protest, which was so clearly a slight form of good breeding that it was not reassuring.
domestication: 他鼻子上的皱纹加深了，脸上那几条原本笔直的细线变得更加突出了，给人的感觉很不吉利。他叔叔做了个优雅的反对的手势，但这种微妙的好脾气反而让人感到不安，因为它实在太过做作。他的举止虽然彬彬有礼，但那种矫揉造作的态度更让人感到他心底的险恶用心。
foreignization: 鼻子上的痕迹加深，残忍的脸上那些笔直的细线拉长，这些看起来都很不吉利；舅舅做了一个优雅的抗议手势，这种姿态是良好教养的一种微妙形式，却没有让人感到安心。

source: On April 25 , 1991 , Belarus reluctantly declared its independence from the Soviet Union . Even after breaking away from the USSR , Belarus maintained diplomatic relations with Russia . The new Democratic Republic of Belarus created its own constitution and was quickly overcome by an almost dictatorial rule .
domestication: 1991年4月25日，比白俄罗斯不情愿地从苏联独立了出来。即使脱离了苏联，比白俄罗斯仍然与俄罗斯保持着外交关系。新的白俄罗斯民主共和国制定了自己的宪法，但很快就被几乎是独裁的统治所控制住了。
foreignization: 1991 年 4 月 25 日，白俄罗斯不情愿地从苏联宣布独立。即使在与苏联分离后，白俄罗斯仍然与俄罗斯保持着外交关系。新的白俄罗斯民主共和国制定了自己的宪法，并迅速被几乎是独裁的统治所取代。

source: Go back to the exercise and you 'll see how you , like the psalmist , can draw hope in times of suffering and trial by remembering all that God has done in the past . The same God who was present in the latter days , helping deliver you through difficult times and circumstances , is with you in the present and will continue to be with you in the future .
domestication: 回去看看那段经文吧，你就会发现，就像圣歌的作者一样，你可以从回忆过去上帝所做的一切中找到安慰。在艰难和试炼中，你不也曾被上帝所保守和带领过吗？同样在现在和未来，上帝也会一直与你同在。
foreignization: 回到练习中，你就会看到你如何像圣经诗人一样，在受苦和试炼的时期，通过回忆上帝过去所做的一切而得到希望。过去在后来那些日子里与你同在，帮助你度过艰难时期和情况的上帝，与你现在同在，也将在未来继续与你同在。

source: It 's been a while since I 've done something for the first time -- i.e. in my monthly goals I have a goal of finding a new interest . It 's something that obviously has to come naturally to my mind , not planned . Now that I 'm almost 100% recuperated from doing the test for both history courses , I can learn how to use Illustrator , MS Windows Movie Maker , and writing fiction .
domestication: 好久没尝试新东西了，我每个月的目标里都有一个找新兴趣的计划。这得是自然而然冒出来的想法，不能硬来。现在历史课考试终于彻底结束了，我可以学学怎么用Illustrator，还有Windows电影制作软件，当然还得写点小说。
foreignization: 已经有一段时间没有做第一次做的事情了——也就是说，在我的月度目标中有一个目标是找到一个新的兴趣。这显然必须自然而然地出现在我的脑海中，而不是计划好的。现在我几乎100%从历史课程的考试中恢复过来了，我可以学习如何使用Illustrator、MS Windows Movie Maker和写小说。

messages_domestication.content:

source: As children mill about near the cloakroom waiting for the hour of their class , the first hurdle looms : partnering . Who will ask you to walk in with him ? Jack Hutchinson , who bounces in the polka ? Chubby Tuttle , who hops but is a good kid ? Jerry Post , whose hands sweat through his gloves ? Pee Wee Johnson , whose head scrapes your nose ? Or , unasked this week , will you have to find a partner among the other stranded girls , preserve face , and walk in smiling ?
domestication: 孩子们在衣帽间附近来回走动，等着上课的时间，第一个难关来了：找舞伴。谁会邀请你一起进去呢？是跳波尔卡舞步轻盈的杰克·哈钦森？还是动作笨拙但心地善良的胖墩儿塔特尔？抑或是手心出汗能把手套都湿透的杰里·波斯特？再或者是头一抬就能蹭到你鼻子的小个子约翰逊？或者这周没人邀请你，你得自己在那些落单的女孩中找个舞伴，顾全颜面，笑着走进去？
foreignization: 当孩子们在衣帽间附近徘徊等待上课的时间时，第一个难关出现了：找搭档。谁会邀请你和他一起进去呢？是跳波尔卡的杰克·哈钦森？是虽然胖但人不错的查比·塔特尔？是手心出汗穿透手套的杰里·波斯特？还是头会擦到你鼻子的皮·维·约翰逊？或者，这周没人邀请你，你将不得不在其他落单的女孩中找一个搭档，保持面子，微笑着走进去？

source: California has been regulating automobile emissions since before the federal government started ; they continue to have the power to set different standards , as long as their standards are more stringent . Recently , a number of states have begun to consider whether to adopt the more stringent-and expensive-California standards . Doing so would not be in the public interest for two reasons .
domestication: 加州在联邦政府开始监管汽车排放之前就着手管这事了；只要他们的标准更严格，他们就有权设定不同的标准。最近，一些州开始考虑是否要采纳更为严格且成本更高的加州标准。这么做对公众利益不利，原因有二。
foreignization: 加利福尼亚州从联邦政府开始监管汽车排放之前就已经开始这样做；他们继续拥有设定不同标准的权力，只要他们的标准更为严格。最近，一些州开始考虑是否采用更为严格且昂贵的加利福尼亚标准。这样做基于两个原因不符合公共利益。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

California has been regulating automobile emissions since before the federal government started ; they continue to have the power to set different standards , as long as their standards are more stringent . source: He bypassed a bunch of lobsters and a small pup . He was out about sixty meters now already , but getting into the thick of them . The third one he drilled , he started the hole too low on the ridge and punctured the shell - he could tell when it pushed through without showing on the other side . He knew what was coming and flinched as he jerked the drill back .
domestication: 他闪开一堆龙虾和一只小狗。现在他已经走了大约六十米远，但即将进入热闹的场地。第三个钻孔，他在脊柱上方的位置太低，结果穿透了壳——当它没有从另一侧穿出来时，他就知道发生了什么。他知道接下来会发生什么，于是身体一抖，当他把钻头拉回来时，不禁缩了一下。
foreignization: 他绕过一堆龙虾和一只小狗。他现在已经走了大约六十米，但即将进入人群中。第三个钻孔时，他在脊柱上方的位置太低，刺穿了壳——他知道当它穿过后没有出现在另一边时就刺穿了。他知道接下来会发生什么，于是当他猛地拉回钻头时，他畏缩了。

source: It was almost too much happiness to bear. Oliver felt stunned and stupefied by the unexpected intelligence; he could not weep, or speak, or rest. He had scarcely the power of understanding anything that had passed, until, after a long ramble in the quiet evening air, a burst of tears came to his relief, and he seemed to awaken, all at once, to a full sense of the joyful change that had occurred, and the almost insupportable load of anguish which had been taken from his breast.
domestication: 这份喜悦几乎让人难以承受。奥利弗感到无比震惊和茫然，他根本无法哭泣、说话或休息。他几乎没办法理解发生了什么，直到在宁静的傍晚空气中漫步了一段时间后，一阵眼泪突然涌出，让他感到如释重负，好像一下子就从梦中醒来，充分感受到发生的快乐变化，以及刚刚从他的心中解除的几乎令人难以忍受的痛苦。
foreignization: 那是几乎难以承受的幸福。奥利弗被这意外的消息震惊和麻痹了；他无法哭泣，或说话，或休息。他几乎没有能力去理解任何已经发生的事情，直到，在宁静的傍晚空气中漫步很长时间后，一阵泪水来到了他的解脱，他似乎一下子醒来了，所有的一切都充满了对刚刚发生的欢乐变化的认识，以及从他的胸口移走的几乎无法忍受的痛苦的重担。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

He had scarcely the power of understanding anything that had passed, until, after a long ramble in the quiet evening air, a burst of tears came to his relief, and he seemed to awaken, all at once, to a full sense of the joyful change that had occurred, and the almost insupportable load of anguish which had been taken from his breast.

source: The study involved 209 people between the years of 2008 and 2010 , who were admitted into an area hospital due to COPD or asthma . Most of the patients were 54 to 74 , although some participants were as young as 18 . Many patients were former smokers ; all had an increased risk of breathing problems if air pollution was high .
domestication: 这项研究在2008年到2010年间，针对209位因慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）或哮喘而入院的一群人进行。这些患者大多数年龄在54岁到74岁之间，虽然有一些参与者年仅18岁。许多患者以前都是吸烟者；他们都有一个共同点：如果空气污染严重，他们的呼吸系统都会面临更大的风险。
foreignization: 这项研究在 2008 年至 2010 年间，涉及了 209 人，他们因 COPD 或哮喘而被送入某地医院。 大多数患者年龄在 54 至 74 岁之间，虽然有些参与者年仅 18 岁。 许多患者都是前吸烟者； 所有人如果空气污染严重，都有呼吸问题的风险增加。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The study involved 209 people between the years of 2008 and 2010 , who were admitted into an area hospital due to COPD or asthma . Most of the patients were 54 to 74 , although some participants were as young as 18 . Many patients were former smokers ; all had an increased risk of breathing problems if air pollution was high .

这项研究在 2008 年至 2010 年间，涉及了 209 人，他们因 COPD 或哮喘而被送入某地医院。 大多数患者年龄在 54 至 74 岁之间，虽然有些参与者年仅 18 岁。 许多患者都是前吸烟者； 所有人如果空气污染严重，都有呼吸问题的风险增加。

source: - Since you 're reading the books , did you know that Eva Gabrielsson ( Stieg Larsson 's significant other and unofficial collaborator on the novels ) disapproves of the extant English translations ? She says the English versions are " too toned-down " , that they 've been sort of cleaned up for the GB-US reading public . So if a new , " hotter " translation comes along in a year or so , will you be reading that ?
domestication: 既然你在读这些书，你知道吗？斯蒂格·拉尔森的伴侣和小说的非官方合作者埃娃·加布里埃尔森（Eva Gabrielsson）并不认可现有的英文译本。她说英文版“太淡化了”，为了迎合英美读者的口味而过度“净化”了内容。所以，如果一年左右的时间内出现新的、更“劲爆”的译本，你会去读吗？
foreignization: - 由于你正在阅读这些书，所以你知道Eva Gabrielsson（Stieg Larsson的重要他人以及小说的非官方合作者）不赞同现有的英文译本吗？她说英文版本“太淡化了”，它们被某种程度上清理干净给GB-US的读者群体。所以如果一年或更长时间内出现一个新的，“更热辣”的译本，你会去读它吗？

source: I hereby pledge to keep my bathroom pink ! We 're proud to own a lovingly maintained and not-too-altered custom 1957 MCM ranch in Everett , WA . Two-tone green tile main bath and grey/charcoal master . Repainting the master walls back to original pink as we speak ! The porcelain is all the original grey stuff . Tore out an ugly 70 ? s shower enclosure that was installed over the original grey step-in corner shower and added a 90 degree chrome rod and curtain . Mahogany trim survived without being painted over YAY !
domestication: 我保证要把浴室保持成粉色！我们自豪地拥有一栋位于华盛顿州埃弗里特市的1957年定制现代牧场风格房屋，这房子维护得很好，改动也不多。主浴室是双色绿瓷砖，主人套房的浴室则是灰色和炭黑色的。现在正在把主人套房的墙面重新漆回原来的粉色！所有的洁具都是原装的灰色。我们拆掉了一个难看的70年代淋浴房，那是在原始的灰色步入式转角淋浴间上安装的，换成了一根90度的镀铬杆和窗帘。幸好，红木装饰条没有被涂漆覆盖，真是太好了！

source: I waited for the one that said Eden Park . No doubt there were others still running then , probably even others that paused at that same island , usually quite abandoned on Saturday mornings , but I knew which one I waited for , knew its noises and smells and the rows of rattan seats where , though I generally had the pick of the place , I always gravitated to the same one at the very back . And I knew the main roads and apartment-lined city streets I still had to put up with , too .
domestication: 我等着那辆开往伊甸公园的车。虽然当时肯定还有其他车在路上跑，可能也有几辆在同一个站点停留，但周六早上这个站点通常空荡荡的，我知道自己等的是哪一辆，熟悉它的声音和气味，还有那些藤编座椅，尽管我通常可以随意挑选座位，但总是不自觉地坐到最后排的那个。我也知道接下来还得忍受那些主干道和两旁密布公寓的城市街道。
foreignization: 我等待的是那个说伊甸公园的。毫无疑问，当时还有其他人仍在奔跑，可能甚至有其他人也在那个通常在周六早上相当荒凉的小岛上停留，但我知道自己在等哪一个，知道它的声音和气味，以及那些藤制座位排，尽管我通常可以随意挑选地方，但我总是被吸引到最后面的那个座位。我也知道我还得忍受的主要道路和公寓林立的城市街道。

source: This dialogue had taken place at Mr. Lorry’s usual desk, with Monseigneur swarming within a yard or two of it, boastful of what he would do to avenge himself on the rascal-people before long. It was too much the way of Monseigneur under his reverses as a refugee, and it was much too much the way of native British orthodoxy, to talk of this terrible Revolution as if it were the only harvest ever known under the skies that had not been sown—as if nothing had ever been done, or omitted to be done, that had led to it—as if observers of the wretched millions in France, and of the misused and perverted resources that should have made them prosperous, had not seen it inevitably coming, years before, and had not in plain words recorded what they saw. Such vapouring, combined with the extravagant plots of Monseigneur for the restoration of a state of things that had utterly exhausted itself, and worn out Heaven and earth as well as itself, was hard to be endured without some remonstrance by any sane man who knew the truth. And it was such vapouring all about his ears, like a troublesome confusion of blood in his own head, added to a latent uneasiness in his mind, which had already made Charles Darnay restless, and which still kept him so.
domestication: 这场对话发生在老洛里先生的办公桌旁，而蒙塞尼尔大人则在一旁嚣张地夸口，说他不久后定要如何报复那帮贱民。流亡中的蒙塞尼尔大人失势后的这副嘴脸，英国本土那些正统人士也是一样，总爱把这场可怕的革命说得好像天上掉下来的一样，仿佛它无端发生，又似乎没有任何作为或不作为导致了它的爆发——就好比有人早年就看出了法国数百万贫苦大众的悲惨境遇和被滥用、扭曲的资源本应让他们繁荣昌盛，并且早已直截了当地记录下所见所闻，预言这一切终将到来。这种胡言乱语，再加上蒙塞尼尔大人那些荒谬绝伦的复辟计划，对于任何了解真相的理智之人来说，实在是难以忍受。这种声音像脑中的混乱血流一样，让查尔斯·达内心神不宁，原本就有些焦虑不安的他，现在更是坐立难安。
foreignization: 这段对话是在洛里先生的惯常办公桌前进行的，与此同时，一位贵族在距此一两码的地方嗡嗡作响，夸耀他不久将如何报复这些流氓百姓。流亡中的贵族在遭受挫折时，以及英国本土正统派，在谈到这场可怕的革命时，总是太过倾向于将其描述为唯一未曾播种便收获的果实——仿佛从未有过任何行为或疏忽导致了它的发生——仿佛观察家们没有在多年前就预见到了法国数百万民众的悲惨境况和被滥用、扭曲的资源本应使他们繁荣起来的局面，并且没有用直白的语言记录下他们所看到的一切。这种空谈，加上贵族们为了恢复一种已经彻底耗尽自身并连同天地一起疲惫不堪的状态而制定的荒谬计划，对于任何了解真相的理智之人来说，都难以忍受而不提出抗议。这种围绕着他耳边的空谈，就像他自己头脑中令人烦恼的血液混乱一样，加上心中潜藏的不安，已经让查尔斯·达内坐立不安，并且仍然让他如此。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

This dialogue had taken place at Mr. Lorry’s usual desk, with Monseigneur swarming within a yard or two of it, boastful of what he would do to avenge himself on the rascal-people before long. It was too much the way of Monseigneur under his reverses as a refugee, and it was much too much the way of native British orthodoxy, to talk of this terrible Revolution as if it were the only harvest ever known under the skies that had not been sown—as if nothing had ever been done, or omitted to be done, that had led to it—as if observers of the wretched millions in France, and of the misused and perverted resources that should have made them prosperous, had not seen it inevitably coming, years before, and had not in plain words recorded what they saw. Such vapouring, combined with the extravagant plots of Monseigneur for the restoration of a state of things that had utterly exhausted itself, and worn out Heaven and earth as well as itself, was hard to be endured without some remonstrance by any sane man who knew the truth. And it was such vapouring all about his ears, like a troublesome confusion of blood in his own head, added to a latent uneasiness in his mind, which had already made Charles Darnay restless, and which still kept him so.

这场对话发生在老洛里先生的办公桌旁，而蒙塞尼尔大人则在一旁嚣张地夸口，说他不久后定要如何报复那帮贱民。流亡中的蒙塞尼尔大人失势后的这副嘴脸，英国本土那些正统人士也是一样，总爱把这场可怕的革命说得好像天上掉下来的一样，仿佛它无端发生，又似乎没有任何作为或不作为导致了它的爆发——就好比有人早年就看出了法国数百万贫苦大众的悲惨境遇和被滥用、扭曲的资源本应让他们繁荣昌盛，并且早已直截了当地记录下所见所闻，预言这一切终将到来。这种胡言乱语，再加上蒙塞尼尔大人那些荒谬绝伦的复辟计划，对于任何了解真相的理智之人来说，实在是难以忍受。这种声音像脑中的混乱血流一样，让查尔斯·达内心神不宁，原本就有些焦虑不安的他，现在更是坐立难安。

source: It was the best of times, it was the worst of times, it was the age of wisdom, it was the age of foolishness, it was the epoch of belief, it was the epoch of incredulity, it was the season of Light, it was the season of Darkness, it was the spring of hope, it was the winter of despair, we had everything before us, we had nothing before us, we were all going direct to Heaven, we were all going direct the other way—in short, the period was so far like the present period, that some of its noisiest authorities insisted on its being received, for good or for evil, in the superlative degree of comparison only.
domestication: 那是最好的时代，也是最坏的时代；是智慧的年代，也是愚昧的年代；是信仰的时期，也是怀疑的时期；是光明的季节，也是黑暗的季节；是充满希望的春天，也是绝望的冬天；我们面前什么都有，我们面前又一无所有；我们全都直奔天堂而去，我们又全都在朝相反的方向前进——简而言之，那个时代和现在如此相似，以至于当时那些最吵闹的权威人士坚持认为，对于那个时代的一切，要么好到极致，要么坏到极点。
foreignization: 那是最美好的时代，那是最糟糕的时代；那是智慧的年代，那是愚蠢的年代；那是信仰的时期，那是怀疑的时期；那是光明的季节，那是黑暗的季节；那是希望的春天，那是绝望的冬天；我们面前应有尽有，我们面前一无所有；我们大家都在直奔天堂，我们大家都在直奔相反的方向——简而言之，那个时期同现今非常相像，一些最吵吵嚷嚷的权威坚持要用最高级的形容词来赞美它或咒骂它。

source: In February op-ed , Bolton advocated launching a " decidedly disproportionate " " retaliatory cyber campaign " against Russia to teach Moscow that the cost of meddling in US elections will be , he said , " so high that they will simply consign all their cyberwarfare plans to their computer memories to gather electronic dust . "
domestication: 在二月份的一篇评论文章中，博尔顿主张对俄罗斯发起一场“明显不成比例的”报复性网络行动，目的就是让莫斯科明白，干涉美国大选的代价会高到让他们只能把这些网络战计划尘封在电脑里，任其蒙上电子灰尘。

source: Conflict always begins with some kind of desire . Some desires are inherently wrong , such as vengeance , lust , or greed . But many desires are not wrong in and of themselves . For example , there is nothing innately wrong about desiring things like peace and quiet , a clean home , a new computer , professional success , an intimate relationship with your spouse , or respectful children .
domestication: 矛盾往往始于某种欲望，世上有很多欲望本身就是不对的，比如报复心理、淫欲或者贪婪等。但也有很多欲望本身是没有错的，比如渴望安宁与静谧，拥有一个干净整洁的家，购买一台新电脑，取得职业上的成功，与自己的伴侣建立亲密的关系，或是让孩子尊重你等。这些欲望本身并无不对，问题在于我们是否能用对方法去实现它们。
foreignization: 冲突总是以某种欲望开始。有些欲望本身就是错误的，例如复仇、淫欲或贪婪。但很多欲望本身并不是错误的。例如，渴望和平与安静、干净的家、新的电脑、职业上的成功、与配偶亲密的关系或者孩子尊重你，这些本身并没有什么错。

source: “With a little persuasion,” thought Fagin, “what more likely than that she would consent to poison him? Women have done such things, and worse, to secure the same object before now. There would be the dangerous villain: the man I hate: gone; another secured in his place; and my influence over the girl, with a knowledge of this crime to back it, unlimited.”
domestication: 费金心想：“只要稍稍一劝，她岂不是很有可能答应下毒吗？女人为了达到同样的目的，以前干过这样的事，甚至更恶劣的事。这样一来，那个危险的恶棍，我恨之入骨的人，就没了；另一个取而代之；我在女孩心中的影响力，再加上这桩罪行的把柄，可就无人能敌了。”
foreignization: “只要稍微劝说一下，”费金想，“她答应毒死他不是再可能不过了吗？女人以前为了达到同样的目的，干过这样的事，甚至更糟的。那个危险的恶棍：我恨的人：就不见了；另一个人取而代之；而我对这女孩的影响力，有了这桩罪行作为后盾，将毫无限制。”

source: Lurking in the sacred groves and wild places of Gaul were the ancient Druids , who were said to have originated in the primeval forests of Britain across the turbulent waters of the channel . The Druids instructed the young in the secrets of religion , conducted public and private sacrifices , explained the law , and sentenced offenders . When Gallic nobles were ill or in danger in battle , they would resort to human sacrifice with the help of the Druids . Caesar 's armies conquered Gaul , but the power of the Druids with their mysterious gods and rituals was not easily suppressed .
domestication: 在高卢的神圣森林和荒野之地，潜伏着古代的德鲁伊祭司，他们据说起源于不列颠岛的原始森林，隔着波涛汹涌的海峡。这些德鲁伊教士向年轻人传授宗教秘密，主持公私祭祀，解释法律，并惩罚罪犯。当高卢贵族生病或在战场上遇险时，他们会借助德鲁伊教士进行人祭。凯撒的大军征服了高卢，但德鲁伊教士们依靠神秘的神灵和仪式所拥有的力量并不是那么容易被压制的。可以说，德鲁伊教士的影响力根深蒂固，牢牢地扎根于高卢人的心中，难以动摇。正如俗话所说，"斧头砍不断，芝麻仁大小的疑心结"，德鲁伊教士的力量就像这疑心结一样，不容易被完全消除。尽管凯撒的军队取得了胜利，但德鲁伊教士的影响力仍然潜移默化地存在，等待着东山再起的机会。
foreignization: 在高卢的神圣树林和荒野中，古老的德鲁伊教士潜伏着，他们据说起源于英格兰那边狂暴海峡对面的原始森林。德鲁伊教士向年轻人讲授宗教的秘密，进行公开和私人祭祀，解释法律，并判决罪犯。当高卢贵族在战斗中生病或处于危险之中时，他们会在德鲁伊教士的帮助下诉诸人祭。凯撒的军队征服了高卢，但德鲁伊教士凭借他们神秘的神灵和仪式的力量并没有被轻易镇压。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Lurking in the sacred groves and wild places of Gaul were the ancient Druids , who were said to have originated in the primeval forests of Britain across the turbulent waters of the channel . When Gallic nobles were ill or in danger in battle , they would resort to human sacrifice with the help of the Druids . Caesar 's armies conquered Gaul , but the power of the Druids with their mysterious gods and rituals was not easily suppressed .

在高卢的神圣树林和荒野中，古老的德鲁伊教士潜伏着，他们据说起源于英格兰那边狂暴海峡对面的原始森林。德鲁伊教士向年轻人讲授宗教的秘密，进行公开和私人祭祀，解释法律，并判决罪犯。当高卢贵族在战斗中生病或处于危险之中时，他们会在德鲁伊教士的帮助下诉诸人祭。凯撒的军队征服了高卢，但德鲁伊教士凭借他们神秘的神灵和仪式的力量并没有被轻易镇压。

source: WHEN THE BEGUILING , YOUNG GINEVRA DE ' BENCI APPEARED BEFORE HIM IN ALL her aristocratic finery in her family 's Florentine palazzo circa 1475 , Bernardo Bembo , the Venetian ambassador to Florence , was instantly smitten . Though Ginevra was recently wed , and Bembo more than twice her age and also married , he launched a determined campaign to win her affection . He evidently succeeded , since Ginevra 's " crimson lips , " " snow-white brow " and , above all , her chastity were celebrated in nearly a dozen poems addressed to Bembo and Ginevra by writers in the Medici circle . One gentlemanly poet , Cristoforo Landino , wrote of them :
domestication: 大约在1475年，年轻迷人的吉内薇拉·德·本奇身着贵族华丽服饰出现在她佛罗伦萨家族宫殿里，威尼斯驻佛罗伦萨大使贝尔纳多·贝姆博一见钟情。尽管吉内薇拉刚结婚，而贝姆博年纪比她大了一倍多，也已婚，但他还是不遗余力地追求她的芳心。显然他成功了，因为吉内薇拉的“红唇”、“雪白的额头”，尤其是她的贞洁，在梅第奇圈子中近十位诗人为贝姆博和吉内薇拉所作的诗中被大加赞美。其中一位绅士诗人克里斯托弗罗·兰迪诺这样写道：

source: A report released by the House Select Committee on Children , Youth , and Families , chaired by Rep. Pat Schroeder of Colorado , which called the federal response to teen AIDS a " national disgrace " and which prompted the Honolulu newspaper headline , claimed that not only was there an explosion of new teenage cases but of infections as well . The committee cited two studies in the Journal of the American Medical Association . Yet one of these studies , that of military applicants , showed the opposite -- that infections among teenage applicants are few and declining -- and the other , of Job Corps applicants , merely showed that teenage HIV infections are disproportionately a problem of disadvantaged minorities .
domestication: 美国众议院儿童、青年和家庭特别委员会发布的一份报告称，政府对青少年艾滋病的反应是“国家的耻辱”。这一事件甚至登上了夏威夷报纸的头条。报告声称，不仅新发病例激增，感染病例也大幅增加。委员会引用了美国医学会杂志上的两项研究来支持其观点。但是，其中一项针对军队新兵的研究结果却恰恰相反——少数青少年新兵中感染病毒的比例很低且有下降趋势；而另一项针对就业培训项目参与者的研究发现，青少年中艾滋病毒感染主要集中在弱势群体中。
foreignization: 由科罗拉多州的帕特·施罗德议员主持的众议院儿童、青年和家庭特别委员会发布的一份报告，称联邦政府对青少年艾滋病的回应是一种“国家耻辱”，并引发了檀香山报纸的头条新闻，声称不仅新青少年病例激增，而且感染病例也在增加。该委员会引用了美国医学会杂志中的两项研究。然而，其中一项研究，即针对军事申请人的研究，显示相反的结果——青少年申请人中的感染病例很少且正在减少——而另一项研究，即针对就业团申请人的研究，只表明青少年HIV感染主要是弱势群体的问题。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

A report released by the House Select Committee on Children , Youth , and Families , chaired by Rep. Pat Schroeder of Colorado , which called the federal response to teen AIDS a " national disgrace " and which prompted the Honolulu newspaper headline , claimed that not only was there an explosion of new teenage cases but of infections as well . The committee cited two studies in the Journal of the American Medical Association . Yet one of these studies , that of military applicants , showed the opposite -- that infections among teenage applicants are few and declining -- and the other , of Job Corps applicants , merely showed that teenage HIV infections are disproportionately a problem of disadvantaged minorities .

美国众议院儿童、青年和家庭特别委员会发布的一份报告称，政府对青少年艾滋病的反应是“国家的耻辱”。这一事件甚至登上了夏威夷报纸的头条。报告声称，不仅新发病例激增，感染病例也大幅增加。委员会引用了美国医学会杂志上的两项研究来支持其观点。但是，其中一项针对军队新兵的研究结果却恰恰相反——少数青少年新兵中感染病毒的比例很低且有下降趋势；而另一项针对就业培训项目参与者的研究发现，青少年中艾滋病毒感染主要集中在弱势群体中。

source: Mr. Bumble was fairly taken by surprise, and fairly beaten. He had a decided propensity for bullying: derived no inconsiderable pleasure from the exercise of petty cruelty; and, consequently, was (it is needless to say) a coward. This is by no means a disparagement to his character; for many official personages, who are held in high respect and admiration, are the victims of similar infirmities. The remark is made, indeed, rather in his favour than otherwise, and with a view of impressing the reader with a just sense of his qualifications for office.
domestication: 班布尔先生被彻底打了个措手不及，也被狠狠地教训了一番。他有个爱好，就是喜欢欺负人：从施虐中获得极大的快感；因此，他也（不用说）是个胆小鬼。这并不是在贬低他的为人，因为很多受人尊敬和钦佩的官员，也都有类似的弱点。这里提到这一点，并不是要抹黑他，而是为了让读者清楚地了解他当官的资格到底有多么合适。换句话说，他这算是一个十足的“上行下效”型的人物——既喜欢欺软怕硬，又是个草包。
foreignization: 班布尔先生完全被打了个措手不及，也的确被打败了。他有明显的喜欢欺凌他人的倾向：从实施小规模的残忍行为中获得不少乐趣；因此，他（不需要说）是个懦夫。这绝不算是对他品格的贬低；因为很多备受尊敬和钦佩的官方人士都是类似的弱点的牺牲者。这番话其实是在替他辩护，而不是指责，并且是为了让读者对他的职务资格产生正确认识。

source: Gradually, he fell into that deep tranquil sleep which ease from recent suffering alone imparts; that calm and peaceful rest which it is pain to wake from. source: That 's so people such as John Codwell Jr . can forever be honored for their accomplishments . A senior on Wheatley 's 1950 PVIL state championship squad , Codwell knew success from an early age . He grew up under the careful eye of his father , John Codwell , who was a principal at Wheatley and the team 's first basketball coach . His dad made sure he had every opportunity available to him while living in the Houston area .

source: I waited for the one that said Eden Park . No doubt there were others still running then , probably even others that paused at that same island , usually quite abandoned on Saturday mornings , but I knew which one I waited for , knew its noises and smells and the rows of rattan seats where , though I generally had the pick of the place , I always gravitated to the same one at the very back . And I knew the main roads and apartment-lined city streets I still had to put up with , too .

source: " Our users are caring more and more about movies , and about showing them , " said Heather McCann , the MIT Urban Studies &; Planning librarian who has been helping Glenn secure movie rights . McCann pays between $250 and $450 for each movie . That price includes " Public Performance Rights , " or the right to show the film to groups within the university community if no admission fee is charged . McCann and Glenn went to buy " Play Time , " they stumbled upon Janus -- a movie distributor they had n't yet encountered -- and its full list of movies . " The list was awesome , " said McCann . She ended up buying more than one .
domestication: “我们的用户越来越关注电影，以及如何展现它们，” 麻省理工学院城市研究与规划图书管理员海瑟·麦肯说，她一直在帮助格伦获得电影版权。麦肯为每部电影支付在250美元至450美元之间的费用。这笔费用包括“公共放映权”，也就是在不收取入场费的情况下，有权向大学社区内的团体放映该片的权利。当麦肯和格伦去购买“玩乐时间”时，他们偶然发现了一家名叫雅努斯的电影发行商——这是他们以前从未遇到过的——以及他们的全部电影列表。“这个列表太棒了，”麦肯说。她最终买了不止一部。

source: The biggest challenge against them is their balance . It 's been well-documented , it 's been talked about how many guys they play , the system in which they play in . Kyle Korver obviously is huge for them , Jeff Teague and their versatile bigs . They 've got two Tristans on their team . Guys that can guard 1-5 , that can switch out , that guard on the perimeter and guard on the post . Those are valuable assets .
domestication: 他们最大的挑战其实是如何平衡阵容。众所周知，他们有很多球员需要轮换，以及复杂的战术体系。科尔弗毫无疑问是他们的一大助力，蒂格和那些多才多艺的大个子球员也是如此。他们队里有两名特里斯坦，可以防守1到5号位，能够随时切换位置，既能在外围防守，也能在内线防守。这样的球员实在是宝贵之极。

source: Stretched upon a mattress on the floor, lay Noah Claypole, fast asleep. Towards him the old man sometimes directed his eyes for an instant, and then brought them back again to the candle; which with a long-burnt wick drooping almost double, and hot grease falling down in clots upon the table, plainly showed that his thoughts were busy elsewhere.
domestication: 诺亚·克莱普尔躺在地板的床垫上，睡得正香。老人有时会瞥他一眼，随即又把目光收回到蜡烛上。那蜡烛芯烧得老长，已经垂了下来，蜡油也一滴一滴地落在桌上，这明显说明老人的心思早就不知道飞到哪里去了。

source: " The author has sought to paint for you a slice of life , " the " Pagliacci " Prologue sings . " His only maxim is that the artist is a person , and that he must write for people . " The authors of both these operas have done their job too well , in that both operas have a built-in emotional power that 's hard to spoil . But if their inspiration were to be found in " what is true , " they might then rise to a whole other kind of power . ' CAV/PAGS ' ON CD , AND OTHERS MISSED
domestication: 《丑角》序曲中唱道：“作者试图为你描绘生活的一幕。”他的唯一信条是艺术家也是人，他必须为人们而写。这两部歌剧的创作者们做得太好了，因为这两部歌剧都有难以磨灭的情感力量。但如果他们的灵感源自“真实”，那它们或许能达到另一种更高的境界。《卡瓦/丑角》的唱片，以及其他错过的精彩。

source: Hi Readers ! Just yesterday I was being interviewed by a reporter who admitted she had let her kids , ages 5 and 2 , wait in the car while she ran into UPS to drop off a package . This took all of a minute or two , but when she told her husband about it , he said , " That was so dangerous ! Promise me you 'll never do that again ! "
domestication: 大家好！昨天有个记者来采访我，她坦白说曾经让她的两个孩子，一个5岁一个2岁，在车里等着，自己则去UPS寄了个包裹。这事儿前后也就一两分钟，但当她跟丈夫提起时，丈夫却说：“那太危险了！你可得答应我，以后再也不能这么做了！”
foreignization: 嗨，读者们！就在昨天，我被一位记者采访，她承认让她5岁和2岁的孩子在车里等着，而她则跑进UPS寄送一个包裹。这整个过程只有一两分钟，但当她告诉丈夫这件事时，他说：“那太危险了！答应我你再也不要那样做了！”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Hi Readers ! Just yesterday I was being interviewed by a reporter who admitted she had let her kids , ages 5 and 2 , wait in the car while she ran into UPS to drop off a package . This took all of a minute or two , but when she told her husband about it , he said , " That was so dangerous ! Promise me you 'll never do that again ! "
大家好！昨天有个记者来采访我，她坦白说曾经让她的两个孩子，一个5岁一个2岁，在车里等着，自己则去UPS寄了个包裹。这事儿前后也就一两分钟，但当她跟丈夫提起时，丈夫却说：“那太危险了！你可得答应我，以后再也不能这么做了！”

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Hi Readers ! Just yesterday I was being interviewed by a reporter who admitted she had let her kids , ages 5 and 2 , wait in the car while she ran into UPS to drop off a package . This took all of a minute or two , but when she told her husband about it , he said , " That was so dangerous ! Promise me you 'll never do that again ! "
嗨，读者们！就在昨天，我被一位记者采访，她承认让她5岁和2岁的孩子在车里等着，而她则跑进UPS寄送一个包裹。这整个过程只有一两分钟，但当她告诉丈夫这件事时，他说：“那太危险了！答应我你再也不要那样做了！”

source: Palin 's strong support and energy is found in the same principles that force her to stay cemented in her convictions -- avoiding the game of D.C. politics and shenanigans . That kind of conviction is Reaganesque , it is Thatcheresque , and there is no Washington expert 's game that can out-live that kind of integrity .
domestication: 帕林的坚定支持和活力源自她坚持原则，不玩华盛顿的政治游戏和花招。这种信念像里根一样坚定，像撒切尔一样顽强，任何华盛顿专家的手段都无法胜过这样的正直。

source: Vercingetorix : Then I will send her to ask the Druid priests to cut mistletoe from the holy oak trees with their golden daggers on the sixth day of the moon . We will decorate our shields with this sacred plant to give us strength and courage in battle . She can not refuse to go on this important mission . ( turning to Carvillax ) Carvillax , bring me Bridiga so that I may tell her of my wishes and take my leave of her .
domestication: 韦辛格托里克斯：那我就派她去，请德鲁伊祭司们在月亮的第六天，用他们金色的匕首从圣橡树上割下槲寄生。我们用这神圣的植物装饰盾牌，好让它们在战斗中给我们力量和勇气。这么重要的任务，她肯定不会拒绝。（转向卡尔维拉克斯）卡尔维拉克斯，你去把布里迪加带来，我要告诉她我的心愿，还要跟她道个别。

source: Meanwhile , Jay 's old friend Lyor Cohen had become chairman and CEO of Warner Music Group 's U.S. Recorded Music , and he was doing the hard sell . He offered Jay a position overseeing all of Warner Music Group 's labels and a piece of WMG 's initial public offering . Several times . Jay was certain he was going to Warner . The day he went to his lawyer 's office to sign the Def Jam contract , he paced the room for five hours . He called Cohen , who grabbed Edgar Bronfman Jr. , the chairman and CEO of WMG , and raced over to the lawyer 's office , to no avail . The decision turned on the chance to own his masters .
domestication: 与此同时，杰伊的老朋友莱尔·科恩已经成为华纳音乐集团美国录音公司的董事长兼首席执行官，他正全力以赴地进行游说。他向杰伊提供了管理所有华纳音乐集团品牌以及华纳音乐集团首次公开募股股份的职位。多次，杰伊都确信自己将加入华纳。但在他去律师办公室签署Def Jam合同那天，他在房间里踱步五个小时。他打电话给科恩，科恩抓住华纳音乐集团董事长兼首席执行官埃德加·布朗夫曼（Edgar Bronfman Jr.），急忙赶到律师办公室，但还是没能成功说服杰伊。最终，杰伊决定留在Def Jam的原因，是他可以拥有自己的版权。
foreignization: 与此同时，杰的老朋友莱尔·科恩（Lyor Cohen）已经成为华纳音乐集团（Warner Music Group）美国录制音乐部门的董事长和CEO，他正在努力说服杰伊。 他为杰伊提供了一个职位，让他负责监督所有华纳音乐集团的厂牌，并获得WMG首次公开募股（IPO）的一部分股份。这件事发生了好几次，杰伊坚信自己将加入华纳。当他前往律师事务所签署Def Jam合同的那天，他在房间里踱步了五个小时。他打电话给科恩，科恩抓住了WMG的董事长和CEO埃德加·布朗夫曼（Edgar Bronfman Jr.），并急忙赶到律师事务所，但最终还是无济于事。最终决定的关键在于拥有自己的母带版权。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Meanwhile , Jay 's old friend Lyor Cohen had become chairman and CEO of Warner Music Group 's U.S. Recorded Music , and he was doing the hard sell . He offered Jay a position overseeing all of Warner Music Group 's labels and a piece of WMG 's initial public offering . Several times . Jay was certain he was going to Warner . The day he went to his lawyer 's office to sign the Def Jam contract , he paced the room for five hours . He called Cohen , who grabbed Edgar Bronfman Jr. , the chairman and CEO of WMG , and raced over to the lawyer 's office , to no avail . The decision turned on the chance to own his masters .

source: He stared at the readings . They were heading off into a section of the belt where a lot of the minor bodies had n't ever been properly charted , so he was setting up scans to add the data into his own charts . He double-checked the firewalls to make sure none of it leaked over into common memory .
domestication: 他盯着那些读数。他们正朝着小行星带中的一块区域前进，那里很多小天体从未被准确测绘过，所以他设置了一系列扫描，准备把这些数据补充到自己的星图上。他又检查了一遍防火墙，确保这些信息不会泄露到公共内存里。

source: This is one of the simplest managerial economics concepts known to man . Companies will hire more workers as they are needed to deliver goods/services demanded profitably . If he fires workers , then he loses sales ( and probably net income ) . If he raises the price of pizzas he loses sales ( and probably net income ) .
domestication: 这可是管理经济学里最简单的一个概念了。公司要是想盈利，就得根据需求雇更多的人来提供商品或服务。要是裁了员工，那就等于放弃了销售（还有可能减少净利润）。要是提高披萨的价格，销售也会下滑（净利润可能也会跟着减少）。
foreignization: 这是人们所知的最简单的管理经济学概念之一。公司会根据需要雇用更多工人以有利可图地提供所需的商品/服务。如果他解雇工人，那么他会失去销售（可能还有净利润）。如果他提高比萨的价格，他也会失去销售（可能还有净利润）。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

If he fires workers , then he loses sales ( and probably net income ) . If he raises the price of pizzas he loses sales ( and probably net income ) .

source: “Tell your governor that Blathers and Duff is here, will you?” said the stouter man, smoothing down his hair, and laying a pair of handcuffs on the table. “Oh! Good-evening, master. Can I have a word or two with you in private, if you please?”
domestication: 你去跟你们头儿说一声，布拉瑟和达夫来了。壮汉一边说着，一边顺了顺头发，还把一副手铐放在了桌子上。哦！晚上好，先生。方便的话，能跟我私下里说两句话吗？
foreignization: “去告诉你家主人，布劳瑟和达夫来了，好吗？”那个更壮实的男人说道，他理了理头发，然后把手铐放在桌子上。“哦！晚上好，少爷。如果您方便的话，我能和您私下说几句话吗？”

source: The band has perfected the art of the stealth groove ? that knack for quietly sliding into a composition and hooking everyone within earshot by mid-song . Their sound is built on a bedrock of bass , meditative vocal harmonies , rock-steady guitar licks and tightly syncopated percussion rhythms . It 's this eclectic mix of sounds that have afforded the band tour slots with a variety of artists over the years , including the Marley Brothers , blink-182 , G. Love &; Special Sauce , Pennywise , and N.E.R.D.
domestication: 这支乐队把潜行律动的技巧磨练得炉火纯青，他们悄无声息地进入曲子，没多久就能让所有听到的人都上瘾。他们的音乐根基在于低音的铺垫，冥想般的和声，稳如磐石的吉他旋律，还有紧密配合的打击乐节奏。正是这种多元的声音组合，让乐队多年来有机会与众多艺人同台演出，比如马利兄弟、blink-182、G. Love & Special Sauce、Pennywise 和 N.E.R.D.等。
foreignization: 乐队已经掌握了隐秘节奏的艺术——那种悄无声息地进入一首曲子并在歌曲中途吸引所有在场听众的本领。他们的音乐建立在贝斯的基石上，冥想般的和声、坚如磐石的吉他 riff 和紧密同步的打击乐节奏。正是这种声音的混搭让乐队多年来有机会与各种艺术家一起巡演，包括马利兄弟、blink-182、G. Love & Special Sauce、Pennywise 和 N.E.R.D.

source: Now and then , when mother had come home from the work she returned to after she lost dad , and I had finished with all my afterschool music activities and had not begun to crack the pile of books waiting for me on the desk , we would dance . I would have changed from my navy blue serge uniform and long-sleeved white cotton blouse into dungarees and T-shirt .
domestication: 时不时地，妈妈从她失去爸爸后重新找的工作下班回家，而我也结束了所有的课外音乐活动，还没开始对付书桌上那堆等着我的书时，我们就会跳起舞来。我早就换下了那身海军蓝的哔叽制服和长袖白棉衬衫，换上了工装裤和T恤。

source: “The more I think of it,” said the doctor, “the more I see that it will occasion endless trouble and difficulty if we put these men in possession of the boy’s real story. I am certain it will not be believed; and even if they can do nothing to him in the end, still the dragging it forward, and giving publicity to all the doubts that will be cast upon it, must interfere, materially, with your benevolent plan of rescuing him from misery.”
domestication: 医生越想越觉得，如果我们把这些实情告诉那些人，肯定麻烦不断，困难重重。这事儿他们肯定不信；就算最后对那孩子无可奈何，但是一旦事情被抖出来，所有质疑和猜测公之于众，必定会大大影响你救他脱离苦海的好心计划。
foreignization: “我越想，”医生说，“就越觉得如果我们把这些人的注意力引向男孩的真实故事，将会引起无尽的麻烦和困难。我确信这不会被相信；即使最终他们无法对他采取任何行动，但将此事公之于众，以及所有可能对其产生的怀疑，必定会严重干扰您从苦难中拯救他的善举。”

source: Efforts to save the Serengeti date back decades . In the 1950s , Bernhard Grzimek of the Frankfurt Zoological Society led a campaign to save the wildebeest migration . His seminal book and a subsequent movie of the same title , Serengeti Shall Not Die , asserted that conserving the Serengeti was a global imperative . The international outcry that followed helped win protected status for the same park corridor that will accommodate the new highway .
domestication: 保护塞伦盖蒂的努力可以追溯到几十年前。在20世纪50年代，法兰克福动物学会的伯恩哈德·格齐梅克发起了一场拯救角马大迁徙的运动。他所写的开创性著作《塞伦盖蒂不会死》，以及随后同名电影，表明保护塞伦盖蒂是全球的紧迫任务。这一事件引发的国际强烈反响，最终使得塞伦盖蒂获得了保护地位，新公路也将途经这个公园走廊。
foreignization: 拯救塞伦盖蒂的努力可以追溯到几十年前。在20世纪50年代，法兰克福动物学会的Bernhard Grzimek领导了一项拯救大迁徙的活动。他的开创性著作和随后同名电影《塞伦盖蒂不会死》，断言保护塞伦盖蒂是一项全球性的紧迫任务。之后引发的国际强烈抗议有助于使同一公园走廊获得了保护地位，而这也是新高速公路所要经过的走廊。

source: Continuing suspicion among educators as well as local politicians prodded Memphis 2000 's organizers to try to differentiate their effort from America 2000 . Memphis added two local goals -- eliminating gaps in educational opportunities among children and fostering parental involvement -- to the six national education goals America 2000 communities are supposed to adopt .
domestication: 教育界和地方政客们的持续怀疑促使孟菲斯2000的组织者们试图区分他们的努力和美国2000。为了避免和美国2000混淆，孟菲斯2000在六项国家教育目标的基础上，又增加了两个当地目标：消除儿童教育机会的差距，培养家长参与教育的意识。这些举措让孟菲斯2000有了自己独特的风格。
foreignization: 教育工作者及地方政治人物持续的怀疑促使Memphis 2000的组织者尝试使他们的努力与美国2000区分开来。 Memphis在六项全国性教育目标的基础上，新增了两个当地目标——消除儿童接受教育机会的差距和推动家长参与——这些是America 2000社区应该采用的。

source: Thanks to newly launched business education startup " Advancers " , these aspiring company owners can take their dreams and gather the knowledge to turn them into actual ventures . source: The single best resource for the ECRI call and the ongoing debate is Doug Short . This week 's article , ECRI 's Embarrassing Recession Call , describes the complete history , the critics , and how it has played out . The article highlights the most important economic indicators used in identifying recessions , showing that none have rolled over .
domestication: 要了解ECRI的这一预测和围绕它的持续争论，Doug Short是个非常好的信息来源。这周，他发表了一篇题为“ECRI令人尴尬的衰退预测”的文章，详细描述了整个事件的历史、批评者们的看法，以及这一预测最终如何演变。文章着重介绍了几个最重要的经济指标，这些指标通常被用来判断经济是否进入衰退期，并且显示出这些指标都没有出现转向下滑的迹象。

source: Nevertheless , a GAO report this year concluded that in the past few years more progress in hiring and personnel practices has been made than in the past 20 . And government pay for some positions is surprisingly competitive -- often supplemented by generous retirement and other benefits . One survey of 35 federal jobs in the Baltimore-Washington corridor in 2003 found that nearly a third of them paid better than their private-sector counterparts . For instance , the average federal senior budget analyst listed in the study earned $69,300 ; a civilian in a similar position earned $62,500 . A " Systems/Electronics Engineer VI " in government service earned $115,600 on average , while the civilian equivalent brought home $112,200 . The average salary for a medical technologist was $50,100 -- 11.6 percent more than for a nongovernment employee doing the same kind of work .
domestication: 不过，今年政府问责局的一份报告指出，近几年在招聘和人事管理方面取得的进步比过去20年还要大。而且，某些岗位的政府薪酬相当有竞争力，通常还附带优厚的退休和其他福利。2003年对巴尔的摩-华盛顿地区35个联邦职位的一项调查显示，近三分之一的岗位薪酬甚至超过了私营部门的同类职位。比如，研究中列出的联邦高级预算分析师的平均年薪为69300美元，而类似岗位的平民雇员年薪为62500美元。政府中的“系统/电子工程师VI”平均年薪为115600美元，而私营部门的同等职位为112200美元。医疗技术员的平均薪资为50100美元，比非政府岗位高出11.6%。

Nevertheless , a GAO report this year concluded that in the past few years more progress in hiring and personnel practices has been made than in the past 20 . And government pay for some positions is surprisingly competitive -- often supplemented by generous retirement and other benefits . One survey of 35 federal jobs in the Baltimore-Washington corridor in 2003 found that nearly a third of them paid better than their private-sector counterparts . For instance , the average federal senior budget analyst listed in the study earned $69,300 ; a civilian in a similar position earned $62,500 . A " Systems/Electronics Engineer VI " in government service earned $115,600 on average , while the civilian equivalent brought home $112,200 . The average salary for a medical technologist was $50,100 -- 11.6 percent more than for a nongovernment employee doing the same kind of work .

Nevertheless , a GAO report this year concluded that in the past few years more progress in hiring and personnel practices has been made than in the past 20 . And government pay for some positions is surprisingly competitive -- often supplemented by generous retirement and other benefits . One survey of 35 federal jobs in the Baltimore-Washington corridor in 2003 found that nearly a third of them paid better than their private-sector counterparts . For instance , the average federal senior budget analyst listed in the study earned $69,300 ; a civilian in a similar position earned $62,500 . A " Systems/Electronics Engineer VI " in government service earned $115,600 on average , while the civilian equivalent brought home $112,200 . The average salary for a medical technologist was $50,100 -- 11.6 percent more than for a nongovernment employee doing the same kind of work .

source: Each of his lawsuits , filed in New York State Supreme Court in recent weeks , contains contracts dated Jan. 2 , 1987 - the first day that senior players could sign such agreements under N.C.A.A. rules . However , each suit also contains copies of loan agreements for several thousand dollars that were dated at various times before the most recent football season . Each agreement carries the name of a player and a signature , purported to be that of the player . Each of the loan agreements says the money was to be repaid through the player 's earnings in professional football .
domestication: 他最近几周在纽约州最高法院提起的每一场诉讼，都包含了1987年1月2日的合同——这是老资格球员们可以按照NCAA规则签订此类协议的第一天。但是，每个案件还包含了几千美元的贷款协议副本，这些副本是在最近一个足球赛季之前的不同时间签署的。每个协议都有一个球员的名字和一个签名，据称是该球员的签名。每个贷款协议都说钱将通过球员在职业足球比赛中的收入来偿还。这其中的猫腻大家都明白，没必要多说。
foreignization: 他最近几周在纽约州最高法院提交的每一项诉讼中，都包含了日期为1987年1月2日的合同——根据NCAA规则，这是老年玩家可以签署此类协议的第一天。然而，每件诉讼还都包含了数千美元的贷款协议副本，这些贷款协议都是在最近一个橄榄球赛季之前的不同时间签订的。每份协议都包含一个球员的名字和一个签名，声称是该球员的签名。每份贷款协议都说这笔钱将通过球员在职业橄榄球中的收入来偿还。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Each of his lawsuits , filed in New York State Supreme Court in recent weeks , contains contracts dated Jan. 2 , 1987 - the first day that senior players could sign such agreements under N.C.A.A. rules . However , each suit also contains copies of loan agreements for several thousand dollars that were dated at various times before the most recent football season . Each agreement carries the name of a player and a signature , purported to be that of the player . Each of the loan agreements says the money was to be repaid through the player 's earnings in professional football .
他最近几周在纽约州最高法院提起的每一场诉讼，都包含了1987年1月2日的合同——这是老资格球员们可以按照NCAA规则签订此类协议的第一天。但是，每个案件还包含了几千美元的贷款协议副本，这些副本是在最近一个足球赛季之前的不同时间签署的。每个协议都有一个球员的名字和一个签名，据称是该球员的签名。每个贷款协议都说钱将通过球员在职业足球比赛中的收入来偿还。这其中的猫腻大家都明白，没必要多说。

Each of his lawsuits , filed in New York State Supreme Court in recent weeks , contains contracts dated Jan. 2 , 1987 - the first day that senior players could sign such agreements under N.C.A.A. rules . However , each suit also contains copies of loan agreements for several thousand dollars that were dated at various times before the most recent football season . Each agreement carries the name of a player and a signature , purported to be that of the player . Each of the loan agreements says the money was to be repaid through the player 's earnings in professional football .

source: Twitter is indeed an extremely powerful social media platform . The real-time factor is a major factor in that . But Facebook is in real time too , but because pretty much most FB personal pages are often closed to non-friends , Twitter definitely takes the cake when it comes to the value that it provides businesses .

source: " The idea of juxtaposing these two was to say , you 're looking in the wrong direction if you 're blaming this African American family for all your woes , " he said . We 've seen it growing up . "

source: If you had to be ' accurate ' in every suspicion you had , that would have an extremely chilling effect on both professional law enforcement and citizen vigilance against ( real ) criminal activity . Probable cause is just that -- not nearly the same standard as ' beyond a reasonable doubt ' , which is what is required for a conviction .
domestication: 如果你每次怀疑都要‘准确无误’，那无论是专业执法还是民众对真实犯罪行为的警惕都会受到极大的打击。合理怀疑就是这么个标准——远不像定罪所需的‘排除合理怀疑’那么严苛。
foreignization: 如果你在每个怀疑上都必须“准确”，这将对专业执法和公民对（真实）犯罪活动的警惕产生极其抑制的影响。合理的原因就是如此——远不是“排除合理怀疑”这样的标准，后者是定罪所要求的。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

If you had to be ' accurate ' in every suspicion you had , that would have an extremely chilling effect on both professional law enforcement and citizen vigilance against ( real ) criminal activity . Probable cause is just that -- not nearly the same standard as ' beyond a reasonable doubt ' , which is what is required for a conviction .

source: Anthony Brown ' 92 , the lieutenant governor of Maryland , recalls that HLS in the early 1990s was a place of turbulence with student sit-ins and rallies protesting the lack of diversity among HLS faculty . While Obama supported the students , and gave a now famous speech at a rally in 1990 , " Barack always had an insightful , reasoned kind of approach and advice , " says Brown . " Whenever he spoke , he left a lot of people in awe . We knew that he was going to do big things in his life , although I do n't know how many of us imagined he 'd become president . "
domestication: 马里兰州副州长安东尼·布朗回忆说，20世纪90年代初的哈佛法学院是个动荡的地方，学生们组织静坐示威和集会，抗议哈佛法学院教师队伍中缺乏多样性。当时奥巴马支持学生，并在1990年的一次集会上发表了一篇著名的演讲。布朗说：“每当他发言时，很多人都对他留下了深刻印象，我们都知道他将来会成就大事，尽管我不知道有多少人曾经想象过他会成为总统。” 布朗继续说：“巴拉克总是能提出富有洞察力和道理的建议，他给人的感觉很有气度。”
foreignization: 安东尼·布朗（Anthony Brown），马里兰州（Maryland）副州长，回忆道，20世纪90年代初期的哈佛法学院是一个动荡的地方，学生们通过静坐和集会抗议哈佛法学院教师队伍中缺乏多样性。虽然奥巴马支持学生，并在1990年的集会上发表了一篇现在著名的演讲，“巴拉克始终采取了富有洞察力、合理的方法和建议，”布朗说。“每当他说话时，他都会让很多人感到惊讶。我们知道他将在生活中做出伟大的事情，虽然我不知道我们中有多少人想象过他将成为总统。”

messages_domestication.content:

Anthony Brown ' 92 , the lieutenant governor of Maryland , recalls that HLS in the early 1990s was a place of turbulence with student sit-ins and rallies protesting the lack of diversity among HLS faculty . " Whenever he spoke , he left a lot of people in awe . We knew that he was going to do big things in his life , although I do n't know how many of us imagined he 'd become president . "

source: He tries to remember the last time he saw his wife but cannot. he remembers only the rails of the bed , the steel of them , and the humiliating smell of decay . At some point , she must have given Jess the ring . But why had she done this ? And how had Jess managed to keep this from him ? And why ? Was this a secret between the two of them ? And if so , what was the ring doing on her dresser , left out like a bit of costume jewelry ?
domestication: 他试图回忆自己最后一次见到妻子的情景，但怎么也想不起来。只记得床边的栏杆是金属的，还有腐烂的尴尬气味。一定是在某个时候，她把戒指给了杰斯。但为什么她要这么做呢？杰斯又是怎么瞒着他的呢？为什么呢？这是他们两个之间的秘密吗？如果真是这样，那么戒指为什么会被随意地放在她的梳妆台上，就像一件廉价的首饰一样？他满脑子都是疑问，却没有答案。这个谜团就像一团乱麻，让他越想越糊涂。他觉得自己好像站在一个黑暗的房间里，什么都看不清，也摸不着。
foreignization: 他试图记住自己最后一次看到妻子是什么时候，但记不起来。他只记得床的栏杆、金属的部分，以及腐烂的屈辱气味。在某个时候，她一定已经把戒指给了杰斯。但是她为什么这么做？杰斯又是如何瞒着他的？为什么？这难道是他们两个人之间的秘密？如果是这样的话，那么这枚戒指为什么会像一件服装首饰一样被随意地放在她的梳妆台上？

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

He tries to remember the last time he saw his wife but cannot. he remembers only the rails of the bed , the steel of them , and the humiliating smell of decay . At some point , she must have given Jess the ring . But why had she done this ? And how had Jess managed to keep this from him ? And why ? Was this a secret between the two of them ? And if so , what was the ring doing on her dresser , left out like a bit of costume jewelry ?

他试图回忆自己最后一次见到妻子的情景，但怎么也想不起来。只记得床边的栏杆是金属的，还有腐烂的尴尬气味。一定是在某个时候，她把戒指给了杰斯。但为什么她要这么做呢？杰斯又是怎么瞒着他的呢？为什么呢？这是他们两个之间的秘密吗？如果真是这样，那么戒指为什么会被随意地放在她的梳妆台上，就像一件廉价的首饰一样？他满脑子都是疑问，却没有答案。这个谜团就像一团乱麻，让他越想越糊涂。他觉得自己好像站在一个黑暗的房间里，什么都看不清，也摸不着。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

He tries to remember the last time he saw his wife but cannot. he remembers only the rails of the bed , the steel of them , and the humiliating smell of decay . At some point , she must have given Jess the ring . But why had she done this ? And how had Jess managed to keep this from him ? And why ? Was this a secret between the two of them ? And if so , what was the ring doing on her dresser , left out like a bit of costume jewelry ?
他试图记住自己最后一次看到妻子是什么时候，但记不起来。他只记得床的栏杆、金属的部分，以及腐烂的屈辱气味。在某个时候，她一定已经把戒指给了杰斯。但是她为什么这么做？杰斯又是如何瞒着他的？为什么？这难道是他们两个人之间的秘密？如果是这样的话，那么这枚戒指为什么会像一件服装首饰一样被随意地放在她的梳妆台上？

source: Conflict always begins with some kind of desire . Some desires are inherently wrong , such as vengeance , lust , or greed . But many desires are not wrong in and of themselves . For example , there is nothing innately wrong about desiring things like peace and quiet , a clean home , a new computer , professional success , an intimate relationship with your spouse , or respectful children .

source: The Question is , whether YOU are willing to accept the facts that are clearly there for everyone to be seen or whether YOU prefer to sacrifice honest thinking for the believe in an old book that is full of contradictions and outrageous crimes ordered by a jealous god , whose greatest fear is that people might not accept his authority and worship some of the other gods around .

source: On the national level , Tea Party Republicans ( and party leaders who fear them ) greeted Obama 's initial election by deciding that destroying him was more important than doing the best they could for the country . Will they greet his re-election as a warning to work with him toward solving problems ? One hopes so ; and one hopes that if they continue their obstreperous course their constituents will see them for what they are ; but it 's more likely that Republican House members will automatically call the sky red if Obama says it 's blue , and then try to blame him for not getting a consensus on the sky 's color .
domestication: 在全国范围内，茶党共和党人（以及害怕他们的党内领导人）对奥巴马初次当选的反应是决定摧毁他比为国家做最好的努力更重要。他们会不会把他再次当选视为与他合作以解决问题的警告呢？这很值得期望，也希望如果他们继续固执己见，他们的支持者能够看穿他们的本来面目；但更有可能的是，共和党议员会在奥巴马说天是蓝的时候自动说天是红的，然后试图怪他没有在天的颜色上达成共识。总之，这帮人可能还会继续顽固不化。
foreignization: 在国家层面上，茶党共和党人（以及害怕他们的党派领导人）迎接奥巴马最初当选的方式是决定摧毁他比为国家做最好的努力更重要。当他再次当选时，他们是否会将其视为与他合作以解决问题的警告？我希望如此；我也希望，如果他们继续其顽固的立场，他们的选民会将他们看作他们所是的那样；但更有可能的是，如果奥巴马说天是蓝色的，共和党众议院议员会自动称天是红色的，然后试图指责他没有就天的颜色达成共识。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

On the national level , Tea Party Republicans ( and party leaders who fear them ) greeted Obama 's initial election by deciding that destroying him was more important than doing the best they could for the country . Will they greet his re-election as a warning to work with him toward solving problems ? One hopes so ; and one hopes that if they continue their obstreperous course their constituents will see them for what they are ; but it 's more likely that Republican House members will automatically call the sky red if Obama says it 's blue , and then try to blame him for not getting a consensus on the sky 's color .

source: In retaliation for the sanctions , Iran vowed to block the Strait of Hormuz , vital oil transit point . Gen. Martin E. Dempsey , the chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff , said that the United States would " take action and reopen the strait , " which could be accomplished only by military means , including minesweepers , warship escorts and potentially airstrikes .
domestication: 伊朗为了报复这些制裁措施，誓言要封锁霍尔木兹海峡，这个海峡是石油运输的重要通道。参谋长联席会议主席马丁·邓普西将军表示，美国将“采取行动重新开放海峡”，而这只有通过军事手段才能实现，包括使用扫雷舰、护航战舰，甚至可能还有空袭。这说明美国不会坐视不理，如果伊朗真的要封锁海峡，美国将不惜动用武力来保持海峡的通畅。

Dempsey , the chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff , said that the United States would " take action and reopen the strait , " which could be accomplished only by military means , including minesweepers , warship escorts and potentially airstrikes .
作为对制裁的报复，伊朗誓言要封锁霍尔木兹海峡，这是一个至关重要的石油运输点。参谋长联席会议主席马丁·E·邓普西将军表示，美国将“采取行动并重新开放海峡”，这只能通过包括扫雷、军舰护航以及可能的空袭在内的军事手段来完成。

source: He was thin when he came back from Vietnam . No , not really thin , but just not the great stunning lout her loneliness had made of him . The skin on his shoulders , and where it sloped to his breast , was pale , mottled , tight . Almost transparent . He grew a beard . She put her mouth in the beard .. Her mouth against his bearded face . Deep , like a jungle . She liked that , a mouth full of hair . Then his eyes lit up and he took her face in his hands and said , so close their lips were touching , and he smiling all the time , " Wife-to-be . My unwed wife . "
domestication: 他从越南回来时瘦了不少。也不是特别瘦，只是不再像她寂寞中想象的那样壮硕了。肩膀上的皮肤，还有延伸到胸口的部分，显得苍白、斑驳、紧绷，几乎透明。他留起了胡子。她把嘴凑到他的胡子里，嘴唇贴着他长满胡子的脸，感觉就像置身丛林深处。她喜欢这种感觉，嘴里满是胡须。这时，他眼睛亮了起来，双手捧住她的脸，两人几乎唇齿相依，他一直微笑着说：“我的未婚妻，我未过门的妻子。”

source: 12 . Do I need to do anything in order to stay in my Original Medicare ? Nope . If you 're content with your Original Medicare coverage , you can sit tight as there are no changes for 2013 to consider , says CMS 's David Sayen . However , because Original Medicare does n't include a drug plan , it 's wise to review your Part D drug plans as the medicines they cover , the pharmacies they work with , and their premiums do change .
domestication: 12. 要想继续享受原有的医疗保险计划，我还需要做什么吗？根本不需要做什么。如果你对现在的医疗保险报销内容很满意，就算了，因为今年不会有变化，美国医疗保险中心的David Sayen这么说。但是，由于原有的医疗保险不包括药品计划，所以最好还是检查一下你的D部分计划，看看那些药品在计划之内，哪些药店可以使用，还有保费是否上涨。

source: If you picked the Opportunity Scholarship Program as controversial , you 're right . The OSP has been under attack ever since its initial enactment , and every yearly reauthorization has come with a fight . The Obama administration has staked out a position that " the Federal Government should focus its attention and available resources on improving the quality of public schools for all students . " Education Secretary Arne Duncan recently commented that " we remain convinced that our time and resources are best spent on reforming the public school system to benefit all students . "
domestication: 你觉得机会奖学金计划很有争议？确实如此。这项计划自从实施以来就一直受到攻击，每年再次审批都会引发一番争论。奥巴马政府已经明确表示，“联邦政府应该专注于利用现有资源改善所有学生的公立学校质量”。教育部长阿恩·邓肯最近表示：“我们仍然坚信，我们的时间和资源最好用于改革公立学校系统，让所有学生受益。” 这两句话基本上就是说，政府的注意力和资源应该放在提高公立教育水平上，而不是给私立学校贴补贴。这么做无疑会得罪那些靠着这笔钱上私立学校的学生和家长，所以每年都会有人跳出来反对。
foreignization: 如果你认为机会奖学金项目是有争议的，你是对的。自从该项目开始实施以来，它就一直受到攻击，每次年度重新授权都伴随着斗争。奥巴马政府已经表明了立场，认为“联邦政府应该专注于利用其关注和现有资源来提高所有学生的公立学校质量。”教育部长阿恩·邓肯最近评论说，“我们仍然坚信，我们的时间和资源最好花在改革公立学校系统上以造福所有学生。”

source: So what did I learn in Change11 that informed today 's tight rope performance ? What happened with this simple , opening conversation about the experience of BEING change ( with few slides , lots of whiteboards and a rather unintelligible set of artifacts for anyone who was n't there ... see here:http : **30;4833;TOOLONG ... ) ? We explored practices which help activate ourselves and those around us . How bringing our full selves to teaching and learning changes things . We benefit from ACTIVATING potential in ourselves to learn , do , engage , PRACTICE !
domestication: 所以，我从Change11中学到了什么，来帮助我应对今天的“高空走钢丝”表演呢？在刚开始的那次谈话中，我们讨论了如何体验变化（几乎没有幻灯片，只有白板和一些在场外的人难以理解的文物... 详情请看：http：**30；4833；TOOLONG...）。我们探讨了激活自己和周围人的实践方法。我们发现，当我们将自己的全部带入教学和学习中时，会发生怎样的变化。通过激活自身的潜力，我们可以更好地学习、行动、参与和实践！

source: Colic is murder on a relationship . A particular irony , that . We needed each other right at that moment , my wife and I. In retrospect , I wish I 'd had more patience . I would come home from work and my wife was wrung out from listening to it , for hours , and she needed hugs and back rubs and words of encouragement . Support ! Instead , we fought . We fought because something horrible was happening to our son and we lacked the power to stop it . We fought because we were frustrated and exhausted . We fought because we were frightened .
domestication: 婴儿的腹绞痛简直是对夫妻关系的摧残，这也真是讽刺啊。那段时间，我和妻子都需要对方的依靠。回想起来，我真希望自己能有更多的耐心。当时我下班回家，妻子已经被孩子的哭声搞得筋疲力尽了，她需要我的拥抱、按摩和鼓励的话语，需要我的支持！但我们却选择了争吵。因为我们无法阻止孩子遭受痛苦，我们感到绝望，所以才会争吵。因为我们非常沮丧和疲惫，所以才会争吵。因为我们害怕极了，所以才会争吵。
foreignization: 肠绞痛是对恋爱关系的杀手。这种讽刺特别致命，我们在那一刻需要彼此，我的妻子和我。回想起来，我希望我当时有更多的耐心。我从工作地点回家，我的妻子已经筋疲力尽，因为她花了几个小时听着孩子的哭声，她需要拥抱、背部按摩和鼓励的话语。支持！但我们却争吵了。我们争吵是因为我们儿子身上发生了可怕的事情，而我们没有能力阻止它。我们争吵是因为我们感到沮丧和精疲力竭。我们争吵是因为我们很害怕。

source: On the phone in June , one week into summer camp , he tells me he has fallen for the arts and crafts counselor , a Minnesotan with Swedish ancestry , named Anna . The only phone at camp is in the office just off the main dining room . Behind him is the dull roar and clank of a hundred children competing for a limited number of metal serving bowls of macaroni and cheese .
domestication: 六月份，我接到夏令营的电话，刚开学一周，他告诉我他爱上了一个叫安娜的美术老师，安娜是明尼苏达州人，有瑞典血统。在夏令营里，只有食堂旁边的办公室有电话，他背后是一百个孩子争夺有限的金属盘子里的通心粉和奶酪的声音，乱哄哄的，还伴随着餐具碰撞的叮当声。
foreignization: 六月的一天，夏令营已经进行了一周，他在电话里告诉我，他爱上了一个艺术和手工艺辅导员，这个辅导员是明尼苏达州人，有瑞典血统，名叫安娜。在营地里，只有办公室旁边的餐厅里有一部电话。他的背后，是一百个孩子为了争夺有限数量的金属通心粉和奶酪餐盒而喧闹和碰撞发出的沉闷轰鸣声。

On the phone in June , one week into summer camp , he tells me he has fallen for the arts and crafts counselor , a Minnesotan with Swedish ancestry , named Anna . The only phone at camp is in the office just off the main dining room . Behind him is the dull roar and clank of a hundred children competing for a limited number of metal serving bowls of macaroni and cheese .
六月份，我接到夏令营的电话，刚开学一周，他告诉我他爱上了一个叫安娜的美术老师，安娜是明尼苏达州人，有瑞典血统。在夏令营里，只有食堂旁边的办公室有电话，他背后是一百个孩子争夺有限的金属盘子里的通心粉和奶酪的声音，乱哄哄的，还伴随着餐具碰撞的叮当声。

Behind him is the dull roar and clank of a hundred children competing for a limited number of metal serving bowls of macaroni and cheese .
六月的一天，夏令营已经进行了一周，他在电话里告诉我，他爱上了一个艺术和手工艺辅导员，这个辅导员是明尼苏达州人，有瑞典血统，名叫安娜。在营地里，只有办公室旁边的餐厅里有一部电话。他的背后，是一百个孩子为了争夺有限数量的金属通心粉和奶酪餐盒而喧闹和碰撞发出的沉闷轰鸣声。

source: Hannah 's mother agreed to the match by letter , excusing herself from the arrangements because of distance . So even the wedding itself was prepared by Mrs. Crooker . On the day of the wedding , Hannah 's mother and two brothers came to the service in an undertaker 's hired carriage , the cheapest in town . The brothers , looking hot and surly in their Sunday suits , might well have been going to a funeral . But they behaved themselves . One would hardly know how loutish they could be at home . Hannah 's mother seemed stiff and defensive . For some reason she had to tell everyone that Hannah 's father had been a lawyer .
domestication: 汉娜的母亲在信里同意了这门亲事，因为路远，她自己就不参与筹办了。所以婚礼的事都是克鲁克太太一手操办的。婚礼那天，汉娜的母亲带着两个弟弟来了，他们坐的是镇上最便宜的一辆丧葬马车。两个弟弟穿着周日才穿的好衣服，热得满脸通红，又一脸不高兴，活像去参加葬礼似的。不过他们倒还算规矩，跟在家里那副粗鲁样儿简直判若两人。汉娜的母亲显得有点拘谨，一副戒备的样子。也不知怎么的，她见人就说汉娜的父亲是做律师的。
foreignization: 汉娜的母亲在信中同意了这门婚事，因为距离的原因，她为自己无法参与筹备表示歉意。所以就连婚礼本身也是由克鲁克夫人准备的。在婚礼当天，汉娜的母亲和两个兄弟乘坐了一辆殡仪馆租来的马车来到仪式现场，这是镇上最便宜的一辆。兄弟俩穿着周日的衣服，显得又热又不高兴，看起来就像是去参加葬礼一样。但他们还是表现得体。一个人几乎不会知道他们在家里有多粗鲁。汉娜的母亲显得僵硬而戒备。不知为何，她必须告诉每个人汉娜的父亲曾是一名律师。

Hannah 's mother seemed stiff and defensive . For some reason she had to tell everyone that Hannah 's father had been a lawyer .

source: Here , on a visit to The Metropolitan Museum of Art , in New York City , he was so struck by a painting by Velzquez , the portrait Juan de Pareja , that his career took a major shift toward fine art . Kobayashi began studying the work of Whistler , Chase , and Sargent -- all artists also influenced by Velzquez . Subsequently , Japanese art also became an inspiration for Kobayashi , in particular the 16th- and 17th-century Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print masters , such as Hokusai , Sharaku , and Utamaro .
domestication: 在纽约市的大都会艺术博物馆里，高林一眼就看上了委拉斯开兹的画作《胡安·德·帕雷哈的肖像》，一下子就被深深吸引住了，自己的艺术之路也就此发生了重大转折。之后，他开始研究惠斯勒、切斯和萨金特等受委拉斯开兹影响的艺术家们的作品。随后，日本艺术也成为了高林的灵感来源，特别是16世纪和17世纪的日本浮世绘木刻版画大师，如葛饰北斋、铃木春信和歌川广重等人的作品。

Subsequently , Japanese art also became an inspiration for Kobayashi , in particular the 16th- and 17th-century Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print masters , such as Hokusai , Sharaku , and Utamaro .

source: I thought Mitt clearly won on points . He looked and sounded presidential , save for the overabundance of hair product . Perry , by contrast , stammered and lapsed into his habit of delivering vague platitudes and ducking any question that called for specifics -- like which climate-change-skeptical scientists he finds most compelling .
domestication: 我觉得米特在这次辩论中明显占据上风，他看起来和听起来都很有总统的气质，除了头发上有点儿过量的造型产品。相比之下，佩里结结巴巴，重犯了他经常说的模糊口号和对具体问题含糊其辞的老毛病，比如被问到他认为哪些怀疑气候变化的科学家最有说服力时，就顾左右而言他。
foreignization: 我认为Mitt很明显以分数获胜。他看起来和听起来很总统，只是头发产品过多。相比之下，Perry结巴并且陷入了他提供模糊陈词滥调并回避任何要求具体答案的问题的习惯中——比如哪些气候变化怀疑论科学家最能吸引他。

source: Through the dismal prison twilight, his new charge accompanied him by corridor and staircase, many doors clanging and locking behind them, until they came into a large, low, vaulted chamber, crowded with prisoners of both sexes. The women were seated at a long table, reading and writing, knitting, sewing, and embroidering; the men were for the most part standing behind their chairs, or lingering up and down the room.
domestication: 他身边跟着新来的犯人，穿过灰暗的监狱走廊和楼梯，一路上门户不断地砰砰关上，直到他们来到一个又大又矮的拱形房间里。这间房间里挤满了男女犯人。女犯人都坐在一张长长的桌子旁，有的读书写字，有的织毛衣，有的缝纫，还有的绣花。男犯人们大部分站在椅子后面，或是来回在房间里溜达。

source: Established in 1787 , the College of Physicians of Philadelphia is the oldest private medical society in the United States . John Morgan , founder of the Perelman School of Medicine , was also a founding member of the society . Throughout its 225 year history , the College has provided a place for both medical professionals and the general public to learn about medicine as both a science and as an art . During his two-year term as president , Dr. Goldfarb will serve as the volunteer Chairman of the Board of Trustees and oversee issues of governance for the society .
domestication: 费城医学院成立于1787年，是美国最古老的私人医学会。佩尔曼医学院的创始人约翰·摩根也是该学会的创始成员。225年来，这个学会为医学专业人士和普通大众提供了一个学习医学的平台，无论是从科学还是艺术的角度。金法伯博士在两年的任期内，将担任志愿者理事会主席，负责监督学会治理相关事务。金法伯博士的领导将带领学会继续发扬其传统，推动医学的发展和普及。
foreignization: 1787年成立的費城醫學會（College of Physicians of Philadelphia）是美国最古老的私人医疗学会。佩雷尔曼医学院的创始人约翰·摩根也是该学会的创始成员。在225年的历史中，學院为醫療專業人士和公众提供了一个学习醫學的場所，以科學和藝術來研究醫學。在他两年的任期内，戈德法伯博士将担任志愿者董事会主席，并监督学会的治理问题。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Established in 1787 , the College of Physicians of Philadelphia is the oldest private medical society in the United States . John Morgan , founder of the Perelman School of Medicine , was also a founding member of the society . Throughout its 225 year history , the College has provided a place for both medical professionals and the general public to learn about medicine as both a science and as an art . During his two-year term as president , Dr. Goldfarb will serve as the volunteer Chairman of the Board of Trustees and oversee issues of governance for the society .

source: Some refuse blood , plasma and platelets but will accept heat-treated human protein . Some will donate blood for themselves in advance whereas others believe that once it leaves the body it can not return . Some accept salvaged blood from intraoperative suction devices , and others allow blood to be withdrawn from a vein and re-transfused hours later , as long as the circuit containing the blood was never disconnected from their body .
domestication: 有些人拒绝接受血液、血浆和血小板，但会接受经过高温处理的人体蛋白质。有些人会提前为自己献血，而另一些人则认为，一旦血液离开身体，就不能再回到体内。有些人接受从手术过程中回收的血液，而另一些人则允许从静脉中抽取血液，并在几小时后重新输回体内，只要包含血液的循环系统始终没有与他们的身体断开连接。每个人的想法不同，有的连带一点儿风险都不愿意冒。
foreignization: 有些人拒绝输血、血浆和血小板，但会接受经过加热处理的人体蛋白质。有些人会提前为自己献血，而另一些人则认为一旦血液离开身体就不能再回去。有些人接受来自手术期间吸入装置的回收血液，而其他人则允许从静脉中抽取血液并在几小时后重新输注，前提是包含血液的循环系统永远不会与他们的身体断开连接。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Some will donate blood for themselves in advance whereas others believe that once it leaves the body it can not return . Some accept salvaged blood from intraoperative suction devices , and others allow blood to be withdrawn from a vein and re-transfused hours later , as long as the circuit containing the blood was never disconnected from their body .

source: Before you load up the baskets and buckets , though , follow some simple ground rules . Call before you go , and call early in the morning or after dark , because most farmers will be out in the fields working during the day . Some , however , do have answering machines which may give picking times and directions .
domestication: 在开始摘采之前，有几点要注意。出门前先打个电话确认一下，建议早上或者晚上打，最好不要在白天，因为农民通常白天都在田里忙活。不过，有些农场可能会有自动答录机，你可以通过听留言了解采摘时间和路线。
foreignization: 在你装满篮子和桶之前，还是需要遵守一些基本规则的。出发前先打电话，而且应该是早晨或傍晚打，因为大多数农民白天都会在田里工作。但是，有些农户配备了自动接听机，可能会提供采摘时间和指引。

source: They kept at this until the snow seemed to fall more brightly in one direction , a tracery of faint light in the east as day began . Out of this rode Cobb on his big mare that could plow through drifts where his Buster would valiantly flounder . He said he 'd spent the entire night keeping the herd from being blown away , had n't slept a goddamned wink . To the side of him , coming visible in the light through the falling snow , was a long semi-circle of humped shapes , snow-covered horses like a moon-scape of boulders .
domestication: 他们就这么干着，直到雪似乎在某个方向上亮了起来，东方开始透出一丝微光，仿佛白昼即将来临。就在这时，科布骑着他那匹大母马从雪中出现了，那马儿能冲过积雪，而他的另一匹马“布斯特”却只能拼命挣扎。他说自己整晚都在防着牛群被风吹散，连个盹都没打。在他旁边，透过纷纷扬扬的雪花，渐渐显现出一长排隆起的轮廓，像是月球表面的大石头，其实是覆盖着雪的马匹。

To the side of him , coming visible in the light through the falling snow , was a long semi-circle of humped shapes , snow-covered horses like a moon-scape of boulders .

source: He accompanied his conductor into a guard-room, smelling of common wine and tobacco, where certain soldiers and patriots, asleep and awake, drunk and sober, and in various neutral states between sleeping and waking, drunkenness and sobriety, were standing and lying about. The light in the guard-house, half derived from the waning oil-lamps of the night, and half from the overcast day, was in a correspondingly uncertain condition. Some registers were lying open on a desk, and an officer of a coarse, dark aspect, presided over these.
domestication: 他跟着指挥官走进一个警卫室，里面弥漫着粗糙的酒味和烟雾。房间里有一些士兵和爱国者，他们有的睡着，有的醒着，有的醉醺醺，有的清醒着，还有一些人处于半梦半醒、半醉半醒的状态。在这杂乱无章的场景中，人们或站着或躺着。警卫室里的光线来源于即将熄灭的油灯和阴云密布的天空，显得十分昏暗。桌子上散乱地放着一些登记册，一位面容粗鲁、肤色黝黑的军官坐在那里主持着一切。整个气氛看起来有些混乱，充满了无序的感觉。
foreignization: 他陪着他的指挥官进入一个值班室，里面散发着廉价的酒和烟草的气味，在那里，一些士兵和爱国者，不管是醒着还是睡着，是醉了还是清醒着，还是处在各种半睡半醒、半醉半醒的中间状态，站在或躺在那里。值班室里的光线，一部分来自夜晚即将耗尽的油灯，一部分来自阴天，同样处于不确定的状态。在一张桌子上，有几本登记册敞开着，一位面貌粗鲁、黝黑的军官主管这些。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The light in the guard-house, half derived from the waning oil-lamps of the night, and half from the overcast day, was in a correspondingly uncertain condition. Some registers were lying open on a desk, and an officer of a coarse, dark aspect, presided over these.
