source: So Moyshe Rabeynu walked along and saw one of his beloved Jews , a true , hard-working Jew , with unkempt peyes and a forked beard , standing on the korner with a pushkart and selling grapes . Moses was delighted when he saw this kinsman , and happily stood opposite him to watch how he behaved . What 's this ? Instead of a pound , he only gives three quarters . A Jew ! . . .
domestication: 摩西·拉比走着走着，看见一个自己钟爱的犹太人，一个真正的勤劳的犹太人，头发乱糟糟的，胡子分叉，站在街角，有个小推车在卖葡萄。摩西看到自己的同胞，非常高兴，高兴地站在他对面，看着他怎么做生意。看看吧，这个人竟然只给顾客三分之四斤，而不是一斤整。真是个犹太人！……
foreignization: 摩西拉比沿路走着，看到他的心爱的犹太人中有一个真正的、勤奋的犹太人，他的佩耶斯很凌乱，胡须分叉，站在街角，用手推车卖葡萄。 摩西看到这个同胞，非常高兴，开心地站在他对面，看着他如何行事。 这是怎么回事？ 不是一磅，只给了四分之三。 一个犹太人！...

source: As the lady had stated her intention of screaming, of course she would have screamed at this additional boldness, but that the exertion was rendered unnecessary by a hasty knocking at the door: which was no sooner heard, than Mr. Bumble darted, with much agility, to the wine bottles, and began dusting them with great violence: while the matron sharply demanded who was there.
domestication: 女士刚才说要叫喊，这会儿遇到这般大胆的行为，自然是要叫的。不过还没等她张口，门外就传来一阵急促的敲门声，省了她这力气。一听到敲门声，邦布尔先生灵巧地蹦到酒瓶那儿，开始卖力地擦起来；而那位夫人则厉声问道：“谁呀？”
foreignization: 正如这位女士已经表明了她要尖叫的意图，当然她会对这额外的大胆行为尖叫，但是一阵急促的敲门声使这种努力变得不必要：敲门声刚一响起，班布尔先生便敏捷地扑向酒瓶，开始用力地擦拭；而那位夫人则尖锐地询问是谁在门外。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

As the lady had stated her intention of screaming, of course she would have screamed at this additional boldness, but that the exertion was rendered unnecessary by a hasty knocking at the door: which was no sooner heard, than Mr. Bumble darted, with much agility, to the wine bottles, and began dusting them with great violence: while the matron sharply demanded who was there.

source: Erna kept telling those stories all night . He does n't beat her anymore now that she 's pregnant , she said . The doctor read him the riot act . If he ever does it again she 's going to stay with her mother until the baby is born . Her mother said she should come and live with her then , until the baby was born .
domestication: 厄尔娜整晚都在讲那些故事。她说，现在她怀孕了，他不会再打她了。医生可把他教训了一顿。要是他再敢动手，她就搬到妈妈家住，直到孩子出生。她妈妈也说，她应该搬过去住，直到孩子出生。
foreignization: 厄尔娜整晚都在讲那些故事。她说，现在她怀孕了，他不再打她了。医生给他读了《暴乱法》。如果他再这样做，她就会住在她母亲那里，直到孩子出生。她母亲说她应该那时候来和她一起住，直到孩子出生。

source: Before the yawning information-spouting chasm of the Internet , there were two ways you could get information on video games : your dubiously-trustful buddies and trade magazines . Despite being a company rag that only covered things coming out on its own consoles , Nintendo Power was one of the best of these publications for its wonderful artwork and community culture . But do n't take my word for it : Now you can parse through the first 13 years of the magazine at Archive.org .
domestication: 在互联网这个信息大喷涌的鸿沟出现之前，想了解电子游戏的信息，你只有两个途径：那些信誓旦旦却不一定靠谱的朋友们，还有就是各种游戏杂志。虽然《Nintendo Power》这本小册子只报道自家平台上的游戏，但它以精美的插画和浓厚的社区文化成为了当时最好的游戏刊物之一。不过，别光听我说，现在你可以在Archive.org上翻阅这本杂志前13年的全部内容了。
foreignization: 在互联网这个令人瞠目结舌的信息喷涌鸿沟之前，你可以通过两种方式获取视频游戏的信息：你那些不太可信的朋友和行业杂志。尽管《Nintendo Power》是一份只报道自家游戏机上即将推出的游戏的公司刊物，但它凭借出色的美术作品和社区文化成为了这些出版物中最好的之一。但不要听我一面之词：现在你可以在Archive.org上浏览该杂志前13年的内容。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Before the yawning information-spouting chasm of the Internet , there were two ways you could get information on video games : your dubiously-trustful buddies and trade magazines . Despite being a company rag that only covered things coming out on its own consoles , Nintendo Power was one of the best of these publications for its wonderful artwork and community culture . But do n't take my word for it : Now you can parse through the first 13 years of the magazine at Archive.org .

source: “But I do, and you must take my word for it. Well! If you could endure to have such a worthless fellow, and a fellow of such indifferent reputation, coming and going at odd times, I should ask that I might be permitted to come and go as a privileged person here; that I might be regarded as an useless (and I would add, if it were not for the resemblance I detected between you and me, an unornamental) piece of furniture, tolerated for its old service, and taken no notice of. I doubt if I should abuse the permission. It is a hundred to one if I should avail myself of it four times in a year. It would satisfy me, I dare say, to know that I had it.”
domestication: "我是认真的，你就当我说的是真的吧。好吧，如果你能忍受一个无用又品行可疑的家伙像我这样来去自由，那我就想请求允许我成为这里的贵宾。让我像一件破旧家具一样被容忍，仅仅因为它曾经有过用处，但现在已经没人在意了。我不确定我是否会滥用这种特权，恐怕一年到头我也不会用超过四次。但只要知道自己有这个权利，就足以让我满足了。"
foreignization: “但是我做到了，你必须相信我的话。好了！如果你能容忍这样一个无用的人，一个名声平平的人，在不固定的时间来来往往，我会请求允许我作为一个特权人来来往往；我希望被视为一件无用的（而且，如果不是因为我在你和我之间发现的相似之处，我会补充说，毫无装饰意义的）家具，被容忍其古老的服务，并不被注意。我怀疑我是否会滥用这种允许。有一百个比一的几率，我一年内只会使用它四次。知道我拥有它就足以让我满意， 我敢说。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“But I do, and you must take my word for it. Well! If you could endure to have such a worthless fellow, and a fellow of such indifferent reputation, coming and going at odd times, I should ask that I might be permitted to come and go as a privileged person here; that I might be regarded as an useless (and I would add, if it were not for the resemblance I detected between you and me, an unornamental) piece of furniture, tolerated for its old service, and taken no notice of. I doubt if I should abuse the permission. It is a hundred to one if I should avail myself of it four times in a year. It would satisfy me, I dare say, to know that I had it.”
"我是认真的，你就当我说的是真的吧。好吧，如果你能忍受一个无用又品行可疑的家伙像我这样来去自由，那我就想请求允许我成为这里的贵宾。让我像一件破旧家具一样被容忍，仅仅因为它曾经有过用处，但现在已经没人在意了。我不确定我是否会滥用这种特权，恐怕一年到头我也不会用超过四次。但只要知道自己有这个权利，就足以让我满足了。"

If you could endure to have such a worthless fellow, and a fellow of such indifferent reputation, coming and going at odd times, I should ask that I might be permitted to come and go as a privileged person here; that I might be regarded as an useless (and I would add, if it were not for the resemblance I detected between you and me, an unornamental) piece of furniture, tolerated for its old service, and taken no notice of. I doubt if I should abuse the permission. It is a hundred to one if I should avail myself of it four times in a year. It would satisfy me, I dare say, to know that I had it.”

“但是我做到了，你必须相信我的话。好了！如果你能容忍这样一个无用的人，一个名声平平的人，在不固定的时间来来往往，我会请求允许我作为一个特权人来来往往；我希望被视为一件无用的（而且，如果不是因为我在你和我之间发现的相似之处，我会补充说，毫无装饰意义的）家具，被容忍其古老的服务，并不被注意。我怀疑我是否会滥用这种允许。有一百个比一的几率，我一年内只会使用它四次。知道我拥有它就足以让我满意， 我敢说。”

source: The opened half-door was opened a little further, and secured at that angle for the time. A broad ray of light fell into the garret, and showed the workman with an unfinished shoe upon his lap, pausing in his labour. His few common tools and various scraps of leather were at his feet and on his bench. He had a white beard, raggedly cut, but not very long, a hollow face, and exceedingly bright eyes. The hollowness and thinness of his face would have caused them to look large, under his yet dark eyebrows and his confused white hair, though they had been really otherwise; but, they were naturally large, and looked unnaturally so. His yellow rags of shirt lay open at the throat, and showed his body to be withered and worn. He, and his old canvas frock, and his loose stockings, and all his poor tatters of clothes, had, in a long seclusion from direct light and air, faded down to such a dull uniformity of parchment-yellow, that it would have been hard to say which was which.
domestication: 半掩的门又推开了一些，暂时固定在那个角度。一道宽宽的光线射进阁楼，照见一个工人坐在那里，怀中放着一只未做完的鞋，停下了手里的活儿。他的几件普通工具和零零碎碎的皮革散落在脚边和工作台上。他留着一撮乱糟糟的白胡子，虽然不长，但显得凌乱；脸庞凹陷，眼睛却异常明亮。即使他的眼睛不是真的大，脸上的消瘦和颧骨突出也会让人觉得眼睛很大，何况他本来眼睛就大，看起来更加不同寻常。他那件破旧的黄色衬衣敞开着领口，露出干瘪而疲惫的身体。他身上穿着的老式帆布外套、松垮的袜子，还有所有破烂的衣服，在长期不见阳光和新鲜空气的情况下，都褪成了同样的暗黄色，几乎分不清哪是哪了。
foreignization: 半开的门又被推开了一些，并暂时固定在那个角度。一道宽阔的光线射入阁楼，照见了工人，他怀中放着一只未完成的鞋子，正停下了手里的活。他的几件普通工具和各种皮料碎片散落在脚边和工作台上。他留着凌乱但不很长的白胡子，面庞凹陷，眼睛却异常明亮。即使他的眼睛不是这样，他的面部凹陷和消瘦也会使它们在他的浓黑眉毛和凌乱的白发下显得很大；然而，它们天生就大，看起来更加不自然。他那黄色破烂的衬衫敞开着领口，显露出他干瘪而憔悴的身体。他本人、他的旧帆布外套、松垮的长袜以及所有破烂的衣服，由于长时间隔绝阳光和空气，都褪色成了几乎相同的羊皮纸般的黄色，很难分辨出哪是哪。

source: So it happened that one afternoon in late August a soldier came to sit beside her on the bench . The nighthawks were beginning to stir on their ledges , all at once , like the dark appendages of a huge , reviving organism , its mute intelligence visible in the manifold lights of its eyes . But whether those eyes were lit from within -- the hausfrau rising on tiptoe to set a match to the wick -- or whether it was the effect of the sun going down behind the Monchsberg , spilling its gold across all the windows of Salzburg , Celestine could n't tell .
domestication: 八月底的一天下午，一个士兵坐在了她的长凳上。夜鹰开始在石架上躁动，仿佛巨大生物体的黑暗触角突然苏醒，它那无声的智慧在众多眼睛般的灯光中显露无疑。可那些灯光是内部点亮的吗——就像家庭主妇踮起脚尖点燃灯芯，还是夕阳西下，躲在蒙希山后，把金光洒满了萨尔茨堡的所有窗户，塞莱斯汀也说不清。
foreignization: 所以，在八月底的一个下午，一名士兵来到长凳上坐在她旁边。夜鹰开始在它们的栖木上活动，突然间，像是一个巨大的、苏醒的有机体的黑暗附属物，它的无声智慧在其众多眼睛的光芒中可见。但那些眼睛是内部发光的——女房东踮起脚尖点燃灯芯——还是因为太阳在蒙赫斯山后落下，将金色洒满了萨尔茨堡的所有窗户，塞莱斯廷无法分辨。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

So it happened that one afternoon in late August a soldier came to sit beside her on the bench . The nighthawks were beginning to stir on their ledges , all at once , like the dark appendages of a huge , reviving organism , its mute intelligence visible in the manifold lights of its eyes . But whether those eyes were lit from within -- the hausfrau rising on tiptoe to set a match to the wick -- or whether it was the effect of the sun going down behind the Monchsberg , spilling its gold across all the windows of Salzburg , Celestine could n't tell .

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

So it happened that one afternoon in late August a soldier came to sit beside her on the bench . The nighthawks were beginning to stir on their ledges , all at once , like the dark appendages of a huge , reviving organism , its mute intelligence visible in the manifold lights of its eyes . But whether those eyes were lit from within -- the hausfrau rising on tiptoe to set a match to the wick -- or whether it was the effect of the sun going down behind the Monchsberg , spilling its gold across all the windows of Salzburg , Celestine could n't tell .
所以，在八月底的一个下午，一名士兵来到长凳上坐在她旁边。夜鹰开始在它们的栖木上活动，突然间，像是一个巨大的、苏醒的有机体的黑暗附属物，它的无声智慧在其众多眼睛的光芒中可见。但那些眼睛是内部发光的——女房东踮起脚尖点燃灯芯——还是因为太阳在蒙赫斯山后落下，将金色洒满了萨尔茨堡的所有窗户，塞莱斯廷无法分辨。

source: “The same reasons which influenced me then, will influence me now,” said Rose firmly. “If I ever owed a strict and rigid duty to her, whose goodness saved me from a life of indigence and suffering, when should I ever feel it, as I should tonight? It is a struggle,” said Rose, “but one I am proud to make; it is a pang, but one my heart shall bear.”
domestication: 当初那些影响我的理由，现在仍然存在，罗丝坚定地说。如果我曾经欠过某个人一份严格而坚定的责任，那个人是她，她的仁慈让我免于受穷和遭罪，那么我应该什么时候感受到这一点呢？现在就是那时！ 罗丝说，这是一场斗争，但我却为之自豪；这是一阵心痛，但我会带着这份疼痛度过今晚。
foreignization: “当初影响我的那些原因，现在仍然会影响我，”罗斯坚定地说。“如果我曾经对救我免于陷入贫困和痛苦的生活的人，怀有严格而固执的义务，那么我应该在什么时候感受到这种义务，如果不是今晚呢？这是一个斗争，”罗斯说，“但是我自豪地面对它；这是一个心痛，但我的心将承受它。”

source: Like her , anti-Espaol Americans do n't see the point of learning Spanish ( or , more tactfully , say they just do n't care for it ) . Well-meaning detractors say their objections are aesthetic ; although French is plenty nasal , it is Spanish that strikes them as nasal in an unpleasant way . Although German is guttural , it is Spanish that they find unpleasantly guttural . Russian sounds slurred , but it is Spanish whose slurredness bothers them . It is an irrational mindset . It 's worth " sharing " this with you , as Dame Edna might say , only because a sizable minority of Americans still have the Edmund/Asian hangup about Spanish .

source: The US Antitrust restrictions already placed on sales of Micro-soft 's Windows software do not extend to Windows 98 , a federal appeals court in Washington ruled . But Sun Micro-systems asked a US judge in San Jose , Calif. , to force changes in Windows 98 or block its release . In addition , the Justice Department and a group of states investigating Microsoft were reportedly preparing a new antitrust complaint that could interfere with this week 's planned shipment of Windows 98 to computermakers .
domestication: 美国反垄断法对微软Windows软件的销售已经有所限制，但华盛顿的一家联邦上诉法院裁定，这些限制并不适用于Windows 98。然而，Sun Microsystems却要求加利福尼亚州圣何塞的一名美国法官强迫微软修改Windows 98，或者干脆阻止其发布。此外，据报道，美国司法部和一群正在调查微软的州政府也在准备新的反垄断诉讼，这可能会影响本周Windows 98向电脑制造商的发货。

source: These two models are often conflated , and many new lenders actually have traditional sources of capital , but use the Internet as a distribution channel to issue new loans . While platforms such as LendingClub , Prosper , Peerform and CircleBack are actual marketplaces , other platforms coined as marketplace lenders , such as SoFi , Earnest and Avant , are for the most part traditional lenders using their balance sheets or similar credit facilities .
domestication: 这两者常被混为一谈，很多新贷款机构其实资金来源传统，只是利用互联网作为渠道发放新贷款。像LendingClub、Prosper、Peerform和CircleBack这样的平台，确实是真正的市场中介，而被称作市场贷款平台的SoFi、Earnest和Avant等，大体上还是传统的贷款机构，主要依靠自身资产负债表或类似的信贷工具来运作。

source: Each of his lawsuits , filed in New York State Supreme Court in recent weeks , contains contracts dated Jan. 2 , 1987 - the first day that senior players could sign such agreements under N.C.A.A. rules . However , each suit also contains copies of loan agreements for several thousand dollars that were dated at various times before the most recent football season . Each agreement carries the name of a player and a signature , purported to be that of the player . Each of the loan agreements says the money was to be repaid through the player 's earnings in professional football .
domestication: 他最近在纽约州最高法院提起的每一桩诉讼中，都包含了一份1987年1月2日签署的合同——这一天正是NCAA规则允许高级球员签订此类协议的第一天。然而，每一份诉状中还附有几张几千美元不等的贷款协议复印件，这些协议的日期都是在最近一个橄榄球赛季之前的某个时间。每份贷款协议上都写着球员的名字和签名，据称是球员本人所签。每份协议都说明这笔钱将从球员将来在职业橄榄球中的收入中偿还。

source: “In making some alterations, the workmen came upon an old dungeon, which had been, for many years, built up and forgotten. Every stone of its inner wall was covered by inscriptions which had been carved by prisoners—dates, names, complaints, and prayers. Upon a corner stone in an angle of the wall, one prisoner, who seemed to have gone to execution, had cut as his last work, three letters. They were done with some very poor instrument, and hurriedly, with an unsteady hand. At first, they were read as D. I. C.; but, on being more carefully examined, the last letter was found to be G. There was no record or legend of any prisoner with those initials, and many fruitless guesses were made what the name could have been. At length, it was suggested that the letters were not initials, but the complete word, DIG. The floor was examined very carefully under the inscription, and, in the earth beneath a stone, or tile, or some fragment of paving, were found the ashes of a paper, mingled with the ashes of a small leathern case or bag. What the unknown prisoner had written will never be read, but he had written something, and hidden it away to keep it from the gaoler.”
domestication: 工匠们在改造时发现了一个早已被人遗忘的旧地牢。这地牢很多年前就被封起来了。地牢内墙上的每一块石头都刻满了囚犯的铭文，有日期、名字、抱怨和祈祷。在一个墙角的石头上，一个似乎即将被处决的囚犯留下了他最后的作品——三个字母。这些字母是用极简陋的工具匆忙刻下的，手还抖个不停。一开始，人们读到的是D.I.C.；但仔细检查后，发现最后一个字母其实是G。没有关于这个囚犯的任何记录或传说，大家猜了好一阵子，都不知这是谁的名字。后来，有人提议说这三个字母并不是名字的首字母，而是一个完整的单词——DIG。于是，人们仔细检查了刻字下面的地面，在一块石头或瓦片下面的土里找到了一张纸的灰烬，还有一些小皮袋的残余。这位不知名的囚犯写了些什么，永远没人能知道了，但他确实写过东西，并藏了起来，不让狱卒发现。
foreignization: 在进行一些改造时，工人们发现了一个古老的地牢，这个地牢多年来已经被封堵并遗忘了。地牢的内墙上的每一块石头都刻有囚犯们雕刻的铭文——日期、名字、抱怨和祈祷。在墙角的一块角石上，一个似乎已被处决的囚犯刻下了他的最后作品，三个字母。这些字母是用非常简陋的工具匆忙刻下的，手也不稳。起初，它们被读作D. I. C.；但经过更仔细的检查后，发现最后一个字母是G。没有关于有这些首字母的囚犯的记录或传说，许多人猜测这可能是哪个名字的首字母。最终，有人建议这些字母不是首字母，而是完整的单词DIG。地板在铭文下方被仔细检查，发现在一块石头、瓷砖或某些铺地碎片下面，有一张纸的灰烬与一个小皮革袋或袋子的灰烬混在一起。这位不知名的囚犯写的内容将永远不会被读到，但他确实写了些什么，并将其藏起来以避免狱卒发现。

source: The biggest challenge against them is their balance . It 's been well-documented , it 's been talked about how many guys they play , the system in which they play in . Kyle Korver obviously is huge for them , Jeff Teague and their versatile bigs . They 've got two Tristans on their team . Guys that can guard 1-5 , that can switch out , that guard on the perimeter and guard on the post . Those are valuable assets .
domestication: 他们面临的最大挑战就是保持平衡。这一点已经广为人知了，大家也都讨论过他们场上的人数和他们的战术体系。显然，凯尔·科沃尔对他们非常重要，还有杰夫·蒂格和那些多才多艺的大个子球员。他们队里有两个特里斯坦这样的球员，能从一号位防到五号位，既能换防，又能在外线和内线防守。这些都是宝贵的财富。
foreignization: 他们面临的最大挑战是他们的平衡。这已经得到了充分的记录，也讨论过他们有多少球员上场，以及他们所采用的体系。Kyle Korver 对他们来说显然是巨大的资产，Jeff Teague 和他们的多才多艺的大个子也是如此。他们队里有两个 Tristan。这些球员能够从1号位防到5号位，可以换防，既能在外围防守也能在低位防守。这些都是宝贵的资产。

source: For now , as Mrs. Larkin plays an unmistakable waltz , each child will follow Miss Slocum 's elegant salmon-colored back , her trim ankles . Effortlessly , she demonstrates the first steps . source: Vila Hunter , 80 , has been a fixture at the Department of Veterans Affairs for 56 years -- and is n't about to leave . She came to Washington in 1942 from the family dairy farm in Wisconsin to work at the War Production Board . She went home after the war but soon returned to Washington and has been working at the VA ever since -- currently compiling dozens of statistical reports . " There 's a great deal of detail , but it 's not drudgery , " she says . " It 's a matter of providing accurate information so that everything can work properly . "
domestication: 维拉·亨特今年80岁，已经在退伍军人事务部工作了56年，她可不打算离开这个地方。1942年，她从威斯康星州的家族牛奶场来到华盛顿，在战时生产委员会工作。战争结束后，她回了家，但很快又回到华盛顿，并一直在退伍军人事务部工作至今，现在她的工作是编制几十份统计报告。她说：“这些工作虽然有很多细节，但并不乏味，这都是为了提供准确的信息，让一切顺利运行。”

source: These are the first of the saving ordinances . There are more . The temple ordinance of the initiatory includes a symbolic washing and anointing of the body . source: This is was typical 30 years ago and still is . A black man in a white neighborhood -- Staten Island -- gets harassed by the police for the nth time . He not only is n't breaking any laws or causing trouble , he might well not have a choice to be there or not -- on his way home from work , for example .
domestication: 这是一件三十年前就存在，现在还在发生的事。一个黑人住在白人的社区——斯塔滕岛，上演了老戏码，被警察骚扰。事发时，他既没有违法乱纪，也没有惹是生非，甚至可能没有选择的权利，因为他可能只是在回家的路上，比如下班回家什么的。

source: When there is a culture of secrecy within a closed group , information generated in and by those individuals can be kept within the confines of the group . This behavior may lead to public harm if a closed group keeps secret information that negatively affects other individuals who are not group members . When a public harm is a possibility , the group must install transparency so as to prevent that harm . While complete transparency might be extremely difficult , there does need to be some concession to candor and accountability . Lawyers , like many other professional groups , are commonly thought of as a closed group . We , like those in other groups , must be vigilant to maintain some transparency . In doing so , we protect and uphold the integrity of our profession while preventing harm to our clients and other citizens . This need for transparency is best illustrated through examples .
domestication: 在一个封闭的小圈子里，如果大家守口如瓶，圈子内部产生的信息就能被圈里人牢牢掌控。这种行为要是让圈外人吃了亏，那可就麻烦了。一旦有损害公众的风险，这个小圈子就得打开天窗说亮话，避免出事。虽然完全透明不太现实，但起码得有点诚意和责任感。律师行业也常被视为一个封闭的小圈子。跟其他行业一样，我们必须保持警惕，确保一定程度的透明。这样做不仅保护了我们职业的声誉，也防止了客户和其他市民受到伤害。这个透明的重要性，通过一些例子就能一目了然。
foreignization: 当封闭群体内部存在保密文化时，由这些个人生成的信息可以保持在群体的界限之内。这种行为可能导致公共危害，如果一个封闭群体保留了对非群体成员产生负面影响的秘密信息。当存在公共危害的可能性时，该群体必须建立透明度以防止这种危害。虽然完全透明可能极其困难，但确实需要在坦率和问责制方面做出一些让步。律师，像许多其他专业群体一样，通常被认为是封闭群体。我们，像其他群体中的成员一样，必须保持警惕以维持一定程度的透明度。这样做，我们保护并维护了我们职业的完整性，同时防止对我们客户和其他公民的伤害。这种对透明度的需求最好通过例子来说明。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

When there is a culture of secrecy within a closed group , information generated in and by those individuals can be kept within the confines of the group . This behavior may lead to public harm if a closed group keeps secret information that negatively affects other individuals who are not group members . When a public harm is a possibility , the group must install transparency so as to prevent that harm . While complete transparency might be extremely difficult , there does need to be some concession to candor and accountability . Lawyers , like many other professional groups , are commonly thought of as a closed group . We , like those in other groups , must be vigilant to maintain some transparency . In doing so , we protect and uphold the integrity of our profession while preventing harm to our clients and other citizens . This need for transparency is best illustrated through examples .

在一个封闭的小圈子里，如果大家守口如瓶，圈子内部产生的信息就能被圈里人牢牢掌控。这种行为要是让圈外人吃了亏，那可就麻烦了。一旦有损害公众的风险，这个小圈子就得打开天窗说亮话，避免出事。虽然完全透明不太现实，但起码得有点诚意和责任感。律师行业也常被视为一个封闭的小圈子。跟其他行业一样，我们必须保持警惕，确保一定程度的透明。这样做不仅保护了我们职业的声誉，也防止了客户和其他市民受到伤害。这个透明的重要性，通过一些例子就能一目了然。
